authors_text: Rahil Parikh,Gaspar Rochette,Carol Espy-Wilson,Shihab Shamma
title: An Empirical Analysis on the Vulnerabilities of End-to-End Speech Segregation Models
title_zh: 端到端语音分离模型漏洞的实证分析
abstract: End-to-end learning models have demonstrated a remarkable capability in performing speech segregation. Despite their wide-scope of real-world applications, little is known about the mechanisms they employ to group and consequently segregate individual speakers. Knowing that harmonicity is a critical cue for these networks to group sources, in this work, we perform a thorough investigation on ConvTasnet and DPT-Net to analyze how they perform a harmonic analysis of the input mixture. We perform ablation studies where we apply low-pass, high-pass, and band-stop filters of varying pass-bands to empirically analyze the harmonics most critical for segregation. We also investigate how these networks decide which output channel to assign to an estimated source by introducing discontinuities in synthetic mixtures. We find that end-to-end networks are highly unstable, and perform poorly when confronted with deformations which are imperceptible to humans. Replacing the encoder in these networks with a spectrogram leads to lower overall performance, but much higher stability. This work helps us to understand what information these network rely on for speech segregation, and exposes two sources of generalization-errors. It also pinpoints the encoder as the part of the network responsible for these errors, allowing for a redesign with expert knowledge or transfer learning.

abstract_zh: 端到端学习模型在执行语音分离方面表现出了卓越的能力。尽管它们在现实世界中应用广泛，但人们对它们用于分组并从而隔离单个说话者的机制知之甚少。知道谐波是这些网络对源进行分组的关键线索，在这项工作中，我们对 ConvTasnet 和 DPT-Net 进行了彻底的调查，以分析它们如何对输入混合物进行谐波分析。我们进行消融研究，应用不同通带的低通、高通和带阻滤波器来凭经验分析对隔离最关键的谐波。我们还研究了这些网络如何通过在合成混合物中引入不连续性来决定将哪个输出通道分配给估计源。我们发现端到端网络非常不稳定，并且在遇到人类无法察觉的变形时表现不佳。用频谱图替换这些网络中的编码器会降低整体性能，但稳定性会更高。这项工作帮助我们了解这些网络依赖哪些信息进行语音分离，并揭示了泛化错误的两个来源。它还将编码器精确定位为网络中对这些错误负责的部分，从而允许利用专业知识或迁移学习进行重新设计。

AI.tldr: 本文对端到端语音分离模型ConvTasnet和DPT-Net的脆弱性进行了实证分析，探讨其如何利用谐波信息进行语音分组。
AI.motivation: 尽管端到端模型在语音分离任务中表现优异，但其内部机制尤其是对谐波信息的依赖性尚未被充分理解，需揭示其脆弱性以改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过消融实验，应用不同带通滤波器分析谐波关键性；在合成混合信号中引入不连续性，研究模型对输出通道的分配逻辑。
AI.result: 发现端到端网络对人类不可感知的微小变形极度不稳定；替换为频谱图编码器虽降低性能但显著提升稳定性，定位编码器为泛化误差的主要来源。
AI.conclusion: 模型依赖编码器提取的谐波特征，其脆弱性源于编码器设计缺陷，可通过专家知识或迁移学习重构编码器以提升鲁棒性。

authors_text: Tao Chen,Yazhou Yao,Lei Zhang,Qiong Wang,Guo-Sen Xie,Fumin Shen
title: Saliency Guided Inter- and Intra-Class Relation Constraints for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督语义分割的显着性引导类间和类内关系约束
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation with only image-level labels aims to reduce annotation costs for the segmentation task. Existing approaches generally leverage class activation maps (CAMs) to locate the object regions for pseudo label generation. However, CAMs can only discover the most discriminative parts of objects, thus leading to inferior pixel-level pseudo labels. To address this issue, we propose a saliency guided Inter- and Intra-Class Relation Constrained (I$^2$CRC) framework to assist the expansion of the activated object regions in CAMs. Specifically, we propose a saliency guided class-agnostic distance module to pull the intra-category features closer by aligning features to their class prototypes. Further, we propose a class-specific distance module to push the inter-class features apart and encourage the object region to have a higher activation than the background. Besides strengthening the capability of the classification network to activate more integral object regions in CAMs, we also introduce an object guided label refinement module to take a full use of both the segmentation prediction and the initial labels for obtaining superior pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012 and COCO datasets demonstrate well the effectiveness of I$^2$CRC over other state-of-the-art counterparts. The source codes, models, and data have been made available at \url{https://github.com/NUST-Machine-Intelligence-Laboratory/I2CRC}.
summary: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation with only image-level labels aims to reduce annotation costs for the segmentation task. Existing approaches generally leverage class activation maps (CAMs) to locate the object regions for pseudo label generation. However, CAMs can only discover the most discriminative parts of objects, thus leading to inferior pixel-level pseudo labels. To address this issue, we propose a saliency guided Inter- and Intra-Class Relation Constrained (I$^2$CRC) framework to assist the expansion of the activated object regions in CAMs. Specifically, we propose a saliency guided class-agnostic distance module to pull the intra-category features closer by aligning features to their class prototypes. Further, we propose a class-specific distance module to push the inter-class features apart and encourage the object region to have a higher activation than the background. Besides strengthening the capability of the classification network to activate more integral object regions in CAMs, we also introduce an object guided label refinement module to take a full use of both the segmentation prediction and the initial labels for obtaining superior pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012 and COCO datasets demonstrate well the effectiveness of I$^2$CRC over other state-of-the-art counterparts. The source codes, models, and data have been made available at \url{https://github.com/NUST-Machine-Intelligence-Laboratory/I2CRC}.
abstract_zh: 仅具有图像级标签的弱监督语义分割旨在降低分割任务的注释成本。现有方法通常利用类激活图（CAM）来定位对象区域以生成伪标签。然而，CAM 只能发现对象最具辨别力的部分，从而导致像素级伪标签较差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个显着性引导的类间和类内关系约束（I$^2$CRC）框架来协助扩展 CAM 中的激活对象区域。具体来说，我们提出了一个显着性引导的与类别无关的距离模块，通过将特征与其类原型对齐来拉近类别内特征。此外，我们提出了一个特定于类的距离模块，以将类间特征分开，并鼓励对象区域具有比背景更高的激活度。除了增强分类网络的能力以激活 CAM 中更完整的对象区域之外，我们还引入了对象引导标签细化模块，以充分利用分割预测和初始标签来获得优质的伪标签。在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验很好地证明了 I$^2$CRC 相对于其他最先进的同行的有效性。源代码、模型和数据已在 \url{https://github.com/NUST-Machine-Intelligence-Laboratory/I2CRC} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著性引导的类间和类内关系约束框架（I²CRC），用于弱监督语义分割任务，以提升像素级伪标签的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖类别激活图（CAMs）生成伪标签，但CAMs仅能定位物体最显著部分，导致像素级伪标签效果不佳。需通过增强CAMs激活区域的完整性来改进分割结果。
AI.method: 设计显著性引导的类无关距离模块（拉近同类特征）和类特定距离模块（分离类间特征），并引入物体引导的标签优化模块，综合分割预测与初始标签生成更优伪标签。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和COCO数据集上实验表明，I²CRC优于其他先进方法，代码、模型和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: I²CRC通过优化类间类内关系约束和标签细化，有效提升了弱监督语义分割的性能，为减少标注成本提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chun-Hao P. Huang,Hongwei Yi,Markus Höschle,Matvey Safroshkin,Tsvetelina Alexiadis,Senya Polikovsky,Daniel Scharstein,Michael J. Black
title: Capturing and Inferring Dense Full-Body Human-Scene Contact
title_zh: 捕捉并推断密集的全身人体场景接触
abstract: Inferring human-scene contact (HSC) is the first step toward understanding how humans interact with their surroundings. While detecting 2D human-object interaction (HOI) and reconstructing 3D human pose and shape (HPS) have enjoyed significant progress, reasoning about 3D human-scene contact from a single image is still challenging. Existing HSC detection methods consider only a few types of predefined contact, often reduce body and scene to a small number of primitives, and even overlook image evidence. To predict human-scene contact from a single image, we address the limitations above from both data and algorithmic perspectives. We capture a new dataset called RICH for "Real scenes, Interaction, Contact and Humans." RICH contains multiview outdoor/indoor video sequences at 4K resolution, ground-truth 3D human bodies captured using markerless motion capture, 3D body scans, and high resolution 3D scene scans. A key feature of RICH is that it also contains accurate vertex-level contact labels on the body. Using RICH, we train a network that predicts dense body-scene contacts from a single RGB image. Our key insight is that regions in contact are always occluded so the network needs the ability to explore the whole image for evidence. We use a transformer to learn such non-local relationships and propose a new Body-Scene contact TRansfOrmer (BSTRO). Very few methods explore 3D contact; those that do focus on the feet only, detect foot contact as a post-processing step, or infer contact from body pose without looking at the scene. To our knowledge, BSTRO is the first method to directly estimate 3D body-scene contact from a single image. We demonstrate that BSTRO significantly outperforms the prior art. The code and dataset are available at https://rich.is.tue.mpg.de.
summary: Inferring human-scene contact (HSC) is the first step toward understanding how humans interact with their surroundings. While detecting 2D human-object interaction (HOI) and reconstructing 3D human pose and shape (HPS) have enjoyed significant progress, reasoning about 3D human-scene contact from a single image is still challenging. Existing HSC detection methods consider only a few types of predefined contact, often reduce body and scene to a small number of primitives, and even overlook image evidence. To predict human-scene contact from a single image, we address the limitations above from both data and algorithmic perspectives. We capture a new dataset called RICH for "Real scenes, Interaction, Contact and Humans." RICH contains multiview outdoor/indoor video sequences at 4K resolution, ground-truth 3D human bodies captured using markerless motion capture, 3D body scans, and high resolution 3D scene scans. A key feature of RICH is that it also contains accurate vertex-level contact labels on the body. Using RICH, we train a network that predicts dense body-scene contacts from a single RGB image. Our key insight is that regions in contact are always occluded so the network needs the ability to explore the whole image for evidence. We use a transformer to learn such non-local relationships and propose a new Body-Scene contact TRansfOrmer (BSTRO). Very few methods explore 3D contact; those that do focus on the feet only, detect foot contact as a post-processing step, or infer contact from body pose without looking at the scene. To our knowledge, BSTRO is the first method to directly estimate 3D body-scene contact from a single image. We demonstrate that BSTRO significantly outperforms the prior art. The code and dataset are available at https://rich.is.tue.mpg.de.
abstract_zh: 推断人景接触 (HSC) 是了解人类如何与周围环境互动的第一步。虽然检测 2D 人与物体交互 (HOI) 和重建 3D 人体姿势和形状 (HPS) 取得了重大进展，但从单个图像推理 3D 人景接触仍然具有挑战性。现有的 HSC 检测方法仅考虑几种类型的预定义接触，通常将身体和场景简化为少量基元，甚至忽略图像证据。为了从单个图像预测人类场景接触，我们从数据和算法的角度解决了上述局限性。我们捕获了一个名为 RICH 的新数据集，用于“真实场景、交互、接触和人类”。 RICH 包含 4K 分辨率的多视图室外/室内视频序列、使用无标记运动捕捉捕获的真实 3D 人体、3D 人体扫描和高分辨率 3D 场景扫描。 RICH 的一个关键特性是它还包含身体上准确的顶点级接触标签。使用 RICH，我们训练了一个网络，该网络可以从单个 RGB 图像中预测密集的身体场景接触。我们的主要见解是，接触的区域总是被遮挡，因此网络需要能够探索整个图像以获取证据。我们使用变压器来学习这种非局部关系，并提出了一种新的身体场景接触 TRansfOrmer (BSTRO)。很少有方法探索 3D 接触；那些只关注脚部，检测脚部接触作为后处理步骤，或者从身体姿势推断接触而无需查看场景。据我们所知，BSTRO 是第一种从单个图像直接估计 3D 身体场景接触的方法。我们证明 BSTRO 显着优于现有技术。代码和数据集可在 https://rich.is.tue.mpg.de 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从单张图像中预测密集全身人体-场景接触的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在预定义接触类型、简化人体和场景表示以及忽略图像证据方面存在局限性，导致3D人体-场景接触推理效果不佳。
AI.method: 构建了包含多视角视频、3D人体和场景扫描的RICH数据集，并设计基于Transformer的BSTRO模型，通过非局部关系学习和顶点级接触标签预测密集接触。
AI.result: BSTRO在多个指标上显著优于现有方法，实现了首个直接从单张图像估计3D全身人体-场景接触的模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解人类与环境的交互提供了新的数据和算法基础，推动了人体-场景接触分析的发展。

Very few methods explore 3D contact; those that do focus on the feet only, detect foot contact as a post-processing step, or infer contact from body pose without looking at the scene. To our knowledge, BSTRO is the first method to directly estimate 3D body-scene contact from a single image. We demonstrate that BSTRO significantly outperforms the prior art. authors_text: Baian Chen,Zhilei Chen,Xiaowei Hu,Jun Xu,Haoran Xie,Mingqiang Wei,Jing Qin
title: Dynamic Message Propagation Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测的动态消息传播网络
abstract: This paper presents a novel deep neural network framework for RGB-D salient object detection by controlling the message passing between the RGB images and depth maps on the feature level and exploring the long-range semantic contexts and geometric information on both RGB and depth features to infer salient objects. To achieve this, we formulate a dynamic message propagation (DMP) module with the graph neural networks and deformable convolutions to dynamically learn the context information and to automatically predict filter weights and affinity matrices for message propagation control. We further embed this module into a Siamese-based network to process the RGB image and depth map respectively and design a multi-level feature fusion (MFF) module to explore the cross-level information between the refined RGB and depth features. Compared with 17 state-of-the-art methods on six benchmark datasets for RGB-D salient object detection, experimental results show that our method outperforms all the others, both quantitatively and visually.
summary: This paper presents a novel deep neural network framework for RGB-D salient object detection by controlling the message passing between the RGB images and depth maps on the feature level and exploring the long-range semantic contexts and geometric information on both RGB and depth features to infer salient objects. To achieve this, we formulate a dynamic message propagation (DMP) module with the graph neural networks and deformable convolutions to dynamically learn the context information and to automatically predict filter weights and affinity matrices for message propagation control. We further embed this module into a Siamese-based network to process the RGB image and depth map respectively and design a multi-level feature fusion (MFF) module to explore the cross-level information between the refined RGB and depth features. Compared with 17 state-of-the-art methods on six benchmark datasets for RGB-D salient object detection, experimental results show that our method outperforms all the others, both quantitatively and visually.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测的新型深度神经网络框架，通过控制特征级别上 RGB 图像和深度图之间的消息传递，并探索 RGB 和深度特征的远程语义上下文和几何信息来推断显着目标。为了实现这一目标，我们使用图神经网络和可变形卷积制定动态消息传播（DMP）模块，以动态学习上下文信息并自动预测用于消息传播控制的过滤器权重和亲和力矩阵。我们进一步将该模块嵌入到基于 Siamese 的网络中，分别处理 RGB 图像和深度图，并设计一个多级特征融合（MFF）模块来探索细化的 RGB 和深度特征之间的跨级信息。与用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测的 6 个基准数据集上的 17 种最先进的方法相比，实验结果表明，我们的方法在数量和视觉上都优于所有其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态消息传播网络框架，用于RGB-D显著性目标检测，通过控制RGB图像与深度图在特征层面的消息传递，结合长期语义上下文和几何信息来推断显著对象。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在融合RGB与深度信息时未能有效捕捉跨模态的长期依赖关系和几何结构，导致显著性检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计动态消息传播模块（DMP），结合图神经网络与可变形卷积，自适应学习上下文信息并预测滤波器权重与亲和矩阵；嵌入Siamese网络分别处理RGB与深度图，并通过多级特征融合模块（MFF）挖掘跨层级信息。
AI.result: 在六个RGB-D显著性检测基准数据集上，相较17种先进方法，本文方法在定量指标和视觉效果上均表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 动态消息传播机制与多级特征融合策略有效提升了RGB-D显著性检测性能，验证了跨模态上下文建模与几何信息利用的重要性。

authors_text: Jinqiang Yu,Alexey Ignatiev,Peter J. Stuckey,Nina Narodytska,Joao Marques-Silva
title: Eliminating The Impossible, Whatever Remains Must Be True
title_zh: 排除不可能，剩下的一定是真的
abstract: The rise of AI methods to make predictions and decisions has led to a pressing need for more explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods. One common approach for XAI is to produce a post-hoc explanation, explaining why a black box ML model made a certain prediction. Formal approaches to post-hoc explanations provide succinct reasons for why a prediction was made, as well as why not another prediction was made. But these approaches assume that features are independent and uniformly distributed. While this means that "why" explanations are correct, they may be longer than required. It also means the "why not" explanations may be suspect as the counterexamples they rely on may not be meaningful. In this paper, we show how one can apply background knowledge to give more succinct "why" formal explanations, that are presumably easier to interpret by humans, and give more accurate "why not" explanations. In addition, we show how to use existing rule induction techniques to efficiently extract background information from a dataset, and also how to report which background information was used to make an explanation, allowing a human to examine it if they doubt the correctness of the explanation.
summary: The rise of AI methods to make predictions and decisions has led to a pressing need for more explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods. One common approach for XAI is to produce a post-hoc explanation, explaining why a black box ML model made a certain prediction. Formal approaches to post-hoc explanations provide succinct reasons for why a prediction was made, as well as why not another prediction was made. But these approaches assume that features are independent and uniformly distributed. While this means that "why" explanations are correct, they may be longer than required. It also means the "why not" explanations may be suspect as the counterexamples they rely on may not be meaningful. In this paper, we show how one can apply background knowledge to give more succinct "why" formal explanations, that are presumably easier to interpret by humans, and give more accurate "why not" explanations. In addition, we show how to use existing rule induction techniques to efficiently extract background information from a dataset, and also how to report which background information was used to make an explanation, allowing a human to examine it if they doubt the correctness of the explanation.
abstract_zh: 用于预测和决策的人工智能方法的兴起导致迫切需要更具可解释性的人工智能（XAI）方法。 XAI 的一种常见方法是生成事后解释，解释黑盒 ML 模型做出特定预测的原因。事后解释的正式方法提供了为什么做出预测以及为什么不做出另一个预测的简洁原因。但这些方法假设特征是独立且均匀分布的。虽然这意味着“为什么”解释是正确的，但它们可能比要求的要长。这也意味着“为什么不”的解释可能值得怀疑，因为它们所依赖的反例可能没有意义。在本文中，我们展示了如何应用背景知识来给出更简洁的“为什么”正式解释，这可能更容易被人类解释，并给出更准确的“为什么不”解释。此外，我们还展示了如何使用现有的规则归纳技术从数据集中有效地提取背景信息，以及如何报告使用哪些背景信息进行解释，以便人们在怀疑解释的正确性时可以检查它。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入背景知识改进可解释人工智能（XAI）的事后解释方法，使'为什么'和'为什么不是'的解释更简洁准确。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI事后解释方法假设特征独立且均匀分布，导致解释冗长或反例不具意义，需结合背景知识提升解释质量。
AI.method: 利用背景知识优化形式化解释，并采用规则归纳技术从数据集中提取背景信息，同时标注解释中使用的背景信息。
AI.result: 生成更简洁的'为什么'解释和更准确的'为什么不是'解释，且可追溯解释所依赖的背景信息。
AI.conclusion: 结合背景知识的解释方法提高了XAI的准确性和可解释性，支持人类对解释的验证与修正。

search_text: Eliminating The Impossible, Whatever Remains Must Be True 排除不可能，剩下的一定是真的 The rise of AI methods to make predictions and decisions has led to a pressing need for more explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) methods. One common approach for XAI is to produce a post-hoc explanation, explaining why a black box ML model made a certain prediction. Formal approaches to post-hoc explanations provide succinct reasons for why a prediction was made, as well as why not another prediction was made. But these approaches assume that features are independent and uniformly distributed. While this means that "why" explanations are correct, they may be longer than required. It also means the "why not" explanations may be suspect as the counterexamples they rely on may not be meaningful. In this paper, we show how one can apply background knowledge to give more succinct "why" formal explanations, that are presumably easier to interpret by humans, and give more accurate "why not" explanations. In addition, we show how to use existing rule induction techniques to efficiently extract background information from a dataset, and also how to report which background information was used to make an explanation, allowing a human to examine it if they doubt the correctness of the explanation. 用于预测和决策的人工智能方法的兴起导致迫切需要更具可解释性的人工智能（XAI）方法。 XAI 的一种常见方法是生成事后解释，解释黑盒 ML 模型做出特定预测的原因。事后解释的正式方法提供了为什么做出预测以及为什么不做出另一个预测的简洁原因。但这些方法假设特征是独立且均匀分布的。虽然这意味着“为什么”解释是正确的，但它们可能比要求的要长。这也意味着“为什么不”的解释可能值得怀疑，因为它们所依赖的反例可能没有意义。在本文中，我们展示了如何应用背景知识来给出更简洁的“为什么”正式解释，这可能更容易被人类解释，并给出更准确的“为什么不”解释。此外，我们还展示了如何使用现有的规则归纳技术从数据集中有效地提取背景信息，以及如何报告使用哪些背景信息进行解释，以便人们在怀疑解释的正确性时可以检查它。 本文旨在通过引入背景知识改进可解释人工智能（XAI）的事后解释方法，使'为什么'和'为什么不是'的解释更简洁准确。 Jinqiang Yu,Alexey Ignatiev,Peter J. Stuckey,Nina Narodytska,Joao Marques-Silva cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Xudong Tian,Zhizhong Zhang,Cong Wang,Wensheng Zhang,Yanyun Qu,Lizhuang Ma,Zongze Wu,Yuan Xie,Dacheng Tao
title: Variational Distillation for Multi-View Learning
title_zh: 多视图学习的变分蒸馏
abstract: Information Bottleneck (IB) based multi-view learning provides an information theoretic principle for seeking shared information contained in heterogeneous data descriptions. However, its great success is generally attributed to estimate the multivariate mutual information which is intractable when the network becomes complicated. Moreover, the representation learning tradeoff, {\it i.e.}, prediction-compression and sufficiency-consistency tradeoff, makes the IB hard to satisfy both requirements simultaneously. In this paper, we design several variational information bottlenecks to exploit two key characteristics ({\it i.e.}, sufficiency and consistency) for multi-view representation learning. Specifically, we propose a Multi-View Variational Distillation (MV$^2$D) strategy to provide a scalable, flexible and analytical solution to fitting MI by giving arbitrary input of viewpoints but without explicitly estimating it. Under rigorously theoretical guarantee, our approach enables IB to grasp the intrinsic correlation between observations and semantic labels, producing predictive and compact representations naturally. Also, our information-theoretic constraint can effectively neutralize the sensitivity to heterogeneous data by eliminating both task-irrelevant and view-specific information, preventing both tradeoffs in multiple view cases. To verify our theoretically grounded strategies, we apply our approaches to various benchmarks under three different applications. Extensive experiments to quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach against state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Information Bottleneck (IB) based multi-view learning provides an information theoretic principle for seeking shared information contained in heterogeneous data descriptions. However, its great success is generally attributed to estimate the multivariate mutual information which is intractable when the network becomes complicated. Moreover, the representation learning tradeoff, {\it i.e.}, prediction-compression and sufficiency-consistency tradeoff, makes the IB hard to satisfy both requirements simultaneously. In this paper, we design several variational information bottlenecks to exploit two key characteristics ({\it i.e.}, sufficiency and consistency) for multi-view representation learning. Specifically, we propose a Multi-View Variational Distillation (MV$^2$D) strategy to provide a scalable, flexible and analytical solution to fitting MI by giving arbitrary input of viewpoints but without explicitly estimating it. Under rigorously theoretical guarantee, our approach enables IB to grasp the intrinsic correlation between observations and semantic labels, producing predictive and compact representations naturally. Also, our information-theoretic constraint can effectively neutralize the sensitivity to heterogeneous data by eliminating both task-irrelevant and view-specific information, preventing both tradeoffs in multiple view cases. To verify our theoretically grounded strategies, we apply our approaches to various benchmarks under three different applications. Extensive experiments to quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach against state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于信息瓶颈（IB）的多视图学习为寻找异构数据描述中包含的共享信息提供了信息理论原理。然而，它的巨大成功通常归因于估计多元互信息，当网络变得复杂时，多元互信息的估计变得棘手。此外，表示学习的权衡，即预测压缩和充分性一致性权衡，使得 IB 很难同时满足这两个要求。在本文中，我们设计了几个变分信息瓶颈，以利用多视图表示学习的两个关键特征（充分性和一致性）。具体来说，我们提出了一种多视图变分蒸馏（MV$^2$D）策略，通过给出任意视点输入但不明确估计它来提供可扩展、灵活和分析的解决方案来拟合 MI。在严格的理论保证下，我们的方法使 IB 能够掌握观察结果和语义标签之间的内在相关性，自然地产生预测性和紧凑的表示。此外，我们的信息论约束可以通过消除与任务无关和特定于视图的信息来有效地消除对异构数据的敏感性，从而防止在多视图情况下进行权衡。为了验证我们的理论基础策略，我们将我们的方法应用于三种不同应用下的各种基准。大量的实验定量和定性地证明了我们的方法相对于最先进方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分蒸馏的多视角学习方法，解决信息瓶颈理论中多变量互信息估计困难及表示学习中的矛盾问题。
AI.motivation: 传统信息瓶颈方法在复杂网络中难以准确估计多变量互信息，且预测压缩与充分性一致性之间的权衡导致无法同时满足要求。
AI.method: 设计多视角变分蒸馏（MV²D）策略，通过变分信息瓶颈利用充分性与一致性特性，无需显式估计互信息即可实现可扩展的表示学习。
AI.result: 在三个不同应用场景的多个基准数据集上实验验证，证明该方法在定量和定性指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过信息论约束有效消除任务无关和视角特定信息，在多视角学习中实现了预测性与紧凑性表示的自然统一。

authors_text: Cameron Voloshin,Hoang M. Le,Swarat Chaudhuri,Yisong Yue
title: Policy Optimization with Linear Temporal Logic Constraints
title_zh: 具有线性时态逻辑约束的策略优化
abstract: We study the problem of policy optimization (PO) with linear temporal logic (LTL) constraints. The language of LTL allows flexible description of tasks that may be unnatural to encode as a scalar cost function. We consider LTL-constrained PO as a systematic framework, decoupling task specification from policy selection, and as an alternative to the standard of cost shaping. With access to a generative model, we develop a model-based approach that enjoys a sample complexity analysis for guaranteeing both task satisfaction and cost optimality (through a reduction to a reachability problem). Empirically, our algorithm can achieve strong performance even in low-sample regimes.
summary: We study the problem of policy optimization (PO) with linear temporal logic (LTL) constraints. The language of LTL allows flexible description of tasks that may be unnatural to encode as a scalar cost function. We consider LTL-constrained PO as a systematic framework, decoupling task specification from policy selection, and as an alternative to the standard of cost shaping. With access to a generative model, we develop a model-based approach that enjoys a sample complexity analysis for guaranteeing both task satisfaction and cost optimality (through a reduction to a reachability problem). Empirically, our algorithm can achieve strong performance even in low-sample regimes.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有线性时序逻辑（LTL）约束的策略优化（PO）问题。 LTL 语言允许灵活地描述可能不自然地编码为标量成本函数的任务。我们将 LTL 约束的 PO 视为一个系统框架，将任务规范与策略选择解耦，并作为成本塑造标准的替代方案。通过使用生成模型，我们开发了一种基于模型的方法，该方法可以进行样本复杂性分析，以保证任务满意度和成本最优性（通过减少可达性问题）。根据经验，我们的算法即使在低样本情况下也能实现强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究带有线性时序逻辑（LTL）约束的策略优化问题，提出一种解耦任务规范与策略选择的系统框架，并通过模型基于方法保证任务满足与成本最优。
AI.motivation: 传统策略优化依赖标量成本函数，难以灵活描述复杂任务规范。LTL语言可更自然地表达时序约束，但现有方法难以有效结合二者，需系统性框架实现解耦。
AI.method: 基于生成模型构建模型驱动方法，将LTL约束转化为可达性问题，通过样本复杂度分析保证任务满足与成本最优，无需依赖成本塑造。
AI.result: 算法在低样本场景下仍能有效满足LTL约束并实现成本优化，实验验证其性能优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出LTL约束策略优化框架，通过理论分析与实验验证，证明其在任务规范解耦与低样本效率上的优势，为复杂任务优化提供新思路。

search_text: Policy Optimization with Linear Temporal Logic Constraints 具有线性时态逻辑约束的策略优化 We study the problem of policy optimization (PO) with linear temporal logic (LTL) constraints. The language of LTL allows flexible description of tasks that may be unnatural to encode as a scalar cost function. We consider LTL-constrained PO as a systematic framework, decoupling task specification from policy selection, and as an alternative to the standard of cost shaping. With access to a generative model, we develop a model-based approach that enjoys a sample complexity analysis for guaranteeing both task satisfaction and cost optimality (through a reduction to a reachability problem). Empirically, our algorithm can achieve strong performance even in low-sample regimes. 我们研究具有线性时序逻辑（LTL）约束的策略优化（PO）问题。 LTL 语言允许灵活地描述可能不自然地编码为标量成本函数的任务。我们将 LTL 约束的 PO 视为一个系统框架，将任务规范与策略选择解耦，并作为成本塑造标准的替代方案。通过使用生成模型，我们开发了一种基于模型的方法，该方法可以进行样本复杂性分析，以保证任务满意度和成本最优性（通过减少可达性问题）。根据经验，我们的算法即使在低样本情况下也能实现强大的性能。 本文研究带有线性时序逻辑（LTL）约束的策略优化问题，提出一种解耦任务规范与策略选择的系统框架，并通过模型基于方法保证任务满足与成本最优。 Cameron Voloshin,Hoang M. Le,Swarat Chaudhuri,Yisong Yue cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Tomoharu Iwata,Atsutoshi Kumagai
title: Meta-learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection via Density Estimation in Latent Space
title_zh: 通过潜在空间中的密度估计进行分布外检测的元学习
abstract: Many neural network-based out-of-distribution (OoD) detection methods have been proposed. However, they require many training data for each target task. We propose a simple yet effective meta-learning method to detect OoD with small in-distribution data in a target task. With the proposed method, the OoD detection is performed by density estimation in a latent space. A neural network shared among all tasks is used to flexibly map instances in the original space to the latent space. The neural network is meta-learned such that the expected OoD detection performance is improved by using various tasks that are different from the target tasks. This meta-learning procedure enables us to obtain appropriate representations in the latent space for OoD detection. For density estimation, we use a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) with full covariance for each class. We can adapt the GMM parameters to in-distribution data in each task in a closed form by maximizing the likelihood. Since the closed form solution is differentiable, we can meta-learn the neural network efficiently with a stochastic gradient descent method by incorporating the solution into the meta-learning objective function. In experiments using six datasets, we demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than existing meta-learning and OoD detection methods.
summary: Many neural network-based out-of-distribution (OoD) detection methods have been proposed. However, they require many training data for each target task. We propose a simple yet effective meta-learning method to detect OoD with small in-distribution data in a target task. With the proposed method, the OoD detection is performed by density estimation in a latent space. A neural network shared among all tasks is used to flexibly map instances in the original space to the latent space. The neural network is meta-learned such that the expected OoD detection performance is improved by using various tasks that are different from the target tasks. This meta-learning procedure enables us to obtain appropriate representations in the latent space for OoD detection. For density estimation, we use a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) with full covariance for each class. We can adapt the GMM parameters to in-distribution data in each task in a closed form by maximizing the likelihood. Since the closed form solution is differentiable, we can meta-learn the neural network efficiently with a stochastic gradient descent method by incorporating the solution into the meta-learning objective function. In experiments using six datasets, we demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than existing meta-learning and OoD detection methods.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了许多基于神经网络的分布外（OoD）检测方法。然而，它们的每个目标任务都需要许多训练数据。我们提出了一种简单而有效的元学习方法，用于在目标任务中使用少量分布数据来检测 OoD。利用所提出的方法，OoD 检测是通过潜在空间中的密度估计来执行的。所有任务共享的神经网络用于灵活地将原始空间中的实例映射到潜在空间。神经网络是元学习的，通过使用与目标任务不同的各种任务来提高预期的 OoD 检测性能。这种元学习过程使我们能够在 OoD 检测的潜在空间中获得适当的表示。对于密度估计，我们使用每个类别具有完全协方差的高斯混合模型 (GMM)。我们可以通过最大化可能性，以封闭形式使 GMM 参数适应每个任务中的分布数据。由于封闭式解是可微的，我们可以通过将解合并到元学习目标函数中，使用随机梯度下降法有效地元学习神经网络。在使用六个数据集的实验中，我们证明所提出的方法比现有的元学习和 OoD 检测方法具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习和潜在空间密度估计的分布外检测方法，以减少目标任务的训练数据需求。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络分布外检测方法依赖大量目标任务训练数据，而实际场景中数据可能有限，需开发数据高效的方法。
AI.method: 使用共享神经网络将原始数据映射到潜在空间，通过元学习优化网络参数；在潜在空间中采用全协方差高斯混合模型进行密度估计，并通过闭式解更新参数以适配任务数据。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在分布外检测性能上优于现有元学习和分布外检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过元学习与潜在空间密度估计结合，可在少量目标任务数据下实现有效的分布外检测，为数据高效检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dongseok Yang,Jiho Kang,Taehei Kim,Sung-Hee Lee
title: Visual Guidance for User Placement in Avatar-Mediated Telepresence between Dissimilar Spaces
title_zh: 不同空间之间阿凡达介导的远程呈现中用户放置的视觉指导
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics, 2024
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics, 2024
abstract: Rapid advances in technology gradually realize immersive mixed-reality (MR) telepresence between distant spaces. This paper presents a novel visual guidance system for avatar-mediated telepresence, directing users to optimal placements that facilitate the clear transfer of gaze and pointing contexts through remote avatars in dissimilar spaces, where the spatial relationship between the remote avatar and the interaction targets may differ from that of the local user. Representing the spatial relationship between the user/avatar and interaction targets with angle-based interaction features, we assign recommendation scores of sampled local placements as their maximum feature similarity with remote placements. These scores are visualized as color-coded 2D sectors to inform the users of better placements for interaction with selected targets. In addition, virtual objects of the remote space are overlapped with the local space for the user to better understand the recommendations. We examine whether the proposed score measure agrees with the actual user perception of the partner's interaction context and find a score threshold for recommendation through user experiments in virtual reality (VR). A subsequent user study in VR investigates the effectiveness and perceptual overload of different combinations of visualizations. Finally, we conduct a user study in an MR telepresence scenario to evaluate the effectiveness of our method in real-world applications.
summary: Rapid advances in technology gradually realize immersive mixed-reality (MR) telepresence between distant spaces. This paper presents a novel visual guidance system for avatar-mediated telepresence, directing users to optimal placements that facilitate the clear transfer of gaze and pointing contexts through remote avatars in dissimilar spaces, where the spatial relationship between the remote avatar and the interaction targets may differ from that of the local user. Representing the spatial relationship between the user/avatar and interaction targets with angle-based interaction features, we assign recommendation scores of sampled local placements as their maximum feature similarity with remote placements. These scores are visualized as color-coded 2D sectors to inform the users of better placements for interaction with selected targets. In addition, virtual objects of the remote space are overlapped with the local space for the user to better understand the recommendations. We examine whether the proposed score measure agrees with the actual user perception of the partner's interaction context and find a score threshold for recommendation through user experiments in virtual reality (VR). A subsequent user study in VR investigates the effectiveness and perceptual overload of different combinations of visualizations. Finally, we conduct a user study in an MR telepresence scenario to evaluate the effectiveness of our method in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 技术的快速进步逐渐实现了遥远空间之间的沉浸式混合现实（MR）临场感。本文提出了一种新型视觉引导系统，用于以化身为媒介的远程呈现，引导用户到达最佳位置，以促进通过不同空间中的远程化身清晰地转移凝视和指向上下文，其中远程化身和交互目标之间的空间关系可能与本地用户不同。使用基于角度的交互特征来表示用户/化身和交互目标之间的空间关系，我们将采样的本地放置的推荐分数指定为其与远程放置的最大特征相似度。这些分数被可视化为颜色编码的 2D 扇区，以告知用户与选定目标交互的更好位置。此外，远程空间的虚拟对象与本地空间重叠，以便用户更好地理解推荐。我们检查所提出的分数测量是否与合作伙伴交互上下文的实际用户感知一致，并通过虚拟现实（VR）中的用户实验找到推荐的分数阈值。随后的 VR 用户研究调查了不同可视化组合的有效性和感知过载。最后，我们在 MR 远程呈现场景中进行了用户研究，以评估我们的方法在实际应用中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 设计一种视觉引导系统，帮助用户在异构空间中通过远程化身实现更有效的交互。
AI.motivation: 在跨空间远程临场场景中，用户与远程交互目标的空间关系差异导致视线和指向信息传递困难，需提供直观引导优化交互体验。
AI.method: 基于角度特征计算本地位置与远程目标的匹配度，生成颜色编码的2D扇区可视化指引；叠加远程空间虚拟物体辅助空间理解，并通过VR实验验证效果。
AI.result: 确定了有效评分阈值，验证了可视化指引对交互准确性提升的作用，且混合可视化方案能降低认知负荷。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在真实MR场景中显著提升了跨空间交互效率，但需平衡信息密度与用户认知负荷的矛盾。

Finally, we conduct a user study in an MR telepresence scenario to evaluate the effectiveness of our method in real-world applications. 技术的快速进步逐渐实现了遥远空间之间的沉浸式混合现实（MR）临场感。本文提出了一种新型视觉引导系统，用于以化身为媒介的远程呈现，引导用户到达最佳位置，以促进通过不同空间中的远程化身清晰地转移凝视和指向上下文，其中远程化身和交互目标之间的空间关系可能与本地用户不同。使用基于角度的交互特征来表示用户/化身和交互目标之间的空间关系，我们将采样的本地放置的推荐分数指定为其与远程放置的最大特征相似度。这些分数被可视化为颜色编码的 2D 扇区，以告知用户与选定目标交互的更好位置。此外，远程空间的虚拟对象与本地空间重叠，以便用户更好地理解推荐。我们检查所提出的分数测量是否与合作伙伴交互上下文的实际用户感知一致，并通过虚拟现实（VR）中的用户实验找到推荐的分数阈值。随后的 VR 用户研究调查了不同可视化组合的有效性和感知过载。最后，我们在 MR 远程呈现场景中进行了用户研究，以评估我们的方法在实际应用中的有效性。 设计一种视觉引导系统，帮助用户在异构空间中通过远程化身实现更有效的交互。 Dongseok Yang,Jiho Kang,Taehei Kim,Sung-Hee Lee cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Ximeng Sun,Ping Hu,Kate Saenko
title: DualCoOp: Fast Adaptation to Multi-Label Recognition with Limited Annotations
title_zh: DualCoOp：快速适应有限注释的多标签识别
abstract: Solving multi-label recognition (MLR) for images in the low-label regime is a challenging task with many real-world applications. Recent work learns an alignment between textual and visual spaces to compensate for insufficient image labels, but loses accuracy because of the limited amount of available MLR annotations. In this work, we utilize the strong alignment of textual and visual features pretrained with millions of auxiliary image-text pairs and propose Dual Context Optimization (DualCoOp) as a unified framework for partial-label MLR and zero-shot MLR. DualCoOp encodes positive and negative contexts with class names as part of the linguistic input (i.e. prompts). Since DualCoOp only introduces a very light learnable overhead upon the pretrained vision-language framework, it can quickly adapt to multi-label recognition tasks that have limited annotations and even unseen classes. Experiments on standard multi-label recognition benchmarks across two challenging low-label settings demonstrate the advantages of our approach over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Solving multi-label recognition (MLR) for images in the low-label regime is a challenging task with many real-world applications. Recent work learns an alignment between textual and visual spaces to compensate for insufficient image labels, but loses accuracy because of the limited amount of available MLR annotations. In this work, we utilize the strong alignment of textual and visual features pretrained with millions of auxiliary image-text pairs and propose Dual Context Optimization (DualCoOp) as a unified framework for partial-label MLR and zero-shot MLR. DualCoOp encodes positive and negative contexts with class names as part of the linguistic input (i.e. prompts). Since DualCoOp only introduces a very light learnable overhead upon the pretrained vision-language framework, it can quickly adapt to multi-label recognition tasks that have limited annotations and even unseen classes. Experiments on standard multi-label recognition benchmarks across two challenging low-label settings demonstrate the advantages of our approach over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 对于许多实际应用来说，解决低标签状态下图像的多标签识别（MLR）问题是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的工作学习了文本和视觉空间之间的对齐，以补偿图像标签的不足，但由于可用的 MLR 注释数量有限，因此失去了准确性。在这项工作中，我们利用数百万辅助图像文本对预训练的文本和视觉特征的强对齐，并提出双上下文优化（DualCoOp）作为部分标签 MLR 和零样本 MLR 的统一框架。 DualCoOp 使用类名对正面和负面上下文进行编码，作为语言输入（即提示）的一部分。由于 DualCoOp 仅在预训练的视觉语言框架上引入了非常轻的可学习开销，因此它可以快速适应具有有限注释甚至看不见的类的多标签识别任务。在两个具有挑战性的低标签设置中对标准多标签识别基准进行的实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 解决低标注环境下图像多标签识别的挑战，提出DualCoOp框架以提升准确率和适应性
AI.motivation: 现有方法因标注不足导致多标签识别准确率下降，需利用预训练文本-视觉对齐模型减少对大量标注的依赖
AI.method: 基于预训练视觉-语言模型，通过编码正负类上下文作为可学习提示，构建轻量级DualCoOp框架处理部分标签与零样本场景
AI.result: 在标准多标签基准测试的两种低标注设置中，DualCoOp性能优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: DualCoOp通过预训练对齐与上下文编码机制，在有限标注下有效提升多标签识别性能，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Akira Matsui,Emilio Ferrara
title: Characterizing Human Actions in the Digital Platform by Temporal Context
title_zh: 通过时间上下文表征数字平台中的人类行为
abstract: Recent advances in digital platforms generate rich, high-dimensional logs of human behavior, and machine learning models have helped social scientists explain knowledge accumulation, communication, and information diffusion. Such models, however, almost always treat behavior as sequences of actions, abstracting the inter-temporal information among actions. To close this gap, we introduce a two-scale Action-Timing Context(ATC) framework that jointly embeds each action and its time interval. ATC obtains low-dimensional representations of actions and characterizes them with inter-temporal information. We provide three applications of ATC to real-world datasets and demonstrate that the method offers a unified view of human behavior. The presented qualitative findings demonstrate that explicitly modeling inter-temporal context is essential for a comprehensive, interpretable understanding of human activity on digital platforms.
summary: Recent advances in digital platforms generate rich, high-dimensional logs of human behavior, and machine learning models have helped social scientists explain knowledge accumulation, communication, and information diffusion. Such models, however, almost always treat behavior as sequences of actions, abstracting the inter-temporal information among actions. To close this gap, we introduce a two-scale Action-Timing Context(ATC) framework that jointly embeds each action and its time interval. ATC obtains low-dimensional representations of actions and characterizes them with inter-temporal information. We provide three applications of ATC to real-world datasets and demonstrate that the method offers a unified view of human behavior. The presented qualitative findings demonstrate that explicitly modeling inter-temporal context is essential for a comprehensive, interpretable understanding of human activity on digital platforms.
abstract_zh: 数字平台的最新进展产生了丰富的、高维的人类行为日志，机器学习模型帮助社会科学家解释知识积累、交流和信息传播。然而，此类模型几乎总是将行为视为动作序列，抽象出动作之间的跨时间信息。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了两个尺度的动作计时上下文（ATC）框架，该框架共同嵌入每个动作及其时间间隔。 ATC 获得动作的低维表示，并用跨时间信息来表征它们。我们提供了 ATC 在现实世界数据集上的三种应用，并证明该方法提供了人类行为的统一视图。所提出的定性研究结果表明，明确建模跨时间背景对于全面、可解释地理解数字平台上的人类活动至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Action-Timing Context（ATC）的双尺度框架，通过结合动作及其时间间隔的低维表示，对数字平台中的人类行为进行时序上下文建模。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通常将人类行为视为动作序列，忽视了动作间的时序关联信息，导致对行为模式的理解不全面。
AI.method: 构建ATC框架，联合嵌入每个动作及其时间间隔，通过低维表示捕捉动作间的时序依赖关系，并在真实数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在三个实际数据集的应用表明，ATC方法能提供统一的人类行为视角，定性分析显示显式建模时序上下文对行为理解至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模动作间的时序上下文是实现数字平台人类行为全面、可解释分析的关键。

authors_text: Zheng Yang,Yi Zhang,Guoxuan Chi,Guidong Zhang
title: Hands-on Wireless Sensing with Wi-Fi: A Tutorial
title_zh: 使用 Wi-Fi 进行无线传感实践：教程
abstract: With the rapid development of wireless communication technology, wireless access points (AP) and internet of things (IoT) devices have been widely deployed in our surroundings. Various types of wireless signals (e.g., Wi-Fi, LoRa, LTE) are filling out our living and working spaces. Previous researches reveal the fact that radio waves are modulated by the spatial structure during the propagation process (e.g., reflection, diffraction, and scattering) and superimposed on the receiver. This observation allows us to reconstruct the surrounding environment based on received wireless signals, called "wireless sensing". Wireless sensing is an emerging technology that enables a wide range of applications, such as gesture recognition for human-computer interaction, vital signs monitoring for health care, and intrusion detection for security management. Compared with other sensing paradigms, such as vision-based and IMU-based sensing, wireless sensing solutions have unique advantages such as high coverage, pervasiveness, low cost, and robustness under adverse light and texture scenarios. Besides, wireless sensing solutions are generally lightweight in terms of both computation overhead and device size. This tutorial takes Wi-Fi sensing as an example. It introduces both the theoretical principles and the code implementation of data collection, signal processing, features extraction, and model design. In addition, this tutorial highlights state-of-the-art deep learning models (e.g., CNN, RNN, and adversarial learning models) and their applications in wireless sensing systems. We hope this tutorial will help people in other research fields to break into wireless sensing research and learn more about its theories, designs, and implementation skills, promoting prosperity in the wireless sensing research field.
summary: With the rapid development of wireless communication technology, wireless access points (AP) and internet of things (IoT) devices have been widely deployed in our surroundings. Various types of wireless signals (e.g., Wi-Fi, LoRa, LTE) are filling out our living and working spaces. Previous researches reveal the fact that radio waves are modulated by the spatial structure during the propagation process (e.g., reflection, diffraction, and scattering) and superimposed on the receiver. This observation allows us to reconstruct the surrounding environment based on received wireless signals, called "wireless sensing". Wireless sensing is an emerging technology that enables a wide range of applications, such as gesture recognition for human-computer interaction, vital signs monitoring for health care, and intrusion detection for security management. Compared with other sensing paradigms, such as vision-based and IMU-based sensing, wireless sensing solutions have unique advantages such as high coverage, pervasiveness, low cost, and robustness under adverse light and texture scenarios. Besides, wireless sensing solutions are generally lightweight in terms of both computation overhead and device size. This tutorial takes Wi-Fi sensing as an example. It introduces both the theoretical principles and the code implementation of data collection, signal processing, features extraction, and model design. In addition, this tutorial highlights state-of-the-art deep learning models (e.g., CNN, RNN, and adversarial learning models) and their applications in wireless sensing systems. We hope this tutorial will help people in other research fields to break into wireless sensing research and learn more about its theories, designs, and implementation skills, promoting prosperity in the wireless sensing research field.
abstract_zh: 随着无线通信技术的快速发展，无线接入点（AP）和物联网（IoT）设备已在我们的周围广泛部署。各种类型的无线信号（例如 Wi-Fi、LoRa、LTE）正在充斥着我们的生活和工作空间。先前的研究揭示了无线电波在传播过程中受到空间结构的调制（例如反射、衍射和散射）并叠加在接收器上的事实。这种观察使我们能够根据接收到的无线信号重建周围环境，称为“无线传感”。无线传感是一项新兴技术，可实现广泛的应用，例如用于人机交互的手势识别、用于医疗保健的生命体征监测以及用于安全管理的入侵检测。与其他传感范例（例如基于视觉和基于IMU的传感）相比，无线传感解决方案具有独特的优势，例如高覆盖率、普遍性、低成本以及在不利光线和纹理场景下的鲁棒性。此外，无线传感解决方案在计算开销和设备尺寸方面通常都是轻量级的。本教程以 Wi-Fi 传感为例。介绍了数据采集、信号处理、特征提取和模型设计的理论原理和代码实现。此外，本教程还重点介绍了最先进的深度学习模型（例如 CNN、RNN 和对抗性学习模型）及其在无线传感系统中的应用。我们希望本教程能够帮助其他研究领域的人们进入无线传感研究，更多地了解其理论、设计和实现技巧，促进无线传感研究领域的繁荣。

AI.tldr: 本文以Wi-Fi传感为例，系统介绍了无线传感的理论原理及数据采集、信号处理、特征提取和模型设计的代码实现方法。
AI.motivation: 无线传感技术凭借高覆盖性、普适性、低成本和强鲁棒性等优势，在健康监护、人机交互和安防管理等领域具有广泛应用前景。
AI.method: 通过理论讲解与代码实践相结合的方式，涵盖无线信号传播特性分析、深度学习模型（CNN/RNN/对抗学习）应用及端到端系统实现。
AI.result: 构建了完整的无线传感技术知识体系，提供了可复现的实验案例，降低了跨领域研究者进入该领域的技术门槛。

search_text: Hands-on Wireless Sensing with Wi-Fi: A Tutorial 使用 Wi-Fi 进行无线传感实践：教程 With the rapid development of wireless communication technology, wireless access points (AP) and internet of things (IoT) devices have been widely deployed in our surroundings. Various types of wireless signals (e.g., Wi-Fi, LoRa, LTE) are filling out our living and working spaces. Previous researches reveal the fact that radio waves are modulated by the spatial structure during the propagation process (e.g., reflection, diffraction, and scattering) and superimposed on the receiver. This observation allows us to reconstruct the surrounding environment based on received wireless signals, called "wireless sensing". Wireless sensing is an emerging technology that enables a wide range of applications, such as gesture recognition for human-computer interaction, vital signs monitoring for health care, and intrusion detection for security management. Compared with other sensing paradigms, such as vision-based and IMU-based sensing, wireless sensing solutions have unique advantages such as high coverage, pervasiveness, low cost, and robustness under adverse light and texture scenarios. Besides, wireless sensing solutions are generally lightweight in terms of both computation overhead and device size. This tutorial takes Wi-Fi sensing as an example. It introduces both the theoretical principles and the code implementation of data collection, signal processing, features extraction, and model design. In addition, this tutorial highlights state-of-the-art deep learning models (e.g., CNN, RNN, and adversarial learning models) and their applications in wireless sensing systems. We hope this tutorial will help people in other research fields to break into wireless sensing research and learn more about its theories, designs, and implementation skills, promoting prosperity in the wireless sensing research field. 随着无线通信技术的快速发展，无线接入点（AP）和物联网（IoT）设备已在我们的周围广泛部署。各种类型的无线信号（例如 Wi-Fi、LoRa、LTE）正在充斥着我们的生活和工作空间。先前的研究揭示了无线电波在传播过程中受到空间结构的调制（例如反射、衍射和散射）并叠加在接收器上的事实。这种观察使我们能够根据接收到的无线信号重建周围环境，称为“无线传感”。无线传感是一项新兴技术，可实现广泛的应用，例如用于人机交互的手势识别、用于医疗保健的生命体征监测以及用于安全管理的入侵检测。与其他传感范例（例如基于视觉和基于IMU的传感）相比，无线传感解决方案具有独特的优势，例如高覆盖率、普遍性、低成本以及在不利光线和纹理场景下的鲁棒性。此外，无线传感解决方案在计算开销和设备尺寸方面通常都是轻量级的。本教程以 Wi-Fi 传感为例。介绍了数据采集、信号处理、特征提取和模型设计的理论原理和代码实现。此外，本教程还重点介绍了最先进的深度学习模型（例如 CNN、RNN 和对抗性学习模型）及其在无线传感系统中的应用。我们希望本教程能够帮助其他研究领域的人们进入无线传感研究，更多地了解其理论、设计和实现技巧，促进无线传感研究领域的繁荣。 本文以Wi-Fi传感为例，系统介绍了无线传感的理论原理及数据采集、信号处理、特征提取和模型设计的代码实现方法。 Zheng Yang,Yi Zhang,Guoxuan Chi,Guidong Zhang eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NI

authors_text: Ruizhi Zhang,Qiaozi Wang,Qiming Yang,Wei Wei
title: Temporal Link Prediction via Adjusted Sigmoid Function and 2-Simplex Sructure
title_zh: 通过调整的 Sigmoid 函数和 2-Simple 结构进行时间链接预测
abstract: Temporal network link prediction is an important task in the field of network science, and has a wide range of applications in practical scenarios. Revealing the evolutionary mechanism of the network is essential for link prediction, and how to effectively utilize the historical information for temporal links and efficiently extract the high-order patterns of network structure remains a vital challenge. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel temporal link prediction model with adjusted sigmoid function and 2-simplex structure (TLPSS). The adjusted sigmoid decay mode takes the active, decay and stable states of edges into account, which properly fits the life cycle of information. Moreover, the latent matrix sequence is introduced, which is composed of simplex high-order structure, to enhance the performance of link prediction method since it is highly feasible in sparse network. Combining the life cycle of information and simplex high-order structure, the overall performance of TLPSS is achieved by satisfying the consistency of temporal and structural information in dynamic networks. Experimental results on six real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of TLPSS, and our proposed model improves the performance of link prediction by an average of 15% compared to other baseline methods.
summary: Temporal network link prediction is an important task in the field of network science, and has a wide range of applications in practical scenarios. Revealing the evolutionary mechanism of the network is essential for link prediction, and how to effectively utilize the historical information for temporal links and efficiently extract the high-order patterns of network structure remains a vital challenge. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel temporal link prediction model with adjusted sigmoid function and 2-simplex structure (TLPSS). The adjusted sigmoid decay mode takes the active, decay and stable states of edges into account, which properly fits the life cycle of information. Moreover, the latent matrix sequence is introduced, which is composed of simplex high-order structure, to enhance the performance of link prediction method since it is highly feasible in sparse network. Combining the life cycle of information and simplex high-order structure, the overall performance of TLPSS is achieved by satisfying the consistency of temporal and structural information in dynamic networks. Experimental results on six real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of TLPSS, and our proposed model improves the performance of link prediction by an average of 15% compared to other baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 时间网络链路预测是网络科学领域的一项重要任务，在实际场景中有着广泛的应用。揭示网络的演化机制对于链路预测至关重要，如何有效利用时间链路的历史信息并有效地提取网络结构的高阶模式仍然是一个至关重要的挑战。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的时间链接预测模型，具有调整后的 sigmoid 函数和 2-simplex 结构（TLPSS）。调整后的sigmoid衰减模式考虑了边缘的活跃状态、衰减状态和稳定状态，很好地契合了信息的生命周期。此外，引入了由单纯形高阶结构组成的潜在矩阵序列，以增强链路预测方法的性能，因为它在稀疏网络中具有很高的可行性。结合信息的生命周期和单纯形高阶结构，TLPSS的整体性能是通过满足动态网络中时间和结构信息的一致性来实现的。六个真实数据集上的实验结果证明了 TLPSS 的有效性，与其他基线方法相比，我们提出的模型将链路预测的性能平均提高了 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合调整的Sigmoid函数和2-单纯形结构的时间链接预测模型（TLPSS），以提升动态网络中链接预测的性能。
AI.motivation: 时间网络链接预测需有效利用历史信息并提取高阶结构模式，但现有方法在稀疏网络中难以兼顾信息生命周期与结构特征的一致性。
AI.method: 引入考虑边活跃、衰减和稳定状态的调整Sigmoid衰减模式，并通过单纯形高阶结构的潜在矩阵序列增强模型，结合信息生命周期与结构信息进行预测。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上实验表明，TLPSS相比基线方法平均提升15%的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: TLPSS通过融合信息生命周期建模与单纯形高阶结构，有效解决了动态网络链接预测中时序与结构信息一致性问题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: W. T. Hutiri,A. Y. Ding
title: Towards Trustworthy Edge Intelligence: Insights from Voice-Activated Services
title_zh: 迈向值得信赖的边缘智能：来自语音激活服务的见解
abstract: In an age of surveillance capitalism, anchoring the design of emerging smart services in trustworthiness is urgent and important. Edge Intelligence, which brings together the fields of AI and Edge computing, is a key enabling technology for smart services. Trustworthy Edge Intelligence should thus be a priority research concern. However, determining what makes Edge Intelligence trustworthy is not straight forward. This paper examines requirements for trustworthy Edge Intelligence in a concrete application scenario of voice-activated services. We contribute to deepening the understanding of trustworthiness in the emerging Edge Intelligence domain in three ways: firstly, we propose a unified framing for trustworthy Edge Intelligence that jointly considers trustworthiness attributes of AI and the IoT. Secondly, we present research outputs of a tangible case study in voice-activated services that demonstrates interdependencies between three important trustworthiness attributes: privacy, security and fairness. Thirdly, based on the empirical and analytical findings, we highlight challenges and open questions that present important future research areas for trustworthy Edge Intelligence.
summary: In an age of surveillance capitalism, anchoring the design of emerging smart services in trustworthiness is urgent and important. Edge Intelligence, which brings together the fields of AI and Edge computing, is a key enabling technology for smart services. Trustworthy Edge Intelligence should thus be a priority research concern. However, determining what makes Edge Intelligence trustworthy is not straight forward. This paper examines requirements for trustworthy Edge Intelligence in a concrete application scenario of voice-activated services. We contribute to deepening the understanding of trustworthiness in the emerging Edge Intelligence domain in three ways: firstly, we propose a unified framing for trustworthy Edge Intelligence that jointly considers trustworthiness attributes of AI and the IoT. Secondly, we present research outputs of a tangible case study in voice-activated services that demonstrates interdependencies between three important trustworthiness attributes: privacy, security and fairness. Thirdly, based on the empirical and analytical findings, we highlight challenges and open questions that present important future research areas for trustworthy Edge Intelligence.
abstract_zh: 在监视资本主义时代，将新兴智能服务的设计建立在可信赖的基础上是紧迫而重要的。边缘智能融合了人工智能和边缘计算领域，是智能服务的关键使能技术。因此，值得信赖的边缘智能应该成为优先研究问题。然而，确定边缘智能值得信赖的因素并不简单。本文研究了语音激活服务的具体应用场景中对可信边缘智能的需求。我们通过三种方式加深对新兴边缘智能领域可信度的理解：首先，我们提出了可信边缘智能的统一框架，共同考虑人工智能和物联网的可信属性。其次，我们介绍了声控服务的具体案例研究的研究成果，该研究成果证明了三个重要的可信属性之间的相互依赖性：隐私、安全和公平。第三，根据实证和分析结果，我们强调了挑战和开放问题，这些挑战和问题为值得信赖的边缘智能提供了重要的未来研究领域。

AI.tldr: 本文通过语音激活服务场景，探讨可信边缘智能的关键要求与挑战。
AI.motivation: 在监控资本主义时代，智能服务的可信性设计成为迫切需求，而边缘智能作为核心技术，其可信性标准亟待明确。
AI.method: 提出融合AI与物联网可信属性的统一框架，并通过语音激活服务案例研究，分析隐私、安全与公平性三者的相互依赖关系。
AI.result: 构建了可信边缘智能的理论框架，揭示了三类核心属性的交互影响，并指出现有研究在隐私保护与算法公平性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索跨领域可信属性的协同机制，以及动态环境下的实时可信保障技术。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索跨领域可信属性的协同机制，以及动态环境下的实时可信保障技术。

tldr: 本文通过语音激活服务场景，探讨可信边缘智能的关键要求与挑战。
motivation: 在监控资本主义时代，智能服务的可信性设计成为迫切需求，而边缘智能作为核心技术，其可信性标准亟待明确。
method: 提出融合AI与物联网可信属性的统一框架，并通过语音激活服务案例研究，分析隐私、安全与公平性三者的相互依赖关系。
result: 构建了可信边缘智能的理论框架，揭示了三类核心属性的交互影响，并指出现有研究在隐私保护与算法公平性方面的不足。
conclusion: 未来需进一步探索跨领域可信属性的协同机制，以及动态环境下的实时可信保障技术。
search_text: Towards Trustworthy Edge Intelligence: Insights from Voice-Activated Services 迈向值得信赖的边缘智能：来自语音激活服务的见解 In an age of surveillance capitalism, anchoring the design of emerging smart services in trustworthiness is urgent and important. Edge Intelligence, which brings together the fields of AI and Edge computing, is a key enabling technology for smart services. Trustworthy Edge Intelligence should thus be a priority research concern. However, determining what makes Edge Intelligence trustworthy is not straight forward. This paper examines requirements for trustworthy Edge Intelligence in a concrete application scenario of voice-activated services. We contribute to deepening the understanding of trustworthiness in the emerging Edge Intelligence domain in three ways: firstly, we propose a unified framing for trustworthy Edge Intelligence that jointly considers trustworthiness attributes of AI and the IoT. Secondly, we present research outputs of a tangible case study in voice-activated services that demonstrates interdependencies between three important trustworthiness attributes: privacy, security and fairness. Thirdly, based on the empirical and analytical findings, we highlight challenges and open questions that present important future research areas for trustworthy Edge Intelligence. 在监视资本主义时代，将新兴智能服务的设计建立在可信赖的基础上是紧迫而重要的。边缘智能融合了人工智能和边缘计算领域，是智能服务的关键使能技术。因此，值得信赖的边缘智能应该成为优先研究问题。然而，确定边缘智能值得信赖的因素并不简单。本文研究了语音激活服务的具体应用场景中对可信边缘智能的需求。我们通过三种方式加深对新兴边缘智能领域可信度的理解：首先，我们提出了可信边缘智能的统一框架，共同考虑人工智能和物联网的可信属性。其次，我们介绍了声控服务的具体案例研究的研究成果，该研究成果证明了三个重要的可信属性之间的相互依赖性：隐私、安全和公平。第三，根据实证和分析结果，我们强调了挑战和开放问题，这些挑战和问题为值得信赖的边缘智能提供了重要的未来研究领域。 本文通过语音激活服务场景，探讨可信边缘智能的关键要求与挑战。 W. T. Hutiri,A. Y. Ding eess.AS,cs.CY,cs.SD

authors_text: Ozioma Collins Oguine,Kanyifeechukwu Jane Oguine,Hashim Ibrahim Bisallah,Daniel Ofuani
title: Hybrid Facial Expression Recognition (FER2013) Model for Real-Time Emotion Classification and Prediction
title_zh: 用于实时情绪分类和预测的混合面部表情识别 (FER2013) 模型
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition is a vital research topic in most fields ranging from artificial intelligence and gaming to Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) and Psychology. This paper proposes a hybrid model for Facial Expression recognition, which comprises a Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) and Haar Cascade deep learning architectures. The objective is to classify real-time and digital facial images into one of the seven facial emotion categories considered. The DCNN employed in this research has more convolutional layers, ReLU Activation functions, and multiple kernels to enhance filtering depth and facial feature extraction. In addition, a haar cascade model was also mutually used to detect facial features in real-time images and video frames. Grayscale images from the Kaggle repository (FER-2013) and then exploited Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) computation to expedite the training and validation process. Pre-processing and data augmentation techniques are applied to improve training efficiency and classification performance. The experimental results show a significantly improved classification performance compared to state-of-the-art (SoTA) experiments and research. Also, compared to other conventional models, this paper validates that the proposed architecture is superior in classification performance with an improvement of up to 6%, totaling up to 70% accuracy, and with less execution time of 2098.8s.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition is a vital research topic in most fields ranging from artificial intelligence and gaming to Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) and Psychology. This paper proposes a hybrid model for Facial Expression recognition, which comprises a Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) and Haar Cascade deep learning architectures. The objective is to classify real-time and digital facial images into one of the seven facial emotion categories considered. The DCNN employed in this research has more convolutional layers, ReLU Activation functions, and multiple kernels to enhance filtering depth and facial feature extraction. In addition, a haar cascade model was also mutually used to detect facial features in real-time images and video frames. Grayscale images from the Kaggle repository (FER-2013) and then exploited Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) computation to expedite the training and validation process. Pre-processing and data augmentation techniques are applied to improve training efficiency and classification performance. The experimental results show a significantly improved classification performance compared to state-of-the-art (SoTA) experiments and research. Also, compared to other conventional models, this paper validates that the proposed architecture is superior in classification performance with an improvement of up to 6%, totaling up to 70% accuracy, and with less execution time of 2098.8s.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别是从人工智能和游戏到人机交互（HCI）和心理学等大多数领域的重要研究课题。本文提出了一种用于面部表情识别的混合模型，其中包括深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）和 Haar Cascade 深度学习架构。目标是将实时和数字面部图像分类为所考虑的七种面部情绪类别之一。本研究中采用的 DCNN 具有更多的卷积层、ReLU 激活函数和多个内核，以增强过滤深度和面部特征提取。此外，还相互使用haar级联模型来检测实时图像和视频帧中的面部特征。来自 Kaggle 存储库 (FER-2013) 的灰度图像，然后利用图形处理单元 (GPU) 计算来加快训练和验证过程。应用预处理和数据增强技术来提高训练效率和分类性能。实验结果表明，与最先进的 (SoTA) 实验和研究相比，分类性能显着提高。此外，与其他传统模型相比，本文验证了所提出的架构在分类性能方面具有优越性，提高了高达 6%，总共高达 70% 的准确率，并且执行时间更短为 2098.8 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）和Haar级联架构的混合模型，用于实时面部表情识别和情绪分类。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别在人工智能、游戏、人机交互等领域具有重要意义，但现有模型在实时性与分类精度上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 采用多层卷积神经网络（含ReLU激活函数）与Haar级联算法结合，利用GPU加速训练，并通过预处理和数据增强技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在FER2013数据集上分类准确率提升至70%，较现有最优方法提高6%，且执行时间缩短至2098.8秒。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型在分类精度和执行效率上优于传统方法，适用于实时情绪识别场景。

authors_text: Luca Della Libera,Cem Subakan,Mirco Ravanelli,Samuele Cornell,Frédéric Lepoutre,François Grondin
title: Resource-Efficient Separation Transformer
title_zh: 资源高效的分离变压器
abstract: Transformers have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance in speech separation. These models, however, are computationally demanding and require a lot of learnable parameters. This paper explores Transformer-based speech separation with a reduced computational cost. Our main contribution is the development of the Resource-Efficient Separation Transformer (RE-SepFormer), a self-attention-based architecture that reduces the computational burden in two ways. First, it uses non-overlapping blocks in the latent space. Second, it operates on compact latent summaries calculated from each chunk. The RE-SepFormer reaches a competitive performance on the popular WSJ0-2Mix and WHAM! datasets in both causal and non-causal settings. Remarkably, it scales significantly better than the previous Transformer-based architectures in terms of memory and inference time, making it more suitable for processing long mixtures.
summary: Transformers have recently achieved state-of-the-art performance in speech separation. These models, however, are computationally demanding and require a lot of learnable parameters. This paper explores Transformer-based speech separation with a reduced computational cost. Our main contribution is the development of the Resource-Efficient Separation Transformer (RE-SepFormer), a self-attention-based architecture that reduces the computational burden in two ways. First, it uses non-overlapping blocks in the latent space. Second, it operates on compact latent summaries calculated from each chunk. The RE-SepFormer reaches a competitive performance on the popular WSJ0-2Mix and WHAM! datasets in both causal and non-causal settings. Remarkably, it scales significantly better than the previous Transformer-based architectures in terms of memory and inference time, making it more suitable for processing long mixtures.
abstract_zh: Transformers 最近在语音分离方面取得了最先进的性能。然而，这些模型的计算要求很高，并且需要大量可学习的参数。本文探讨了基于 Transformer 的语音分离，并降低了计算成本。我们的主要贡献是开发了资源高效分离变压器（RE-SepFormer），这是一种基于自注意力的架构，可以通过两种方式减少计算负担。首先，它在潜在空间中使用不重叠的块。其次，它对从每个块计算出的紧凑潜在摘要进行操作。 RE-SepFormer 在流行的 WSJ0-2Mix 和 WHAM! 上达到了具有竞争力的性能！因果和非因果设置中的数据集。值得注意的是，它在内存和推理时间方面比之前基于 Transformer 的架构具有更好的扩展性，使其更适合处理长混合物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算效率更高的分离Transformer模型（RE-SepFormer），用于语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在语音分离中表现优异，但计算成本高且参数量大，限制了其在实际应用中的效率。
AI.method: 通过引入非重叠的潜在空间块和基于紧凑潜在摘要的分块处理机制，减少计算负担。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-2Mix和WHAM!数据集上，RE-SepFormer在因果和非因果场景下均达到竞争性性能，且在内存和推理时间上显著优于现有架构。
AI.conclusion: RE-SepFormer在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算资源需求，更适合处理长混叠语音信号。

authors_text: Lan Wu,Ki Myung Brian Lee,Cedric Le Gentil,Teresa Vidal-Calleja
title: Log-GPIS-MOP: A Unified Representation for Mapping, Odometry and Planning
title_zh: Log-GPIS-MOP：测绘、里程计和规划的统一表示
abstract: Whereas dedicated scene representations are required for each different task in conventional robotic systems, this paper demonstrates that a unified representation can be used directly for multiple key tasks. We propose the Log-Gaussian Process Implicit Surface for Mapping, Odometry and Planning (Log-GPIS-MOP): a probabilistic framework for surface reconstruction, localisation and navigation based on a unified representation. Our framework applies a logarithmic transformation to a Gaussian Process Implicit Surface (GPIS) formulation to recover a global representation that accurately captures the Euclidean distance field with gradients and, at the same time, the implicit surface. By directly estimating the distance field and its gradient through Log-GPIS inference, the proposed incremental odometry technique computes the optimal alignment of an incoming frame and fuses it globally to produce a map. Concurrently, an optimisation-based planner computes a safe collision-free path using the same Log-GPIS surface representation. We validate the proposed framework on simulated and real datasets in 2D and 3D and benchmark against the state-of-the-art approaches. Our experiments show that Log-GPIS-MOP produces competitive results in sequential odometry, surface mapping and obstacle avoidance.
summary: Whereas dedicated scene representations are required for each different task in conventional robotic systems, this paper demonstrates that a unified representation can be used directly for multiple key tasks. We propose the Log-Gaussian Process Implicit Surface for Mapping, Odometry and Planning (Log-GPIS-MOP): a probabilistic framework for surface reconstruction, localisation and navigation based on a unified representation. Our framework applies a logarithmic transformation to a Gaussian Process Implicit Surface (GPIS) formulation to recover a global representation that accurately captures the Euclidean distance field with gradients and, at the same time, the implicit surface. By directly estimating the distance field and its gradient through Log-GPIS inference, the proposed incremental odometry technique computes the optimal alignment of an incoming frame and fuses it globally to produce a map. Concurrently, an optimisation-based planner computes a safe collision-free path using the same Log-GPIS surface representation. We validate the proposed framework on simulated and real datasets in 2D and 3D and benchmark against the state-of-the-art approaches. Our experiments show that Log-GPIS-MOP produces competitive results in sequential odometry, surface mapping and obstacle avoidance.
abstract_zh: 尽管传统机器人系统中的每个不同任务都需要专用的场景表示，但本文证明了统一的表示可以直接用于多个关键任务。我们提出了用于测绘、里程计和规划的对数高斯过程隐式曲面（Log-GPIS-MOP）：一种基于统一表示的用于曲面重建、定位和导航的概率框架。我们的框架将对数变换应用于高斯过程隐式曲面 (GPIS) 公式，以恢复全局表示，该全局表示能够准确捕获带有梯度的欧几里德距离场，同时捕获隐式曲面。通过 Log-GPIS 推理直接估计距离场及其梯度，所提出的增量里程计技术计算输入帧的最佳对齐并将其全局融合以生成地图。同时，基于优化的规划器使用相同的 Log-GPIS 表面表示来计算安全的无碰撞路径。我们在 2D 和 3D 模拟和真实数据集上验证了所提出的框架，并针对最先进的方法进行了基准测试。我们的实验表明，Log-GPIS-MOP 在顺序里程计、表面测绘和避障方面产生了有竞争力的结果。

AI.motivation: 传统机器人系统需要为不同任务设计独立的场景表示，导致效率低下且难以集成。本文旨在证明统一表示可同时满足多任务需求，提升系统整体性能。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程隐式曲面（GPIS）框架，通过引入对数变换构建全局距离场表示，直接估计距离场及其梯度，实现增量里程计计算与地图融合，并基于同一表示进行避障规划。
AI.result: 在2D/3D仿真与真实数据集上验证，Log-GPIS-MOP在连续里程计、表面建图和障碍物规避任务中均达到与先进方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: Log-GPIS-MOP通过统一表示有效整合了地图构建、定位与规划功能，为机器人系统提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: Log-GPIS-MOP: A Unified Representation for Mapping, Odometry and Planning Log-GPIS-MOP：测绘、里程计和规划的统一表示 Whereas dedicated scene representations are required for each different task in conventional robotic systems, this paper demonstrates that a unified representation can be used directly for multiple key tasks. We propose the Log-Gaussian Process Implicit Surface for Mapping, Odometry and Planning (Log-GPIS-MOP): a probabilistic framework for surface reconstruction, localisation and navigation based on a unified representation. Our framework applies a logarithmic transformation to a Gaussian Process Implicit Surface (GPIS) formulation to recover a global representation that accurately captures the Euclidean distance field with gradients and, at the same time, the implicit surface. By directly estimating the distance field and its gradient through Log-GPIS inference, the proposed incremental odometry technique computes the optimal alignment of an incoming frame and fuses it globally to produce a map. Concurrently, an optimisation-based planner computes a safe collision-free path using the same Log-GPIS surface representation. We validate the proposed framework on simulated and real datasets in 2D and 3D and benchmark against the state-of-the-art approaches. Our experiments show that Log-GPIS-MOP produces competitive results in sequential odometry, surface mapping and obstacle avoidance. 尽管传统机器人系统中的每个不同任务都需要专用的场景表示，但本文证明了统一的表示可以直接用于多个关键任务。我们提出了用于测绘、里程计和规划的对数高斯过程隐式曲面（Log-GPIS-MOP）：一种基于统一表示的用于曲面重建、定位和导航的概率框架。我们的框架将对数变换应用于高斯过程隐式曲面 (GPIS) 公式，以恢复全局表示，该全局表示能够准确捕获带有梯度的欧几里德距离场，同时捕获隐式曲面。通过 Log-GPIS 推理直接估计距离场及其梯度，所提出的增量里程计技术计算输入帧的最佳对齐并将其全局融合以生成地图。同时，基于优化的规划器使用相同的 Log-GPIS 表面表示来计算安全的无碰撞路径。我们在 2D 和 3D 模拟和真实数据集上验证了所提出的框架，并针对最先进的方法进行了基准测试。我们的实验表明，Log-GPIS-MOP 在顺序里程计、表面测绘和避障方面产生了有竞争力的结果。 本文提出一种统一的Log-GPIS-MOP表示方法，用于机器人系统的地图构建、里程计和路径规划任务。 Lan Wu,Ki Myung Brian Lee,Cedric Le Gentil,Teresa Vidal-Calleja cs.RO

authors_text: Beinan Wang
title: A Parallel Implementation of Computing Mean Average Precision
title_zh: 计算平均精度的并行实现
abstract: Mean Average Precision (mAP) has been widely used for evaluating the quality of object detectors, but an efficient implementation is still absent. Current implementations can only count true positives (TP's) and false positives (FP's) for one class at a time by looping through every detection of that class sequentially. Not only are these approaches inefficient, but they are also inconvenient for reporting validation mAP during training. We propose a parallelized alternative that can process mini-batches of detected bounding boxes (DTBB's) and ground truth bounding boxes (GTBB's) as inference goes such that mAP can be instantly calculated after inference is finished. Loops and control statements in sequential implementations are replaced with extensive uses of broadcasting, masking, and indexing. All operators involved are supported by popular machine learning frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow. As a result, our implementation is much faster and can easily fit into typical training routines. A PyTorch version of our implementation is available at https://github.com/bwangca/fast-map.
summary: Mean Average Precision (mAP) has been widely used for evaluating the quality of object detectors, but an efficient implementation is still absent. Current implementations can only count true positives (TP's) and false positives (FP's) for one class at a time by looping through every detection of that class sequentially. Not only are these approaches inefficient, but they are also inconvenient for reporting validation mAP during training. We propose a parallelized alternative that can process mini-batches of detected bounding boxes (DTBB's) and ground truth bounding boxes (GTBB's) as inference goes such that mAP can be instantly calculated after inference is finished. Loops and control statements in sequential implementations are replaced with extensive uses of broadcasting, masking, and indexing. All operators involved are supported by popular machine learning frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow. As a result, our implementation is much faster and can easily fit into typical training routines. A PyTorch version of our implementation is available at https://github.com/bwangca/fast-map.
abstract_zh: 平均精度（mAP）已被广泛用于评估目标检测器的质量，但仍然缺乏有效的实现。当前的实现只能通过按顺序循环该类别的每个检测来一次计算一个类别的真阳性 (TP) 和假阳性 (FP)。这些方法不仅效率低下，而且在训练期间报告验证 mAP 也不方便。我们提出了一种并行化替代方案，可以在推理过程中处理小批量检测到的边界框 (DTBB) 和地面真实边界框 (GTBB)，以便在推理完成后可以立即计算 mAP。顺序实现中的循环和控制语句被广泛使用的广播、屏蔽和索引所取代。所有涉及的算子都受到流行的机器学习框架（例如 PyTorch 和 TensorFlow）的支持。因此，我们的实施速度要快得多，并且可以轻松适应典型的培训例程。我们实现的 PyTorch 版本可在 https://github.com/bwangca/fast-map 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算平均精度均值（mAP）的并行实现方法，用于评估目标检测器的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前计算mAP的方法效率低下，且难以在训练过程中实时报告验证mAP，因此需要一种更高效的实现方式。
AI.method: 通过使用广播、掩码和索引操作，将检测到的边界框和真实边界框的处理过程并行化，从而替代传统方法中的循环和控制语句。
AI.result: 该实现方法显著提高了计算效率，并且能够轻松集成到典型的训练流程中。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的并行计算mAP的方法在速度和易用性方面优于传统方法，适用于现代机器学习框架如PyTorch和TensorFlow。

authors_text: Yen-Cheng Liu,Chih-Yao Ma,Zsolt Kira
title: Unbiased Teacher v2: Semi-supervised Object Detection for Anchor-free and Anchor-based Detectors
title_zh: Unbiased Teacher v2：无锚检测器和基于锚检测器的半监督目标检测
abstract: With the recent development of Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SS-OD) techniques, object detectors can be improved by using a limited amount of labeled data and abundant unlabeled data. However, there are still two challenges that are not addressed: (1) there is no prior SS-OD work on anchor-free detectors, and (2) prior works are ineffective when pseudo-labeling bounding box regression. In this paper, we present Unbiased Teacher v2, which shows the generalization of SS-OD method to anchor-free detectors and also introduces Listen2Student mechanism for the unsupervised regression loss. Specifically, we first present a study examining the effectiveness of existing SS-OD methods on anchor-free detectors and find that they achieve much lower performance improvements under the semi-supervised setting. We also observe that box selection with centerness and the localization-based labeling used in anchor-free detectors cannot work well under the semi-supervised setting. On the other hand, our Listen2Student mechanism explicitly prevents misleading pseudo-labels in the training of bounding box regression; we specifically develop a novel pseudo-labeling selection mechanism based on the Teacher and Student's relative uncertainties. This idea contributes to favorable improvement in the regression branch in the semi-supervised setting. Our method, which works for both anchor-free and anchor-based methods, consistently performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional.
summary: With the recent development of Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SS-OD) techniques, object detectors can be improved by using a limited amount of labeled data and abundant unlabeled data. However, there are still two challenges that are not addressed: (1) there is no prior SS-OD work on anchor-free detectors, and (2) prior works are ineffective when pseudo-labeling bounding box regression. In this paper, we present Unbiased Teacher v2, which shows the generalization of SS-OD method to anchor-free detectors and also introduces Listen2Student mechanism for the unsupervised regression loss. Specifically, we first present a study examining the effectiveness of existing SS-OD methods on anchor-free detectors and find that they achieve much lower performance improvements under the semi-supervised setting. We also observe that box selection with centerness and the localization-based labeling used in anchor-free detectors cannot work well under the semi-supervised setting. On the other hand, our Listen2Student mechanism explicitly prevents misleading pseudo-labels in the training of bounding box regression; we specifically develop a novel pseudo-labeling selection mechanism based on the Teacher and Student's relative uncertainties. This idea contributes to favorable improvement in the regression branch in the semi-supervised setting. Our method, which works for both anchor-free and anchor-based methods, consistently performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional.
abstract_zh: 随着半监督目标检测（SS-OD）技术的最新发展，可以通过使用有限数量的标记数据和大量未标记数据来改进目标检测器。然而，仍然有两个挑战没有得到解决：(1) 之前没有关于无锚检测器的 SS-OD 工作，(2) 先前的工作在伪标记边界框回归时无效。在本文中，我们提出了 Unbiased Teacher v2，它展示了 SS-OD 方法对无锚检测器的推广，并引入了用于无监督回归损失的 Listen2Student 机制。具体来说，我们首先提出了一项研究，检验现有 SS-OD 方法在无锚检测器上的有效性，发现它们在半监督设置下实现的性能改进要低得多。我们还观察到，具有中心性的框选择和无锚检测器中使用的基于定位的标记在半监督设置下不能很好地工作。另一方面，我们的 Listen2Student 机制明确防止了边界框回归训练中误导性的伪标签；我们根据教师和学生的相对不确定性专门开发了一种新颖的伪标签选择机制。这个想法有助于半监督环境中回归分支的良好改进。我们的方法适用于无锚定方法和基于锚定方法，在 VOC、COCO 标准和 COCO 附加方法中始终表现优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Unbiased Teacher v2方法，将半监督目标检测技术扩展至无锚框检测器，并改进伪标签生成机制以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在无锚框检测器上效果不佳，且伪标签的边界框回归存在误导性，需解决锚框与无锚框检测器的通用性问题。
AI.method: 提出Listen2Student机制，基于教师-学生模型的不确定性筛选伪标签；分析无锚框检测器在半监督场景下的局限性，并设计针对性改进方案。
AI.result: 在VOC、COCO-standard和COCO-additional数据集上，该方法在锚框和无锚框检测器上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Unbiased Teacher v2通过不确定性驱动的伪标签选择机制，有效提升了半监督目标检测在锚框与无锚框检测器上的性能，具有广泛适用性。
