search_text: Unbiased Teacher v2: Semi-supervised Object Detection for Anchor-free and Anchor-based Detectors Unbiased Teacher v2：无锚检测器和基于锚检测器的半监督目标检测 With the recent development of Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SS-OD) techniques, object detectors can be improved by using a limited amount of labeled data and abundant unlabeled data. However, there are still two challenges that are not addressed: (1) there is no prior SS-OD work on anchor-free detectors, and (2) prior works are ineffective when pseudo-labeling bounding box regression. In this paper, we present Unbiased Teacher v2, which shows the generalization of SS-OD method to anchor-free detectors and also introduces Listen2Student mechanism for the unsupervised regression loss. Specifically, we first present a study examining the effectiveness of existing SS-OD methods on anchor-free detectors and find that they achieve much lower performance improvements under the semi-supervised setting. We also observe that box selection with centerness and the localization-based labeling used in anchor-free detectors cannot work well under the semi-supervised setting. On the other hand, our Listen2Student mechanism explicitly prevents misleading pseudo-labels in the training of bounding box regression; we specifically develop a novel pseudo-labeling selection mechanism based on the Teacher and Student's relative uncertainties. This idea contributes to favorable improvement in the regression branch in the semi-supervised setting. Our method, which works for both anchor-free and anchor-based methods, consistently performs favorably against the state-of-the-art methods in VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional. 随着半监督目标检测（SS-OD）技术的最新发展，可以通过使用有限数量的标记数据和大量未标记数据来改进目标检测器。然而，仍然有两个挑战没有得到解决：(1) 之前没有关于无锚检测器的 SS-OD 工作，(2) 先前的工作在伪标记边界框回归时无效。在本文中，我们提出了 Unbiased Teacher v2，它展示了 SS-OD 方法对无锚检测器的推广，并引入了用于无监督回归损失的 Listen2Student 机制。具体来说，我们首先提出了一项研究，检验现有 SS-OD 方法在无锚检测器上的有效性，发现它们在半监督设置下实现的性能改进要低得多。我们还观察到，具有中心性的框选择和无锚检测器中使用的基于定位的标记在半监督设置下不能很好地工作。另一方面，我们的 Listen2Student 机制明确防止了边界框回归训练中误导性的伪标签；我们根据教师和学生的相对不确定性专门开发了一种新颖的伪标签选择机制。这个想法有助于半监督环境中回归分支的良好改进。我们的方法适用于无锚定方法和基于锚定方法，在 VOC、COCO 标准和 COCO 附加方法中始终表现优于最先进的方法。 本文提出Unbiased Teacher v2方法，将半监督目标检测技术扩展至无锚框检测器，并改进伪标签生成机制以提升检测性能。 Yen-Cheng Liu,Chih-Yao Ma,Zsolt Kira cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Se-Wook Yoo,Seung-Woo Seo
title: Learning Multi-Task Transferable Rewards via Variational Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过变分逆强化学习学习多任务可转移奖励
abstract: Many robotic tasks are composed of a lot of temporally correlated sub-tasks in a highly complex environment. It is important to discover situational intentions and proper actions by deliberating on temporal abstractions to solve problems effectively. To understand the intention separated from changing task dynamics, we extend an empowerment-based regularization technique to situations with multiple tasks based on the framework of a generative adversarial network. Under the multitask environments with unknown dynamics, we focus on learning a reward and policy from the unlabeled expert examples. In this study, we define situational empowerment as the maximum of mutual information representing how an action conditioned on both a certain state and sub-task affects the future. Our proposed method derives the variational lower bound of the situational mutual information to optimize it. We simultaneously learn the transferable multi-task reward function and policy by adding an induced term to the objective function. By doing so, the multi-task reward function helps to learn a robust policy for environmental change. We validate the advantages of our approach on multi-task learning and multi-task transfer learning. We demonstrate our proposed method has the robustness of both randomness and changing task dynamics. Finally, we prove that our method has significantly better performance and data efficiency than existing imitation learning methods on various benchmarks.
summary: Many robotic tasks are composed of a lot of temporally correlated sub-tasks in a highly complex environment. It is important to discover situational intentions and proper actions by deliberating on temporal abstractions to solve problems effectively. To understand the intention separated from changing task dynamics, we extend an empowerment-based regularization technique to situations with multiple tasks based on the framework of a generative adversarial network. Under the multitask environments with unknown dynamics, we focus on learning a reward and policy from the unlabeled expert examples. In this study, we define situational empowerment as the maximum of mutual information representing how an action conditioned on both a certain state and sub-task affects the future. Our proposed method derives the variational lower bound of the situational mutual information to optimize it. We simultaneously learn the transferable multi-task reward function and policy by adding an induced term to the objective function. By doing so, the multi-task reward function helps to learn a robust policy for environmental change. We validate the advantages of our approach on multi-task learning and multi-task transfer learning. We demonstrate our proposed method has the robustness of both randomness and changing task dynamics. Finally, we prove that our method has significantly better performance and data efficiency than existing imitation learning methods on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 许多机器人任务是由高度复杂的环境中许多时间相关的子任务组成的。通过考虑时间抽象来有效地解决问题来发现情境意图和适当的行动非常重要。为了理解与不断变化的任务动态分离的意图，我们将基于授权的正则化技术扩展到基于生成对抗网络框架的多个任务的情况。在动态未知的多任务环境下，我们专注于从未标记的专家示例中学习奖励和策略。在本研究中，我们将情境授权定义为最大互信息，表示以特定状态和子任务为条件的行动如何影响未来。我们提出的方法推导情境互信息的变分下界以对其进行优化。我们通过向目标函数添加归纳项来同时学习可转移的多任务奖励函数和策略。通过这样做，多任务奖励函数有助于学习针对环境变化的稳健政策。我们验证了我们的方法在多任务学习和多任务迁移学习方面的优势。我们证明了我们提出的方法具有随机性和不断变化的任务动态的鲁棒性。最后，我们证明我们的方法在各种基准上比现有的模仿学习方法具有显着更好的性能和数据效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分逆强化学习的方法，用于在多任务和未知动态环境中从未标记专家示例中学习可迁移的奖励函数和策略。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以应对多任务环境下动态变化和不确定性，需通过情境意图理解和时间抽象提升策略鲁棒性与数据效率。
AI.method: 扩展赋能正则化技术，结合生成对抗网络框架，定义情境赋能为条件互信息最大值，通过变分下界优化同时学习多任务奖励函数与策略。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中验证了方法在多任务学习与迁移学习中的优越性，表现出对随机性和动态变化的鲁棒性及更高的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了多任务环境下的奖励函数学习问题，证明了其在复杂动态场景中的性能优势。

authors_text: Uğur Çoğalan,Mojtaba Bemana,Hans-Peter Seidel,Karol Myszkowski
title: Video frame interpolation for high dynamic range sequences captured with dual-exposure sensors
title_zh: 使用双曝光传感器捕获的高动态范围序列的视频帧插值
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) enables many important applications that might involve the temporal domain, such as slow motion playback, or the spatial domain, such as stop motion sequences. We are focusing on the former task, where one of the key challenges is handling high dynamic range (HDR) scenes in the presence of complex motion. To this end, we explore possible advantages of dual-exposure sensors that readily provide sharp short and blurry long exposures that are spatially registered and whose ends are temporally aligned. This way, motion blur registers temporally continuous information on the scene motion that, combined with the sharp reference, enables more precise motion sampling within a single camera shot. We demonstrate that this facilitates a more complex motion reconstruction in the VFI task, as well as HDR frame reconstruction that so far has been considered only for the originally captured frames, not in-between interpolated frames. We design a neural network trained in these tasks that clearly outperforms existing solutions. We also propose a metric for scene motion complexity that provides important insights into the performance of VFI methods at the test time.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) enables many important applications that might involve the temporal domain, such as slow motion playback, or the spatial domain, such as stop motion sequences. We are focusing on the former task, where one of the key challenges is handling high dynamic range (HDR) scenes in the presence of complex motion. To this end, we explore possible advantages of dual-exposure sensors that readily provide sharp short and blurry long exposures that are spatially registered and whose ends are temporally aligned. This way, motion blur registers temporally continuous information on the scene motion that, combined with the sharp reference, enables more precise motion sampling within a single camera shot. We demonstrate that this facilitates a more complex motion reconstruction in the VFI task, as well as HDR frame reconstruction that so far has been considered only for the originally captured frames, not in-between interpolated frames. We design a neural network trained in these tasks that clearly outperforms existing solutions. We also propose a metric for scene motion complexity that provides important insights into the performance of VFI methods at the test time.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值 (VFI) 支持许多可能涉及时域（例如慢动作播放）或空间域（例如定格动画序列）的重要应用。我们专注于前一项任务，其中的关键挑战之一是在存在复杂运动的情况下处理高动态范围（HDR）场景。为此，我们探索了双曝光传感器的可能优势，这些传感器可以轻松提供清晰的短曝光和模糊的长曝光，这些曝光在空间上进行记录，并且其末端在时间上对齐。通过这种方式，运动模糊记录了场景运动的时间连续信息，与清晰的参考相结合，可以在单次相机拍摄中实现更精确的运动采样。我们证明，这有助于 VFI 任务中更复杂的运动重建，以及 HDR 帧重建，到目前为止，仅考虑原始捕获的帧，而不是插值帧之间的帧重建。我们设计了一个经过这些任务训练的神经网络，其性能明显优于现有的解决方案。我们还提出了一个场景运动复杂性的度量标准，它为测试时 VFI 方法的性能提供了重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双曝光传感器的高动态范围（HDR）视频帧插值方法，以解决复杂运动场景下的视频插值问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视频帧插值在处理HDR场景时面临复杂运动带来的挑战，而双曝光传感器能提供时空对齐的清晰短曝光和模糊长曝光，为运动信息提取和HDR重建提供新思路。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，利用双曝光传感器的时空对齐特性进行运动采样与HDR帧重建，并提出场景运动复杂度评估指标以指导模型优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在HDR帧插值任务中显著优于现有方案，且首次实现了对插值帧的HDR重建，提出的运动复杂度指标有效反映算法性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 双曝光传感器结合神经网络能有效提升HDR视频插值质量，提出的评估指标为VFI方法性能分析提供新视角。

method: 设计神经网络模型，利用双曝光传感器的时空对齐特性进行运动采样与HDR帧重建，并提出场景运动复杂度评估指标以指导模型优化。
result: 实验表明该方法在HDR帧插值任务中显著优于现有方案，且首次实现了对插值帧的HDR重建，提出的运动复杂度指标有效反映算法性能差异。
conclusion: 双曝光传感器结合神经网络能有效提升HDR视频插值质量，提出的评估指标为VFI方法性能分析提供新视角。
search_text: Video frame interpolation for high dynamic range sequences captured with dual-exposure sensors 使用双曝光传感器捕获的高动态范围序列的视频帧插值 Video frame interpolation (VFI) enables many important applications that might involve the temporal domain, such as slow motion playback, or the spatial domain, such as stop motion sequences. We are focusing on the former task, where one of the key challenges is handling high dynamic range (HDR) scenes in the presence of complex motion. To this end, we explore possible advantages of dual-exposure sensors that readily provide sharp short and blurry long exposures that are spatially registered and whose ends are temporally aligned. This way, motion blur registers temporally continuous information on the scene motion that, combined with the sharp reference, enables more precise motion sampling within a single camera shot. We demonstrate that this facilitates a more complex motion reconstruction in the VFI task, as well as HDR frame reconstruction that so far has been considered only for the originally captured frames, not in-between interpolated frames. We design a neural network trained in these tasks that clearly outperforms existing solutions. We also propose a metric for scene motion complexity that provides important insights into the performance of VFI methods at the test time. 视频帧插值 (VFI) 支持许多可能涉及时域（例如慢动作播放）或空间域（例如定格动画序列）的重要应用。我们专注于前一项任务，其中的关键挑战之一是在存在复杂运动的情况下处理高动态范围（HDR）场景。为此，我们探索了双曝光传感器的可能优势，这些传感器可以轻松提供清晰的短曝光和模糊的长曝光，这些曝光在空间上进行记录，并且其末端在时间上对齐。通过这种方式，运动模糊记录了场景运动的时间连续信息，与清晰的参考相结合，可以在单次相机拍摄中实现更精确的运动采样。我们证明，这有助于 VFI 任务中更复杂的运动重建，以及 HDR 帧重建，到目前为止，仅考虑原始捕获的帧，而不是插值帧之间的帧重建。我们设计了一个经过这些任务训练的神经网络，其性能明显优于现有的解决方案。我们还提出了一个场景运动复杂性的度量标准，它为测试时 VFI 方法的性能提供了重要的见解。 本文提出了一种基于双曝光传感器的高动态范围（HDR）视频帧插值方法，以解决复杂运动场景下的视频插值问题。 Uğur Çoğalan,Mojtaba Bemana,Hans-Peter Seidel,Karol Myszkowski cs.CV

authors_text: Jennifer Gielis,Ajay Shankar,Amanda Prorok
title: A Critical Review of Communications in Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: 多机器人系统中通信的批判性评论
abstract: Purpose of Review. This review summarizes the broad roles that communication formats and technologies have played in enabling multi-robot systems. We approach this field from two perspectives: of robotic applications that need communication capabilities in order to accomplish tasks, and of networking technologies that have enabled newer and more advanced multi-robot systems. Recent Findings. Through this review, we identify a dearth of work that holistically tackles the problem of co-design and co-optimization of robots and the networks they employ. We also highlight the role that data-driven and machine learning approaches play in evolving communication pipelines for multi-robot systems. In particular, we refer to recent work that diverges from hand-designed communication patterns, and also discuss the "sim-to-real" gap in this context. Summary. We present a critical view of the way robotic algorithms and their networking systems have evolved, and make the case for a more synergistic approach. Finally, we also identify four broad Open Problems for research and development, while offering a data-driven perspective for solving some of them.
summary: Purpose of Review. This review summarizes the broad roles that communication formats and technologies have played in enabling multi-robot systems. We approach this field from two perspectives: of robotic applications that need communication capabilities in order to accomplish tasks, and of networking technologies that have enabled newer and more advanced multi-robot systems. Recent Findings. Through this review, we identify a dearth of work that holistically tackles the problem of co-design and co-optimization of robots and the networks they employ. We also highlight the role that data-driven and machine learning approaches play in evolving communication pipelines for multi-robot systems. In particular, we refer to recent work that diverges from hand-designed communication patterns, and also discuss the "sim-to-real" gap in this context. Summary. We present a critical view of the way robotic algorithms and their networking systems have evolved, and make the case for a more synergistic approach. Finally, we also identify four broad Open Problems for research and development, while offering a data-driven perspective for solving some of them.
abstract_zh: 审查的目的。本综述总结了通信格式和技术在实现多机器人系统方面所发挥的广泛作用。我们从两个角度探讨这一领域：需要通信能力才能完成任务的机器人应用程序，以及支持更新、更先进的多机器人系统的网络技术。最近的发现。通过这次审查，我们发现缺乏全面解决机器人及其使用的网络的协同设计和协同优化问题的工作。我们还强调了数据驱动和机器学习方法在发展多机器人系统通信管道中所发挥的作用。我们特别提到了与手工设计的通信模式不同的最新工作，并讨论了这种背景下的“模拟与真实”差距。概括。我们对机器人算法及其网络系统的发展方式提出了批判性的看法，并提出了更具协同性的方法的理由。最后，我们还确定了四个广泛的研究和开发开放问题，同时提供了数据驱动的视角来解决其中一些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了通信技术在多机器人系统中的关键作用，指出当前缺乏对机器人与网络协同设计的系统性研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多侧重机器人应用或通信技术单一方面，缺乏对二者协同优化的整体性探索，且数据驱动方法的应用仍面临仿真与现实环境的差距。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，从机器人应用需求和通信技术发展两个视角分析，结合数据驱动与机器学习方法的最新进展进行讨论。
AI.result: 发现协同设计与优化的研究不足，强调机器学习在通信管道优化中的潜力，并揭示了仿真到现实环境的迁移鸿沟问题。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁采用更协同的机器人与网络设计方法，提出四个开放性问题，并建议通过数据驱动视角推动未来研究与开发。

authors_text: Cristina Y. Morimoto,Aurora Pozo,Marcílio C. P. de Souto
title: An Analysis of the Admissibility of the Objective Functions Applied in Evolutionary Multi-objective Clustering
title_zh: 进化多目标聚类中目标函数的可接受性分析
abstract: A variety of clustering criteria has been applied as an objective function in Evolutionary Multi-Objective Clustering approaches (EMOCs). However, most EMOCs do not provide detailed analysis regarding the choice and usage of the objective functions. Aiming to support a better choice and definition of the objectives in the EMOCs, this paper proposes an analysis of the admissibility of the clustering criteria in evolutionary optimization by examining the search direction and its potential in finding optimal results. As a result, we demonstrate how the admissibility of the objective functions can influence the optimization. Furthermore, we provide insights regarding the combinations and usage of the clustering criteria in the EMOCs.
summary: A variety of clustering criteria has been applied as an objective function in Evolutionary Multi-Objective Clustering approaches (EMOCs). However, most EMOCs do not provide detailed analysis regarding the choice and usage of the objective functions. Aiming to support a better choice and definition of the objectives in the EMOCs, this paper proposes an analysis of the admissibility of the clustering criteria in evolutionary optimization by examining the search direction and its potential in finding optimal results. As a result, we demonstrate how the admissibility of the objective functions can influence the optimization. Furthermore, we provide insights regarding the combinations and usage of the clustering criteria in the EMOCs.
abstract_zh: 多种聚类标准已被用作进化多目标聚类方法（EMOC）中的目标函数。然而，大多数 EMOC 没有提供有关目标函数的选择和使用的详细分析。为了支持更好地选择和定义 EMOC 中的目标，本文提出通过检查搜索方向及其寻找最佳结果的潜力来分析进化优化中聚类标准的可接受性。因此，我们演示了目标函数的可接受性如何影响优化。此外，我们还提供了有关 EMOC 中聚类标准的组合和使用的见解。

AI.tldr: 分析进化多目标聚类（EMOCs）中目标函数的适用性，以支持更优的目标选择和定义。
AI.motivation: 现有EMOCs方法缺乏对目标函数选择和适用性的详细分析，导致难以优化聚类效果，需通过分析来指导更优的目标函数应用。
AI.method: 通过分析目标函数的搜索方向及其在进化优化中寻找最优解的潜力，评估其适用性，并探讨不同聚类准则的组合与应用方式。
AI.result: 证明了目标函数的适用性对优化效果的影响，并提供了EMOCs中聚类准则组合与应用的见解。
AI.conclusion: 目标函数的适用性分析有助于提升EMOCs的优化效果，未来需进一步研究不同准则的组合策略以增强聚类性能。

authors_text: Majid Pourmemar,Yashas Joshi,Charalambos Poullis
title: Predicting Human Performance in Vertical Hierarchical Menu Selection in Immersive AR Using Hand-gesture and Head-gaze
title_zh: 使用手势和头部注视来预测沉浸式 AR 中垂直分层菜单选择中的人类表现
abstract: There are currently limited guidelines on designing user interfaces (UI) for immersive augmented reality (AR) applications. Designers must reflect on their experience designing UI for desktop and mobile applications and conjecture how a UI will influence AR users' performance. In this work, we introduce a predictive model for determining users' performance for a target UI without the subsequent involvement of participants in user studies. The model is trained on participants' responses to objective performance measures such as consumed endurance (CE) and pointing time (PT) using hierarchical drop-down menus. Large variability in the depth and context of the menus is ensured by randomly and dynamically creating the hierarchical drop-down menus and associated user tasks from words contained in the lexical database WordNet. Subjective performance bias is reduced by incorporating the users' non-verbal standard performance WAIS-IV during the model training. The semantic information of the menu is encoded using the Universal Sentence Encoder. We present the results of a user study that demonstrates that the proposed predictive model achieves high accuracy in predicting the CE on hierarchical menus of users with various cognitive abilities. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on predicting CE in designing UI for immersive AR applications.
summary: There are currently limited guidelines on designing user interfaces (UI) for immersive augmented reality (AR) applications. Designers must reflect on their experience designing UI for desktop and mobile applications and conjecture how a UI will influence AR users' performance. In this work, we introduce a predictive model for determining users' performance for a target UI without the subsequent involvement of participants in user studies. The model is trained on participants' responses to objective performance measures such as consumed endurance (CE) and pointing time (PT) using hierarchical drop-down menus. Large variability in the depth and context of the menus is ensured by randomly and dynamically creating the hierarchical drop-down menus and associated user tasks from words contained in the lexical database WordNet. Subjective performance bias is reduced by incorporating the users' non-verbal standard performance WAIS-IV during the model training. The semantic information of the menu is encoded using the Universal Sentence Encoder. We present the results of a user study that demonstrates that the proposed predictive model achieves high accuracy in predicting the CE on hierarchical menus of users with various cognitive abilities. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on predicting CE in designing UI for immersive AR applications.
abstract_zh: 目前，关于沉浸式增强现实 (AR) 应用程序的用户界面 (UI) 设计指南有限。设计师必须反思他们为桌面和移动应用程序设计 UI 的经验，并推测 UI 将如何影响 AR 用户的表现。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个预测模型，用于确定用户对目标 UI 的表现，而无需参与者随后参与用户研究。该模型使用分层下拉菜单根据参与者对客观绩效指标（例如消耗耐力 (CE) 和指向时间 (PT)）的反应进行训练。通过根据词汇数据库 WordNet 中包含的单词随机、动态地创建分层下拉菜单和关联的用户任务，可以确保菜单深度和上下文的较大变化。通过在模型训练期间纳入用户的非语言标准性能 WAIS-IV，可以减少主观性能偏差。菜单的语义信息使用通用句子编码器进行编码。我们提出了一项用户研究的结果，该结果表明所提出的预测模型在预测具有各种认知能力的用户的分层菜单上的 CE 方面实现了高精度。据我们所知，这是第一个在沉浸式 AR 应用程序 UI 设计中预测 CE 的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预测沉浸式AR应用中用户垂直层级菜单选择性能的模型，结合手势和视线数据进行预测。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏针对沉浸式AR应用的用户界面设计指南，设计师需依赖传统桌面和移动应用经验进行推测，存在主观偏差。
AI.method: 通过WordNet动态生成层级菜单任务，采集用户耐力消耗和指向时间等客观指标，结合WAIS-IV标准性能数据和Universal Sentence Encoder语义编码训练预测模型。
AI.result: 用户实验表明该模型能准确预测不同认知能力用户的菜单操作耐力消耗，是首个针对AR界面设计的CE预测研究。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为沉浸式AR界面设计提供了数据驱动的性能预测方法，可减少对传统用户体验研究的依赖。

search_text: Predicting Human Performance in Vertical Hierarchical Menu Selection in Immersive AR Using Hand-gesture and Head-gaze 使用手势和头部注视来预测沉浸式 AR 中垂直分层菜单选择中的人类表现 There are currently limited guidelines on designing user interfaces (UI) for immersive augmented reality (AR) applications. Designers must reflect on their experience designing UI for desktop and mobile applications and conjecture how a UI will influence AR users' performance. In this work, we introduce a predictive model for determining users' performance for a target UI without the subsequent involvement of participants in user studies. The model is trained on participants' responses to objective performance measures such as consumed endurance (CE) and pointing time (PT) using hierarchical drop-down menus. Large variability in the depth and context of the menus is ensured by randomly and dynamically creating the hierarchical drop-down menus and associated user tasks from words contained in the lexical database WordNet. Subjective performance bias is reduced by incorporating the users' non-verbal standard performance WAIS-IV during the model training. The semantic information of the menu is encoded using the Universal Sentence Encoder. We present the results of a user study that demonstrates that the proposed predictive model achieves high accuracy in predicting the CE on hierarchical menus of users with various cognitive abilities. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on predicting CE in designing UI for immersive AR applications. 目前，关于沉浸式增强现实 (AR) 应用程序的用户界面 (UI) 设计指南有限。设计师必须反思他们为桌面和移动应用程序设计 UI 的经验，并推测 UI 将如何影响 AR 用户的表现。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个预测模型，用于确定用户对目标 UI 的表现，而无需参与者随后参与用户研究。该模型使用分层下拉菜单根据参与者对客观绩效指标（例如消耗耐力 (CE) 和指向时间 (PT)）的反应进行训练。通过根据词汇数据库 WordNet 中包含的单词随机、动态地创建分层下拉菜单和关联的用户任务，可以确保菜单深度和上下文的较大变化。通过在模型训练期间纳入用户的非语言标准性能 WAIS-IV，可以减少主观性能偏差。菜单的语义信息使用通用句子编码器进行编码。我们提出了一项用户研究的结果，该结果表明所提出的预测模型在预测具有各种认知能力的用户的分层菜单上的 CE 方面实现了高精度。据我们所知，这是第一个在沉浸式 AR 应用程序 UI 设计中预测 CE 的工作。 本文提出一种预测沉浸式AR应用中用户垂直层级菜单选择性能的模型，结合手势和视线数据进行预测。 Majid Pourmemar,Yashas Joshi,Charalambos Poullis cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Minguk Kang,Joonghyuk Shin,Jaesik Park
title: StudioGAN: A Taxonomy and Benchmark of GANs for Image Synthesis
title_zh: StudioGAN：图像合成 GAN 的分类和基准
comment: 32 pages, IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI, 2023)
comments: 32 pages, IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI, 2023)
abstract: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) is one of the state-of-the-art generative models for realistic image synthesis. While training and evaluating GAN becomes increasingly important, the current GAN research ecosystem does not provide reliable benchmarks for which the evaluation is conducted consistently and fairly. Furthermore, because there are few validated GAN implementations, researchers devote considerable time to reproducing baselines. We study the taxonomy of GAN approaches and present a new open-source library named StudioGAN. StudioGAN supports 7 GAN architectures, 9 conditioning methods, 4 adversarial losses, 12 regularization modules, 3 differentiable augmentations, 7 evaluation metrics, and 5 evaluation backbones. With our training and evaluation protocol, we present a large-scale benchmark using various datasets (CIFAR10, ImageNet, AFHQv2, FFHQ, and Baby/Papa/Granpa-ImageNet) and 3 different evaluation backbones (InceptionV3, SwAV, and Swin Transformer). Unlike other benchmarks used in the GAN community, we train representative GANs, including BigGAN and StyleGAN series in a unified training pipeline and quantify generation performance with 7 evaluation metrics. The benchmark evaluates other cutting-edge generative models (e.g., StyleGAN-XL, ADM, MaskGIT, and RQ-Transformer). StudioGAN provides GAN implementations, training, and evaluation scripts with the pre-trained weights. StudioGAN is available at https://github.com/POSTECH-CVLab/PyTorch-StudioGAN.
summary: Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) is one of the state-of-the-art generative models for realistic image synthesis. While training and evaluating GAN becomes increasingly important, the current GAN research ecosystem does not provide reliable benchmarks for which the evaluation is conducted consistently and fairly. Furthermore, because there are few validated GAN implementations, researchers devote considerable time to reproducing baselines. We study the taxonomy of GAN approaches and present a new open-source library named StudioGAN. StudioGAN supports 7 GAN architectures, 9 conditioning methods, 4 adversarial losses, 12 regularization modules, 3 differentiable augmentations, 7 evaluation metrics, and 5 evaluation backbones. With our training and evaluation protocol, we present a large-scale benchmark using various datasets (CIFAR10, ImageNet, AFHQv2, FFHQ, and Baby/Papa/Granpa-ImageNet) and 3 different evaluation backbones (InceptionV3, SwAV, and Swin Transformer). Unlike other benchmarks used in the GAN community, we train representative GANs, including BigGAN and StyleGAN series in a unified training pipeline and quantify generation performance with 7 evaluation metrics. The benchmark evaluates other cutting-edge generative models (e.g., StyleGAN-XL, ADM, MaskGIT, and RQ-Transformer). StudioGAN provides GAN implementations, training, and evaluation scripts with the pre-trained weights. StudioGAN is available at https://github.com/POSTECH-CVLab/PyTorch-StudioGAN.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）是最先进的逼真图像合成生成模型之一。虽然训练和评估 GAN 变得越来越重要，但当前的 GAN 研究生态系统并没有提供可靠的基准来一致、公平地进行评估。此外，由于经过验证的 GAN 实现很少，研究人员花费大量时间来重现基线。我们研究了 GAN 方法的分类，并提出了一个名为 StudioGAN 的新开源库。 StudioGAN 支持 7 种 GAN 架构、9 种调节方法、4 种对抗性损失、12 种正则化模块、3 种可微增强、7 种评估指标和 5 种评估骨干。通过我们的训练和评估协议，我们使用各种数据集（CIFAR10、ImageNet、AFHQv2、FFHQ 和 Baby/Papa/Granpa-ImageNet）和 3 个不同的评估主干（InceptionV3、SwAV 和 Swin Transformer）提出了一个大规模基准。与 GAN 社区中使用的其他基准不同，我们在统一的训练管道中训练代表性的 GAN，包括 BigGAN 和 StyleGAN 系列，并使用 7 个评估指标量化生成性能。该基准评估了其他前沿的生成模型（例如 StyleGAN-XL、ADM、MaskGIT 和 RQ-Transformer）。 StudioGAN 提供带有预训练权重的 GAN 实现、训练和评估脚本。 StudioGAN 位于 https://github.com/POSTECH-CVLab/PyTorch-StudioGAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StudioGAN，一个用于图像合成的生成对抗网络（GAN）分类法和基准测试框架，包含多种架构、损失函数和评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前GAN研究缺乏统一的评估基准和验证实现，导致研究人员耗费大量时间重复基线实验，需建立标准化评估体系。
AI.method: 构建StudioGAN开源库，支持7种GAN架构、9种条件方法、4种对抗损失等模块，并基于多数据集（如CIFAR10、ImageNet）和3种评估主干网络进行大规模基准测试。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上评估了包括BigGAN、StyleGAN系列等在内的先进模型，量化生成性能并提供预训练权重及训练评估脚本。
AI.conclusion: StudioGAN为GAN研究提供统一训练与评估框架，促进公平比较，加速生成模型研发进程。

authors_text: Jiageng Mao,Shaoshuai Shi,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li
title: 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 自动驾驶 3D 物体检测：全面调查
comment: Accepted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). Project page is at https://github.com/PointsCoder/Awesome-3D-Object-Detection-for-Autonomous-Driving
comments: Accepted to International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). Project page is at https://github.com/PointsCoder/Awesome-3D-Object-Detection-for-Autonomous-Driving
abstract: Autonomous driving, in recent years, has been receiving increasing attention for its potential to relieve drivers' burdens and improve the safety of driving. In modern autonomous driving pipelines, the perception system is an indispensable component, aiming to accurately estimate the status of surrounding environments and provide reliable observations for prediction and planning. 3D object detection, which intelligently predicts the locations, sizes, and categories of the critical 3D objects near an autonomous vehicle, is an important part of a perception system. This paper reviews the advances in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. First, we introduce the background of 3D object detection and discuss the challenges in this task. Second, we conduct a comprehensive survey of the progress in 3D object detection from the aspects of models and sensory inputs, including LiDAR-based, camera-based, and multi-modal detection approaches. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the potentials and challenges in each category of methods. Additionally, we systematically investigate the applications of 3D object detection in driving systems. Finally, we conduct a performance analysis of the 3D object detection approaches, and we further summarize the research trends over the years and prospect the future directions of this area.
summary: Autonomous driving, in recent years, has been receiving increasing attention for its potential to relieve drivers' burdens and improve the safety of driving. In modern autonomous driving pipelines, the perception system is an indispensable component, aiming to accurately estimate the status of surrounding environments and provide reliable observations for prediction and planning. 3D object detection, which intelligently predicts the locations, sizes, and categories of the critical 3D objects near an autonomous vehicle, is an important part of a perception system. This paper reviews the advances in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. First, we introduce the background of 3D object detection and discuss the challenges in this task. Second, we conduct a comprehensive survey of the progress in 3D object detection from the aspects of models and sensory inputs, including LiDAR-based, camera-based, and multi-modal detection approaches. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the potentials and challenges in each category of methods. Additionally, we systematically investigate the applications of 3D object detection in driving systems. Finally, we conduct a performance analysis of the 3D object detection approaches, and we further summarize the research trends over the years and prospect the future directions of this area.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动驾驶因其减轻驾驶员负担、提高驾驶安全性的潜力而受到越来越多的关注。在现代自动驾驶管道中，感知系统是不可或缺的组成部分，旨在准确估计周围环境的状态，并为预测和规划提供可靠的观测结果。 3D 物体检测可以智能预测自动驾驶车辆附近关键 3D 物体的位置、大小和类别，是感知系统的重要组成部分。本文回顾了自动驾驶 3D 物体检测的进展。首先，我们介绍 3D 对象检测的背景并讨论该任务的挑战。其次，我们从模型和感官输入方面对 3D 物体检测的进展进行了全面的调查，包括基于激光雷达、基于相机和多模态检测方法。我们还对每一类方法的潜力和挑战进行了深入分析。此外，我们系统地研究了 3D 物体检测在驾驶系统中的应用。最后，我们对3D目标检测方法进行了性能分析，进一步总结了多年来的研究趋势并展望了该领域的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶中3D物体检测的技术进展，分析了不同方法的潜力与挑战。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要精准的环境感知系统，而3D物体检测是其核心部分，对提升安全性和可靠性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过全面调研基于LiDAR、摄像头和多模态的检测方法，分析各技术路线的优缺点，并评估其在自动驾驶系统中的应用与性能。
AI.result: 总结了现有3D检测技术的分类、挑战及发展趋势，为后续研究提供了系统性参考。
AI.conclusion: 3D物体检测技术需进一步优化多模态融合与实时性，未来研究应关注更高效的算法和实际场景的适应性。

search_text: 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving: A Comprehensive Survey 自动驾驶 3D 物体检测：全面调查 Autonomous driving, in recent years, has been receiving increasing attention for its potential to relieve drivers' burdens and improve the safety of driving. In modern autonomous driving pipelines, the perception system is an indispensable component, aiming to accurately estimate the status of surrounding environments and provide reliable observations for prediction and planning. 3D object detection, which intelligently predicts the locations, sizes, and categories of the critical 3D objects near an autonomous vehicle, is an important part of a perception system. This paper reviews the advances in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. First, we introduce the background of 3D object detection and discuss the challenges in this task. Second, we conduct a comprehensive survey of the progress in 3D object detection from the aspects of models and sensory inputs, including LiDAR-based, camera-based, and multi-modal detection approaches. We also provide an in-depth analysis of the potentials and challenges in each category of methods. Additionally, we systematically investigate the applications of 3D object detection in driving systems. Finally, we conduct a performance analysis of the 3D object detection approaches, and we further summarize the research trends over the years and prospect the future directions of this area. 近年来，自动驾驶因其减轻驾驶员负担、提高驾驶安全性的潜力而受到越来越多的关注。在现代自动驾驶管道中，感知系统是不可或缺的组成部分，旨在准确估计周围环境的状态，并为预测和规划提供可靠的观测结果。 3D 物体检测可以智能预测自动驾驶车辆附近关键 3D 物体的位置、大小和类别，是感知系统的重要组成部分。本文回顾了自动驾驶 3D 物体检测的进展。首先，我们介绍 3D 对象检测的背景并讨论该任务的挑战。其次，我们从模型和感官输入方面对 3D 物体检测的进展进行了全面的调查，包括基于激光雷达、基于相机和多模态检测方法。我们还对每一类方法的潜力和挑战进行了深入分析。此外，我们系统地研究了 3D 物体检测在驾驶系统中的应用。最后，我们对3D目标检测方法进行了性能分析，进一步总结了多年来的研究趋势并展望了该领域的未来方向。 本文综述了自动驾驶中3D物体检测的技术进展，分析了不同方法的潜力与挑战。 Jiageng Mao,Shaoshuai Shi,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Chenglong Qian,Zhaohong Xiang,Zhuoran Wu,Hongbin Sun
title: RF-LIO: Removal-First Tightly-coupled Lidar Inertial Odometry in High Dynamic Environments
title_zh: RF-LIO：高动态环境中的首个移除紧耦合激光雷达惯性里程计
abstract: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is considered to be an essential capability for intelligent vehicles and mobile robots. However, most of the current lidar SLAM approaches are based on the assumption of a static environment. Hence the localization in a dynamic environment with multiple moving objects is actually unreliable. The paper proposes a dynamic SLAM framework RF-LIO, building on LIO-SAM, which adds adaptive multi-resolution range images and uses tightly-coupled lidar inertial odometry to first remove moving objects, and then match lidar scan to the submap. Thus, it can obtain accurate poses even in high dynamic environments. The proposed RF-LIO is evaluated on both self-collected datasets and open Urbanloco datasets. The experimental results in high dynamic environments demonstrate that, compared with LOAM and LIO-SAM, the absolute trajectory accuracy of the proposed RF-LIO can be improved by 90% and 70%, respectively. RF-LIO is one of the state-of-the-art SLAM systems in high dynamic environments.
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) is considered to be an essential capability for intelligent vehicles and mobile robots. However, most of the current lidar SLAM approaches are based on the assumption of a static environment. Hence the localization in a dynamic environment with multiple moving objects is actually unreliable. The paper proposes a dynamic SLAM framework RF-LIO, building on LIO-SAM, which adds adaptive multi-resolution range images and uses tightly-coupled lidar inertial odometry to first remove moving objects, and then match lidar scan to the submap. Thus, it can obtain accurate poses even in high dynamic environments. The proposed RF-LIO is evaluated on both self-collected datasets and open Urbanloco datasets. The experimental results in high dynamic environments demonstrate that, compared with LOAM and LIO-SAM, the absolute trajectory accuracy of the proposed RF-LIO can be improved by 90% and 70%, respectively. RF-LIO is one of the state-of-the-art SLAM systems in high dynamic environments.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）被认为是智能车辆和移动机器人的必备能力。然而，当前大多数激光雷达 SLAM 方法都是基于静态环境的假设。因此，在具有多个移动对象的动态环境中的定位实际上是不可靠的。论文提出了一种动态 SLAM 框架 RF-LIO，建立在 LIO-SAM 的基础上，添加了自适应多分辨率距离图像，并使用紧耦合激光雷达惯性里程计首先去除移动物体，然后将激光雷达扫描与子地图匹配。因此，即使在高动态环境下也能获得准确的姿态。所提出的 RF-LIO 在自行收集的数据集和开放的 Urbanloco 数据集上进行了评估。高动态环境下的实验结果表明，与LOAM和LIO-SAM相比，所提出的RF-LIO的绝对轨迹精度可分别提高90％和70％。 RF-LIO 是高动态环境中最先进的 SLAM 系统之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高动态环境下鲁棒的激光雷达惯性里程计框架RF-LIO，通过动态物体移除和紧密耦合的SLAM实现精准定位。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达SLAM方法依赖静态环境假设，难以处理包含多移动物体的高动态场景，导致定位可靠性不足。
AI.method: 基于LIO-SAM框架，引入自适应多分辨率距离图像与紧耦合激光雷达惯性里程计，分两阶段实现动态物体移除和子地图扫描匹配。
AI.result: 在自建数据集和Urbanloco数据集测试中，绝对轨迹精度较LOAM和LIO-SAM分别提升90%和70%。
AI.conclusion: RF-LIO通过动态物体预处理与紧耦合优化，在高动态场景下达到当前最先进的SLAM性能。

authors_text: Emre Ozfatura,Yulin Shao,Alberto Perotti,Branislav Popovic,Deniz Gunduz
title: All you need is feedback: Communication with block attention feedback codes
title_zh: 您所需要的只是反馈：与块注意力反馈代码进行通信
abstract: Deep learning based channel code designs have recently gained interest as an alternative to conventional coding algorithms, particularly for channels for which existing codes do not provide effective solutions. Communication over a feedback channel is one such problem, for which promising results have recently been obtained by employing various deep learning architectures. In this paper, we introduce a novel learning-aided code design for feedback channels, called generalized block attention feedback (GBAF) codes, which i) employs a modular architecture that can be implemented using different neural network architectures; ii) provides order-of-magnitude improvements in the probability of error compared to existing designs; and iii) can transmit at desired code rates.
summary: Deep learning based channel code designs have recently gained interest as an alternative to conventional coding algorithms, particularly for channels for which existing codes do not provide effective solutions. Communication over a feedback channel is one such problem, for which promising results have recently been obtained by employing various deep learning architectures. In this paper, we introduce a novel learning-aided code design for feedback channels, called generalized block attention feedback (GBAF) codes, which i) employs a modular architecture that can be implemented using different neural network architectures; ii) provides order-of-magnitude improvements in the probability of error compared to existing designs; and iii) can transmit at desired code rates.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的信道代码设计最近作为传统编码算法的替代方案引起了人们的兴趣，特别是对于现有代码无法提供有效解决方案的信道。通过反馈通道的通信就是这样的问题之一，最近通过采用各种深度学习架构已经获得了有希望的结果。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的反馈通道学习辅助代码设计，称为广义块注意反馈（GBAF）代码，它i）采用了可以使用不同神经网络架构实现的模块化架构； ii) 与现有设计相比，错误概率得到了数量级的改进； iii) 可以以期望的码率进行传输。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的新型反馈信道编码设计方法——广义块注意力反馈（GBAF）码，以提升通信系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统编码算法在反馈信道中效果有限，而现有深度学习方法存在性能不足和灵活性差的问题，需设计更高效的编码方案。
AI.method: 采用模块化神经网络架构，结合块注意力机制，通过反馈通道动态调整编码策略，支持不同码率传输。
AI.result: 相较现有方案，GBAF码在误码率上实现数量级提升，且能按需调整码率，验证了其在反馈信道中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GBAF码通过深度学习与反馈机制的结合，为反馈信道通信提供了高效、灵活的编码解决方案，具有显著应用价值。

authors_text: Łukasz Struski,Marcin Mazur,Paweł Batorski,Przemysław Spurek,Jacek Tabor
title: Bounding Evidence and Estimating Log-Likelihood in VAE
title_zh: VAE 中的边界证据和估计对数似然
abstract: Many crucial problems in deep learning and statistical inference are caused by a variational gap, i.e., a difference between model evidence (log-likelihood) and evidence lower bound (ELBO). In particular, in a classical VAE setting that involves training via an ELBO cost function, it is difficult to provide a robust comparison of the effects of training between models, since we do not know a log-likelihood of data (but only its lower bound). In this paper, to deal with this problem, we introduce a general and effective upper bound, which allows us to efficiently approximate the evidence of data. We provide extensive theoretical and experimental studies of our approach, including its comparison to the other state-of-the-art upper bounds, as well as its application as a tool for the evaluation of models that were trained on various lower bounds.
summary: Many crucial problems in deep learning and statistical inference are caused by a variational gap, i.e., a difference between model evidence (log-likelihood) and evidence lower bound (ELBO). In particular, in a classical VAE setting that involves training via an ELBO cost function, it is difficult to provide a robust comparison of the effects of training between models, since we do not know a log-likelihood of data (but only its lower bound). In this paper, to deal with this problem, we introduce a general and effective upper bound, which allows us to efficiently approximate the evidence of data. We provide extensive theoretical and experimental studies of our approach, including its comparison to the other state-of-the-art upper bounds, as well as its application as a tool for the evaluation of models that were trained on various lower bounds.
abstract_zh: 深度学习和统计推断中的许多关键问题都是由变分差距引起的，即模型证据（对数似然）和证据下界（ELBO）之间的差异。特别是，在涉及通过 ELBO 成本函数进行训练的经典 VAE 设置中，很难提供模型之间训练效果的稳健比较，因为我们不知道数据的对数似然（仅知道其下限）。在本文中，为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个通用且有效的上限，它使我们能够有效地近似数据的证据。我们对我们的方法进行了广泛的理论和实验研究，包括它与其他最先进的上限的比较，以及它作为评估在各种下限上训练的模型的工具的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用有效的方法，通过引入数据证据的上界来近似变分自编码器（VAE）中的对数似然，以解决变分间隙问题。
AI.motivation: 在VAE训练中，仅能通过ELBO下界评估模型，无法准确比较不同模型的真实对数似然，导致模型效果评估不全面。
AI.method: 提出一种通用上界估计方法，结合理论分析与实验验证，对比其他先进上界方法，并应用于不同下界训练模型的评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在估计对数似然时优于现有上界方法，有效提升了模型训练效果的评估准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法成功弥补了VAE中变分间隙的缺陷，为模型评估提供了更可靠的工具，有助于优化训练策略与模型比较。

authors_text: Jianxiong Tang,Jianhuang Lai,Xiaohua Xie,Lingxiao Yang,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: SNN2ANN: A Fast and Memory-Efficient Training Framework for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: SNN2ANN：一种快速、内存高效的尖峰神经网络训练框架
abstract: Spiking neural networks are efficient computation models for low-power environments. Spike-based BP algorithms and ANN-to-SNN (ANN2SNN) conversions are successful techniques for SNN training. Nevertheless, the spike-base BP training is slow and requires large memory costs. Though ANN2NN provides a low-cost way to train SNNs, it requires many inference steps to mimic the well-trained ANN for good performance. In this paper, we propose a SNN-to-ANN (SNN2ANN) framework to train the SNN in a fast and memory-efficient way. The SNN2ANN consists of 2 components: a) a weight sharing architecture between ANN and SNN and b) spiking mapping units. Firstly, the architecture trains the weight-sharing parameters on the ANN branch, resulting in fast training and low memory costs for SNN. Secondly, the spiking mapping units ensure that the activation values of the ANN are the spiking features. As a result, the classification error of the SNN can be optimized by training the ANN branch. Besides, we design an adaptive threshold adjustment (ATA) algorithm to address the noisy spike problem. Experiment results show that our SNN2ANN-based models perform well on the benchmark datasets (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and Tiny-ImageNet). Moreover, the SNN2ANN can achieve comparable accuracy under 0.625x time steps, 0.377x training time, 0.27x GPU memory costs, and 0.33x spike activities of the Spike-based BP model.
summary: Spiking neural networks are efficient computation models for low-power environments. Spike-based BP algorithms and ANN-to-SNN (ANN2SNN) conversions are successful techniques for SNN training. Nevertheless, the spike-base BP training is slow and requires large memory costs. Though ANN2NN provides a low-cost way to train SNNs, it requires many inference steps to mimic the well-trained ANN for good performance. In this paper, we propose a SNN-to-ANN (SNN2ANN) framework to train the SNN in a fast and memory-efficient way. The SNN2ANN consists of 2 components: a) a weight sharing architecture between ANN and SNN and b) spiking mapping units. Firstly, the architecture trains the weight-sharing parameters on the ANN branch, resulting in fast training and low memory costs for SNN. Secondly, the spiking mapping units ensure that the activation values of the ANN are the spiking features. As a result, the classification error of the SNN can be optimized by training the ANN branch. Besides, we design an adaptive threshold adjustment (ATA) algorithm to address the noisy spike problem. Experiment results show that our SNN2ANN-based models perform well on the benchmark datasets (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and Tiny-ImageNet). Moreover, the SNN2ANN can achieve comparable accuracy under 0.625x time steps, 0.377x training time, 0.27x GPU memory costs, and 0.33x spike activities of the Spike-based BP model.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络是低功耗环境下的高效计算模型。基于尖峰的 BP 算法和 ANN 到 SNN (ANN2SNN) 转换是 SNN 训练的成功技术。然而，基于脉冲的 BP 训练速度很慢并且需要大量的内存成本。尽管 ANN2NN 提供了一种低成本的 SNN 训练方法，但它需要许多推理步骤来模仿训练有素的 ANN 以获得良好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种 SNN-to-ANN (SNN2ANN) 框架，以快速且节省内存的方式训练 SNN。 SNN2ANN 由 2 个组件组成：a) ANN 和 SNN 之间的权重共享架构，b) 尖峰映射单元。首先，该架构在 ANN 分支上训练权重共享参数，从而实现 SNN 的快速训练和低内存成本。其次，尖峰映射单元确保 ANN 的激活值是尖峰特征。因此，可以通过训练 ANN 分支来优化 SNN 的分类误差。此外，我们设计了一种自适应阈值调整（ATA）算法来解决噪声尖峰问题。实验结果表明，我们基于 SNN2ANN 的模型在基准数据集（CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 Tiny-ImageNet）上表现良好。此外，SNN2ANN 可以在基于 Spike 的 BP 模型的 0.625 倍时间步长、0.377 倍训练时间、0.27 倍 GPU 内存成本和 0.33 倍尖峰活动下实现相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SNN2ANN的快速且内存高效的脉冲神经网络训练框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的脉冲神经网络训练方法（如基于脉冲的反向传播和ANN到SNN转换）存在训练速度慢、内存消耗大或需要大量推理步骤的问题。
AI.method: 框架包含两个核心组件：ANN与SNN之间的权重共享架构以及脉冲映射单元，并设计了自适应阈值调整算法以解决噪声脉冲问题。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上表现优异，相比基于脉冲的BP模型，时间步长、训练时间、GPU内存消耗和脉冲活动量分别减少至0.625x、0.377x、0.27x和0.33x。
AI.conclusion: SNN2ANN框架在保持精度的同时显著提升了训练效率和内存利用率，为脉冲神经网络的训练提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhikai Wei,Xuhui Hu
title: Object Localization Assistive System Based on CV and Vibrotactile Encoding
title_zh: 基于CV和振动触觉编码的物体定位辅助系统
abstract: Intelligent assistive systems can navigate blind people, but most of them could only give non-intuitive cues or inefficient guidance. Based on computer vision and vibrotactile encoding, this paper presents an interactive system that provides blind people with intuitive spatial cognition. Different from the traditional auditory feedback strategy based on speech cues, this paper firstly introduces a vibration-encoded feedback method that leverages the haptic neural pathway and enables the users to interact with objects other than manipulating an assistance device. Based on this strategy, a wearable visual module based on an RGB-D camera is adopted for 3D spatial object localization, which contributes to accurate perception and quick object localization in the real environment. The experimental results on target blind individuals indicate that vibrotactile feedback reduces the task completion time by over 25% compared with the mainstream voice prompt feedback scheme. The proposed object localization system provides a more intuitive spatial navigation and comfortable wearability for blindness assistance.
summary: Intelligent assistive systems can navigate blind people, but most of them could only give non-intuitive cues or inefficient guidance. The experimental results on target blind individuals indicate that vibrotactile feedback reduces the task completion time by over 25% compared with the mainstream voice prompt feedback scheme. The proposed object localization system provides a more intuitive spatial navigation and comfortable wearability for blindness assistance.
abstract_zh: 智能辅助系统可以为盲人导航，但大多数只能提供非直观的提示或低效的指导。本文基于计算机视觉和振动触觉编码，提出了一种为盲人提供直观空间认知的交互系统。与传统基于语音提示的听觉反馈策略不同，本文首先介绍了一种振动编码反馈方法，该方法利用触觉神经通路，使用户能够与物体进行交互，而不是操纵辅助设备。基于该策略，采用基于RGB-D相机的可穿戴视觉模块进行3D空间物体定位，有助于在真实环境中准确感知和快速物体定位。对目标盲人的实验结果表明，与主流语音提示反馈方案相比，振动触觉反馈减少了25%以上的任务完成时间。所提出的物体定位系统为失明辅助提供了更直观的空间导航和舒适的佩戴性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉和触觉编码的物体定位辅助系统，帮助视障人士更直观地感知空间。
AI.motivation: 现有导航系统提供的非直观或低效的语音提示无法满足视障人士对空间认知的需求。
AI.method: 结合RGB-D相机实现3D空间物体定位，并通过触觉反馈编码替代传统语音提示，利用触觉神经通路传递空间信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，触觉反馈方案使任务完成时间比主流语音提示方案缩短超过25%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过触觉编码提供更直观的空间导航体验，同时具备舒适的可穿戴性，为视障辅助提供了新方案。

search_text: Object Localization Assistive System Based on CV and Vibrotactile Encoding 基于CV和振动触觉编码的物体定位辅助系统 Intelligent assistive systems can navigate blind people, but most of them could only give non-intuitive cues or inefficient guidance. Based on computer vision and vibrotactile encoding, this paper presents an interactive system that provides blind people with intuitive spatial cognition. Different from the traditional auditory feedback strategy based on speech cues, this paper firstly introduces a vibration-encoded feedback method that leverages the haptic neural pathway and enables the users to interact with objects other than manipulating an assistance device. Based on this strategy, a wearable visual module based on an RGB-D camera is adopted for 3D spatial object localization, which contributes to accurate perception and quick object localization in the real environment. The experimental results on target blind individuals indicate that vibrotactile feedback reduces the task completion time by over 25% compared with the mainstream voice prompt feedback scheme. The proposed object localization system provides a more intuitive spatial navigation and comfortable wearability for blindness assistance. 智能辅助系统可以为盲人导航，但大多数只能提供非直观的提示或低效的指导。本文基于计算机视觉和振动触觉编码，提出了一种为盲人提供直观空间认知的交互系统。与传统基于语音提示的听觉反馈策略不同，本文首先介绍了一种振动编码反馈方法，该方法利用触觉神经通路，使用户能够与物体进行交互，而不是操纵辅助设备。基于该策略，采用基于RGB-D相机的可穿戴视觉模块进行3D空间物体定位，有助于在真实环境中准确感知和快速物体定位。对目标盲人的实验结果表明，与主流语音提示反馈方案相比，振动触觉反馈减少了25%以上的任务完成时间。所提出的物体定位系统为失明辅助提供了更直观的空间导航和舒适的佩戴性。 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉和触觉编码的物体定位辅助系统，帮助视障人士更直观地感知空间。 Zhikai Wei,Xuhui Hu cs.RO

authors_text: Antonios Saravanos,Stavros Zervoudakis,Dongnanzi Zheng,Amarpreet Nanda,Georgios Shaheen,Charles Hornat,Jeremiah Konde Chaettle,Alassane Yoda,Hyeree Park,Will Ang
title: Reputation, Risk, and Trust on User Adoption of Internet Search Engines: The Case of DuckDuckGo
title_zh: 用户采用互联网搜索引擎的声誉、风险和信任：DuckDuckGo 案例
abstract: This paper investigates the determinants of end-user adoption of the DuckDuckGo search engine coupling the standard UTAUT model with factors to reflect reputation, risk, and trust. An experimental approach was taken to validate our model, where participants were exposed to the DuckDuckGo product using a vignette. Subsequently, answering questions on their perception of the technology. The data was analyzed using the partial least squares-structural equation modeling (PLS-SEM) approach. From the nine distinct factors studied, we found that 'Performance Expectancy' played the greatest role in user decisions on adoption, followed by 'Firm Reputation', 'Initial Trust in Technology', 'Social Influence', and an individual's 'Disposition to Trust'. We conclude by exploring how these findings can explain DuckDuckGo's rising prominence as a search engine.
summary: This paper investigates the determinants of end-user adoption of the DuckDuckGo search engine coupling the standard UTAUT model with factors to reflect reputation, risk, and trust. An experimental approach was taken to validate our model, where participants were exposed to the DuckDuckGo product using a vignette. Subsequently, answering questions on their perception of the technology. The data was analyzed using the partial least squares-structural equation modeling (PLS-SEM) approach. From the nine distinct factors studied, we found that 'Performance Expectancy' played the greatest role in user decisions on adoption, followed by 'Firm Reputation', 'Initial Trust in Technology', 'Social Influence', and an individual's 'Disposition to Trust'. We conclude by exploring how these findings can explain DuckDuckGo's rising prominence as a search engine.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了最终用户采用 DuckDuckGo 搜索引擎的决定因素，将标准 UTAUT 模型与反映声誉、风险和信任的因素相结合。我们采用实验方法来验证我们的模型，其中参与者使用小插图接触 DuckDuckGo 产品。随后，回答了有关他们对该技术的看法的问题。使用偏最小二乘结构方程建模（PLS-SEM）方法对数据进行分析。从研究的九个不同因素中，我们发现“绩效预期”在用户采用决策中发挥最大作用，其次是“公司声誉”、“对技术的初始信任”、“社会影响力”和个人的“信任倾向”。最后，我们探讨了这些发现如何解释 DuckDuckGo 作为搜索引擎的日益突出。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨声誉、风险和信任如何影响用户采用DuckDuckGo搜索引擎，结合UTAUT模型分析关键因素。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于UTAUT模型，但较少结合声誉、风险和信任因素，尤其针对DuckDuckGo的案例分析不足，需进一步探讨其用户采纳机制。
AI.method: 通过实验法，让参与者接触DuckDuckGo产品情境，收集感知数据，并采用PLS-SEM结构方程模型进行分析。
AI.result: 绩效期望是用户采纳首要因素，其次为企业声誉、初始技术信任、社会影响及个人信任倾向。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，绩效期望和信任因素在用户采纳中起关键作用，解释了DuckDuckGo通过强调隐私和性能获得用户增长的原因。

authors_text: Bo Wei,Hang Song,Makoto Nakamura,Koichi Kimura,Nozomu Togawa,Jiro Katto
title: QuDASH: Quantum-inspired rate adaptation approach for DASH video streaming
title_zh: QuDASH：DASH 视频流的量子启发速率自适应方法
abstract: Internet traffic is dramatically increasing with the development of network technologies and video streaming traffic accounts for large amount within the total traffic, which reveals the importance to guarantee the quality of content delivery service. Based on the network conditions, adaptive bitrate (ABR) control is utilized as a common technique which can choose the proper bitrate to ensure the video streaming quality. In this paper, new bitrate control method, QuDASH is proposed by taking advantage of the emerging quantum technology. In QuDASH, the adaptive control model is developed using the quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO), which aims at increasing the average bitrate and decreasing the video rebuffering events to maximize the user quality of experience (QoE). In order to formulate the video control model, first the QUBO terms of different factors are defined regarding video quality, bitrate change, and buffer condition. Then, all the individual QUBO terms are merged to generate an objective function. By minimizing the QUBO objective function, the bitrate choice is determined from the solution. The control model is solved by Digital Annealer, which is a quantum-inspired computing technology. The evaluation of the proposed method is carried out by simulation with the throughput traces obtained in real world under different scenarios and the comparison with other methods is conducted. Experiment results demonstrated that the proposed QuDASH method has better performance in terms of QoE compared with other advanced ABR methods. In 68.2% of the examined cases, QuDASH achieves the highest QoE results, which shows the superiority of the QuDASH over conventional methods.
summary: Internet traffic is dramatically increasing with the development of network technologies and video streaming traffic accounts for large amount within the total traffic, which reveals the importance to guarantee the quality of content delivery service. Based on the network conditions, adaptive bitrate (ABR) control is utilized as a common technique which can choose the proper bitrate to ensure the video streaming quality. In this paper, new bitrate control method, QuDASH is proposed by taking advantage of the emerging quantum technology. In QuDASH, the adaptive control model is developed using the quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO), which aims at increasing the average bitrate and decreasing the video rebuffering events to maximize the user quality of experience (QoE). In order to formulate the video control model, first the QUBO terms of different factors are defined regarding video quality, bitrate change, and buffer condition. Then, all the individual QUBO terms are merged to generate an objective function. By minimizing the QUBO objective function, the bitrate choice is determined from the solution. The control model is solved by Digital Annealer, which is a quantum-inspired computing technology. The evaluation of the proposed method is carried out by simulation with the throughput traces obtained in real world under different scenarios and the comparison with other methods is conducted. Experiment results demonstrated that the proposed QuDASH method has better performance in terms of QoE compared with other advanced ABR methods. In 68.2% of the examined cases, QuDASH achieves the highest QoE results, which shows the superiority of the QuDASH over conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 随着网络技术的发展，互联网流量急剧增加，视频流流量在总流量中所占比重较大，这凸显了保证内容交付服务质量的重要性。基于网络状况，自适应比特率（ABR）控制作为一种常用技术，可以选择合适的比特率来保证视频流质量。本文利用新兴的量子技术提出了新的比特率控制方法QuDASH。在 QuDASH 中，自适应控制模型是使用二次无约束二进制优化 (QUBO) 开发的，旨在提高平均比特率并减少视频重新缓冲事件，以最大限度地提高用户体验质量 (QoE)。为了制定视频控制模型，首先定义关于视频质量、比特率变化和缓冲区条件的不同因素的QUBO项。然后，合并所有单独的 QUBO 项以生成目标函数。通过最小化 QUBO 目标函数，比特率选择由解决定。控制模型由数字退火器解决，这是一种受量子启发的计算技术。通过仿真对现实世界中不同场景下获得的吞吐量轨迹进行评估，并与其他方法进行比较。实验结果表明，与其他先进的 ABR 方法相比，所提出的 QuDASH 方法在 QoE 方面具有更好的性能。在 68.2% 的检查案例中，QuDASH 获得了最高的 QoE 结果，这表明 QuDASH 相对于传统方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子技术的DASH视频流媒体比特率自适应方法QuDASH，旨在提升用户服务质量（QoE）。
AI.motivation: 随着视频流媒体流量占比激增，传统自适应比特率（ABR）方法在应对网络波动和优化用户体验方面存在不足，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过构建二次无约束二进制优化（QUBO）模型，将视频质量、比特率变化和缓冲状态等因素转化为目标函数，并利用量子模拟计算技术Digital Annealer求解最优比特率选择方案。
AI.result: 在68.2%的测试场景中，QuDASH的QoE指标优于其他先进ABR方法，显著减少了视频缓冲事件并提升了平均比特率。
AI.conclusion: 量子启发式算法有效解决了传统ABR方法的局限性，验证了QuDASH在视频流媒体质量优化中的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子技术的DASH视频流媒体比特率自适应方法QuDASH，旨在提升用户服务质量（QoE）。

motivation: 随着视频流媒体流量占比激增，传统自适应比特率（ABR）方法在应对网络波动和优化用户体验方面存在不足，亟需更高效的算法。
method: 通过构建二次无约束二进制优化（QUBO）模型，将视频质量、比特率变化和缓冲状态等因素转化为目标函数，并利用量子模拟计算技术Digital Annealer求解最优比特率选择方案。
result: 在68.2%的测试场景中，QuDASH的QoE指标优于其他先进ABR方法，显著减少了视频缓冲事件并提升了平均比特率。
conclusion: 量子启发式算法有效解决了传统ABR方法的局限性，验证了QuDASH在视频流媒体质量优化中的优越性。
search_text: QuDASH: Quantum-inspired rate adaptation approach for DASH video streaming QuDASH：DASH 视频流的量子启发速率自适应方法 Internet traffic is dramatically increasing with the development of network technologies and video streaming traffic accounts for large amount within the total traffic, which reveals the importance to guarantee the quality of content delivery service. Based on the network conditions, adaptive bitrate (ABR) control is utilized as a common technique which can choose the proper bitrate to ensure the video streaming quality. In this paper, new bitrate control method, QuDASH is proposed by taking advantage of the emerging quantum technology. In QuDASH, the adaptive control model is developed using the quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO), which aims at increasing the average bitrate and decreasing the video rebuffering events to maximize the user quality of experience (QoE). In order to formulate the video control model, first the QUBO terms of different factors are defined regarding video quality, bitrate change, and buffer condition. Then, all the individual QUBO terms are merged to generate an objective function. By minimizing the QUBO objective function, the bitrate choice is determined from the solution. The control model is solved by Digital Annealer, which is a quantum-inspired computing technology. The evaluation of the proposed method is carried out by simulation with the throughput traces obtained in real world under different scenarios and the comparison with other methods is conducted. Experiment results demonstrated that the proposed QuDASH method has better performance in terms of QoE compared with other advanced ABR methods. In 68.2% of the examined cases, QuDASH achieves the highest QoE results, which shows the superiority of the QuDASH over conventional methods. 随着网络技术的发展，互联网流量急剧增加，视频流流量在总流量中所占比重较大，这凸显了保证内容交付服务质量的重要性。基于网络状况，自适应比特率（ABR）控制作为一种常用技术，可以选择合适的比特率来保证视频流质量。本文利用新兴的量子技术提出了新的比特率控制方法QuDASH。在 QuDASH 中，自适应控制模型是使用二次无约束二进制优化 (QUBO) 开发的，旨在提高平均比特率并减少视频重新缓冲事件，以最大限度地提高用户体验质量 (QoE)。为了制定视频控制模型，首先定义关于视频质量、比特率变化和缓冲区条件的不同因素的QUBO项。然后，合并所有单独的 QUBO 项以生成目标函数。通过最小化 QUBO 目标函数，比特率选择由解决定。控制模型由数字退火器解决，这是一种受量子启发的计算技术。通过仿真对现实世界中不同场景下获得的吞吐量轨迹进行评估，并与其他方法进行比较。实验结果表明，与其他先进的 ABR 方法相比，所提出的 QuDASH 方法在 QoE 方面具有更好的性能。在 68.2% 的检查案例中，QuDASH 获得了最高的 QoE 结果，这表明 QuDASH 相对于传统方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于量子技术的DASH视频流媒体比特率自适应方法QuDASH，旨在提升用户服务质量（QoE）。 Bo Wei,Hang Song,Makoto Nakamura,Koichi Kimura,Nozomu Togawa,Jiro Katto cs.NI,cs.MM,eess.IV

authors_text: Songqiao Han,Xiyang Hu,Hailiang Huang,Mingqi Jiang,Yue Zhao
title: ADBench: Anomaly Detection Benchmark
title_zh: ADBench：异常检测基准
comment: NeurIPS 2022. All authors contribute equally and are listed alphabetically. Code available at https://github.com/Minqi824/ADBench
comments: NeurIPS 2022. All authors contribute equally and are listed alphabetically. Code available at https://github.com/Minqi824/ADBench
abstract: Given a long list of anomaly detection algorithms developed in the last few decades, how do they perform with regard to (i) varying levels of supervision, (ii) different types of anomalies, and (iii) noisy and corrupted data? In this work, we answer these key questions by conducting (to our best knowledge) the most comprehensive anomaly detection benchmark with 30 algorithms on 57 benchmark datasets, named ADBench. Our extensive experiments (98,436 in total) identify meaningful insights into the role of supervision and anomaly types, and unlock future directions for researchers in algorithm selection and design. With ADBench, researchers can easily conduct comprehensive and fair evaluations for newly proposed methods on the datasets (including our contributed ones from natural language and computer vision domains) against the existing baselines. To foster accessibility and reproducibility, we fully open-source ADBench and the corresponding results.
summary: Given a long list of anomaly detection algorithms developed in the last few decades, how do they perform with regard to (i) varying levels of supervision, (ii) different types of anomalies, and (iii) noisy and corrupted data? In this work, we answer these key questions by conducting (to our best knowledge) the most comprehensive anomaly detection benchmark with 30 algorithms on 57 benchmark datasets, named ADBench. Our extensive experiments (98,436 in total) identify meaningful insights into the role of supervision and anomaly types, and unlock future directions for researchers in algorithm selection and design. With ADBench, researchers can easily conduct comprehensive and fair evaluations for newly proposed methods on the datasets (including our contributed ones from natural language and computer vision domains) against the existing baselines. To foster accessibility and reproducibility, we fully open-source ADBench and the corresponding results.
abstract_zh: 鉴于过去几十年开发的一长串异常检测算法，它们在以下方面表现如何：（i）不同级别的监督，（ii）不同类型的异常，以及（iii）噪声和损坏的数据？在这项工作中，我们通过（据我们所知）在 57 个基准数据集上使用 30 种算法执行最全面的异常检测基准（名为 ADBench）来回答这些关键问题。我们广泛的实验（总共 98,436 个）确定了对监督和异常类型的作用的有意义的见解，并为研究人员在算法选择和设计方面揭示了未来的方向。借助 ADBench，研究人员可以轻松地根据现有基线对数据集（包括我们贡献的自然语言和计算机视觉领域的方法）上新提出的方法进行全面、公平的评估。为了提高可访问性和可重复性，我们完全开源 ADBench 和相应的结果。

AI.tldr: 构建名为ADBench的异常检测算法基准测试，评估30种算法在57个数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测算法在不同监督水平、异常类型及噪声数据下的表现缺乏系统性对比，需建立统一基准以指导算法选择与改进。
AI.method: 在57个基准数据集上测试30种异常检测算法，通过98,436次实验分析监督程度、异常类型及数据噪声对算法性能的影响。
AI.result: 发现监督水平与异常类型显著影响算法表现，提出未来研究方向，并开源ADBench以支持公平的算法评估。
AI.conclusion: ADBench为异常检测领域提供全面评估框架，促进新方法的可比性研究，推动算法设计与应用优化。

ai_content.conclusion: ADBench为异常检测领域提供全面评估框架，促进新方法的可比性研究，推动算法设计与应用优化。

authors_text: Uphar Singh,Tushar Musale,Ranjana Vyas,O. P. Vyas
title: Agricultural Plantation Classification using Transfer Learning Approach based on CNN
title_zh: 使用基于 CNN 的迁移学习方法进行农业种植园分类
abstract: Hyper-spectral images are images captured from a satellite that gives spatial and spectral information of specific region.A Hyper-spectral image contains much more number of channels as compared to a RGB image, hence containing more information about entities within the image. It makes them well suited for the classification of objects in a snap. In the past years, the efficiency of hyper-spectral image recognition has increased significantly with deep learning. The Convolution Neural Network(CNN) and Multi-Layer Perceptron(MLP) has demonstrated to be an excellent process of classifying images. However, they suffer from the issues of long training time and requirement of large amounts of the labeled data, to achieve the expected outcome. These issues become more complex while dealing with hyper-spectral images. To decrease the training time and reduce the dependence on large labeled data-set, we propose using the method of transfer learning.The features learned by CNN and MLP models are then used by the transfer learning model to solve a new classification problem on an unseen dataset. A detailed comparison of CNN and multiple MLP architectural models is performed, to determine an optimum architecture that suits best the objective. The results show that the scaling of layers not always leads to increase in accuracy but often leads to over-fitting, and also an increase in the training time.The training time is reduced to greater extent by applying the transfer learning approach rather than just approaching the problem by directly training a new model on large data-sets, without much affecting the accuracy.

To decrease the training time and reduce the dependence on large labeled data-set, we propose using the method of transfer learning.The features learned by CNN and MLP models are then used by the transfer learning model to solve a new classification problem on an unseen dataset. A detailed comparison of CNN and multiple MLP architectural models is performed, to determine an optimum architecture that suits best the objective. The results show that the scaling of layers not always leads to increase in accuracy but often leads to over-fitting, and also an increase in the training time.The training time is reduced to greater extent by applying the transfer learning approach rather than just approaching the problem by directly training a new model on large data-sets, without much affecting the accuracy.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像是从卫星捕获的图像，可提供特定区域的空间和光谱信息。与 RGB 图像相比，高光谱图像包含更多数量的通道，因此包含有关图像内实体的更多信息。这使得它们非常适合快速对对象进行分类。在过去的几年里，随着深度学习，高光谱图像识别的效率显着提高。卷积神经网络（CNN）和多层感知器（MLP）已被证明是一种出色的图像分类过程。然而，它们面临着训练时间长和需要大量标记数据才能达到预期结果的问题。在处理高光谱图像时，这些问题变得更加复杂。为了减少训练时间并减少对大型标记数据集的依赖，我们建议使用迁移学习的方法。然后迁移学习模型使用 CNN 和 MLP 模型学习的特征来解决未见过的数据集上的新分类问题。对 CNN 和多个 MLP 架构模型进行详细比较，以确定最适合目标的最佳架构。结果表明，层数的缩放并不总是会导致精度的提高，而是经常导致过拟合，并且还会增加训练时间。通过应用迁移学习方法，可以更大程度地减少训练时间，而不是直接在大数据集上训练新模型来解决问题，并且不会对精度产生太大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于CNN的迁移学习方法，用于高光谱图像的农业种植分类，以减少训练时间和对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含丰富的光谱信息，但传统CNN和MLP模型在处理时面临训练时间长、依赖大量标注数据的问题，尤其在高光谱场景下更为复杂。
AI.method: 通过迁移学习方法，利用预训练CNN和MLP模型的特征解决新分类问题，并对比不同CNN和MLP架构以确定最优结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，增加网络层数未必提升准确率且易导致过拟合，迁移学习显著减少训练时间且基本不影响分类精度。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习能有效提升高光谱图像分类效率，合理设计网络结构对平衡准确率与训练时间至关重要。

authors_text: Uphar Singh,Kumar Saurabh,Neelaksh Trehan,Ranjana Vyas,O. P. Vyas
title: Terrain Classification using Transfer Learning on Hyperspectral Images: A Comparative study
title_zh: 在高光谱图像上使用迁移学习进行地形分类：比较研究
abstract: A Hyperspectral image contains much more number of channels as compared to a RGB image, hence containing more information about entities within the image. The convolutional neural network (CNN) and the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) have been proven to be an effective method of image classification. However, they suffer from the issues of long training time and requirement of large amounts of the labeled data, to achieve the expected outcome. These issues become more complex while dealing with hyperspectral images. To decrease the training time and reduce the dependence on large labeled dataset, we propose using the method of transfer learning. The hyperspectral dataset is preprocessed to a lower dimension using PCA, then deep learning models are applied to it for the purpose of classification. The features learned by this model are then used by the transfer learning model to solve a new classification problem on an unseen dataset. A detailed comparison of CNN and multiple MLP architectural models is performed, to determine an optimum architecture that suits best the objective. The results show that the scaling of layers not always leads to increase in accuracy but often leads to overfitting, and also an increase in the training time.The training time is reduced to greater extent by applying the transfer learning approach rather than just approaching the problem by directly training a new model on large datasets, without much affecting the accuracy.
summary: A Hyperspectral image contains much more number of channels as compared to a RGB image, hence containing more information about entities within the image. The convolutional neural network (CNN) and the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) have been proven to be an effective method of image classification. However, they suffer from the issues of long training time and requirement of large amounts of the labeled data, to achieve the expected outcome. These issues become more complex while dealing with hyperspectral images. To decrease the training time and reduce the dependence on large labeled dataset, we propose using the method of transfer learning. The hyperspectral dataset is preprocessed to a lower dimension using PCA, then deep learning models are applied to it for the purpose of classification. The features learned by this model are then used by the transfer learning model to solve a new classification problem on an unseen dataset. A detailed comparison of CNN and multiple MLP architectural models is performed, to determine an optimum architecture that suits best the objective. The results show that the scaling of layers not always leads to increase in accuracy but often leads to overfitting, and also an increase in the training time.The training time is reduced to greater extent by applying the transfer learning approach rather than just approaching the problem by directly training a new model on large datasets, without much affecting the accuracy.
abstract_zh: 与 RGB 图像相比，高光谱图像包含更多数量的通道，因此包含有关图像内实体的更多信息。卷积神经网络（CNN）和多层感知器（MLP）已被证明是图像分类的有效方法。然而，它们面临着训练时间长和需要大量标记数据才能达到预期结果的问题。在处理高光谱图像时，这些问题变得更加复杂。为了减少训练时间并减少对大型标记数据集的依赖，我们建议使用迁移学习的方法。使用 PCA 将高光谱数据集预处理为较低维度，然后应用深度学习模型进行分类。然后，迁移学习模型使用该模型学到的特征来解决未见过的数据集上的新分类问题。对 CNN 和多个 MLP 架构模型进行详细比较，以确定最适合目标的最佳架构。结果表明，层数的缩放并不总是会导致精度的提高，而是经常导致过拟合，并且还会增加训练时间。通过应用迁移学习方法，可以更大程度地减少训练时间，而不是直接在大型数据集上训练新模型来解决问题，并且不会对精度产生太大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用迁移学习对高光谱图像进行地形分类的比较方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量通道，信息丰富，但传统方法训练时间长且依赖大量标记数据，因此提出迁移学习以减少训练时间和数据依赖。
AI.method: 使用PCA对高光谱数据集进行降维，然后应用深度学习模型进行分类，并利用迁移学习将学到的特征用于解决新分类问题。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，增加层数并不总是提高准确率，反而可能导致过拟合和训练时间增加，而迁移学习显著减少了训练时间且对准确率影响不大。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习在减少训练时间和数据依赖方面表现良好，且在高光谱图像分类任务中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Jiaming Zhang,Qi Yi,Dongyuan Lu,Jitao Sang
title: Low-Mid Adversarial Perturbation against Unauthorized Face Recognition System
title_zh: 针对未经授权的人脸识别系统的中低对抗扰动
abstract: In light of the growing concerns regarding the unauthorized use of facial recognition systems and its implications on individual privacy, the exploration of adversarial perturbations as a potential countermeasure has gained traction. However, challenges arise in effectively deploying this approach against unauthorized facial recognition systems due to the effects of JPEG compression on image distribution across the internet, which ultimately diminishes the efficacy of adversarial perturbations. Existing JPEG compression-resistant techniques struggle to strike a balance between resistance, transferability, and attack potency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel solution referred to as \emph{low frequency adversarial perturbation} (LFAP). This method conditions the source model to leverage low-frequency characteristics through adversarial training. To further enhance the performance, we introduce an improved \emph{low-mid frequency adversarial perturbation} (LMFAP) that incorporates mid-frequency components for an additive benefit. Our study encompasses a range of settings to replicate genuine application scenarios, including cross backbones, supervisory heads, training datasets, and testing datasets. Moreover, we evaluated our approaches on a commercial black-box API, \texttt{Face++}. The empirical results validate the cutting-edge performance achieved by our proposed solutions.
summary: In light of the growing concerns regarding the unauthorized use of facial recognition systems and its implications on individual privacy, the exploration of adversarial perturbations as a potential countermeasure has gained traction. However, challenges arise in effectively deploying this approach against unauthorized facial recognition systems due to the effects of JPEG compression on image distribution across the internet, which ultimately diminishes the efficacy of adversarial perturbations. Existing JPEG compression-resistant techniques struggle to strike a balance between resistance, transferability, and attack potency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel solution referred to as \emph{low frequency adversarial perturbation} (LFAP). This method conditions the source model to leverage low-frequency characteristics through adversarial training. To further enhance the performance, we introduce an improved \emph{low-mid frequency adversarial perturbation} (LMFAP) that incorporates mid-frequency components for an additive benefit. Our study encompasses a range of settings to replicate genuine application scenarios, including cross backbones, supervisory heads, training datasets, and testing datasets. Moreover, we evaluated our approaches on a commercial black-box API, \texttt{Face++}. The empirical results validate the cutting-edge performance achieved by our proposed solutions.
abstract_zh: 鉴于人们越来越担心未经授权使用面部识别系统及其对个人隐私的影响，将对抗性扰动作为潜在对策的探索已经受到关注。然而，由于 JPEG 压缩对互联网上图像分布的影响，有效部署这种方法来对抗未经授权的面部识别系统会出现挑战，这最终会削弱对抗性扰动的效果。现有的 JPEG 抗压缩技术很难在抗压缩性、可传输性和攻击能力之间取得平衡。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种称为\emph{低频对抗性扰动}（LFAP）的新颖解决方案。该方法通过对抗性训练调节源模型以利用低频特征。为了进一步增强性能，我们引入了改进的\emph{低中频对抗性扰动}（LMFAP），它结合了中频分量以获得附加优势。我们的研究涵盖了一系列复制真实应用场景的设置，包括跨主干、监督头、训练数据集和测试数据集。此外，我们还在商业黑盒 API \texttt{Face++} 上评估了我们的方法。实证结果验证了我们提出的解决方案所实现的尖端性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对未经授权人脸识别系统的低中频对抗扰动方法（LMFAP），以解决JPEG压缩导致的对抗扰动失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗扰动技术在JPEG压缩下效果下降，难以平衡抗压性、可迁移性和攻击强度，需更有效的解决方案保护隐私。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练构建低频对抗扰动（LFAP），并引入中频成分改进为LMFAP，增强对压缩图像的鲁棒性与攻击性。
AI.result: 实验表明LMFAP在跨模型、跨数据集及商业API（Face++）测试中均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: LMFAP通过结合低中频特征显著提升了对抗扰动的实用性，为应对人脸识别隐私风险提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 实验表明LMFAP在跨模型、跨数据集及商业API（Face++）测试中均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: LMFAP通过结合低中频特征显著提升了对抗扰动的实用性，为应对人脸识别隐私风险提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jenthe Thienpondt,Kris Demuynck
title: Transfer Learning for Robust Low-Resource Children's Speech ASR with Transformers and Source-Filter Warping
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 和源滤波器变形进行稳健的低资源儿童语音 ASR 的迁移学习
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are known to exhibit difficulties when transcribing children's speech. This can mainly be attributed to the absence of large children's speech corpora to train robust ASR models and the resulting domain mismatch when decoding children's speech with systems trained on adult data. In this paper, we propose multiple enhancements to alleviate these issues. First, we propose a data augmentation technique based on the source-filter model of speech to close the domain gap between adult and children's speech. This enables us to leverage the data availability of adult speech corpora by making these samples perceptually similar to children's speech. Second, using this augmentation strategy, we apply transfer learning on a Transformer model pre-trained on adult data. This model follows the recently introduced XLS-R architecture, a wav2vec 2.0 model pre-trained on several cross-lingual adult speech corpora to learn general and robust acoustic frame-level representations. Adopting this model for the ASR task using adult data augmented with the proposed source-filter warping strategy and a limited amount of in-domain children's speech significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art results on the PF-STAR British English Children's Speech corpus with a 4.86% WER on the official test set.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are known to exhibit difficulties when transcribing children's speech. This can mainly be attributed to the absence of large children's speech corpora to train robust ASR models and the resulting domain mismatch when decoding children's speech with systems trained on adult data. In this paper, we propose multiple enhancements to alleviate these issues. First, we propose a data augmentation technique based on the source-filter model of speech to close the domain gap between adult and children's speech. This enables us to leverage the data availability of adult speech corpora by making these samples perceptually similar to children's speech. Second, using this augmentation strategy, we apply transfer learning on a Transformer model pre-trained on adult data. This model follows the recently introduced XLS-R architecture, a wav2vec 2.0 model pre-trained on several cross-lingual adult speech corpora to learn general and robust acoustic frame-level representations. Adopting this model for the ASR task using adult data augmented with the proposed source-filter warping strategy and a limited amount of in-domain children's speech significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art results on the PF-STAR British English Children's Speech corpus with a 4.86% WER on the official test set.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统在转录儿童语音时会遇到困难。这主要是由于缺乏大型儿童语音语料库来训练强大的 ASR 模型，以及在使用成人数据训练的系统解码儿童语音时导致的域不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了多项增强措施来缓解这些问题。首先，我们提出了一种基于语音源过滤模型的数据增强技术，以缩小成人和儿童语音之间的领域差距。这使我们能够通过使这些样本在感知上与儿童语音相似来利用成人语音语料库的数据可用性。其次，使用这种增强策略，我们将迁移学习应用于根据成人数据预先训练的 Transformer 模型。该模型遵循最近推出的 XLS-R 架构，这是一种在多个跨语言成人语音语料库上进行预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型，用于学习通用且稳健的声学帧级表示。采用该模型进行 ASR 任务，使用成人数据，并使用所提出的源过滤器扭曲策略和有限数量的域内儿童语音进行增强，显着优于 PF-STAR 英国英语儿童语音语料库上之前的最先进结果，在官方测试集上的 WER 为 4.86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合迁移学习与源滤波器变形技术，解决低资源条件下儿童语音识别的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统难以处理儿童语音，因缺乏儿童语料库且成人模型存在领域差异。
AI.method: 基于源-滤波器模型设计数据增强技术缩小成人与儿童语音差距，并在XLS-R预训练Transformer模型上应用迁移学习。
AI.result: 在PF-STAR数据集上实现4.86% WER，显著优于先前最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强与迁移学习结合可有效提升低资源儿童语音识别性能，缩小领域差异。
