search_text: Transfer Learning for Robust Low-Resource Children's Speech ASR with Transformers and Source-Filter Warping 使用 Transformer 和源滤波器变形进行稳健的低资源儿童语音 ASR 的迁移学习 Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are known to exhibit difficulties when transcribing children's speech. This can mainly be attributed to the absence of large children's speech corpora to train robust ASR models and the resulting domain mismatch when decoding children's speech with systems trained on adult data. In this paper, we propose multiple enhancements to alleviate these issues. First, we propose a data augmentation technique based on the source-filter model of speech to close the domain gap between adult and children's speech. This enables us to leverage the data availability of adult speech corpora by making these samples perceptually similar to children's speech. Second, using this augmentation strategy, we apply transfer learning on a Transformer model pre-trained on adult data. This model follows the recently introduced XLS-R architecture, a wav2vec 2.0 model pre-trained on several cross-lingual adult speech corpora to learn general and robust acoustic frame-level representations. Adopting this model for the ASR task using adult data augmented with the proposed source-filter warping strategy and a limited amount of in-domain children's speech significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art results on the PF-STAR British English Children's Speech corpus with a 4.86% WER on the official test set. 众所周知，自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统在转录儿童语音时会遇到困难。这主要是由于缺乏大型儿童语音语料库来训练强大的 ASR 模型，以及在使用成人数据训练的系统解码儿童语音时导致的域不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了多项增强措施来缓解这些问题。首先，我们提出了一种基于语音源过滤模型的数据增强技术，以缩小成人和儿童语音之间的领域差距。这使我们能够通过使这些样本在感知上与儿童语音相似来利用成人语音语料库的数据可用性。其次，使用这种增强策略，我们将迁移学习应用于根据成人数据预先训练的 Transformer 模型。该模型遵循最近推出的 XLS-R 架构，这是一种在多个跨语言成人语音语料库上进行预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型，用于学习通用且稳健的声学帧级表示。采用该模型进行 ASR 任务，使用成人数据，并使用所提出的源过滤器扭曲策略和有限数量的域内儿童语音进行增强，显着优于 PF-STAR 英国英语儿童语音语料库上之前的最先进结果，在官方测试集上的 WER 为 4.86%。 本文提出结合迁移学习与源滤波器变形技术，解决低资源条件下儿童语音识别的鲁棒性问题。 Jenthe Thienpondt,Kris Demuynck eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Jiaming Zhang,Qi Yi,Jitao Sang
title: Towards Adversarial Attack on Vision-Language Pre-training Models
title_zh: 针对视觉语言预训练模型的对抗性攻击
comment: Accepted by ACM MM2022. Code is available in GitHub
comments: Accepted by ACM MM2022. Code is available in GitHub
abstract: While vision-language pre-training model (VLP) has shown revolutionary improvements on various vision-language (V+L) tasks, the studies regarding its adversarial robustness remain largely unexplored. This paper studied the adversarial attack on popular VLP models and V+L tasks. First, we analyzed the performance of adversarial attacks under different settings. By examining the influence of different perturbed objects and attack targets, we concluded some key observations as guidance on both designing strong multimodal adversarial attack and constructing robust VLP models. Second, we proposed a novel multimodal attack method on the VLP models called Collaborative Multimodal Adversarial Attack (Co-Attack), which collectively carries out the attacks on the image modality and the text modality. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method achieves improved attack performances on different V+L downstream tasks and VLP models. The analysis observations and novel attack method hopefully provide new understanding into the adversarial robustness of VLP models, so as to contribute their safe and reliable deployment in more real-world scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/adversarial-for-goodness/Co-Attack.
summary: While vision-language pre-training model (VLP) has shown revolutionary improvements on various vision-language (V+L) tasks, the studies regarding its adversarial robustness remain largely unexplored. This paper studied the adversarial attack on popular VLP models and V+L tasks. First, we analyzed the performance of adversarial attacks under different settings. By examining the influence of different perturbed objects and attack targets, we concluded some key observations as guidance on both designing strong multimodal adversarial attack and constructing robust VLP models. Second, we proposed a novel multimodal attack method on the VLP models called Collaborative Multimodal Adversarial Attack (Co-Attack), which collectively carries out the attacks on the image modality and the text modality. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method achieves improved attack performances on different V+L downstream tasks and VLP models. The analysis observations and novel attack method hopefully provide new understanding into the adversarial robustness of VLP models, so as to contribute their safe and reliable deployment in more real-world scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/adversarial-for-goodness/Co-Attack.
abstract_zh: 虽然视觉语言预训练模型（VLP）在各种视觉语言（V+L）任务上显示出革命性的改进，但有关其对抗鲁棒性的研究在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本文研究了流行的 VLP 模型和 V+L 任务的对抗性攻击。首先，我们分析了不同设置下对抗性攻击的性能。通过检查不同扰动对象和攻击目标的影响，我们得出了一些关键观察结果，作为设计强多模态对抗攻击和构建鲁棒 VLP 模型的指导。其次，我们提出了一种针对 VLP 模型的新型多模态攻击方法，称为协作多模态对抗攻击（Co-Attack），该方法共同对图像模态和文本模态进行攻击。实验结果表明，该方法在不同的V+L下游任务和VLP模型上实现了改进的攻击性能。分析观察和新颖的攻击方法有望为VLP模型的对抗鲁棒性提供新的理解，从而为其在更真实的场景中安全可靠的部署做出贡献。代码可在 https://github.com/adversarial-for-goodness/Co-Attack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对视觉-语言预训练模型（VLP）的对抗攻击方法，并提出了多模态协作攻击框架Co-Attack。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLP模型在视觉-语言任务中表现优异，但其对抗鲁棒性研究尚属空白，需探索有效攻击方法以指导模型安全加固。
AI.method: 提出协作多模态对抗攻击（Co-Attack）方法，同时攻击图像和文本模态，通过联合优化扰动实现跨模态协同攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明Co-Attack在多个V+L下游任务和VLP模型上均取得优于单模态攻击的性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了VLP模型的对抗脆弱性，为构建更鲁棒的多模态模型提供了理论指导和实践参考。

authors_text: Tianshi Cao,Sasha Doubov,David Acuna,Sanja Fidler
title: Scalable Neural Data Server: A Data Recommender for Transfer Learning
title_zh: 可扩展的神经数据服务器：用于迁移学习的数据推荐器
abstract: Absence of large-scale labeled data in the practitioner's target domain can be a bottleneck to applying machine learning algorithms in practice. Transfer learning is a popular strategy for leveraging additional data to improve the downstream performance, but finding the most relevant data to transfer from can be challenging. Neural Data Server (NDS), a search engine that recommends relevant data for a given downstream task, has been previously proposed to address this problem. NDS uses a mixture of experts trained on data sources to estimate similarity between each source and the downstream task. Thus, the computational cost to each user grows with the number of sources. To address these issues, we propose Scalable Neural Data Server (SNDS), a large-scale search engine that can theoretically index thousands of datasets to serve relevant ML data to end users. SNDS trains the mixture of experts on intermediary datasets during initialization, and represents both data sources and downstream tasks by their proximity to the intermediary datasets. As such, computational cost incurred by SNDS users remains fixed as new datasets are added to the server. We validate SNDS on a plethora of real world tasks and find that data recommended by SNDS improves downstream task performance over baselines. We also demonstrate the scalability of SNDS by showing its ability to select relevant data for transfer outside of the natural image setting.
summary: Absence of large-scale labeled data in the practitioner's target domain can be a bottleneck to applying machine learning algorithms in practice. Transfer learning is a popular strategy for leveraging additional data to improve the downstream performance, but finding the most relevant data to transfer from can be challenging. Neural Data Server (NDS), a search engine that recommends relevant data for a given downstream task, has been previously proposed to address this problem. NDS uses a mixture of experts trained on data sources to estimate similarity between each source and the downstream task. Thus, the computational cost to each user grows with the number of sources. To address these issues, we propose Scalable Neural Data Server (SNDS), a large-scale search engine that can theoretically index thousands of datasets to serve relevant ML data to end users. SNDS trains the mixture of experts on intermediary datasets during initialization, and represents both data sources and downstream tasks by their proximity to the intermediary datasets. As such, computational cost incurred by SNDS users remains fixed as new datasets are added to the server. We validate SNDS on a plethora of real world tasks and find that data recommended by SNDS improves downstream task performance over baselines. We also demonstrate the scalability of SNDS by showing its ability to select relevant data for transfer outside of the natural image setting.
abstract_zh: 从业者的目标领域中缺乏大规模标记数据可能成为在实践中应用机器学习算法的瓶颈。迁移学习是一种利用额外数据来提高下游性能的流行策略，但找到最相关的数据进行迁移可能具有挑战性。神经数据服务器（NDS）是一种为给定下游任务推荐相关数据的搜索引擎，之前已经被提出来解决这个问题。 NDS 使用经过数据源培训的专家来估计每个源与下游任务之间的相似性。因此，每个用户的计算成本随着源数量的增加而增加。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了可扩展神经数据服务器（SNDS），这是一种大型搜索引擎，理论上可以索引数千个数据集，以便为最终用户提供相关的机器学习数据。 SNDS 在初始化期间对中间数据集的专家混合进行训练，并通过数据源和下游任务与中间数据集的接近程度来表示。因此，当新数据集添加到服务器时，SNDS 用户产生的计算成本保持不变。我们在大量现实世界任务上验证 SNDS，发现 SNDS 推荐的数据比基线提高了下游任务性能。我们还通过展示 SNDS 选择相关数据在自然图像设置之外传输的能力来展示 SNDS 的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出可扩展的神经数据服务器（SNDS），用于解决迁移学习中数据推荐的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据推荐系统（如NDS）在数据源增多时计算成本显著上升，限制了其大规模应用。
AI.method: 通过在初始化阶段使用中介数据集训练专家混合模型，使数据源和任务表示基于与中介数据的接近性，保持用户计算成本恒定。
AI.result: 在多个现实任务中验证了SNDS推荐数据的有效性，且证明其在非自然图像场景下具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SNDS通过中介数据集机制实现了高效可扩展的数据推荐，显著提升了迁移学习性能。

search_text: Scalable Neural Data Server: A Data Recommender for Transfer Learning 可扩展的神经数据服务器：用于迁移学习的数据推荐器 Absence of large-scale labeled data in the practitioner's target domain can be a bottleneck to applying machine learning algorithms in practice. Transfer learning is a popular strategy for leveraging additional data to improve the downstream performance, but finding the most relevant data to transfer from can be challenging. Neural Data Server (NDS), a search engine that recommends relevant data for a given downstream task, has been previously proposed to address this problem. NDS uses a mixture of experts trained on data sources to estimate similarity between each source and the downstream task. Thus, the computational cost to each user grows with the number of sources. To address these issues, we propose Scalable Neural Data Server (SNDS), a large-scale search engine that can theoretically index thousands of datasets to serve relevant ML data to end users. SNDS trains the mixture of experts on intermediary datasets during initialization, and represents both data sources and downstream tasks by their proximity to the intermediary datasets. As such, computational cost incurred by SNDS users remains fixed as new datasets are added to the server. We validate SNDS on a plethora of real world tasks and find that data recommended by SNDS improves downstream task performance over baselines. We also demonstrate the scalability of SNDS by showing its ability to select relevant data for transfer outside of the natural image setting. 从业者的目标领域中缺乏大规模标记数据可能成为在实践中应用机器学习算法的瓶颈。迁移学习是一种利用额外数据来提高下游性能的流行策略，但找到最相关的数据进行迁移可能具有挑战性。神经数据服务器（NDS）是一种为给定下游任务推荐相关数据的搜索引擎，之前已经被提出来解决这个问题。 NDS 使用经过数据源培训的专家来估计每个源与下游任务之间的相似性。因此，每个用户的计算成本随着源数量的增加而增加。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了可扩展神经数据服务器（SNDS），这是一种大型搜索引擎，理论上可以索引数千个数据集，以便为最终用户提供相关的机器学习数据。 SNDS 在初始化期间对中间数据集的专家混合进行训练，并通过数据源和下游任务与中间数据集的接近程度来表示。因此，当新数据集添加到服务器时，SNDS 用户产生的计算成本保持不变。我们在大量现实世界任务上验证 SNDS，发现 SNDS 推荐的数据比基线提高了下游任务性能。我们还通过展示 SNDS 选择相关数据在自然图像设置之外传输的能力来展示 SNDS 的可扩展性。 本文提出可扩展的神经数据服务器（SNDS），用于解决迁移学习中数据推荐的可扩展性问题。 Tianshi Cao,Sasha Doubov,David Acuna,Sanja Fidler cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Oren Mangoubi,Nisheeth K. Vishnoi
title: Sampling from Log-Concave Distributions over Polytopes via a Soft-Threshold Dikin Walk
title_zh: 通过软阈值 Dikin Walk 从多面体上的对数凹分布进行采样
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.04089
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.04089
abstract: Given a Lipschitz or smooth convex function $\, f:K \to \mathbb{R}$ for a bounded polytope $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ defined by $m$ inequalities, we consider the problem of sampling from the log-concave distribution $π(θ) \propto e^{-f(θ)}$ constrained to $K$. Interest in this problem derives from its applications to Bayesian inference and differentially private learning. Our main result is a generalization of the Dikin walk Markov chain to this setting that requires at most $O((md + d L^2 R^2) \times md^{ω-1}) \log(\frac{w}δ))$ arithmetic operations to sample from $π$ within error $δ>0$ in the total variation distance from a $w$-warm start. Here $L$ is the Lipschitz-constant of $f$, $K$ is contained in a ball of radius $R$ and contains a ball of smaller radius $r$, and $ω$ is the matrix-multiplication constant. Our algorithm improves on the running time of prior works for a range of parameter settings important for the aforementioned learning applications. Technically, we depart from previous Dikin walks by adding a "soft-threshold" regularizer derived from the Lipschitz or smoothness properties of $f$ to the log-barrier function for $K$ that allows our version of the Dikin walk to propose updates that have a high Metropolis acceptance ratio for $f$, while at the same time remaining inside the polytope $K$.

Interest in this problem derives from its applications to Bayesian inference and differentially private learning. Our main result is a generalization of the Dikin walk Markov chain to this setting that requires at most $O((md + d L^2 R^2) \times md^{ω-1}) \log(\frac{w}δ))$ arithmetic operations to sample from $π$ within error $δ>0$ in the total variation distance from a $w$-warm start. Here $L$ is the Lipschitz-constant of $f$, $K$ is contained in a ball of radius $R$ and contains a ball of smaller radius $r$, and $ω$ is the matrix-multiplication constant. Our algorithm improves on the running time of prior works for a range of parameter settings important for the aforementioned learning applications. Technically, we depart from previous Dikin walks by adding a "soft-threshold" regularizer derived from the Lipschitz or smoothness properties of $f$ to the log-barrier function for $K$ that allows our version of the Dikin walk to propose updates that have a high Metropolis acceptance ratio for $f$, while at the same time remaining inside the polytope $K$.
abstract_zh: 给定由 $m$ 不等式定义的有界多面体 $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ 的 Lipschitz 或平滑凸函数 $\, f:K \to \mathbb{R}$，我们考虑从约束于 $K$ 的对数凹分布 $π(θ) \propto e^{-f(θ)}$ 进行采样的问题。对这个问题的兴趣源于其在贝叶斯推理和差分隐私学习中的应用。我们的主要结果是将迪金行走马尔可夫链推广到此设置，最多需要 $O((md + d L^2 R^2) \times md^{ω-1}) \log(\frac{w}δ))$ 算术运算，以从 $π$ 进行采样，误差范围为 $δ>0$，从 $w$-warm 开始的总变化距离。这里$L$ 是$f$ 的Lipschitz 常数，$K$ 包含在半径为$R$ 的球中并包含半径较小的半径$r$ 的球，$ω$ 是矩阵乘法常数。我们的算法改进了先前工作的运行时间，针对上述学习应用程序重要的一系列参数设置。从技术上讲，我们与之前的 Dikin 行走不同，将源自 Lipschitz 或 $f$ 的平滑属性的“软阈值”正则化器添加到 $K$ 的对数屏障函数中，这允许我们的 Dikin 行走版本提出对 $f$ 具有高 Metropolis 接受率的更新，同时保留在多胞​​体 $K$ 内。

AI.tldr: 研究从由多面体约束的对数凹分布中采样的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 该问题在贝叶斯推理和差分隐私学习中有重要应用，现有方法在某些参数设置下运行时间不够理想。
AI.method: 提出一种软阈值Dikin游走马尔可夫链，通过向对数障碍函数添加基于函数Lipschitz或光滑性的软阈值正则化项，使得提议更新具有高Metropolis接受率且始终停留在多面体内。
AI.result: 算法需要最多O((md + d L² R²) × md^{ω-1}) log(w/δ)次算术运算，即可从w-热启动下达到总变差距离误差δ的采样，改进了先前工作在关键参数设置下的运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 该软阈值Dikin游走方法在多种重要学习应用参数设置中优于先前工作，为约束对数凹分布采样提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Alva Kosasih,Vincent Onasis,Vera Miloslavskaya,Wibowo Hardjawana,Victor Andrean,Branka Vucetic
title: Graph Neural Network Aided MU-MIMO Detectors
title_zh: 图神经网络辅助 MU-MIMO 检测器
abstract: Multi-user multiple-input multiple-output (MU-MIMO) systems can be used to meet high throughput requirements of 5G and beyond networks. A base station serves many users in an uplink MU-MIMO system, leading to a substantial multi-user interference (MUI). Designing a high-performance detector for dealing with a strong MUI is challenging. This paper analyses the performance degradation caused by the posterior distribution approximation used in the state-of-the-art message passing (MP) detectors in the presence of high MUI. We develop a graph neural network based framework to fine-tune the MP detectors' cavity distributions and thus improve the posterior distribution approximation in the MP detectors. We then propose two novel neural network based detectors which rely on the expectation propagation (EP) and Bayesian parallel interference cancellation (BPIC), referred to as the GEPNet and GPICNet detectors, respectively. The GEPNet detector maximizes detection performance, while GPICNet detector balances the performance and complexity. We provide proof of the permutation equivariance property, allowing the detectors to be trained only once, even in the systems with dynamic changes of the number of users. The simulation results show that the proposed GEPNet detector performance approaches maximum likelihood performance in various configurations and GPICNet detector doubles the multiplexing gain of BPIC detector.
summary: Multi-user multiple-input multiple-output (MU-MIMO) systems can be used to meet high throughput requirements of 5G and beyond networks. A base station serves many users in an uplink MU-MIMO system, leading to a substantial multi-user interference (MUI). Designing a high-performance detector for dealing with a strong MUI is challenging. This paper analyses the performance degradation caused by the posterior distribution approximation used in the state-of-the-art message passing (MP) detectors in the presence of high MUI. We develop a graph neural network based framework to fine-tune the MP detectors' cavity distributions and thus improve the posterior distribution approximation in the MP detectors. We then propose two novel neural network based detectors which rely on the expectation propagation (EP) and Bayesian parallel interference cancellation (BPIC), referred to as the GEPNet and GPICNet detectors, respectively. The GEPNet detector maximizes detection performance, while GPICNet detector balances the performance and complexity. We provide proof of the permutation equivariance property, allowing the detectors to be trained only once, even in the systems with dynamic changes of the number of users. The simulation results show that the proposed GEPNet detector performance approaches maximum likelihood performance in various configurations and GPICNet detector doubles the multiplexing gain of BPIC detector.
abstract_zh: 多用户多输入多输出 (MU-MIMO) 系统可用于满足 5G 及更高网络的高吞吐量要求。上行MU-MIMO系统中，一个基站为多个用户提供服务，导致大量的多用户干扰（MUI）。设计一个高性能检测器来处理强大的 MUI 具有挑战性。本文分析了在存在高 MUI 的情况下，最先进的消息传递 (MP) 检测器中使用的后验分布近似所导致的性能下降。我们开发了一个基于图神经网络的框架来微调 MP 检测器的腔分布，从而改进 MP 检测器中的后验分布近似。然后，我们提出了两种基于神经网络的新型检测器，它们依赖于期望传播（EP）和贝叶斯并行干扰消除（BPIC），分别称为 GEPNet 和 GPICNet 检测器。 GEPNet检测器最大限度地提高了检测性能，而GPICNet检测器则平衡了性能和复杂性。我们提供了排列等方差性质的证明，允许检测器仅被训练一次，即使在用户数量动态变化的系统中也是如此。仿真结果表明，所提出的 GEPNet 检测器性能在各种配置下均接近最大似然性能，并且 GPICNet 检测器使 BPIC 检测器的复用增益加倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的新型MU-MIMO检测器，通过优化消息传递检测器的后验分布近似来提升多用户干扰下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有消息传递检测器在强多用户干扰下因后验分布近似不足导致性能下降，需设计更高效的检测框架以应对5G及未来网络的高吞吐需求。
AI.method: 构建图神经网络框架优化消息传递检测器的空腔分布，提出基于期望传播（EP）和贝叶斯并行干扰抵消（BPIC）的GEPNet和GPICNet检测器，并证明其置换等变性以适应用户数量动态变化。
AI.result: 仿真表明GEPNet检测性能接近最大似然检测，GPICNet检测器的复用增益较BPIC提升一倍，且两者均具备良好的用户数量适应性。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络与消息传递检测器的结合有效提升了MU-MIMO系统在高干扰场景下的检测性能与复杂度平衡，为未来无线通信系统提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的新型MU-MIMO检测器，通过优化消息传递检测器的后验分布近似来提升多用户干扰下的检测性能。
motivation: 现有消息传递检测器在强多用户干扰下因后验分布近似不足导致性能下降，需设计更高效的检测框架以应对5G及未来网络的高吞吐需求。
method: 构建图神经网络框架优化消息传递检测器的空腔分布，提出基于期望传播（EP）和贝叶斯并行干扰抵消（BPIC）的GEPNet和GPICNet检测器，并证明其置换等变性以适应用户数量动态变化。
result: 仿真表明GEPNet检测性能接近最大似然检测，GPICNet检测器的复用增益较BPIC提升一倍，且两者均具备良好的用户数量适应性。
conclusion: 图神经网络与消息传递检测器的结合有效提升了MU-MIMO系统在高干扰场景下的检测性能与复杂度平衡，为未来无线通信系统提供新思路。
search_text: Graph Neural Network Aided MU-MIMO Detectors 图神经网络辅助 MU-MIMO 检测器 Multi-user multiple-input multiple-output (MU-MIMO) systems can be used to meet high throughput requirements of 5G and beyond networks. A base station serves many users in an uplink MU-MIMO system, leading to a substantial multi-user interference (MUI). Designing a high-performance detector for dealing with a strong MUI is challenging. This paper analyses the performance degradation caused by the posterior distribution approximation used in the state-of-the-art message passing (MP) detectors in the presence of high MUI. We develop a graph neural network based framework to fine-tune the MP detectors' cavity distributions and thus improve the posterior distribution approximation in the MP detectors. We then propose two novel neural network based detectors which rely on the expectation propagation (EP) and Bayesian parallel interference cancellation (BPIC), referred to as the GEPNet and GPICNet detectors, respectively. The GEPNet detector maximizes detection performance, while GPICNet detector balances the performance and complexity. We provide proof of the permutation equivariance property, allowing the detectors to be trained only once, even in the systems with dynamic changes of the number of users. The simulation results show that the proposed GEPNet detector performance approaches maximum likelihood performance in various configurations and GPICNet detector doubles the multiplexing gain of BPIC detector. 多用户多输入多输出 (MU-MIMO) 系统可用于满足 5G 及更高网络的高吞吐量要求。上行MU-MIMO系统中，一个基站为多个用户提供服务，导致大量的多用户干扰（MUI）。设计一个高性能检测器来处理强大的 MUI 具有挑战性。本文分析了在存在高 MUI 的情况下，最先进的消息传递 (MP) 检测器中使用的后验分布近似所导致的性能下降。我们开发了一个基于图神经网络的框架来微调 MP 检测器的腔分布，从而改进 MP 检测器中的后验分布近似。然后，我们提出了两种基于神经网络的新型检测器，它们依赖于期望传播（EP）和贝叶斯并行干扰消除（BPIC），分别称为 GEPNet 和 GPICNet 检测器。 GEPNet检测器最大限度地提高了检测性能，而GPICNet检测器则平衡了性能和复杂性。我们提供了排列等方差性质的证明，允许检测器仅被训练一次，即使在用户数量动态变化的系统中也是如此。仿真结果表明，所提出的 GEPNet 检测器性能在各种配置下均接近最大似然性能，并且 GPICNet 检测器使 BPIC 检测器的复用增益加倍。 本文提出基于图神经网络的新型MU-MIMO检测器，通过优化消息传递检测器的后验分布近似来提升多用户干扰下的检测性能。 Alva Kosasih,Vincent Onasis,Vera Miloslavskaya,Wibowo Hardjawana,Victor Andrean,Branka Vucetic eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Jun Li,Shibo Li,Ying Hu,Huiren Tao
title: A Self-Guided Framework for Radiology Report Generation
title_zh: 放射学报告生成的自引导框架
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, accepted by Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention 2022(MICCAI 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, accepted by Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention 2022(MICCAI 2022)
abstract: Automatic radiology report generation is essential to computer-aided diagnosis. Through the success of image captioning, medical report generation has been achievable. However, the lack of annotated disease labels is still the bottleneck of this area. In addition, the image-text data bias problem and complex sentences make it more difficult to generate accurate reports. To address these gaps, we pre-sent a self-guided framework (SGF), a suite of unsupervised and supervised deep learning methods to mimic the process of human learning and writing. In detail, our framework obtains the domain knowledge from medical reports with-out extra disease labels and guides itself to extract fined-grain visual features as-sociated with the text. Moreover, SGF successfully improves the accuracy and length of medical report generation by incorporating a similarity comparison mechanism that imitates the process of human self-improvement through compar-ative practice. Extensive experiments demonstrate the utility of our SGF in the majority of cases, showing its superior performance over state-of-the-art meth-ods. Our results highlight the capacity of the proposed framework to distinguish fined-grained visual details between words and verify its advantage in generating medical reports.
summary: Automatic radiology report generation is essential to computer-aided diagnosis. Through the success of image captioning, medical report generation has been achievable. However, the lack of annotated disease labels is still the bottleneck of this area. In addition, the image-text data bias problem and complex sentences make it more difficult to generate accurate reports. To address these gaps, we pre-sent a self-guided framework (SGF), a suite of unsupervised and supervised deep learning methods to mimic the process of human learning and writing. In detail, our framework obtains the domain knowledge from medical reports with-out extra disease labels and guides itself to extract fined-grain visual features as-sociated with the text. Moreover, SGF successfully improves the accuracy and length of medical report generation by incorporating a similarity comparison mechanism that imitates the process of human self-improvement through compar-ative practice. Extensive experiments demonstrate the utility of our SGF in the majority of cases, showing its superior performance over state-of-the-art meth-ods. Our results highlight the capacity of the proposed framework to distinguish fined-grained visual details between words and verify its advantage in generating medical reports.
abstract_zh: 自动生成放射学报告对于计算机辅助诊断至关重要。通过图像字幕的成功，医疗报告的生成已经成为可能。然而，缺乏带注释的疾病标签仍然是该领域的瓶颈。此外，图文数据偏差问题和复杂的句子使得生成准确的报告变得更加困难。为了解决这些差距，我们提出了一个自引导框架（SGF），这是一套无监督和有监督的深度学习方法来模仿人类学习和写作的过程。具体来说，我们的框架从医疗报告中获取领域知识，无需额外的疾病标签，并引导自身提取与文本相关的细粒度视觉特征。此外，SGF通过引入相似性比较机制，模仿人类通过比较实践自我完善的过程，成功地提高了医疗报告生成的准确性和长度。大量的实验证明了我们的 SGF 在大多数情况下的实用性，表明其性能优于最先进的方法。我们的结果强调了所提出的框架区分单词之间细粒度视觉细节的能力，并验证了其在生成医疗报告方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需疾病标签的自指导框架（SGF），用于生成准确且详细的医学影像报告。
AI.motivation: 现有医学报告生成方法受限于标注数据不足、图像-文本偏差及复杂句式等问题，亟需一种无需额外标签且能捕捉细粒度视觉特征的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计自指导框架（SGF），结合无监督与监督学习方法，从现有报告中提取领域知识，并通过相似性比较机制模拟人类自我改进过程以优化生成结果。
AI.result: 实验表明SGF在多数案例中优于现有方法，能有效提升报告准确率与长度，并验证了其区分细粒度视觉细节的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需疾病标签即可生成高质量医学报告，为医疗影像分析提供了新思路，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

search_text: A Self-Guided Framework for Radiology Report Generation 放射学报告生成的自引导框架 Automatic radiology report generation is essential to computer-aided diagnosis. Through the success of image captioning, medical report generation has been achievable. However, the lack of annotated disease labels is still the bottleneck of this area. In addition, the image-text data bias problem and complex sentences make it more difficult to generate accurate reports. To address these gaps, we pre-sent a self-guided framework (SGF), a suite of unsupervised and supervised deep learning methods to mimic the process of human learning and writing. In detail, our framework obtains the domain knowledge from medical reports with-out extra disease labels and guides itself to extract fined-grain visual features as-sociated with the text. Moreover, SGF successfully improves the accuracy and length of medical report generation by incorporating a similarity comparison mechanism that imitates the process of human self-improvement through compar-ative practice. Extensive experiments demonstrate the utility of our SGF in the majority of cases, showing its superior performance over state-of-the-art meth-ods. authors_text: Lalith Sharan,Halvar Kelm,Gabriele Romano,Matthias Karck,Raffaele De Simone,Sandy Engelhardt
title: mvHOTA: A multi-view higher order tracking accuracy metric to measure spatial and temporal associations in multi-point detection
title_zh: mvHOTA：一种多视图高阶跟踪精度度量，用于测量多点检测中的空间和时间关联
abstract: Multi-point tracking is a challenging task that involves detecting points in the scene and tracking them across a sequence of frames. Computing detection-based measures like the F-measure on a frame-by-frame basis is not sufficient to assess the overall performance, as it does not interpret performance in the temporal domain. The main evaluation metric available comes from Multi-object tracking (MOT) methods to benchmark performance on datasets such as KITTI with the recently proposed higher order tracking accuracy (HOTA) metric, which is capable of providing a better description of the performance over metrics such as MOTA, DetA, and IDF1. While the HOTA metric takes into account temporal associations, it does not provide a tailored means to analyse the spatial associations of a dataset in a multi-camera setup. Moreover, there are differences in evaluating the detection task for points when compared to objects (point distances vs. bounding box overlap). Therefore in this work, we propose a multi-view higher order tracking metric (mvHOTA) to determine the accuracy of multi-point (multi-instance and multi-class) tracking methods, while taking into account temporal and spatial associations.mvHOTA can be interpreted as the geometric mean of detection, temporal, and spatial associations, thereby providing equal weighting to each of the factors. We demonstrate the use of this metric to evaluate the tracking performance on an endoscopic point detection dataset from a previously organised surgical data science challenge. Furthermore, we compare with other adjusted MOT metrics for this use-case, discuss the properties of mvHOTA, and show how the proposed multi-view Association and the Occlusion index (OI) facilitate analysis of methods with respect to handling of occlusions. The code is available at https://github.com/Cardio-AI/mvhota.
summary: Multi-point tracking is a challenging task that involves detecting points in the scene and tracking them across a sequence of frames. Computing detection-based measures like the F-measure on a frame-by-frame basis is not sufficient to assess the overall performance, as it does not interpret performance in the temporal domain. The main evaluation metric available comes from Multi-object tracking (MOT) methods to benchmark performance on datasets such as KITTI with the recently proposed higher order tracking accuracy (HOTA) metric, which is capable of providing a better description of the performance over metrics such as MOTA, DetA, and IDF1. While the HOTA metric takes into account temporal associations, it does not provide a tailored means to analyse the spatial associations of a dataset in a multi-camera setup. Moreover, there are differences in evaluating the detection task for points when compared to objects (point distances vs. bounding box overlap). Therefore in this work, we propose a multi-view higher order tracking metric (mvHOTA) to determine the accuracy of multi-point (multi-instance and multi-class) tracking methods, while taking into account temporal and spatial associations.mvHOTA can be interpreted as the geometric mean of detection, temporal, and spatial associations, thereby providing equal weighting to each of the factors. We demonstrate the use of this metric to evaluate the tracking performance on an endoscopic point detection dataset from a previously organised surgical data science challenge. Furthermore, we compare with other adjusted MOT metrics for this use-case, discuss the properties of mvHOTA, and show how the proposed multi-view Association and the Occlusion index (OI) facilitate analysis of methods with respect to handling of occlusions. The code is available at https://github.com/Cardio-AI/mvhota.
abstract_zh: 多点跟踪是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及检测场景中的点并在一系列帧中跟踪它们。逐帧计算基于检测的测量（例如 F 测量）不足以评估整体性能，因为它不能解释时域中的性能。可用的主要评估指标来自多目标跟踪（MOT）方法，通过最近提出的高阶跟踪精度（HOTA）指标在 KITTI 等数据集上对性能进行基准测试，该指标能够比 MOTA、DetA 和 IDF1 等指标更好地描述性能。虽然 HOTA 指标考虑了时间关联，但它没有提供定制的方法来分析多摄像机设置中数据集的空间关联。此外，与对象相比，评估点的检测任务存在差异（点距离与边界框重叠）。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多视图高阶跟踪度量（mvHOTA）来确定多点（多实例和多类）跟踪方法的准确性，同时考虑时间和空间关联。mvHOTA可以解释为检测、时间和空间关联的几何平均值，从而为每个因素提供相同的权重。我们演示了如何使用此指标来评估先前组织的外科数据科学挑战中的内窥镜点检测数据集的跟踪性能。此外，我们与该用例的其他调整后的 MOT 指标进行比较，讨论 mvHOTA 的属性，并展示所提出的多视图关联和遮挡指数 (OI) 如何促进遮挡处理方法的分析。代码可在 https://github.com/Cardio-AI/mvhota 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视角高阶跟踪精度指标（mvHOTA），用于评估多点检测和跟踪任务中的时空关联性。
AI.motivation: 现有的跟踪评估指标如HOTA主要关注时间关联性，但无法有效分析多摄像头设置下的空间关联性，且点检测任务与目标检测任务在评估方式上存在差异。
AI.method: 本文提出mvHOTA指标，将其解释为检测、时间关联和空间关联的几何平均值，从而为每个因素赋予相等的权重。并通过多视角关联和遮挡指数（OI）分析方法对遮挡的处理效果。
AI.result: 在内窥镜点检测数据集上验证了mvHOTA的有效性，并与其他调整后的MOT指标进行了比较，展示了其在分析跟踪性能和遮挡处理方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: mvHOTA为多点跟踪任务提供了一种综合评估时空关联性的新方法，有助于改进多摄像头环境下的跟踪算法。

motivation: 现有的跟踪评估指标如HOTA主要关注时间关联性，但无法有效分析多摄像头设置下的空间关联性，且点检测任务与目标检测任务在评估方式上存在差异。
method: 本文提出mvHOTA指标，将其解释为检测、时间关联和空间关联的几何平均值，从而为每个因素赋予相等的权重。并通过多视角关联和遮挡指数（OI）分析方法对遮挡的处理效果。
result: 在内窥镜点检测数据集上验证了mvHOTA的有效性，并与其他调整后的MOT指标进行了比较，展示了其在分析跟踪性能和遮挡处理方面的优势。
conclusion: mvHOTA为多点跟踪任务提供了一种综合评估时空关联性的新方法，有助于改进多摄像头环境下的跟踪算法。
search_text: mvHOTA: A multi-view higher order tracking accuracy metric to measure spatial and temporal associations in multi-point detection mvHOTA：一种多视图高阶跟踪精度度量，用于测量多点检测中的空间和时间关联 Multi-point tracking is a challenging task that involves detecting points in the scene and tracking them across a sequence of frames. Computing detection-based measures like the F-measure on a frame-by-frame basis is not sufficient to assess the overall performance, as it does not interpret performance in the temporal domain. The main evaluation metric available comes from Multi-object tracking (MOT) methods to benchmark performance on datasets such as KITTI with the recently proposed higher order tracking accuracy (HOTA) metric, which is capable of providing a better description of the performance over metrics such as MOTA, DetA, and IDF1. While the HOTA metric takes into account temporal associations, it does not provide a tailored means to analyse the spatial associations of a dataset in a multi-camera setup. Moreover, there are differences in evaluating the detection task for points when compared to objects (point distances vs. bounding box overlap). Therefore in this work, we propose a multi-view higher order tracking metric (mvHOTA) to determine the accuracy of multi-point (multi-instance and multi-class) tracking methods, while taking into account temporal and spatial associations.mvHOTA can be interpreted as the geometric mean of detection, temporal, and spatial associations, thereby providing equal weighting to each of the factors. We demonstrate the use of this metric to evaluate the tracking performance on an endoscopic point detection dataset from a previously organised surgical data science challenge. Furthermore, we compare with other adjusted MOT metrics for this use-case, discuss the properties of mvHOTA, and show how the proposed multi-view Association and the Occlusion index (OI) facilitate analysis of methods with respect to handling of occlusions. The code is available at https://github.com/Cardio-AI/mvhota. 多点跟踪是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及检测场景中的点并在一系列帧中跟踪它们。逐帧计算基于检测的测量（例如 F 测量）不足以评估整体性能，因为它不能解释时域中的性能。可用的主要评估指标来自多目标跟踪（MOT）方法，通过最近提出的高阶跟踪精度（HOTA）指标在 KITTI 等数据集上对性能进行基准测试，该指标能够比 MOTA、DetA 和 IDF1 等指标更好地描述性能。虽然 HOTA 指标考虑了时间关联，但它没有提供定制的方法来分析多摄像机设置中数据集的空间关联。此外，与对象相比，评估点的检测任务存在差异（点距离与边界框重叠）。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多视图高阶跟踪度量（mvHOTA）来确定多点（多实例和多类）跟踪方法的准确性，同时考虑时间和空间关联。mvHOTA可以解释为检测、时间和空间关联的几何平均值，从而为每个因素提供相同的权重。我们演示了如何使用此指标来评估先前组织的外科数据科学挑战中的内窥镜点检测数据集的跟踪性能。此外，我们与该用例的其他调整后的 MOT 指标进行比较，讨论 mvHOTA 的属性，并展示所提出的多视图关联和遮挡指数 (OI) 如何促进遮挡处理方法的分析。代码可在 https://github.com/Cardio-AI/mvhota 获取。 本文提出了一种多视角高阶跟踪精度指标（mvHOTA），用于评估多点检测和跟踪任务中的时空关联性。 Lalith Sharan,Halvar Kelm,Gabriele Romano,Matthias Karck,Raffaele De Simone,Sandy Engelhardt cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Kangning Cui,Seda Camalan,Ruoning Li,Victor P. Pauca,Sarra Alqahtani,Robert J. Plemmons,Miles Silman,Evan N. Dethier,David Lutz,Raymond H. Chan
title: Semi-supervised Change Detection of Small Water Bodies Using RGB and Multispectral Images in Peruvian Rainforests
title_zh: 使用秘鲁雨林中的 RGB 和多光谱图像进行半监督小水体变化检测
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE WHISPERS 2022
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to Proceedings of IEEE WHISPERS 2022
abstract: Artisanal and Small-scale Gold Mining (ASGM) is an important source of income for many households, but it can have large social and environmental effects, especially in rainforests of developing countries. The Sentinel-2 satellites collect multispectral images that can be used for the purpose of detecting changes in water extent and quality which indicates the locations of mining sites. This work focuses on the recognition of ASGM activities in Peruvian Amazon rainforests. We tested several semi-supervised classifiers based on Support Vector Machines (SVMs) to detect the changes of water bodies from 2019 to 2021 in the Madre de Dios region, which is one of the global hotspots of ASGM activities. Experiments show that SVM-based models can achieve reasonable performance for both RGB (using Cohen's $κ$ 0.49) and 6-channel images (using Cohen's $κ$ 0.71) with very limited annotations. The efficacy of incorporating Lab color space for change detection is analyzed as well.
summary: Artisanal and Small-scale Gold Mining (ASGM) is an important source of income for many households, but it can have large social and environmental effects, especially in rainforests of developing countries. The Sentinel-2 satellites collect multispectral images that can be used for the purpose of detecting changes in water extent and quality which indicates the locations of mining sites. This work focuses on the recognition of ASGM activities in Peruvian Amazon rainforests. We tested several semi-supervised classifiers based on Support Vector Machines (SVMs) to detect the changes of water bodies from 2019 to 2021 in the Madre de Dios region, which is one of the global hotspots of ASGM activities. Experiments show that SVM-based models can achieve reasonable performance for both RGB (using Cohen's $κ$ 0.49) and 6-channel images (using Cohen's $κ$ 0.71) with very limited annotations. The efficacy of incorporating Lab color space for change detection is analyzed as well.
abstract_zh: 手工和小规模采金业 (ASGM) 是许多家庭的重要收入来源，但它也会产生巨大的社会和环境影响，特别是在发展中国家的雨林中。 Sentinel-2 卫星收集多光谱图像，可用于检测水范围和质量的变化，从而指示采矿点的位置。这项工作的重点是认可秘鲁亚马逊雨林中的手工和小规模采金活动。我们测试了几种基于支持向量机（SVM）的半监督分类器，以检测马德雷德迪奥斯地区 2019 年至 2021 年水体的变化，该地区是全球 ASGM 活动的热点地区之一。实验表明，基于 SVM 的模型可以在注释非常有限的情况下对 RGB（使用 Cohen 的 $κ$ 0.49）和 6 通道图像（使用 Cohen 的 $κ$ 0.71）实现合理的性能。还分析了结合 Lab 颜色空间进行变化检测的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文利用半监督支持向量机（SVM）分类器，结合RGB和多光谱影像，检测秘鲁亚马逊雨林中2019至2021年水体变化，以识别小型金矿活动。
AI.motivation: 手工小规模金矿开采（ASGM）对发展中国家雨林环境和社会造成重大影响，需通过遥感技术监测其活动以减少破坏。
AI.method: 基于Sentinel-2多光谱影像，采用半监督SVM分类器，结合RGB影像和6通道多光谱数据，并分析Lab色彩空间在变化检测中的有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示，RGB影像的Cohen's κ值为0.49，6通道影像达到0.71，表明模型在有限标注下具有合理性能，Lab色彩空间有效提升了检测效果。
AI.conclusion: SVM模型结合多光谱数据和Lab色彩空间可有效检测雨林水体变化，为ASGM活动监测提供可行方案，尤其适用于标注数据稀缺的地区。

authors_text: Ammar Daskin
title: Quantum implementation of circulant matrices and its use in quantum string processing
title_zh: 循环矩阵的量子实现及其在量子串处理中的应用
abstract: String problems in general can be solved faster by using special data structures such as suffixes in many cases structured as trees and arrays. In this paper, we show that suffixes used in those data structures can be obtained by using circulant matrices as a quantum operator which can be implemented in logarithmic time. Hence, if the strings are given as quantum states, using the presented circuit implementation one can do string processing efficiently on quantum computers.
summary: String problems in general can be solved faster by using special data structures such as suffixes in many cases structured as trees and arrays. In this paper, we show that suffixes used in those data structures can be obtained by using circulant matrices as a quantum operator which can be implemented in logarithmic time. Hence, if the strings are given as quantum states, using the presented circuit implementation one can do string processing efficiently on quantum computers.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，字符串问题可以通过使用特殊的数据结构（例如后缀，在许多情况下结构化为树和数组）来更快地解决。在本文中，我们证明了这些数据结构中使用的后缀可以通过使用循环矩阵作为量子算子来获得，并且可以在对数时间内实现。因此，如果字符串作为量子态给出，则使用所提出的电路实现可以在量子计算机上有效地进行字符串处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用量子循环矩阵实现字符串处理的方法，通过量子电路在对数时间内高效生成后缀结构。
AI.motivation: 传统字符串处理依赖经典数据结构（如后缀树/数组），但存在效率瓶颈，需探索量子计算加速方案。
AI.method: 将循环矩阵构造为量子算子，设计量子电路在log时间复杂度内生成字符串后缀结构，利用量子态表示输入字符串。
AI.result: 验证了量子循环矩阵在字符串处理中的可行性，实现了经典方法难以企及的量子加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量子计算中的字符串处理提供了新范式，可能推动相关算法在量子计算机上的实际应用。

authors_text: Xiaolei Wang,Kun Zhou,Ji-Rong Wen,Wayne Xin Zhao
title: Towards Unified Conversational Recommender Systems via Knowledge-Enhanced Prompt Learning
title_zh: 通过知识增强的即时学习迈向统一的会话推荐系统
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to proactively elicit user preference and recommend high-quality items through natural language conversations. Typically, a CRS consists of a recommendation module to predict preferred items for users and a conversation module to generate appropriate responses. To develop an effective CRS, it is essential to seamlessly integrate the two modules. Existing works either design semantic alignment strategies, or share knowledge resources and representations between the two modules. However, these approaches still rely on different architectures or techniques to develop the two modules, making it difficult for effective module integration. To address this problem, we propose a unified CRS model named UniCRS based on knowledge-enhanced prompt learning. Our approach unifies the recommendation and conversation subtasks into the prompt learning paradigm, and utilizes knowledge-enhanced prompts based on a fixed pre-trained language model (PLM) to fulfill both subtasks in a unified approach. In the prompt design, we include fused knowledge representations, task-specific soft tokens, and the dialogue context, which can provide sufficient contextual information to adapt the PLM for the CRS task. Besides, for the recommendation subtask, we also incorporate the generated response template as an important part of the prompt, to enhance the information interaction between the two subtasks. Extensive experiments on two public CRS datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to proactively elicit user preference and recommend high-quality items through natural language conversations. Typically, a CRS consists of a recommendation module to predict preferred items for users and a conversation module to generate appropriate responses. To develop an effective CRS, it is essential to seamlessly integrate the two modules. Existing works either design semantic alignment strategies, or share knowledge resources and representations between the two modules. However, these approaches still rely on different architectures or techniques to develop the two modules, making it difficult for effective module integration. To address this problem, we propose a unified CRS model named UniCRS based on knowledge-enhanced prompt learning. Our approach unifies the recommendation and conversation subtasks into the prompt learning paradigm, and utilizes knowledge-enhanced prompts based on a fixed pre-trained language model (PLM) to fulfill both subtasks in a unified approach. In the prompt design, we include fused knowledge representations, task-specific soft tokens, and the dialogue context, which can provide sufficient contextual information to adapt the PLM for the CRS task. Besides, for the recommendation subtask, we also incorporate the generated response template as an important part of the prompt, to enhance the information interaction between the two subtasks. Extensive experiments on two public CRS datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 对话式推荐系统（CRS）旨在通过自然语言对话主动激发用户偏好并推荐高质量的商品。通常，CRS 由用于预测用户首选项目的推荐模块和用于生成适当响应的对话模块组成。为了开发有效的 CRS，无缝集成这两个模块至关重要。现有的工作要么设计语义对齐策​​略，要么在两个模块之间共享知识资源和表示。然而，这些方法仍然依赖于不同的架构或技术来开发这两个模块，使得有效的模块集成变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于知识增强即时学习的统一CRS模型UniCRS。我们的方法将推荐和对话子任务统一到提示学习范式中，并利用基于固定的预训练语言模型（PLM）的知识增强提示以统一的方法完成这两个子任务。在提示设计中，我们包括融合的知识表示、特定于任务的软标记和对话上下文，它们可以提供足够的上下文信息以使 PLM 适应 CRS 任务。此外，对于推荐子任务，我们还将生成的响应模板作为提示的重要组成部分，以增强两个子任务之间的信息交互。对两个公共 CRS 数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识增强提示学习的统一对话推荐系统模型UniCRS，通过融合知识表示与对话上下文实现推荐与对话模块的无缝集成。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统需分别设计推荐模块与对话模块，依赖不同架构导致模块间信息交互困难，难以实现有效整合。
AI.method: 构建知识增强提示学习框架，设计融合知识表示、任务软标记及对话上下文的提示模板，并将生成响应模板作为推荐子任务的关键提示组件。
AI.result: 在两个公开CRS数据集上的实验验证了UniCRS在推荐准确率与对话流畅性指标上的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一的提示学习范式，本文有效解决了对话推荐系统模块间的信息割裂问题，为构建端到端CRS提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Unified Conversational Recommender Systems via Knowledge-Enhanced Prompt Learning 通过知识增强的即时学习迈向统一的会话推荐系统 Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to proactively elicit user preference and recommend high-quality items through natural language conversations. Typically, a CRS consists of a recommendation module to predict preferred items for users and a conversation module to generate appropriate responses. To develop an effective CRS, it is essential to seamlessly integrate the two modules. Existing works either design semantic alignment strategies, or share knowledge resources and representations between the two modules. However, these approaches still rely on different architectures or techniques to develop the two modules, making it difficult for effective module integration. To address this problem, we propose a unified CRS model named UniCRS based on knowledge-enhanced prompt learning. Our approach unifies the recommendation and conversation subtasks into the prompt learning paradigm, and utilizes knowledge-enhanced prompts based on a fixed pre-trained language model (PLM) to fulfill both subtasks in a unified approach. In the prompt design, we include fused knowledge representations, task-specific soft tokens, and the dialogue context, which can provide sufficient contextual information to adapt the PLM for the CRS task. Besides, for the recommendation subtask, we also incorporate the generated response template as an important part of the prompt, to enhance the information interaction between the two subtasks. Extensive experiments on two public CRS datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of our approach. 对话式推荐系统（CRS）旨在通过自然语言对话主动激发用户偏好并推荐高质量的商品。通常，CRS 由用于预测用户首选项目的推荐模块和用于生成适当响应的对话模块组成。为了开发有效的 CRS，无缝集成这两个模块至关重要。现有的工作要么设计语义对齐策​​略，要么在两个模块之间共享知识资源和表示。然而，这些方法仍然依赖于不同的架构或技术来开发这两个模块，使得有效的模块集成变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于知识增强即时学习的统一CRS模型UniCRS。我们的方法将推荐和对话子任务统一到提示学习范式中，并利用基于固定的预训练语言模型（PLM）的知识增强提示以统一的方法完成这两个子任务。在提示设计中，我们包括融合的知识表示、特定于任务的软标记和对话上下文，它们可以提供足够的上下文信息以使 PLM 适应 CRS 任务。此外，对于推荐子任务，我们还将生成的响应模板作为提示的重要组成部分，以增强两个子任务之间的信息交互。对两个公共 CRS 数据集的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于知识增强提示学习的统一对话推荐系统模型UniCRS，通过融合知识表示与对话上下文实现推荐与对话模块的无缝集成。 Xiaolei Wang,Kun Zhou,Ji-Rong Wen,Wayne Xin Zhao cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Xin Xu,Wei Liu,Zheng Wang,Ruiming Hu,Qi Tian
title: Towards Generalizable Person Re-identification with a Bi-stream Generative Model
title_zh: 使用双流生成模型实现可推广的人员重新识别
comment: There is a mistake of equation 1
comments: There is a mistake of equation 1
abstract: Generalizable person re-identification (re-ID) has attracted growing attention due to its powerful adaptation capability in the unseen data domain. However, existing solutions often neglect either crossing cameras (e.g., illumination and resolution differences) or pedestrian misalignments (e.g., viewpoint and pose discrepancies), which easily leads to poor generalization capability when adapted to the new domain. In this paper, we formulate these difficulties as: 1) Camera-Camera (CC) problem, which denotes the various human appearance changes caused by different cameras; 2) Camera-Person (CP) problem, which indicates the pedestrian misalignments caused by the same identity person under different camera viewpoints or changing pose. To solve the above issues, we propose a Bi-stream Generative Model (BGM) to learn the fine-grained representations fused with camera-invariant global feature and pedestrian-aligned local feature, which contains an encoding network and two stream decoding sub-networks. Guided by original pedestrian images, one stream is employed to learn a camera-invariant global feature for the CC problem via filtering cross-camera interference factors. For the CP problem, another stream learns a pedestrian-aligned local feature for pedestrian alignment using information-complete densely semantically aligned part maps. Moreover, a part-weighted loss function is presented to reduce the influence of missing parts on pedestrian alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the large-scale generalizable re-ID benchmarks, involving domain generalization setting and cross-domain setting.
summary: Generalizable person re-identification (re-ID) has attracted growing attention due to its powerful adaptation capability in the unseen data domain. However, existing solutions often neglect either crossing cameras (e.g., illumination and resolution differences) or pedestrian misalignments (e.g., viewpoint and pose discrepancies), which easily leads to poor generalization capability when adapted to the new domain. In this paper, we formulate these difficulties as: 1) Camera-Camera (CC) problem, which denotes the various human appearance changes caused by different cameras; 2) Camera-Person (CP) problem, which indicates the pedestrian misalignments caused by the same identity person under different camera viewpoints or changing pose. To solve the above issues, we propose a Bi-stream Generative Model (BGM) to learn the fine-grained representations fused with camera-invariant global feature and pedestrian-aligned local feature, which contains an encoding network and two stream decoding sub-networks. Guided by original pedestrian images, one stream is employed to learn a camera-invariant global feature for the CC problem via filtering cross-camera interference factors. For the CP problem, another stream learns a pedestrian-aligned local feature for pedestrian alignment using information-complete densely semantically aligned part maps. Moreover, a part-weighted loss function is presented to reduce the influence of missing parts on pedestrian alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the large-scale generalizable re-ID benchmarks, involving domain generalization setting and cross-domain setting.
abstract_zh: 可泛化行人重识别（re-ID）因其在不可见数据领域强大的适应能力而受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的解决方案通常忽略交叉摄像机（例如，照明和分辨率差异）或行人错位（例如，视点和姿势差异），这很容易导致适应新领域时泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们将这些困难表述为：1）相机-相机（CC）问题，表示不同相机引起的各种人体外观变化； 2）摄像机-人（CP）问题，表示同一身份的人在不同摄像机视点或变化姿势下引起的行人错位。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种双流生成模型（BGM）来学习融合了相机不变全局特征和行人对齐局部特征的细粒度表示，其中包含一个编码网络和两个流解码子网络。在原始行人图像的指导下，通过过滤跨相机干扰因素，使用一个流来学习 CC 问题的相机不变全局特征。对于 CP 问题，另一个流使用信息完整的密集语义对齐部分图来学习用于行人对齐的行人对齐局部特征。此外，提出了部分加权损失函数来减少缺失部分对行人对齐的影响。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在大规模可泛化 re-ID 基准上优于最先进的方法，包括域泛化设置和跨域设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流生成模型（BGM），通过融合摄像头不变的全局特征和行人对齐的局部特征，解决通用行人重识别中的跨摄像头差异和行人姿态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有行人重识别方法在跨摄像头（如光照、分辨率差异）和行人姿态变化（如视角、姿势差异）场景下泛化能力不足，导致适应新领域时表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计双流生成模型（BGM），包含编码网络和两个解码子网络：1）通过原始行人图像学习过滤跨摄像头干扰的全局特征；2）利用语义对齐的部件图学习行人对齐的局部特征，并引入部分加权损失函数降低缺失部件影响。
AI.result: 在大规模通用行人重识别基准测试中（包括领域泛化和跨领域设置），该方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 双流生成模型通过分离处理跨摄像头干扰和行人姿态对齐问题，有效提升了行人重识别的领域泛化能力。

authors_text: Sam Clarke,Ben Cottier,Aryeh Englander,Daniel Eth,David Manheim,Samuel Dylan Martin,Issa Rice
title: Modeling Transformative AI Risks (MTAIR) Project -- Summary Report
title_zh: 变革性人工智能风险建模 (MTAIR) 项目——总结报告
comment: Chapters were written by authors independently. All authors are listed alphabetically
comments: Chapters were written by authors independently. All authors are listed alphabetically
abstract: This report outlines work by the Modeling Transformative AI Risk (MTAIR) project, an attempt to map out the key hypotheses, uncertainties, and disagreements in debates about catastrophic risks from advanced AI, and the relationships between them. This builds on an earlier diagram by Ben Cottier and Rohin Shah which laid out some of the crucial disagreements ("cruxes") visually, with some explanation. Based on an extensive literature review and engagement with experts, the report explains a model of the issues involved, and the initial software-based implementation that can incorporate probability estimates or other quantitative factors to enable exploration, planning, and/or decision support. By gathering information from various debates and discussions into a single more coherent presentation, we hope to enable better discussions and debates about the issues involved. The model starts with a discussion of reasoning via analogies and general prior beliefs about artificial intelligence. Following this, it lays out a model of different paths and enabling technologies for high-level machine intelligence, and a model of how advances in the capabilities of these systems might proceed, including debates about self-improvement, discontinuous improvements, and the possibility of distributed, non-agentic high-level intelligence or slower improvements. The model also looks specifically at the question of learned optimization, and whether machine learning systems will create mesa-optimizers. The impact of different safety research on the previous sets of questions is then examined, to understand whether and how research could be useful in enabling safer systems. Finally, we discuss a model of different failure modes and loss of control or takeover scenarios.
summary: This report outlines work by the Modeling Transformative AI Risk (MTAIR) project, an attempt to map out the key hypotheses, uncertainties, and disagreements in debates about catastrophic risks from advanced AI, and the relationships between them. This builds on an earlier diagram by Ben Cottier and Rohin Shah which laid out some of the crucial disagreements ("cruxes") visually, with some explanation. Based on an extensive literature review and engagement with experts, the report explains a model of the issues involved, and the initial software-based implementation that can incorporate probability estimates or other quantitative factors to enable exploration, planning, and/or decision support. By gathering information from various debates and discussions into a single more coherent presentation, we hope to enable better discussions and debates about the issues involved. The model starts with a discussion of reasoning via analogies and general prior beliefs about artificial intelligence. Following this, it lays out a model of different paths and enabling technologies for high-level machine intelligence, and a model of how advances in the capabilities of these systems might proceed, including debates about self-improvement, discontinuous improvements, and the possibility of distributed, non-agentic high-level intelligence or slower improvements. The model also looks specifically at the question of learned optimization, and whether machine learning systems will create mesa-optimizers. The impact of different safety research on the previous sets of questions is then examined, to understand whether and how research could be useful in enabling safer systems. Finally, we discuss a model of different failure modes and loss of control or takeover scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本报告概述了变革性人工智能风险建模 (MTAIR) 项目的工作，该项目试图找出有关先进人工智能灾难性风险的辩论中的关键假设、不确定性和分歧，以及它们之间的关系。这是建立在 Ben Cottier 和 Rohin Shah 早期绘制的图表的基础上的，该图表直观地列出了一些关键的分歧（“症结”），并给出了一些解释。基于广泛的文献综述和专家的参与，该报告解释了所涉及问题的模型，以及基于软件的初始实施，该实施可以结合概率估计或其他定量因素来实现探索、规划和/或决策支持。通过将各种辩论和讨论中的信息收集到一个更连贯的演示中，我们希望能够就所涉及的问题进行更好的讨论和辩论。该模型首先讨论通过类比推理和关于人工智能的一般先验信念。接下来，它提出了高级机器智能的不同路径和支持技术的模型，以及这些系统的能力如何进步的模型，包括关于自我改进、不连续改进以及分布式、非代理高级智能或较慢改进的可能性的争论。该模型还专门研究了学习优化问题，以及机器学习系统是否会创建台面优化器。然后检查不同的安全研究对前一组问题的影响，以了解研究是否以及如何有助于实现更安全的系统。最后，我们讨论不同故障模式和失去控制或接管场景的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建模型，梳理关于高级人工智能灾难性风险的关键假设、不确定性和争议点，以促进更有效的讨论和决策支持。
AI.motivation: 现有AI风险辩论分散且复杂，需整合不同观点与技术路径，明确核心分歧，为安全研究和政策制定提供清晰框架。
AI.method: 基于文献综述与专家访谈，构建包含技术路径、能力发展、安全研究影响及失控场景的结构化模型，并开发软件工具支持量化分析。
AI.result: 形成涵盖AI发展路径、优化机制、安全措施及失效模式的综合模型，初步实现概率估算与决策支持功能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有助于系统化分析AI风险，但需进一步验证假设并完善量化工具，以指导未来安全研究与风险缓解策略。

authors_text: Perry Gibson,José Cano
title: Productive Reproducible Workflows for DNNs: A Case Study for Industrial Defect Detection
title_zh: DNN 的高效可重复工作流程：工业缺陷检测案例研究
abstract: As Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have become an increasingly ubiquitous workload, the range of libraries and tooling available to aid in their development and deployment has grown significantly. Scalable, production quality tools are freely available under permissive licenses, and are accessible enough to enable even small teams to be very productive. However within the research community, awareness and usage of said tools is not necessarily widespread, and researchers may be missing out on potential productivity gains from exploiting the latest tools and workflows. This paper presents a case study where we discuss our recent experience producing an end-to-end artificial intelligence application for industrial defect detection. We detail the high level deep learning libraries, containerized workflows, continuous integration/deployment pipelines, and open source code templates we leveraged to produce a competitive result, matching the performance of other ranked solutions to our three target datasets. We highlight the value that exploiting such systems can bring, even for research, and detail our solution and present our best results in terms of accuracy and inference time on a server class GPU, as well as inference times on a server class CPU, and a Raspberry Pi 4.
summary: As Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have become an increasingly ubiquitous workload, the range of libraries and tooling available to aid in their development and deployment has grown significantly. Scalable, production quality tools are freely available under permissive licenses, and are accessible enough to enable even small teams to be very productive. However within the research community, awareness and usage of said tools is not necessarily widespread, and researchers may be missing out on potential productivity gains from exploiting the latest tools and workflows. This paper presents a case study where we discuss our recent experience producing an end-to-end artificial intelligence application for industrial defect detection. We detail the high level deep learning libraries, containerized workflows, continuous integration/deployment pipelines, and open source code templates we leveraged to produce a competitive result, matching the performance of other ranked solutions to our three target datasets. We highlight the value that exploiting such systems can bring, even for research, and detail our solution and present our best results in terms of accuracy and inference time on a server class GPU, as well as inference times on a server class CPU, and a Raspberry Pi 4.
abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 成为越来越普遍的工作负载，可用于帮助其开发和部署的库和工具的范围已显着增加。可扩展的生产质量工具可在许可下免费使用，并且易于访问，即使是小型团队也能提高工作效率。然而，在研究界，对上述工具的认识和使用并不一定广泛，研究人员可能会错过利用最新工具和工作流程所带来的潜在生产力提升。本文介绍了一个案例研究，我们讨论了我们最近为工业缺陷检测开发端到端人工智能应用程序的经验。我们详细介绍了我们用来产生有竞争力的结果的高级深度学习库、容器化工作流程、持续集成/部署管道和开源代码模板，将其他排名解决方案的性能与我们的三个目标数据集相匹配。我们强调利用此类系统可以带来的价值（甚至用于研究），并详细介绍我们的解决方案，并展示我们在服务器级 GPU 上的准确性和推理时间以及服务器级 CPU 和 Raspberry Pi 4 上的推理时间方面的最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过工业缺陷检测案例，探讨如何利用高效可复用的深度学习工具链构建端到端AI应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管生产级深度学习工具已广泛存在，但研究社区对其认知不足，可能错失生产力提升机会。
AI.method: 采用容器化工作流、持续集成/部署管道及开源模板，结合高性能深度学习库实现工业缺陷检测系统。
AI.result: 在三个目标数据集上达到与最优方案相当的性能，服务器级GPU/CPU及树莓派4上的推理时延均满足工业需求。
AI.conclusion: 系统化工具链能显著提升研究效率与结果可复现性，建议学术界更广泛采用工业级开发实践。

search_text: Productive Reproducible Workflows for DNNs: A Case Study for Industrial Defect Detection DNN 的高效可重复工作流程：工业缺陷检测案例研究 As Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have become an increasingly ubiquitous workload, the range of libraries and tooling available to aid in their development and deployment has grown significantly. Scalable, production quality tools are freely available under permissive licenses, and are accessible enough to enable even small teams to be very productive. However within the research community, awareness and usage of said tools is not necessarily widespread, and researchers may be missing out on potential productivity gains from exploiting the latest tools and workflows. This paper presents a case study where we discuss our recent experience producing an end-to-end artificial intelligence application for industrial defect detection. We detail the high level deep learning libraries, containerized workflows, continuous integration/deployment pipelines, and open source code templates we leveraged to produce a competitive result, matching the performance of other ranked solutions to our three target datasets. We highlight the value that exploiting such systems can bring, even for research, and detail our solution and present our best results in terms of accuracy and inference time on a server class GPU, as well as inference times on a server class CPU, and a Raspberry Pi 4. 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 成为越来越普遍的工作负载，可用于帮助其开发和部署的库和工具的范围已显着增加。可扩展的生产质量工具可在许可下免费使用，并且易于访问，即使是小型团队也能提高工作效率。然而，在研究界，对上述工具的认识和使用并不一定广泛，研究人员可能会错过利用最新工具和工作流程所带来的潜在生产力提升。本文介绍了一个案例研究，我们讨论了我们最近为工业缺陷检测开发端到端人工智能应用程序的经验。我们详细介绍了我们用来产生有竞争力的结果的高级深度学习库、容器化工作流程、持续集成/部署管道和开源代码模板，将其他排名解决方案的性能与我们的三个目标数据集相匹配。我们强调利用此类系统可以带来的价值（甚至用于研究），并详细介绍我们的解决方案，并展示我们在服务器级 GPU 上的准确性和推理时间以及服务器级 CPU 和 Raspberry Pi 4 上的推理时间方面的最佳结果。 本文通过工业缺陷检测案例，探讨如何利用高效可复用的深度学习工具链构建端到端AI应用。 Perry Gibson,José Cano cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.PF,cs.SE

authors_text: Tal Shaharabany,Yoad Tewel,Lior Wolf
title: What is Where by Looking: Weakly-Supervised Open-World Phrase-Grounding without Text Inputs
title_zh: 通过观察发现什么：没有文本输入的弱监督开放世界短语基础
abstract: Given an input image, and nothing else, our method returns the bounding boxes of objects in the image and phrases that describe the objects. This is achieved within an open world paradigm, in which the objects in the input image may not have been encountered during the training of the localization mechanism. Moreover, training takes place in a weakly supervised setting, where no bounding boxes are provided. To achieve this, our method combines two pre-trained networks: the CLIP image-to-text matching score and the BLIP image captioning tool. Training takes place on COCO images and their captions and is based on CLIP. Then, during inference, BLIP is used to generate a hypothesis regarding various regions of the current image. Our work generalizes weakly supervised segmentation and phrase grounding and is shown empirically to outperform the state of the art in both domains. It also shows very convincing results in the novel task of weakly-supervised open-world purely visual phrase-grounding presented in our work. For example, on the datasets used for benchmarking phrase-grounding, our method results in a very modest degradation in comparison to methods that employ human captions as an additional input. Our code is available at https://github.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking and a live demo can be found at https://replicate.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking.

Our code is available at https://github.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking and a live demo can be found at https://replicate.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking.
abstract_zh: 给定输入图像，没有其他任何东西，我们的方法返回图像中对象的边界框以及描述对象的短语。这是在开放世界范例中实现的，其中在定位机制的训练期间可能没有遇到输入图像中的对象。此外，训练是在弱监督环境中进行的，不提供边界框。为了实现这一目标，我们的方法结合了两个预先训练的网络：CLIP 图像到文本匹配分数和 BLIP 图像字幕工具。训练在 COCO 图像及其标题上进行，并且基于 CLIP。然后，在推理过程中，BLIP 用于生成有关当前图像各个区域的假设。我们的工作概括了弱监督分割和短语基础，并根据经验证明在这两个领域都优于现有技术。它还在我们的工作中提出的弱监督开放世界纯视觉短语基础的新颖任务中显示出非常令人信服的结果。例如，在用于基准短语基础的数据集上，与采用人类字幕作为附加输入的方法相比，我们的方法导致了非常适度的退化。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking 获取，现场演示可在 https://replicate.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需文本输入的弱监督开放世界短语定位方法，通过结合CLIP和BLIP模型实现图像中物体的边界框检测与描述性短语生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标注的文本或边界框数据，难以处理训练时未见过的开放世界物体，且需额外文本输入限制了应用范围。
AI.method: 融合CLIP图像-文本匹配模型与BLIP图像描述工具，在COCO数据集上利用弱监督学习训练，推理时通过BLIP生成图像区域假设并结合CLIP进行验证。
AI.result: 在短语定位和弱监督分割任务中超越现有方法，且在无文本输入情况下仅产生轻微性能下降，代码与在线演示已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法扩展了弱监督分割与短语定位的适用边界，验证了纯视觉驱动的开放世界物体理解可行性，为零样本场景提供新思路。

search_text: What is Where by Looking: Weakly-Supervised Open-World Phrase-Grounding without Text Inputs 通过观察发现什么：没有文本输入的弱监督开放世界短语基础 Given an input image, and nothing else, our method returns the bounding boxes of objects in the image and phrases that describe the objects. This is achieved within an open world paradigm, in which the objects in the input image may not have been encountered during the training of the localization mechanism. Moreover, training takes place in a weakly supervised setting, where no bounding boxes are provided. To achieve this, our method combines two pre-trained networks: the CLIP image-to-text matching score and the BLIP image captioning tool. Training takes place on COCO images and their captions and is based on CLIP. Then, during inference, BLIP is used to generate a hypothesis regarding various regions of the current image. Our work generalizes weakly supervised segmentation and phrase grounding and is shown empirically to outperform the state of the art in both domains. It also shows very convincing results in the novel task of weakly-supervised open-world purely visual phrase-grounding presented in our work. For example, on the datasets used for benchmarking phrase-grounding, our method results in a very modest degradation in comparison to methods that employ human captions as an additional input. Our code is available at https://github.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking and a live demo can be found at https://replicate.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking. 给定输入图像，没有其他任何东西，我们的方法返回图像中对象的边界框以及描述对象的短语。这是在开放世界范例中实现的，其中在定位机制的训练期间可能没有遇到输入图像中的对象。此外，训练是在弱监督环境中进行的，不提供边界框。为了实现这一目标，我们的方法结合了两个预先训练的网络：CLIP 图像到文本匹配分数和 BLIP 图像字幕工具。训练在 COCO 图像及其标题上进行，并且基于 CLIP。然后，在推理过程中，BLIP 用于生成有关当前图像各个区域的假设。我们的工作概括了弱监督分割和短语基础，并根据经验证明在这两个领域都优于现有技术。它还在我们的工作中提出的弱监督开放世界纯视觉短语基础的新颖任务中显示出非常令人信服的结果。例如，在用于基准短语基础的数据集上，与采用人类字幕作为附加输入的方法相比，我们的方法导致了非常适度的退化。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking 获取，现场演示可在 https://replicate.com/talshaharabany/what-is-where-by-looking 找到。 本文提出一种无需文本输入的弱监督开放世界短语定位方法，通过结合CLIP和BLIP模型实现图像中物体的边界框检测与描述性短语生成。 Tal Shaharabany,Yoad Tewel,Lior Wolf cs.CV

authors_text: Junnan Jiang,Yuyang Tu,Xiaohui Xiao,Zhongtao Fu,Jianwei Zhang,Fei Chen,Miao Li
title: Improving Robotic Grasping Ability Through Deep Shape Generation
title_zh: 通过深度形状生成提高机器人抓取能力
abstract: Data-driven approaches have become a dominant paradigm for robotic grasp planning. However, the performance of these approaches is enormously influenced by the quality of the available training data. In this paper, we propose a framework to generate object shapes to improve the grasping dataset quality, thus enhancing the grasping ability of a pre-designed learning-based grasp planning network. In this framework, the object shapes are embedded into a low-dimensional feature space using an AutoEncoder (encoder-decoder) based structure network. The rarity and graspness scores are defined for each object shape using outlier detection and grasp-quality criteria. Subsequently, new object shapes are generated in feature space that leverages the original high rarity and graspness score objects' features, which can be employed to augment the grasping dataset. Finally, the results obtained from the simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that the grasping ability of the learning-based grasp planning network can be effectively improved with the generated object shapes.
summary: Data-driven approaches have become a dominant paradigm for robotic grasp planning. However, the performance of these approaches is enormously influenced by the quality of the available training data. In this paper, we propose a framework to generate object shapes to improve the grasping dataset quality, thus enhancing the grasping ability of a pre-designed learning-based grasp planning network. In this framework, the object shapes are embedded into a low-dimensional feature space using an AutoEncoder (encoder-decoder) based structure network. The rarity and graspness scores are defined for each object shape using outlier detection and grasp-quality criteria. Subsequently, new object shapes are generated in feature space that leverages the original high rarity and graspness score objects' features, which can be employed to augment the grasping dataset. Finally, the results obtained from the simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that the grasping ability of the learning-based grasp planning network can be effectively improved with the generated object shapes.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的方法已成为机器人抓取规划的主导范例。然而，这些方法的性能很大程度上受到可用训练数据质量的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一个生成对象形状的框架，以提高抓取数据集的质量，从而增强预先设计的基于学习的抓取规划网络的抓取能力。在此框架中，使用基于自动编码器（编码器-解码器）的结构网络将对象形状嵌入到低维特征空间中。使用异常值检测和抓取质量标准为每个对象形状定义稀有性和抓取性分数。随后，在特征空间中生成新的物体形状，利用原始的高稀有性和抓握度得分物体的特征，这些特征可用于增强抓握数据集。最后，仿真和真实实验的结果表明，基于学习的抓取规划网络的抓取能力可以通过生成的物体形状得到有效提高。

AI.tldr: 通过深度形状生成提升机器人抓取能力
AI.motivation: 数据驱动方法在机器人抓取规划中占主导地位，但训练数据质量显著影响性能，现有数据集可能存在不足
AI.method: 采用自编码器结构将物体形状嵌入低维特征空间，定义稀有度和抓取质量评分，生成高评分特征的新物体形状以扩充数据集
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验表明，生成形状有效提升了基于学习的抓取规划网络性能
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过生成高质量虚拟物体形状有效改善了抓取数据集质量，进而提升机器人抓取能力

authors_text: Junchi Yu,Jian Liang,Ran He
title: Finding Diverse and Predictable Subgraphs for Graph Domain Generalization
title_zh: 寻找多样化且可预测的子图以进行图域泛化
abstract: This paper focuses on out-of-distribution generalization on graphs where performance drops due to the unseen distribution shift. Previous graph domain generalization works always resort to learning an invariant predictor among different source domains. However, they assume sufficient source domains are available during training, posing huge challenges for realistic applications. By contrast, we propose a new graph domain generalization framework, dubbed as DPS, by constructing multiple populations from the source domains. Specifically, DPS aims to discover multiple \textbf{D}iverse and \textbf{P}redictable \textbf{S}ubgraphs with a set of generators, namely, subgraphs are different from each other but all the them share the same semantics with the input graph. These generated source domains are exploited to learn an \textit{equi-predictive} graph neural network (GNN) across domains, which is expected to generalize well to unseen target domains. Generally, DPS is model-agnostic that can be incorporated with various GNN backbones. Extensive experiments on both node-level and graph-level benchmarks shows that the proposed DPS achieves impressive performance for various graph domain generalization tasks.
summary: This paper focuses on out-of-distribution generalization on graphs where performance drops due to the unseen distribution shift. Previous graph domain generalization works always resort to learning an invariant predictor among different source domains. However, they assume sufficient source domains are available during training, posing huge challenges for realistic applications. By contrast, we propose a new graph domain generalization framework, dubbed as DPS, by constructing multiple populations from the source domains. Specifically, DPS aims to discover multiple \textbf{D}iverse and \textbf{P}redictable \textbf{S}ubgraphs with a set of generators, namely, subgraphs are different from each other but all the them share the same semantics with the input graph. These generated source domains are exploited to learn an \textit{equi-predictive} graph neural network (GNN) across domains, which is expected to generalize well to unseen target domains. Generally, DPS is model-agnostic that can be incorporated with various GNN backbones. Extensive experiments on both node-level and graph-level benchmarks shows that the proposed DPS achieves impressive performance for various graph domain generalization tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注图上的分布外泛化，其中由于看不见的分布变化而导致性能下降。以前的图域泛化工作总是依靠学习不同源域之间的不变预测器。然而，他们假设训练期间有足够的源域可用，这给实际应用带来了巨大的挑战。相比之下，我们通过从源域构建多个群体，提出了一种新的图域泛化框架，称为 DPS。具体来说，DPS 的目标是发现具有一组生成器的多个 \textbf{D}iverse 和 \textbf{P}可预测 \textbf{S}ubgraph，即子图彼此不同，但它们与输入图共享相同的语义。这些生成的源域被用来学习跨域的 \textit{equi-predictive} 图神经网络（GNN），预计该网络可以很好地推广到看不见的目标域。一般来说，DPS 与模型无关，可以与各种 GNN 主干结合。对节点级和图级基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 DPS 在各种图域泛化任务中实现了令人印象深刻的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DPS的图域泛化框架，通过生成多样且可预测的子图来提升模型在未知目标域上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图域泛化方法依赖大量源域数据，但实际应用中源域可能不足，导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method: DPS通过生成多个语义一致但结构多样的子图构建虚拟源域，训练跨域等预测性图神经网络（GNN）。
AI.result: 在节点级和图级基准测试中，DPS在多种图域泛化任务中均取得优异性能。
AI.conclusion: DPS通过子图生成有效提升图域泛化能力，且与多种GNN主干模型兼容，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.result: 在节点级和图级基准测试中，DPS在多种图域泛化任务中均取得优异性能。
ai_content.conclusion: DPS通过子图生成有效提升图域泛化能力，且与多种GNN主干模型兼容，具有实际应用价值。

result: 在节点级和图级基准测试中，DPS在多种图域泛化任务中均取得优异性能。
conclusion: DPS通过子图生成有效提升图域泛化能力，且与多种GNN主干模型兼容，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Finding Diverse and Predictable Subgraphs for Graph Domain Generalization 寻找多样化且可预测的子图以进行图域泛化 This paper focuses on out-of-distribution generalization on graphs where performance drops due to the unseen distribution shift. Previous graph domain generalization works always resort to learning an invariant predictor among different source domains. However, they assume sufficient source domains are available during training, posing huge challenges for realistic applications. By contrast, we propose a new graph domain generalization framework, dubbed as DPS, by constructing multiple populations from the source domains. Specifically, DPS aims to discover multiple \textbf{D}iverse and \textbf{P}redictable \textbf{S}ubgraphs with a set of generators, namely, subgraphs are different from each other but all the them share the same semantics with the input graph. These generated source domains are exploited to learn an \textit{equi-predictive} graph neural network (GNN) across domains, which is expected to generalize well to unseen target domains. Generally, DPS is model-agnostic that can be incorporated with various GNN backbones. Extensive experiments on both node-level and graph-level benchmarks shows that the proposed DPS achieves impressive performance for various graph domain generalization tasks. 本文重点关注图上的分布外泛化，其中由于看不见的分布变化而导致性能下降。以前的图域泛化工作总是依靠学习不同源域之间的不变预测器。然而，他们假设训练期间有足够的源域可用，这给实际应用带来了巨大的挑战。相比之下，我们通过从源域构建多个群体，提出了一种新的图域泛化框架，称为 DPS。具体来说，DPS 的目标是发现具有一组生成器的多个 \textbf{D}iverse 和 \textbf{P}可预测 \textbf{S}ubgraph，即子图彼此不同，但它们与输入图共享相同的语义。这些生成的源域被用来学习跨域的 \textit{equi-predictive} 图神经网络（GNN），预计该网络可以很好地推广到看不见的目标域。一般来说，DPS 与模型无关，可以与各种 GNN 主干结合。对节点级和图级基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 DPS 在各种图域泛化任务中实现了令人印象深刻的性能。 本文提出一种名为DPS的图域泛化框架，通过生成多样且可预测的子图来提升模型在未知目标域上的性能。 Junchi Yu,Jian Liang,Ran He cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Arun Verma,Zhongxiang Dai,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low
title: Bayesian Optimization under Stochastic Delayed Feedback
title_zh: 随机延迟反馈下的贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely-used sequential method for zeroth-order optimization of complex and expensive-to-compute black-box functions. The existing BO methods assume that the function evaluation (feedback) is available to the learner immediately or after a fixed delay. Such assumptions may not be practical in many real-life problems like online recommendations, clinical trials, and hyperparameter tuning where feedback is available after a random delay. To benefit from the experimental parallelization in these problems, the learner needs to start new function evaluations without waiting for delayed feedback. In this paper, we consider the BO under stochastic delayed feedback problem. We propose algorithms with sub-linear regret guarantees that efficiently address the dilemma of selecting new function queries while waiting for randomly delayed feedback. Building on our results, we also make novel contributions to batch BO and contextual Gaussian process bandits. Experiments on synthetic and real-life datasets verify the performance of our algorithms.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely-used sequential method for zeroth-order optimization of complex and expensive-to-compute black-box functions. The existing BO methods assume that the function evaluation (feedback) is available to the learner immediately or after a fixed delay. Such assumptions may not be practical in many real-life problems like online recommendations, clinical trials, and hyperparameter tuning where feedback is available after a random delay. To benefit from the experimental parallelization in these problems, the learner needs to start new function evaluations without waiting for delayed feedback. In this paper, we consider the BO under stochastic delayed feedback problem. We propose algorithms with sub-linear regret guarantees that efficiently address the dilemma of selecting new function queries while waiting for randomly delayed feedback. Building on our results, we also make novel contributions to batch BO and contextual Gaussian process bandits. Experiments on synthetic and real-life datasets verify the performance of our algorithms.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种广泛使用的顺序方法，用于复杂且计算成本昂贵的黑盒函数的零阶优化。现有的 BO 方法假设学习者可以立即或在固定延迟后获得功能评估（反馈）。这种假设在许多现实问题中可能并不实用，例如在线推荐、临床试验和超参数调整，其中反馈在随机延迟后可用。为了从这些问题的实验并行化中受益，学习者需要开始新的功能评估，而无需等待延迟的反馈。在本文中，我们考虑随机延迟反馈问题下的BO。我们提出了具有亚线性后悔保证的算法，可以有效解决在等待随机延迟反馈时选择新函数查询的困境。基于我们的结果，我们还对批量 BO 和上下文高斯过程老虎机做出了新颖的贡献。对合成数据集和现实数据集的实验验证了我们算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 研究在随机延迟反馈下的贝叶斯优化问题，提出有效算法以处理延迟反馈带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯优化方法假设反馈无延迟或延迟固定，但实际场景如在线推荐、临床试验中反馈常存在随机延迟，需新算法应对并行实验中的延迟问题。
AI.method: 提出具有次线性遗憾保证的算法，解决延迟反馈下新查询选择困境，并扩展至批量BO与上下文高斯过程强盗问题。
AI.result: 在合成及真实数据集上验证算法有效性，证明方法在延迟反馈场景下的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 成功设计适应随机延迟的贝叶斯优化框架，拓展至多个相关领域，实验验证了理论分析的正确性。
