search_text: Reduced Robust Random Cut Forest for Out-Of-Distribution detection in machine learning models 用于机器学习模型中分布外检测的减少鲁棒随机切割森林 Most machine learning-based regressors extract information from data collected via past observations of limited length to make predictions in the future. Consequently, when input to these trained models is data with significantly different statistical properties from data used for training, there is no guarantee of accurate prediction. Consequently, using these models on out-of-distribution input data may result in a completely different predicted outcome from the desired one, which is not only erroneous but can also be hazardous in some cases. Successful deployment of these machine learning models in any system requires a detection system, which should be able to distinguish between out-of-distribution and in-distribution data (i.e. similar to training data). In this paper, we introduce a novel approach for this detection process using a Reduced Robust Random Cut Forest (RRRCF) data structure, which can be used on both small and large data sets. Similar to the Robust Random Cut Forest (RRCF), RRRCF is a structured, but a reduced representation of the training data sub-space in form of cut trees. Empirical results of this method on both low and high-dimensional data showed that inference about data being in/out of training distribution can be made efficiently and the model is easy to train with no difficult hyper-parameter tuning. The paper discusses two different use-cases for testing and validating results. 大多数基于机器学习的回归器从过去有限长度的观察收集的数据中提取信息，以对未来进行预测。因此，当输入到这些训练模型的数据与用于训练的数据具有显着不同的统计属性时，无法保证准确的预测。因此，在分布外的输入数据上使用这些模型可能会导致与期望结果完全不同的预测结果，这不仅是错误的，而且在某些情况下还可能是危险的。在任何系统中成功部署这些机器学习模型都需要一个检测系统，该系统应该能够区分分布外和分布内数据（即类似于训练数据）。在本文中，我们介绍了一种使用简化鲁棒随机森林（RRRCF）数据结构进行检测过程的新方法，该方法可用于小型和大型数据集。与鲁棒随机切割森林（RRCF）类似，RRCF 是一种结构化的、但以切割树形式减少的训练数据子空间的表示。该方法在低维和高维数据上的实证结果表明，可以有效地推断数据是否处于训练分布中，并且模型易于训练，无需困难的超参数调整。本文讨论了用于测试和验证结果的两种不同用例。 本文提出了一种基于缩减鲁棒随机切割森林（RRRCF）的数据结构，用于检测机器学习模型的输入数据是否超出训练数据的分布范围。 Harsh Vardhan,Janos Sztipanovits cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xingang Pan,Ayush Tewari,Lingjie Liu,Christian Theobalt
title: GAN2X: Non-Lambertian Inverse Rendering of Image GANs
title_zh: GAN2X：图像 GAN 的非朗伯逆渲染
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2022. The video demo is available at the project page: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/GAN2X/
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2022. The video demo is available at the project page: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/GAN2X/
abstract: 2D images are observations of the 3D physical world depicted with the geometry, material, and illumination components. Recovering these underlying intrinsic components from 2D images, also known as inverse rendering, usually requires a supervised setting with paired images collected from multiple viewpoints and lighting conditions, which is resource-demanding. In this work, we present GAN2X, a new method for unsupervised inverse rendering that only uses unpaired images for training. Unlike previous Shape-from-GAN approaches that mainly focus on 3D shapes, we take the first attempt to also recover non-Lambertian material properties by exploiting the pseudo paired data generated by a GAN. To achieve precise inverse rendering, we devise a specularity-aware neural surface representation that continuously models the geometry and material properties. A shading-based refinement technique is adopted to further distill information in the target image and recover more fine details. Experiments demonstrate that GAN2X can accurately decompose 2D images to 3D shape, albedo, and specular properties for different object categories, and achieves the state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised single-view 3D face reconstruction. We also show its applications in downstream tasks including real image editing and lifting 2D GANs to decomposed 3D GANs.
summary: 2D images are observations of the 3D physical world depicted with the geometry, material, and illumination components. Recovering these underlying intrinsic components from 2D images, also known as inverse rendering, usually requires a supervised setting with paired images collected from multiple viewpoints and lighting conditions, which is resource-demanding. In this work, we present GAN2X, a new method for unsupervised inverse rendering that only uses unpaired images for training. Unlike previous Shape-from-GAN approaches that mainly focus on 3D shapes, we take the first attempt to also recover non-Lambertian material properties by exploiting the pseudo paired data generated by a GAN. To achieve precise inverse rendering, we devise a specularity-aware neural surface representation that continuously models the geometry and material properties. A shading-based refinement technique is adopted to further distill information in the target image and recover more fine details. Experiments demonstrate that GAN2X can accurately decompose 2D images to 3D shape, albedo, and specular properties for different object categories, and achieves the state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised single-view 3D face reconstruction. We also show its applications in downstream tasks including real image editing and lifting 2D GANs to decomposed 3D GANs.
abstract_zh: 2D 图像是对用几何、材质和照明组件描绘的 3D 物理世界的观察。从 2D 图像中恢复这些底层内在组件（也称为逆渲染）通常需要使用从多个视点和照明条件收集的配对图像进行监督设置，这对资源要求很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GAN2X，一种无监督逆渲染的新方法，仅使用不配对的图像进行训练。与之前主要关注 3D 形状的 Shape-from-GAN 方法不同，我们首次尝试通过利用 GAN 生成的伪配对数据来恢复非朗伯材料属性。为了实现精确的逆渲染，我们设计了一种镜面反射感知神经表面表示，可以连续模拟几何形状和材料属性。采用基于阴影的细化技术来进一步提取目标图像中的信息并恢复更多精细细节。实验表明，GAN2X 可以准确地将 2D 图像分解为不同对象类别的 3D 形状、反照率和镜面反射属性，并实现无监督单视图 3D 人脸重建的最先进性能。我们还展示了它在下游任务中的应用，包括真实图像编辑和将 2D GAN 提升为分解的 3D GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAN2X方法，在无需配对图像的情况下实现非朗伯逆渲染，从2D图像中恢复3D形状、反照率和镜面属性。
AI.motivation: 传统逆渲染依赖多视角配对图像和复杂光照条件，数据获取成本高。现有Shape-from-GAN方法仅关注3D形状，缺乏对非朗伯材质的处理。
AI.method: 通过GAN生成伪配对数据，设计具有镜面感知能力的神经表面表示模型，结合基于光照的细化技术，实现几何与材质属性的连续建模。
AI.result: 在多个物体类别上实现高精度分解，达到单视角3D人脸重建的最先进水平，并成功应用于图像编辑和2D GAN到3D GAN的迁移。
AI.conclusion: GAN2X通过创新性方法解决了非朗伯逆渲染难题，推动了无监督单视角3D重建技术的发展。

search_text: GAN2X: Non-Lambertian Inverse Rendering of Image GANs GAN2X：图像 GAN 的非朗伯逆渲染 2D images are observations of the 3D physical world depicted with the geometry, material, and illumination components. Recovering these underlying intrinsic components from 2D images, also known as inverse rendering, usually requires a supervised setting with paired images collected from multiple viewpoints and lighting conditions, which is resource-demanding. In this work, we present GAN2X, a new method for unsupervised inverse rendering that only uses unpaired images for training. Unlike previous Shape-from-GAN approaches that mainly focus on 3D shapes, we take the first attempt to also recover non-Lambertian material properties by exploiting the pseudo paired data generated by a GAN. To achieve precise inverse rendering, we devise a specularity-aware neural surface representation that continuously models the geometry and material properties. A shading-based refinement technique is adopted to further distill information in the target image and recover more fine details. Experiments demonstrate that GAN2X can accurately decompose 2D images to 3D shape, albedo, and specular properties for different object categories, and achieves the state-of-the-art performance for unsupervised single-view 3D face reconstruction. authors_text: Zhanghao Sun,Yu Zhang,Yicheng Wu,Dong Huo,Yiming Qian,Jian Wang
title: Structured Light with Redundancy Codes
title_zh: 具有冗余代码的结构光
abstract: Structured light (SL) systems acquire high-fidelity 3D geometry with active illumination projection. Conventional systems exhibit challenges when working in environments with strong ambient illumination, global illumination and cross-device interference. This paper proposes a general-purposed technique to improve the robustness of SL by projecting redundant optical signals in addition to the native SL patterns. In this way, projected signals become more distinguishable from errors. Thus the geometry information can be more easily recovered using simple signal processing and the ``coding gain" in performance is obtained. We propose three applications using our redundancy codes: (1) Self error-correction for SL imaging under strong ambient light, (2) Error detection for adaptive reconstruction under global illumination, and (3) Interference filtering with device-specific projection sequence encoding, especially for event camera-based SL and light curtain devices. We systematically analyze the design rules and signal processing algorithms in these applications. Corresponding hardware prototypes are built for evaluations on real-world complex scenes. Experimental results on the synthetic and real data demonstrate the significant performance improvements in SL systems with our redundancy codes.
summary: Structured light (SL) systems acquire high-fidelity 3D geometry with active illumination projection. Conventional systems exhibit challenges when working in environments with strong ambient illumination, global illumination and cross-device interference. This paper proposes a general-purposed technique to improve the robustness of SL by projecting redundant optical signals in addition to the native SL patterns. In this way, projected signals become more distinguishable from errors. Thus the geometry information can be more easily recovered using simple signal processing and the ``coding gain" in performance is obtained. We propose three applications using our redundancy codes: (1) Self error-correction for SL imaging under strong ambient light, (2) Error detection for adaptive reconstruction under global illumination, and (3) Interference filtering with device-specific projection sequence encoding, especially for event camera-based SL and light curtain devices. We systematically analyze the design rules and signal processing algorithms in these applications. Corresponding hardware prototypes are built for evaluations on real-world complex scenes. Experimental results on the synthetic and real data demonstrate the significant performance improvements in SL systems with our redundancy codes.
abstract_zh: 结构光 (SL) 系统通过主动照明投影获取高保真 3D 几何形状。传统系统在强环境照明、全局照明和跨设备干扰的环境中工作时会遇到挑战。本文提出了一种通用技术，通过在原生 SL 模式之外投射冗余光信号来提高 SL 的鲁棒性。通过这种方式，投影信号变得更容易与错误区分开。因此，使用简单的信号处理可以更容易地恢复几何信息，并获得性能上的“编码增益”。我们提出了使用冗余码的三种应用：（1）强环境光下SL成像的自纠错，（2）全局照明下自适应重建的错误检测，以及（3）使用特定于设备的投影序列编码进行干扰过滤，特别是基于事件相机的SL和光幕设备。我们系统地分析了这些应用中的设计规则和信号处理算法。建立了相应的硬件原型对现实世界复杂场景的评估 合成数据和真实数据的实验结果证明了使用我们的冗余代码的 SL 系统的显着性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过投影冗余光学信号增强结构光系统的鲁棒性，解决强环境光和设备干扰下的3D重建问题。
AI.motivation: 传统结构光系统在强环境光、全局光照和跨设备干扰环境下难以稳定获取高精度3D几何信息。
AI.method: 设计冗余编码信号并集成到结构光系统中，提出三种应用：自纠错、自适应重建错误检测、设备特异性干扰过滤，并构建硬件原型验证。
AI.result: 实验表明冗余编码显著提升了结构光系统在合成数据和真实场景中的性能，尤其在复杂光照和干扰环境下效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 冗余编码技术有效增强了结构光系统的鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的高精度3D重建提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Structured Light with Redundancy Codes 具有冗余代码的结构光 Structured light (SL) systems acquire high-fidelity 3D geometry with active illumination projection. Conventional systems exhibit challenges when working in environments with strong ambient illumination, global illumination and cross-device interference. This paper proposes a general-purposed technique to improve the robustness of SL by projecting redundant optical signals in addition to the native SL patterns. In this way, projected signals become more distinguishable from errors. Thus the geometry information can be more easily recovered using simple signal processing and the ``coding gain" in performance is obtained. We propose three applications using our redundancy codes: (1) Self error-correction for SL imaging under strong ambient light, (2) Error detection for adaptive reconstruction under global illumination, and (3) Interference filtering with device-specific projection sequence encoding, especially for event camera-based SL and light curtain devices. We systematically analyze the design rules and signal processing algorithms in these applications. Corresponding hardware prototypes are built for evaluations on real-world complex scenes. Experimental results on the synthetic and real data demonstrate the significant performance improvements in SL systems with our redundancy codes. 结构光 (SL) 系统通过主动照明投影获取高保真 3D 几何形状。传统系统在强环境照明、全局照明和跨设备干扰的环境中工作时会遇到挑战。本文提出了一种通用技术，通过在原生 SL 模式之外投射冗余光信号来提高 SL 的鲁棒性。通过这种方式，投影信号变得更容易与错误区分开。因此，使用简单的信号处理可以更容易地恢复几何信息，并获得性能上的“编码增益”。我们提出了使用冗余码的三种应用：（1）强环境光下SL成像的自纠错，（2）全局照明下自适应重建的错误检测，以及（3）使用特定于设备的投影序列编码进行干扰过滤，特别是基于事件相机的SL和光幕设备。我们系统地分析了这些应用中的设计规则和信号处理算法。建立了相应的硬件原型对现实世界复杂场景的评估 合成数据和真实数据的实验结果证明了使用我们的冗余代码的 SL 系统的显着性能改进。 本文提出通过投影冗余光学信号增强结构光系统的鲁棒性，解决强环境光和设备干扰下的3D重建问题。 Zhanghao Sun,Yu Zhang,Yicheng Wu,Dong Huo,Yiming Qian,Jian Wang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Rohit Saha,Mengyi Fang,Angeline Yasodhara,Kyryl Truskovskyi,Azin Asgarian,Daniel Homola,Raahil Shah,Frederik Dieleman,Jack Weatheritt,Thomas Rogers
title: GaLeNet: Multimodal Learning for Disaster Prediction, Management and Relief
title_zh: GaLeNet：灾害预测、管理和救援的多模式学习
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Workshop on Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022 Workshop on Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment
abstract: After a natural disaster, such as a hurricane, millions are left in need of emergency assistance. To allocate resources optimally, human planners need to accurately analyze data that can flow in large volumes from several sources. This motivates the development of multimodal machine learning frameworks that can integrate multiple data sources and leverage them efficiently. To date, the research community has mainly focused on unimodal reasoning to provide granular assessments of the damage. Moreover, previous studies mostly rely on post-disaster images, which may take several days to become available. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework (GaLeNet) for assessing the severity of damage by complementing pre-disaster images with weather data and the trajectory of the hurricane. Through extensive experiments on data from two hurricanes, we demonstrate (i) the merits of multimodal approaches compared to unimodal methods, and (ii) the effectiveness of GaLeNet at fusing various modalities. Furthermore, we show that GaLeNet can leverage pre-disaster images in the absence of post-disaster images, preventing substantial delays in decision making.
summary: After a natural disaster, such as a hurricane, millions are left in need of emergency assistance. To allocate resources optimally, human planners need to accurately analyze data that can flow in large volumes from several sources. This motivates the development of multimodal machine learning frameworks that can integrate multiple data sources and leverage them efficiently. To date, the research community has mainly focused on unimodal reasoning to provide granular assessments of the damage. Moreover, previous studies mostly rely on post-disaster images, which may take several days to become available. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework (GaLeNet) for assessing the severity of damage by complementing pre-disaster images with weather data and the trajectory of the hurricane. Through extensive experiments on data from two hurricanes, we demonstrate (i) the merits of multimodal approaches compared to unimodal methods, and (ii) the effectiveness of GaLeNet at fusing various modalities. Furthermore, we show that GaLeNet can leverage pre-disaster images in the absence of post-disaster images, preventing substantial delays in decision making.
abstract_zh: 飓风等自然灾害发生后，数百万人需要紧急援助。为了优化资源分配，人类规划人员需要准确分析来自多个来源的大量数据。这推动了多模式机器学习框架的开发，该框架可以集成多个数据源并有效地利用它们。迄今为止，研究界主要集中在单模态推理上，以提供对损害的精细评估。此外，之前的研究大多依赖于灾后图像，这些图像可能需要几天的时间才能获得。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多模态框架（GaLeNet），通过用天气数据和飓风轨迹补充灾前图像来评估损害的严重程度。通过对两次飓风的数据进行大量实验，我们证明了（i）多模态方法相对于单模态方法的优点，以及（ii）GaLeNet 在融合各种模态方面的有效性。此外，我们还表明，GaLeNet 可以在缺乏灾后图像的情况下利用灾前图像，从而防止决策的严重延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GaLeNet多模态框架，通过整合灾前图像、天气数据和飓风轨迹，实现灾后损害严重程度的高效评估。
AI.motivation: 传统灾后评估依赖延迟数日的灾后图像，导致资源分配滞后，需开发融合多源数据的多模态方法提升决策效率。
AI.method: 构建GaLeNet框架，结合灾前图像、实时天气数据及飓风路径信息，通过多模态特征融合技术实现损害预测与评估。
AI.result: 在两场飓风数据集上验证，GaLeNet相较单模态方法提升评估精度，且在缺乏灾后图像时仍能基于灾前数据提供有效预测。
AI.conclusion: GaLeNet通过多模态数据融合显著提升灾害评估效率，为应急资源分配提供及时可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Wenyuan Sun,Ping Zhou,Yangang Wang,Zongpu Yu,Jing Jin,Guangquan Zhou
title: 3D Face Parsing via Surface Parameterization and 2D Semantic Segmentation Network
title_zh: 通过表面参数化和 2D 语义分割网络进行 3D 人脸解析
abstract: Face parsing assigns pixel-wise semantic labels as the face representation for computers, which is the fundamental part of many advanced face technologies. Compared with 2D face parsing, 3D face parsing shows more potential to achieve better performance and further application, but it is still challenging due to 3D mesh data computation. Recent works introduced different methods for 3D surface segmentation, while the performance is still limited. In this paper, we propose a method based on the "3D-2D-3D" strategy to accomplish 3D face parsing. The topological disk-like 2D face image containing spatial and textural information is transformed from the sampled 3D face data through the face parameterization algorithm, and a specific 2D network called CPFNet is proposed to achieve the semantic segmentation of the 2D parameterized face data with multi-scale technologies and feature aggregation. The 2D semantic result is then inversely re-mapped to 3D face data, which finally achieves the 3D face parsing. Experimental results show that both CPFNet and the "3D-2D-3D" strategy accomplish high-quality 3D face parsing and outperform state-of-the-art 2D networks as well as 3D methods in both qualitative and quantitative comparisons.
summary: Face parsing assigns pixel-wise semantic labels as the face representation for computers, which is the fundamental part of many advanced face technologies. Compared with 2D face parsing, 3D face parsing shows more potential to achieve better performance and further application, but it is still challenging due to 3D mesh data computation. Recent works introduced different methods for 3D surface segmentation, while the performance is still limited. In this paper, we propose a method based on the "3D-2D-3D" strategy to accomplish 3D face parsing. The topological disk-like 2D face image containing spatial and textural information is transformed from the sampled 3D face data through the face parameterization algorithm, and a specific 2D network called CPFNet is proposed to achieve the semantic segmentation of the 2D parameterized face data with multi-scale technologies and feature aggregation. The 2D semantic result is then inversely re-mapped to 3D face data, which finally achieves the 3D face parsing. Experimental results show that both CPFNet and the "3D-2D-3D" strategy accomplish high-quality 3D face parsing and outperform state-of-the-art 2D networks as well as 3D methods in both qualitative and quantitative comparisons.
abstract_zh: 人脸解析分配像素级语义标签作为计算机的人脸表示，这是许多先进人脸技术的基础部分。与 2D 人脸解析相比，3D 人脸解析显示出更大的潜力，可以实现更好的性能和进一步的应用，但由于 3D 网格数据计算，它仍然具有挑战性。最近的工作引入了不同的 3D 表面分割方法，但性能仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于“3D-2D-3D”策略的方法来完成3D人脸解析。通过人脸参数化算法将采样的3D人脸数据转换为包含空间和纹理信息的拓扑盘状2D人脸图像，并提出了一种称为CPFNet的特定2D网络，利用多尺度技术和特征聚合来实现2D参数化人脸数据的语义分割。然后将2D语义结果逆向重新映射到3D人脸数据，最终实现3D人脸解析。实验结果表明，CPFNet 和“3D-2D-3D”策略都实现了高质量的 3D 人脸解析，并且在定性和定量比较中均优于最先进的 2D 网络以及 3D 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于'3D-2D-3D'策略的3D人脸解析方法，通过参数化将3D人脸数据转换为2D图像进行语义分割，再映射回3D空间。
AI.motivation: 3D人脸解析因3D网格数据计算复杂度高而面临挑战，现有方法性能有限，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过人脸参数化算法将3D人脸数据转换为包含空间和纹理信息的2D拓扑盘状图像，设计多尺度技术与特征聚合的2D网络CPFNet进行语义分割，再将结果逆向映射回3D数据。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有2D网络及3D方法，实现了高质量的3D人脸解析。
AI.conclusion: 提出的'3D-2D-3D'策略与CPFNet有效解决了3D人脸解析难题，为相关应用提供了新思路。

Experimental results show that both CPFNet and the "3D-2D-3D" strategy accomplish high-quality 3D face parsing and outperform state-of-the-art 2D networks as well as 3D methods in both qualitative and quantitative comparisons. 人脸解析分配像素级语义标签作为计算机的人脸表示，这是许多先进人脸技术的基础部分。与 2D 人脸解析相比，3D 人脸解析显示出更大的潜力，可以实现更好的性能和进一步的应用，但由于 3D 网格数据计算，它仍然具有挑战性。最近的工作引入了不同的 3D 表面分割方法，但性能仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于“3D-2D-3D”策略的方法来完成3D人脸解析。通过人脸参数化算法将采样的3D人脸数据转换为包含空间和纹理信息的拓扑盘状2D人脸图像，并提出了一种称为CPFNet的特定2D网络，利用多尺度技术和特征聚合来实现2D参数化人脸数据的语义分割。然后将2D语义结果逆向重新映射到3D人脸数据，最终实现3D人脸解析。实验结果表明，CPFNet 和“3D-2D-3D”策略都实现了高质量的 3D 人脸解析，并且在定性和定量比较中均优于最先进的 2D 网络以及 3D 方法。 本文提出一种基于'3D-2D-3D'策略的3D人脸解析方法，通过参数化将3D人脸数据转换为2D图像进行语义分割，再映射回3D空间。 Wenyuan Sun,Ping Zhou,Yangang Wang,Zongpu Yu,Jing Jin,Guangquan Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Hitchcox,James Richard Forbes
title: Mind the Gap: Norm-Aware Adaptive Robust Loss for Multivariate Least-Squares Problems
title_zh: 注意差距：多元最小二乘问题的规范感知自适应鲁棒损失
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. This paper has been accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. V2: Update weighting in (13), (28) and re-run results. Hypothesis, methodology, and general findings remain unchanged. Update Sec. II-A to reference IRLS, and update citation [11] accordingly. Include acknowledgement to Mitchell Cohen. V3: Update Section II-A to least-squares
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures. This paper has been accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. V2: Update weighting in (13), (28) and re-run results. Hypothesis, methodology, and general findings remain unchanged. Update Sec. II-A to reference IRLS, and update citation [11] accordingly. Include acknowledgement to Mitchell Cohen. V3: Update Section II-A to least-squares
abstract: Measurement outliers are unavoidable when solving real-world robot state estimation problems. A large family of robust loss functions (RLFs) exists to mitigate the effects of outliers, including newly developed adaptive methods that do not require parameter tuning. All of these methods assume that residuals follow a zero-mean Gaussian-like distribution. However, in multivariate problems the residual is often defined as a norm, and norms follow a Chi-like distribution with a non-zero mode value. This produces a "mode gap" that impacts the convergence rate and accuracy of existing RLFs. The proposed approach, "Adaptive MB," accounts for this gap by first estimating the mode of the residuals using an adaptive Chi-like distribution. Applying an existing adaptive weighting scheme only to residuals greater than the mode leads to more robust performance and faster convergence times in two fundamental state estimation problems, point cloud alignment and pose averaging.
summary: Measurement outliers are unavoidable when solving real-world robot state estimation problems. A large family of robust loss functions (RLFs) exists to mitigate the effects of outliers, including newly developed adaptive methods that do not require parameter tuning. All of these methods assume that residuals follow a zero-mean Gaussian-like distribution. However, in multivariate problems the residual is often defined as a norm, and norms follow a Chi-like distribution with a non-zero mode value. This produces a "mode gap" that impacts the convergence rate and accuracy of existing RLFs. The proposed approach, "Adaptive MB," accounts for this gap by first estimating the mode of the residuals using an adaptive Chi-like distribution. Applying an existing adaptive weighting scheme only to residuals greater than the mode leads to more robust performance and faster convergence times in two fundamental state estimation problems, point cloud alignment and pose averaging.
abstract_zh: 在解决现实世界的机器人状态估计问题时，测量异常值是不可避免的。存在大量鲁棒损失函数（RLF）来减轻异常值的影响，包括新开发的不需要参数调整的自适应方法。所有这些方法都假设残差遵循零均值高斯分布。然而，在多元问题中，残差通常被定义为范数，并且范数遵循非零众数的 Chi 型分布。这会产生“模式间隙”，影响现有 RLF 的收敛速度和准确性。所提出的方法“自适应 MB”通过首先使用自适应 Chi 类分布估计残差模式来解决这一差距。仅将现有的自适应加权方案应用于大于模式的残差，可以在点云对齐和位姿平均这两个基本状态估计问题中带来更稳健的性能和更快的收敛时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应鲁棒损失函数（Adaptive MB），解决多变量最小二乘问题中因残差分布模式差异导致的收敛与精度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒损失函数假设残差服从零均值高斯分布，但实际多变量问题中残差的范数常呈现非零模式值的Chi-like分布，导致模式差距影响算法性能。
AI.method: 通过自适应估计残差模式值，结合Chi-like分布特性，仅对超过模式值的残差应用自适应加权方案，提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在点云对齐和姿态平均任务中，该方法相比现有方法收敛速度更快且鲁棒性更优。
AI.conclusion: Adaptive MB通过考虑残差分布的模式差异，有效缓解了多变量最小二乘问题中的异常值影响，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Aref Abedjooy,Mehran Ebrahimi
title: Multi-Modality Image Inpainting using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络的多模态图像修复
comment: to be published in the Proceedings of 26th Int'l Conf on Image Processing, Computer Vision, & Pattern Recognition (IPCV), July 2022
comments: to be published in the Proceedings of 26th Int'l Conf on Image Processing, Computer Vision, & Pattern Recognition (IPCV), July 2022
abstract: Deep learning techniques, especially Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have significantly improved image inpainting and image-to-image translation tasks over the past few years. To the best of our knowledge, the problem of combining the image inpainting task with the multi-modality image-to-image translation remains intact. In this paper, we propose a model to address this problem. The model will be evaluated on combined night-to-day image translation and inpainting, along with promising qualitative and quantitative results.
summary: Deep learning techniques, especially Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have significantly improved image inpainting and image-to-image translation tasks over the past few years. To the best of our knowledge, the problem of combining the image inpainting task with the multi-modality image-to-image translation remains intact. In this paper, we propose a model to address this problem. The model will be evaluated on combined night-to-day image translation and inpainting, along with promising qualitative and quantitative results.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术，尤其是生成对抗网络（GAN）在过去几年中显着改善了图像修复和图像到图像的翻译任务。据我们所知，将图像修复任务与多模态图像到图像转换相结合的问题仍然存在。在本文中，我们提出了一个模型来解决这个问题。该模型将结合夜间图像转换和修复进行评估，并提供有前景的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的多模态图像修复方法，结合图像到图像的翻译任务，解决夜间到日间图像转换及修复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合多模态图像翻译与修复任务，需探索统一框架同时处理语义转换与缺失区域补全。
AI.method: 设计基于GAN的多模态图像修复模型，通过联合优化生成器与判别器，实现夜间到日间图像的语义转换与缺失区域修复。
AI.result: 在夜间到日间图像转换和修复任务中，模型表现出良好的定性和定量结果，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 证明了结合多模态翻译与修复的可行性，为相关领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jun-Ting Hsieh,Pravesh K. Kothari
title: Approximating Max-Cut on Bounded Degree Graphs: Tighter Analysis of the FKL Algorithm
title_zh: 有界度图上的近似最大割：FKL 算法的更严格分析
abstract: In this note, we describe a $α_{GW} + \tildeΩ(1/d^2)$-factor approximation algorithm for Max-Cut on weighted graphs of degree $\leq d$. Here, $α_{GW}\approx 0.878$ is the worst-case approximation ratio of the Goemans-Williamson rounding for Max-Cut. This improves on previous results for unweighted graphs by Feige, Karpinski, and Langberg and Florén. Our guarantee is obtained by a tighter analysis of the solution obtained by applying a natural local improvement procedure to the Goemans-Williamson rounding of the basic SDP strengthened with triangle inequalities.
summary: In this note, we describe a $α_{GW} + \tildeΩ(1/d^2)$-factor approximation algorithm for Max-Cut on weighted graphs of degree $\leq d$. Here, $α_{GW}\approx 0.878$ is the worst-case approximation ratio of the Goemans-Williamson rounding for Max-Cut. This improves on previous results for unweighted graphs by Feige, Karpinski, and Langberg and Florén. Our guarantee is obtained by a tighter analysis of the solution obtained by applying a natural local improvement procedure to the Goemans-Williamson rounding of the basic SDP strengthened with triangle inequalities.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了 $α_{GW} + \tildeΩ(1/d^2)$ 因子近似算法，用于 $\leq d$ 度加权图上的 Max-Cut。这里，$α_{GW}\approx 0.878$ 是 Max-Cut 的 Goemans-Williamson 舍入的最坏情况近似比率。这改进了 Feige、Karpinski、Langberg 和 Florén 之前的未加权图结果。我们的保证是通过对解决方案进行更严格的分析而获得的，该解决方案是通过将自然局部改进程序应用于用三角形不等式强化的基本 SDP 的 Goemans-Williamson 舍入而获得的。

AI.tldr: 本文针对有界度图的Max-Cut问题，提出改进的近似算法并进行更紧密的分析。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在无权图上表现有限，需扩展至加权图并优化近似比。
AI.method: 基于Goemans-Williamson半定规划解，结合三角不等式加强与局部改进过程进行分析。
AI.result: 获得α_GW + Õ(1/d²)因子的近似比，优于此前无权图结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为有界度图Max-Cut问题提供了更优的理论保证，推动相关算法研究。

Here, $α_{GW}\approx 0.878$ is the worst-case approximation ratio of the Goemans-Williamson rounding for Max-Cut. This improves on previous results for unweighted graphs by Feige, Karpinski, and Langberg and Florén. Our guarantee is obtained by a tighter analysis of the solution obtained by applying a natural local improvement procedure to the Goemans-Williamson rounding of the basic SDP strengthened with triangle inequalities. 在本文中，我们描述了 $α_{GW} + \tildeΩ(1/d^2)$ 因子近似算法，用于 $\leq d$ 度加权图上的 Max-Cut。这里，$α_{GW}\approx 0.878$ 是 Max-Cut 的 Goemans-Williamson 舍入的最坏情况近似比率。这改进了 Feige、Karpinski、Langberg 和 Florén 之前的未加权图结果。我们的保证是通过对解决方案进行更严格的分析而获得的，该解决方案是通过将自然局部改进程序应用于用三角形不等式强化的基本 SDP 的 Goemans-Williamson 舍入而获得的。 本文针对有界度图的Max-Cut问题，提出改进的近似算法并进行更紧密的分析。 Jun-Ting Hsieh,Pravesh K. Kothari cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Manjie Xu,Guangyuan Jiang,Wei Liang,Chi Zhang,Yixin Zhu
title: Interactive Visual Reasoning under Uncertainty
title_zh: 不确定性下的交互式视觉推理
abstract: One of the fundamental cognitive abilities of humans is to quickly resolve uncertainty by generating hypotheses and testing them via active trials. Encountering a novel phenomenon accompanied by ambiguous cause-effect relationships, humans make hypotheses against data, conduct inferences from observation, test their theory via experimentation, and correct the proposition if inconsistency arises. These iterative processes persist until the underlying mechanism becomes clear. In this work, we devise the IVRE (pronounced as "ivory") environment for evaluating artificial agents' reasoning ability under uncertainty. IVRE is an interactive environment featuring rich scenarios centered around Blicket detection. Agents in IVRE are placed into environments with various ambiguous action-effect pairs and asked to determine each object's role. They are encouraged to propose effective and efficient experiments to validate their hypotheses based on observations and actively gather new information. The game ends when all uncertainties are resolved or the maximum number of trials is consumed. By evaluating modern artificial agents in IVRE, we notice a clear failure of today's learning methods compared to humans. Such inefficacy in interactive reasoning ability under uncertainty calls for future research in building human-like intelligence.

Encountering a novel phenomenon accompanied by ambiguous cause-effect relationships, humans make hypotheses against data, conduct inferences from observation, test their theory via experimentation, and correct the proposition if inconsistency arises. These iterative processes persist until the underlying mechanism becomes clear. In this work, we devise the IVRE (pronounced as "ivory") environment for evaluating artificial agents' reasoning ability under uncertainty. IVRE is an interactive environment featuring rich scenarios centered around Blicket detection. Agents in IVRE are placed into environments with various ambiguous action-effect pairs and asked to determine each object's role. They are encouraged to propose effective and efficient experiments to validate their hypotheses based on observations and actively gather new information. The game ends when all uncertainties are resolved or the maximum number of trials is consumed. By evaluating modern artificial agents in IVRE, we notice a clear failure of today's learning methods compared to humans. Such inefficacy in interactive reasoning ability under uncertainty calls for future research in building human-like intelligence.
abstract_zh: 人类的基本认知能力之一是通过产生假设并通过主动试验来测试它们来快速解决不确定性。遇到因果关系不明确的新现象时，人类会根据数据做出假设，从观察中进行推论，通过实验检验他们的理论，如果出现不一致，则纠正命题。这些迭代过程一直持续到底层机制变得清晰为止。在这项工作中，我们设计了 IVRE（发音为“象牙”）环境来评估人工智能体在不确定性下的推理能力。 IVRE 是一个交互式环境，具有以 Blicket 检测为中心的丰富场景。 IVRE 中的代理被放置在具有各种不明确的动作-效果对的环境中，并要求确定每个对象的角色。鼓励他们根据观察提出有效且高效的实验来验证他们的假设并积极收集新信息。当所有不确定性都解决或者消耗了最大尝试次数时，游戏结束。通过评估 IVRE 中的现代人工智能体，我们注意到与人类相比，当今的学习方法明显失败。不确定性下交互式推理能力的低效需要未来研究构建类人智能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVRE环境以评估人工智能代理在不确定性下的推理能力，通过交互式场景测试其假设生成与验证效率。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过主动实验快速解决不确定性问题，而现有AI在类似任务中表现不足，需构建更接近人类推理能力的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计基于Blicket检测的交互式环境IVRE，包含模糊因果关系场景，要求代理通过主动实验验证假设并消除不确定性。
AI.result: 现代AI代理在IVRE中表现显著低于人类，暴露出现有学习方法在不确定性下交互推理的低效性。
AI.conclusion: 需未来研究突破当前AI在不确定性场景下的推理局限，向类人智能迈进。

authors_text: Zhihong Lin,Danli Shi,Donghao Zhang,Xianwen Shang,Mingguang He,Zongyuan Ge
title: Camera Adaptation for Fundus-Image-Based CVD Risk Estimation
title_zh: 基于眼底图像的 CVD 风险估计的相机适配
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution will be added soon
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution will be added soon
abstract: Recent studies have validated the association between cardiovascular disease (CVD) risk and retinal fundus images. Combining deep learning (DL) and portable fundus cameras will enable CVD risk estimation in various scenarios and improve healthcare democratization. However, there are still significant issues to be solved. One of the top priority issues is the different camera differences between the databases for research material and the samples in the production environment. Most high-quality retinography databases ready for research are collected from high-end fundus cameras, and there is a significant domain discrepancy between different cameras. To fully explore the domain discrepancy issue, we first collect a Fundus Camera Paired (FCP) dataset containing pair-wise fundus images captured by the high-end Topcon retinal camera and the low-end Mediwork portable fundus camera of the same patients. Then, we propose a cross-laterality feature alignment pre-training scheme and a self-attention camera adaptor module to improve the model robustness. The cross-laterality feature alignment training encourages the model to learn common knowledge from the same patient's left and right fundus images and improve model generalization. Meanwhile, the device adaptation module learns feature transformation from the target domain to the source domain. We conduct comprehensive experiments on both the UK Biobank database and our FCP data. The experimental results show that the CVD risk regression accuracy and the result consistency over two cameras are improved with our proposed method. The code is available here: \url{https://github.com/linzhlalala/CVD-risk-based-on-retinal-fundus-images}
summary: Recent studies have validated the association between cardiovascular disease (CVD) risk and retinal fundus images. Combining deep learning (DL) and portable fundus cameras will enable CVD risk estimation in various scenarios and improve healthcare democratization. However, there are still significant issues to be solved. One of the top priority issues is the different camera differences between the databases for research material and the samples in the production environment. Most high-quality retinography databases ready for research are collected from high-end fundus cameras, and there is a significant domain discrepancy between different cameras. To fully explore the domain discrepancy issue, we first collect a Fundus Camera Paired (FCP) dataset containing pair-wise fundus images captured by the high-end Topcon retinal camera and the low-end Mediwork portable fundus camera of the same patients. Then, we propose a cross-laterality feature alignment pre-training scheme and a self-attention camera adaptor module to improve the model robustness. The cross-laterality feature alignment training encourages the model to learn common knowledge from the same patient's left and right fundus images and improve model generalization. Meanwhile, the device adaptation module learns feature transformation from the target domain to the source domain. We conduct comprehensive experiments on both the UK Biobank database and our FCP data. The experimental results show that the CVD risk regression accuracy and the result consistency over two cameras are improved with our proposed method. The code is available here: \url{https://github.com/linzhlalala/CVD-risk-based-on-retinal-fundus-images}
abstract_zh: 最近的研究验证了心血管疾病 (CVD) 风险与视网膜眼底图像之间的关联。深度学习 (DL) 和便携式眼底相机的结合将实现各种场景下的 CVD 风险评估，并提高医疗保健民主化。然而，仍有一些重大问题有待解决。最优先的问题之一是研究材料数据库与生产环境中的样本之间的不同相机差异。大多数可供研究的高质量视网膜摄影数据库都是从高端眼底相机收集的，不同相机之间存在显着的域差异。为了充分探讨域差异问题，我们首先收集眼底相机配对（FCP）数据集，其中包含由同一患者的高端 Topcon 视网膜相机和低端 Mediwork 便携式眼底相机拍摄的成对眼底图像。然后，我们提出了一种跨横向特征对齐预训练方案和一个自注意力相机适配器模块来提高模型的鲁棒性。横向特征对齐训练鼓励模型从同一患者的左右眼底图像中学习共同知识并提高模型泛化能力。同时，设备适应模块学习从目标域到源域的特征转换。我们对 UK Biobank 数据库和 FCP 数据进行了全面的实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法提高了 CVD 风险回归的准确性和两个摄像机的结果一致性。代码可在此处获取：\url{https://github.com/linzhlalala/CVD-risk-based-on-retinal-fundus-images}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对眼底图像的相机自适应方法，用于心血管疾病（CVD）风险估计，以解决不同相机设备间的数据域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有高质量眼底图像数据库多基于高端相机，而实际生产环境中常使用低端便携式相机，导致域差异显著，影响模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含高端Topcon与低端Mediwork相机配对图像的FCP数据集，提出跨眼特征对齐预训练方案及自注意力相机适配模块，通过学习同患者双眼图像的共性知识与跨域特征转换实现模型鲁棒性提升。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank数据库和FCP数据集上实验表明，所提方法显著提升了CVD风险回归精度及跨相机结果一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过相机自适应技术有效缓解域差异问题，为便携式设备在真实场景中的CVD风险估计应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Geng Li,Boyuan Ren,Hongzhi Wang
title: EEML: Ensemble Embedded Meta-learning
title_zh: EEML：集成嵌入式元学习
abstract: To accelerate learning process with few samples, meta-learning resorts to prior knowledge from previous tasks. However, the inconsistent task distribution and heterogeneity is hard to be handled through a global sharing model initialization. In this paper, based on gradient-based meta-learning, we propose an ensemble embedded meta-learning algorithm (EEML) that explicitly utilizes multi-model-ensemble to organize prior knowledge into diverse specific experts. We rely on a task embedding cluster mechanism to deliver diverse tasks to matching experts in training process and instruct how experts collaborate in test phase. As a result, the multi experts can focus on their own area of expertise and cooperate in upcoming task to solve the task heterogeneity. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms recent state-of-the-arts easily in few-shot learning problem, which validates the importance of differentiation and cooperation.
summary: To accelerate learning process with few samples, meta-learning resorts to prior knowledge from previous tasks. However, the inconsistent task distribution and heterogeneity is hard to be handled through a global sharing model initialization. In this paper, based on gradient-based meta-learning, we propose an ensemble embedded meta-learning algorithm (EEML) that explicitly utilizes multi-model-ensemble to organize prior knowledge into diverse specific experts. We rely on a task embedding cluster mechanism to deliver diverse tasks to matching experts in training process and instruct how experts collaborate in test phase. As a result, the multi experts can focus on their own area of expertise and cooperate in upcoming task to solve the task heterogeneity. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms recent state-of-the-arts easily in few-shot learning problem, which validates the importance of differentiation and cooperation.
abstract_zh: 为了用少量样本加速学习过程，元学习诉诸先前任务的先验知识。然而，不一致的任务分布和异构性很难通过全局共享模型初始化来处理。在本文中，基于基于梯度的元学习，我们提出了一种集成嵌入式元学习算法（EEML），该算法明确地利用多模型集成将先验知识组织成不同的特定专家。我们依靠任务嵌入集群机制，在训练过程中向匹配的专家交付不同的任务，并指导专家在测试阶段如何协作。因此，多专家可以专注于自己的专业领域，并在即将到来的任务中进行合作，以解决任务的异构性。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在少样本学习问题上轻松优于最新的最先进方法，这验证了差异化和合作的重要性。

AI.tldr: 提出EEML方法解决少样本学习中的任务异质性问题
AI.motivation: 现有元学习方法难以处理任务分布不一致和异质性问题
AI.method: 基于梯度元学习，结合多模型集成与任务嵌入聚类机制，训练时分配任务给匹配专家，测试时协作解决任务
AI.result: 在少样本学习任务中显著优于现有先进方法
AI.conclusion: 通过专家分化与协作机制有效解决任务异质性问题

authors_text: Aref Abedjooy,Mehran Ebrahimi
title: Multi-Modality Image Super-Resolution using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络的多模态图像超分辨率
comment: to be published in the Proceedings of 16th International Conference on Computer Graphics, Visualization, Computer Vision and Image Processing (CGVCVIP), Lisbon, Portugal, July 2022
comments: to be published in the Proceedings of 16th International Conference on Computer Graphics, Visualization, Computer Vision and Image Processing (CGVCVIP), Lisbon, Portugal, July 2022
abstract: Over the past few years deep learning-based techniques such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have significantly improved solutions to image super-resolution and image-to-image translation problems. In this paper, we propose a solution to the joint problem of image super-resolution and multi-modality image-to-image translation. The problem can be stated as the recovery of a high-resolution image in a modality, given a low-resolution observation of the same image in an alternative modality. Our paper offers two models to address this problem and will be evaluated on the recovery of high-resolution day images given low-resolution night images of the same scene. Promising qualitative and quantitative results will be presented for each model.
summary: Over the past few years deep learning-based techniques such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have significantly improved solutions to image super-resolution and image-to-image translation problems. In this paper, we propose a solution to the joint problem of image super-resolution and multi-modality image-to-image translation. The problem can be stated as the recovery of a high-resolution image in a modality, given a low-resolution observation of the same image in an alternative modality. Our paper offers two models to address this problem and will be evaluated on the recovery of high-resolution day images given low-resolution night images of the same scene. Promising qualitative and quantitative results will be presented for each model.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，基于深度学习的技术，例如生成对抗网络（GAN），显着改进了图像超分辨率和图像到图像转换问题的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了图像超分辨率和多模态图像到图像翻译联合问题的解决方案。该问题可以描述为在一种模态中恢复高分辨率图像，同时以另一种模态对同一图像进行低分辨率观察。我们的论文提供了两种模型来解决这个问题，并将在给定同一场景的低分辨率夜间图像的情况下对高分辨率白天图像的恢复进行评估。每个模型都将呈现有前景的定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图像超分辨率与多模态图像转换的生成对抗网络方法，旨在从低分辨率异构模态图像中恢复高分辨率目标模态图像。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理超分辨率和图像转换任务，难以有效融合多模态信息，导致跨模态图像重建效果受限。
AI.method: 设计两个基于GAN的模型架构，通过联合优化超分辨率网络与多模态转换网络，实现从低分辨率源模态（如夜景）到高分辨率目标模态（如日景）的端到端重建。
AI.result: 在跨模态图像恢复任务中，两个模型均取得具有竞争力的定性视觉效果和定量评价指标，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了联合优化超分辨率与多模态转换的可行性，为跨模态图像生成任务提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Nicole Meister,Dora Zhao,Angelina Wang,Vikram V. Ramaswamy,Ruth Fong,Olga Russakovsky
title: Gender Artifacts in Visual Datasets
title_zh: 视觉数据集中的性别伪影
abstract: Gender biases are known to exist within large-scale visual datasets and can be reflected or even amplified in downstream models. Many prior works have proposed methods for mitigating gender biases, often by attempting to remove gender expression information from images. To understand the feasibility and practicality of these approaches, we investigate what $\textit{gender artifacts}$ exist within large-scale visual datasets. We define a $\textit{gender artifact}$ as a visual cue that is correlated with gender, focusing specifically on those cues that are learnable by a modern image classifier and have an interpretable human corollary. Through our analyses, we find that gender artifacts are ubiquitous in the COCO and OpenImages datasets, occurring everywhere from low-level information (e.g., the mean value of the color channels) to the higher-level composition of the image (e.g., pose and location of people). Given the prevalence of gender artifacts, we claim that attempts to remove gender artifacts from such datasets are largely infeasible. Instead, the responsibility lies with researchers and practitioners to be aware that the distribution of images within datasets is highly gendered and hence develop methods which are robust to these distributional shifts across groups.
summary: Gender biases are known to exist within large-scale visual datasets and can be reflected or even amplified in downstream models. Many prior works have proposed methods for mitigating gender biases, often by attempting to remove gender expression information from images. To understand the feasibility and practicality of these approaches, we investigate what $\textit{gender artifacts}$ exist within large-scale visual datasets. We define a $\textit{gender artifact}$ as a visual cue that is correlated with gender, focusing specifically on those cues that are learnable by a modern image classifier and have an interpretable human corollary. Through our analyses, we find that gender artifacts are ubiquitous in the COCO and OpenImages datasets, occurring everywhere from low-level information (e.g., the mean value of the color channels) to the higher-level composition of the image (e.g., pose and location of people). Given the prevalence of gender artifacts, we claim that attempts to remove gender artifacts from such datasets are largely infeasible. Instead, the responsibility lies with researchers and practitioners to be aware that the distribution of images within datasets is highly gendered and hence develop methods which are robust to these distributional shifts across groups.
abstract_zh: 已知大规模视觉数据集中存在性别偏见，并且可以在下游模型中反映出来甚至放大。许多先前的作品提出了减轻性别偏见的方法，通常是尝试从图像中删除性别表达信息。为了了解这些方法的可行性和实用性，我们研究了大规模视觉数据集中存在哪些$\textit{性别伪影}$。我们将 $\textit{性别伪影}$ 定义为与性别相关的视觉线索，特别关注那些可由现代图像分类器学习并具有可解释的人类推论的线索。通过我们的分析，我们发现性别伪影在 COCO 和 OpenImages 数据集中无处不在，从低级信息（例如颜色通道的平均值）到图像的高级组成（例如人的姿势和位置）无处不在。鉴于性别伪影的普遍存在，我们声称尝试从此类数据集中删除性别伪影基本上是不可行的。相反，研究人员和从业者有责任意识到数据集中图像的分布是高度性别化的，因此开发对这些跨群体分布变化稳健的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究大规模视觉数据集中存在的性别相关视觉线索（性别伪影），分析其分布特征及去除可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉数据集存在性别偏见，且去偏方法多试图移除性别信息，但其可行性尚未明确。
AI.method: 定义性别伪影为可被现代图像分类器学习且具有可解释性的人类对应线索，通过分析COCO和OpenImages数据集中的低级（如颜色通道均值）和高级（如人体姿态）特征进行验证。
AI.result: 发现性别伪影在两个数据集中普遍存在，涉及从低级到高级的多层级视觉特征。
AI.conclusion: 彻底移除性别伪影在技术上不可行，应通过开发对性别分布偏移鲁棒的模型来应对这一问题。

Through our analyses, we find that gender artifacts are ubiquitous in the COCO and OpenImages datasets, occurring everywhere from low-level information (e.g., the mean value of the color channels) to the higher-level composition of the image (e.g., pose and location of people). Given the prevalence of gender artifacts, we claim that attempts to remove gender artifacts from such datasets are largely infeasible. Instead, the responsibility lies with researchers and practitioners to be aware that the distribution of images within datasets is highly gendered and hence develop methods which are robust to these distributional shifts across groups. 已知大规模视觉数据集中存在性别偏见，并且可以在下游模型中反映出来甚至放大。许多先前的作品提出了减轻性别偏见的方法，通常是尝试从图像中删除性别表达信息。为了了解这些方法的可行性和实用性，我们研究了大规模视觉数据集中存在哪些$\textit{性别伪影}$。我们将 $\textit{性别伪影}$ 定义为与性别相关的视觉线索，特别关注那些可由现代图像分类器学习并具有可解释的人类推论的线索。通过我们的分析，我们发现性别伪影在 COCO 和 OpenImages 数据集中无处不在，从低级信息（例如颜色通道的平均值）到图像的高级组成（例如人的姿势和位置）无处不在。鉴于性别伪影的普遍存在，我们声称尝试从此类数据集中删除性别伪影基本上是不可行的。相反，研究人员和从业者有责任意识到数据集中图像的分布是高度性别化的，因此开发对这些跨群体分布变化稳健的方法。 本文研究大规模视觉数据集中存在的性别相关视觉线索（性别伪影），分析其分布特征及去除可行性。 Nicole Meister,Dora Zhao,Angelina Wang,Vikram V. Ramaswamy,Ruth Fong,Olga Russakovsky cs.CV

authors_text: Mohamed Djeha,Antonin Dallard,Ahmed Zermane,Pierre Gergondet,Abderrahmane Kheddar
title: Human-Robot Handovers using Task-Space Quadratic Programming
title_zh: 使用任务空间二次规划进行人机切换
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, Accepted in 2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, Accepted in 2022 31st IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
abstract: Bidirectional object handover between a human and a robot enables an important functionality skill in robotic human-centered manufacturing or services. The problem in achieving this skill lies in the capacity of any solution to deal with three important aspects: (i) synchronized timing for the handing over phases; (ii) the handling of object pose constraints; and (iii) understanding the haptic exchanging to seamlessly achieve some steps of the (i). We propose a new approach for (i) and (ii) consisting in explicitly formulating the handover process as constraints in a task-space quadratic programming control framework to achieve implicit time and trajectory encounters. Our method is implemented on Panda robotic arm taking objects from a human operator.
summary: Bidirectional object handover between a human and a robot enables an important functionality skill in robotic human-centered manufacturing or services. The problem in achieving this skill lies in the capacity of any solution to deal with three important aspects: (i) synchronized timing for the handing over phases; (ii) the handling of object pose constraints; and (iii) understanding the haptic exchanging to seamlessly achieve some steps of the (i). We propose a new approach for (i) and (ii) consisting in explicitly formulating the handover process as constraints in a task-space quadratic programming control framework to achieve implicit time and trajectory encounters. Our method is implemented on Panda robotic arm taking objects from a human operator.
abstract_zh: 人和机器人之间的双向物体切换在以人为中心的机器人制造或服务中实现了重要的功能技能。实现这一技能的问题在于任何解决方案处理三个重要方面的能力：(i) 切换阶段的同步计时； (ii) 物体姿态约束的处理； (iii) 理解触觉交换以无缝地实现 (i) 的一些步骤。我们针对（i）和（ii）提出了一种新方法，包括将切换过程明确地表述为任务空间二次规划控制框架中的约束，以实现隐式时间和轨迹相遇。我们的方法是在 Panda 机械臂上实现的，该机械臂从人类操作员那里获取物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务空间二次规划的控制框架，用于实现人机之间的双向物体交接。
AI.motivation: 现有方案难以同时解决交接过程中的时序同步、物体姿态约束及触觉交互理解三方面问题，影响人机协作效率。
AI.method: 将交接过程的时序和姿态约束显式建模为二次规划问题，在Panda机械臂上实现控制框架。
AI.result: 成功实现机械臂与人类操作员的物体交接，满足时序同步和物体姿态约束要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过任务空间二次规划有效解决了人机交接中的核心挑战，提升了协作流畅性。

authors_text: Jaehyuk Heo,YongGi Jeong,Sunwoo Kim,Jaehee Kim,Pilsung Kang
title: REVECA -- Rich Encoder-decoder framework for Video Event CAptioner
title_zh: REVECA——用于视频事件 CAptioner 的丰富编码器-解码器框架
comment: The IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR). LOng-form VidEo Understanding (LOVEU) workshop
comments: The IEEE/CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR). LOng-form VidEo Understanding (LOVEU) workshop
abstract: We describe an approach used in the Generic Boundary Event Captioning challenge at the Long-Form Video Understanding Workshop held at CVPR 2022. We designed a Rich Encoder-decoder framework for Video Event CAptioner (REVECA) that utilizes spatial and temporal information from the video to generate a caption for the corresponding the event boundary. REVECA uses frame position embedding to incorporate information before and after the event boundary. Furthermore, it employs features extracted using the temporal segment network and temporal-based pairwise difference method to learn temporal information. A semantic segmentation mask for the attentional pooling process is adopted to learn the subject of an event. Finally, LoRA is applied to fine-tune the image encoder to enhance the learning efficiency. REVECA yielded an average score of 50.97 on the Kinetics-GEBC test data, which is an improvement of 10.17 over the baseline method. Our code is available in https://github.com/TooTouch/REVECA.
summary: We describe an approach used in the Generic Boundary Event Captioning challenge at the Long-Form Video Understanding Workshop held at CVPR 2022. We designed a Rich Encoder-decoder framework for Video Event CAptioner (REVECA) that utilizes spatial and temporal information from the video to generate a caption for the corresponding the event boundary. REVECA uses frame position embedding to incorporate information before and after the event boundary. Furthermore, it employs features extracted using the temporal segment network and temporal-based pairwise difference method to learn temporal information. A semantic segmentation mask for the attentional pooling process is adopted to learn the subject of an event. Finally, LoRA is applied to fine-tune the image encoder to enhance the learning efficiency. REVECA yielded an average score of 50.97 on the Kinetics-GEBC test data, which is an improvement of 10.17 over the baseline method. Our code is available in https://github.com/TooTouch/REVECA.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了在 CVPR 2022 举行的长格式视频理解研讨会上通用边界事件字幕挑战中使用的方法。我们为视频事件 CAptioner (REVECA) 设计了一个丰富的编码器-解码器框架，它利用视频中的空间和时间信息来生成相应事件边界的字幕。 REVECA 使用帧位置嵌入来合并事件边界之前和之后的信息。此外，它采用使用时间段网络和基于时间的成对差分方法提取的特征来学习时间信息。采用注意力池过程的语义分割掩模来学习事件的主题。最后，应用LoRA对图像编码器进行微调，以提高学习效率。 REVECA 在 Kinetics-GEBC 测试数据上的平均得分为 50.97，比基线方法提高了 10.17。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/TooTouch/REVECA 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为REVECA的丰富编码器-解码器框架，用于视频事件边界生成描述性字幕。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用视频时空信息生成事件边界字幕时存在不足，需更有效整合上下文信息以提升准确性。
AI.method: 采用帧位置嵌入捕捉事件边界前后的时空信息，结合时序分段网络与时序差分方法提取动态特征，通过语义分割掩码优化注意力池化过程，并使用LoRA技术微调图像编码器以提高效率。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBC测试数据集上达到50.97的平均得分，较基线方法提升10.17分。
AI.conclusion: REVECA通过多模态特征融合与高效微调策略显著提升了事件边界字幕生成性能，验证了时空信息与注意力机制结合的有效性。

authors_text: Goran Vasiljevic,Dean Martinovic,Matko Batos,Stjepan Bogdan
title: Validation of two-wire power line UAV localization based on the magnetic field strength
title_zh: 基于磁场强度的两线电力线无人机定位验证
comment: ICUAS 2022, The 2022 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems
comments: ICUAS 2022, The 2022 International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems
abstract: In this paper we extend our previous work on UAV localization based on the magnetic field strength. The method is based on a magnetic flux density distribution in vicinity of two very long, thin and parallel transmission lines. An UAV is equipped with 4 magnetometers, positioned so that obtained measurements give unique solution to an optimization problem used to find relative position and orientation of the UAV with respect to conductors. Several sets of experiments, undertaken on a laboratory setup, confirmed validity of the method for both solutions - analytical and numerical optimization. Obtained results, compared with high precision motion capture system, are within range of standard RTK positioning.
summary: In this paper we extend our previous work on UAV localization based on the magnetic field strength. The method is based on a magnetic flux density distribution in vicinity of two very long, thin and parallel transmission lines. An UAV is equipped with 4 magnetometers, positioned so that obtained measurements give unique solution to an optimization problem used to find relative position and orientation of the UAV with respect to conductors. Several sets of experiments, undertaken on a laboratory setup, confirmed validity of the method for both solutions - analytical and numerical optimization. Obtained results, compared with high precision motion capture system, are within range of standard RTK positioning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们扩展了之前基于磁场强度的无人机定位的工作。该方法基于两条非常长、细且平行的传输线附近的磁通密度分布。无人机配备了 4 个磁力计，其定位使得获得的测量结果为用于查找无人机相对于导体的相对位置和方向的优化问题提供了独特的解决方案。在实验室设置中进行的几组实验证实了该方法对于解析和数值优化这两种解决方案的有效性。所得结果与高精度运动捕捉系统相比，均在标准RTK定位范围内。

AI.tldr: 验证基于磁场强度的无人机定位方法在两线电力线路环境中的有效性
AI.motivation: 提升无人机在电力线路等复杂环境中的定位精度和可靠性
AI.method: 利用两条平行输电线路附近的磁通密度分布模型，结合四磁力计测量数据，通过解析与数值优化方法确定无人机相对位置和姿态
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法定位精度达到RTK级别，验证了解析与数值优化方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在实验室环境下有效，为无人机在电力线路巡检等场景提供了一种高精度定位方案

search_text: Validation of two-wire power line UAV localization based on the magnetic field strength 基于磁场强度的两线电力线无人机定位验证 In this paper we extend our previous work on UAV localization based on the magnetic field strength. The method is based on a magnetic flux density distribution in vicinity of two very long, thin and parallel transmission lines. An UAV is equipped with 4 magnetometers, positioned so that obtained measurements give unique solution to an optimization problem used to find relative position and orientation of the UAV with respect to conductors. Several sets of experiments, undertaken on a laboratory setup, confirmed validity of the method for both solutions - analytical and numerical optimization. Obtained results, compared with high precision motion capture system, are within range of standard RTK positioning. 在本文中，我们扩展了之前基于磁场强度的无人机定位的工作。该方法基于两条非常长、细且平行的传输线附近的磁通密度分布。无人机配备了 4 个磁力计，其定位使得获得的测量结果为用于查找无人机相对于导体的相对位置和方向的优化问题提供了独特的解决方案。在实验室设置中进行的几组实验证实了该方法对于解析和数值优化这两种解决方案的有效性。所得结果与高精度运动捕捉系统相比，均在标准RTK定位范围内。 验证基于磁场强度的无人机定位方法在两线电力线路环境中的有效性 Goran Vasiljevic,Dean Martinovic,Matko Batos,Stjepan Bogdan cs.RO

authors_text: Luca Carminati,Federico Cacciamani,Marco Ciccone,Nicola Gatti
title: A Marriage between Adversarial Team Games and 2-player Games: Enabling Abstractions, No-regret Learning, and Subgame Solving
title_zh: 对抗性团队游戏和两人游戏的结合：实现抽象、无悔学习和子游戏解决
comment: 20 pages; Accepted for publication at ICML 2022
comments: 20 pages; Accepted for publication at ICML 2022
abstract: \emph{Ex ante} correlation is becoming the mainstream approach for \emph{sequential adversarial team games}, where a team of players faces another team in a zero-sum game. It is known that team members' asymmetric information makes both equilibrium computation \textsf{APX}-hard and team's strategies not directly representable on the game tree. This latter issue prevents the adoption of successful tools for huge 2-player zero-sum games such as, \emph{e.g.}, abstractions, no-regret learning, and subgame solving. This work shows that we can recover from this weakness by bridging the gap between sequential adversarial team games and 2-player games. In particular, we propose a new, suitable game representation that we call \emph{team-public-information}, in which a team is represented as a single coordinator who only knows information common to the whole team and prescribes to each member an action for any possible private state. The resulting representation is highly \emph{explainable}, being a 2-player tree in which the team's strategies are behavioral with a direct interpretation and more expressive than the original extensive form when designing abstractions. Furthermore, we prove payoff equivalence of our representation, and we provide techniques that, starting directly from the extensive form, generate dramatically more compact representations without information loss. Finally, we experimentally evaluate our techniques when applied to a standard testbed, comparing their performance with the current state of the art.

It is known that team members' asymmetric information makes both equilibrium computation \textsf{APX}-hard and team's strategies not directly representable on the game tree. This latter issue prevents the adoption of successful tools for huge 2-player zero-sum games such as, \emph{e.g.}, abstractions, no-regret learning, and subgame solving. This work shows that we can recover from this weakness by bridging the gap between sequential adversarial team games and 2-player games. In particular, we propose a new, suitable game representation that we call \emph{team-public-information}, in which a team is represented as a single coordinator who only knows information common to the whole team and prescribes to each member an action for any possible private state. The resulting representation is highly \emph{explainable}, being a 2-player tree in which the team's strategies are behavioral with a direct interpretation and more expressive than the original extensive form when designing abstractions. Furthermore, we prove payoff equivalence of our representation, and we provide techniques that, starting directly from the extensive form, generate dramatically more compact representations without information loss. Finally, we experimentally evaluate our techniques when applied to a standard testbed, comparing their performance with the current state of the art.
abstract_zh: \emph{事前}相关性正在成为 \emph{顺序对抗性团队游戏}的主流方法，其中一个团队的玩家在零和游戏中面对另一个团队。众所周知，团队成员的信息不对称使得均衡计算 \textsf{APX} 变得困难，并且团队的策略无法直接在博弈树上表示。后一个问题阻碍了大型两人零和游戏的成功工具的采用，例如\emph{e.g.}、抽象、无悔学习和子游戏解决。这项工作表明，我们可以通过弥合连续对抗团队游戏和两人游戏之间的差距来弥补这一弱点。特别是，我们提出了一种新的、合适的游戏表示，称为 \emph{team-public-information}，其中团队被表示为单个协调员，他只知道整个团队共有的信息，并向每个成员规定任何可能的私有状态的操作。由此产生的表示是高度 \emph{可解释的}，是一个 2 人树，其中团队的策略是具有直接解释的行为，并且在设计抽象时比原始的扩展形式更具表现力。此外，我们证明了我们的表示的收益等价性，并且我们提供了直接从扩展形式开始的技术，在不丢失信息的情况下生成显着更紧凑的表示。最后，我们通过实验评估我们的技术应用于标准测试台时，将其性能与当前最先进的技术进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将对抗性团队游戏与两人零和游戏结合，解决团队成员信息不对称导致的均衡计算难题，并设计新的游戏表示方法以支持抽象化、无遗憾学习和子博弈求解。
AI.motivation: 在序贯对抗团队游戏中，团队成员的信息不对称导致均衡计算复杂度高且无法直接应用两人游戏的工具（如抽象化、无遗憾学习等），亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种名为'team-public-information'的新游戏表示方法，将团队视为单个协调者，仅基于公共信息制定策略，并证明其与原始博弈的收益等价性，同时提供从原始博弈生成紧凑表示的技术。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在标准测试环境中优于现有技术，生成的表示更紧凑且保留信息，支持更高效的策略设计与计算。
AI.conclusion: 通过桥接团队游戏与两人游戏的差距，本文为对抗性团队博弈提供了可解释、高效的策略表示与计算框架，推动了相关技术的应用。

authors_text: Ke Zhang,Xiahai Zhuang
title: Deep Compatible Learning for Partially-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 部分监督医学图像分割的深度兼容学习
abstract: Partially-supervised learning can be challenging for segmentation due to the lack of supervision for unlabeled structures, and the methods directly applying fully-supervised learning could lead to incompatibility, meaning ground truth is not in the solution set of the optimization problem given the loss function. To address the challenge, we propose a deep compatible learning (DCL) framework, which trains a single multi-label segmentation network using images with only partial structures annotated. We first formulate the partially-supervised segmentation as an optimization problem compatible with missing labels, and prove its compatibility. Then, we equip the model with a conditional segmentation strategy, to propagate labels from multiple partially-annotated images to the target. Additionally, we propose a dual learning strategy, which learns two opposite mappings of label propagation simultaneously, to provide substantial supervision for unlabeled structures. The two strategies are formulated into compatible forms, termed as conditional compatibility and dual compatibility, respectively. We show this framework is generally applicable for conventional loss functions. The approach attains significant performance improvement over existing methods, especially in the situation where only a small training dataset is available. Results on three segmentation tasks have shown that the proposed framework could achieve performance matching fully-supervised models.
summary: Partially-supervised learning can be challenging for segmentation due to the lack of supervision for unlabeled structures, and the methods directly applying fully-supervised learning could lead to incompatibility, meaning ground truth is not in the solution set of the optimization problem given the loss function. To address the challenge, we propose a deep compatible learning (DCL) framework, which trains a single multi-label segmentation network using images with only partial structures annotated. We first formulate the partially-supervised segmentation as an optimization problem compatible with missing labels, and prove its compatibility. Then, we equip the model with a conditional segmentation strategy, to propagate labels from multiple partially-annotated images to the target. Additionally, we propose a dual learning strategy, which learns two opposite mappings of label propagation simultaneously, to provide substantial supervision for unlabeled structures. The two strategies are formulated into compatible forms, termed as conditional compatibility and dual compatibility, respectively. We show this framework is generally applicable for conventional loss functions. The approach attains significant performance improvement over existing methods, especially in the situation where only a small training dataset is available. Results on three segmentation tasks have shown that the proposed framework could achieve performance matching fully-supervised models.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏对未标记结构的监督，部分监督学习对于分割可能具有挑战性，而直接应用全监督学习的方法可能会导致不兼容，这意味着给定损失函数的情况下，真实情况不在优化问题的解集中。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种深度兼容学习（DCL）框架，该框架使用仅注释部分结构的图像来训练单个多标签分割网络。我们首先将部分监督分割表述为与缺失标签兼容的优化问题，并证明其兼容性。然后，我们为模型配备条件分割策略，将标签从多个部分注释的图像传播到目标。此外，我们提出了一种双重学习策略，它同时学习标签传播的两个相反的映射，为未标记的结构提供实质性的监督。这两种策略被表述为兼容的形式，分别称为条件兼容和双重兼容。我们证明这个框架通常适用于传统的损失函数。该方法比现有方法取得了显着的性能改进，特别是在只有少量训练数据集可用的情况下。三个分割任务的结果表明，所提出的框架可以实现与完全监督模型相匹配的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度兼容学习（DCL）框架，用于解决部分监督的医学图像分割问题。
AI.motivation: 部分监督学习在分割任务中面临未标注结构缺乏监督的问题，直接应用全监督学习的方法可能导致不兼容问题，即真实标签不在优化问题的解集中。
AI.method: 提出了一种深度兼容学习框架，通过兼容缺失标签的优化问题进行训练，并引入条件分割策略和双学习策略，以提供对未标注结构的大量监督。
AI.result: 该方法在三个分割任务中均表现出色，特别是在训练数据集较小时，其性能可与全监督模型相媲美。
AI.conclusion: DCL框架在部分监督医学图像分割任务中具有广泛适用性，并能显著提升现有方法的性能。

We show this framework is generally applicable for conventional loss functions. The approach attains significant performance improvement over existing methods, especially in the situation where only a small training dataset is available. Results on three segmentation tasks have shown that the proposed framework could achieve performance matching fully-supervised models. 由于缺乏对未标记结构的监督，部分监督学习对于分割可能具有挑战性，而直接应用全监督学习的方法可能会导致不兼容，这意味着给定损失函数的情况下，真实情况不在优化问题的解集中。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种深度兼容学习（DCL）框架，该框架使用仅注释部分结构的图像来训练单个多标签分割网络。我们首先将部分监督分割表述为与缺失标签兼容的优化问题，并证明其兼容性。然后，我们为模型配备条件分割策略，将标签从多个部分注释的图像传播到目标。此外，我们提出了一种双重学习策略，它同时学习标签传播的两个相反的映射，为未标记的结构提供实质性的监督。这两种策略被表述为兼容的形式，分别称为条件兼容和双重兼容。我们证明这个框架通常适用于传统的损失函数。该方法比现有方法取得了显着的性能改进，特别是在只有少量训练数据集可用的情况下。三个分割任务的结果表明，所提出的框架可以实现与完全监督模型相匹配的性能。 本文提出了一种深度兼容学习（DCL）框架，用于解决部分监督的医学图像分割问题。 Ke Zhang,Xiahai Zhuang cs.CV

authors_text: Peibei Cao,Chenyang Le,Yuming Fang,Kede Ma
title: A Perceptually Optimized and Self-Calibrated Tone Mapping Operator
title_zh: 感知优化和自校准的色调映射算子
abstract: With the increasing popularity and accessibility of high dynamic range (HDR) photography, tone mapping operators (TMOs) for dynamic range compression are practically demanding. In this paper, we develop a two-stage neural network-based TMO that is self-calibrated and perceptually optimized. In Stage one, motivated by the physiology of the early stages of the human visual system, we first decompose an HDR image into a normalized Laplacian pyramid. We then use two lightweight deep neural networks (DNNs), taking the normalized representation as input and estimating the Laplacian pyramid of the corresponding LDR image. We optimize the tone mapping network by minimizing the normalized Laplacian pyramid distance (NLPD), a perceptual metric aligning with human judgments of tone-mapped image quality. In Stage two, the input HDR image is self-calibrated to compute the final LDR image. We feed the same HDR image but rescaled with different maximum luminances to the learned tone mapping network, and generate a pseudo-multi-exposure image stack with different detail visibility and color saturation. We then train another lightweight DNN to fuse the LDR image stack into a desired LDR image by maximizing a variant of the structural similarity index for multi-exposure image fusion (MEF-SSIM), which has been proven perceptually relevant to fused image quality. The proposed self-calibration mechanism through MEF enables our TMO to accept uncalibrated HDR images, while being physiology-driven. Extensive experiments show that our method produces images with consistently better visual quality. Additionally, since our method builds upon three lightweight DNNs, it is among the fastest local TMOs.
summary: With the increasing popularity and accessibility of high dynamic range (HDR) photography, tone mapping operators (TMOs) for dynamic range compression are practically demanding. In this paper, we develop a two-stage neural network-based TMO that is self-calibrated and perceptually optimized. In Stage one, motivated by the physiology of the early stages of the human visual system, we first decompose an HDR image into a normalized Laplacian pyramid. We then use two lightweight deep neural networks (DNNs), taking the normalized representation as input and estimating the Laplacian pyramid of the corresponding LDR image. We optimize the tone mapping network by minimizing the normalized Laplacian pyramid distance (NLPD), a perceptual metric aligning with human judgments of tone-mapped image quality. In Stage two, the input HDR image is self-calibrated to compute the final LDR image. We feed the same HDR image but rescaled with different maximum luminances to the learned tone mapping network, and generate a pseudo-multi-exposure image stack with different detail visibility and color saturation. We then train another lightweight DNN to fuse the LDR image stack into a desired LDR image by maximizing a variant of the structural similarity index for multi-exposure image fusion (MEF-SSIM), which has been proven perceptually relevant to fused image quality. The proposed self-calibration mechanism through MEF enables our TMO to accept uncalibrated HDR images, while being physiology-driven. Extensive experiments show that our method produces images with consistently better visual quality. Additionally, since our method builds upon three lightweight DNNs, it is among the fastest local TMOs.
abstract_zh: 随着高动态范围 (HDR) 摄影的日益普及和普及，用于动态范围压缩的色调映射算子 (TMO) 的要求越来越高。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于两阶段神经网络的 TMO，它具有自校准和感知优化功能。在第一阶段，受人类视觉系统早期阶段生理学的启发，我们首先将 HDR 图像分解为归一化的拉普拉斯金字塔。然后，我们使用两个轻量级深度神经网络 (DNN)，将归一化表示作为输入并估计相应 LDR 图像的拉普拉斯金字塔。我们通过最小化归一化拉普拉斯金字塔距离（NLPD）来优化色调映射网络，NLPD 是一种与人类对色调映射图像质量的判断一致的感知度量。在第二阶段，输入 HDR 图像进行自校准以计算最终的 LDR 图像。我们将相同的 HDR 图像提供给学习的色调映射网络，但以不同的最大亮度重新缩放，并生成具有不同细节可见度和颜色饱和度的伪多重曝光图像堆栈。然后，我们训练另一个轻量级 DNN，通过最大化多重曝光图像融合的结构相似性指数 (MEF-SSIM) 的变体，将 LDR 图像堆栈融合到所需的 LDR 图像中，这已被证明在感知上与融合图像质量相关。所提出的通过 MEF 的自校准机制使我们的 TMO 能够接受未校准的 HDR 图像，同时是生理驱动的。大量实验表明，我们的方法生成的图像始终具有更好的视觉质量。此外，由于我们的方法建立在三个轻量级 DNN 之上，因此它是最快的本地 TMO 之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于两阶段神经网络的自校准感知优化色调映射算子，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像到低动态范围（LDR）图像的转换。
AI.motivation: 随着HDR摄影普及，传统色调映射算子在动态范围压缩和感知质量优化上存在不足，需开发自校准且符合人眼感知的高效方法。
AI.method: 第一阶段通过生理学启发的归一化拉普拉斯金字塔分解HDR图像，利用两个轻量DNN估计LDR金字塔并以NLPD指标优化；第二阶段通过多尺度亮度重缩放生成伪多曝光图像栈，再用另一DNN以MEF-SSIM指标融合生成最终LDR图像。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量上优于现有算法，且因采用三个轻量DNN，成为最快的局部色调映射算子之一。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自校准机制与生理驱动的感知优化方法，使模型能处理未校准HDR图像，同时实现高质量与高效能的平衡。

authors_text: Xin Jing,Meishu Song,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Zijiang Yang,Björn W. Schuller
title: Redundancy Reduction Twins Network: A Training framework for Multi-output Emotion Regression
title_zh: 冗余减少双胞胎网络：多输出情绪回归的训练框架
comment: 5 pages, accepted by ICML Exvo workshop
comments: 5 pages, accepted by ICML Exvo workshop
abstract: In this paper, we propose the Redundancy Reduction Twins Network (RRTN), a redundancy reduction training framework that minimizes redundancy by measuring the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of the same network fed with distorted versions of a sample and bringing it as close to the identity matrix as possible. RRTN also applies a new loss function, the Barlow Twins loss function, to help maximize the similarity of representations obtained from different distorted versions of a sample. However, as the distribution of losses can cause performance fluctuations in the network, we also propose the use of a Restrained Uncertainty Weight Loss (RUWL) or joint training to identify the best weights for the loss function. Our best approach on CNN14 with the proposed methodology obtains a CCC over emotion regression of 0.678 on the ExVo Multi-task dev set, a 4.8% increase over a vanilla CNN 14 CCC of 0.647, which achieves a significant difference at the 95% confidence interval (2-tailed).
summary: In this paper, we propose the Redundancy Reduction Twins Network (RRTN), a redundancy reduction training framework that minimizes redundancy by measuring the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of the same network fed with distorted versions of a sample and bringing it as close to the identity matrix as possible. RRTN also applies a new loss function, the Barlow Twins loss function, to help maximize the similarity of representations obtained from different distorted versions of a sample. However, as the distribution of losses can cause performance fluctuations in the network, we also propose the use of a Restrained Uncertainty Weight Loss (RUWL) or joint training to identify the best weights for the loss function. Our best approach on CNN14 with the proposed methodology obtains a CCC over emotion regression of 0.678 on the ExVo Multi-task dev set, a 4.8% increase over a vanilla CNN 14 CCC of 0.647, which achieves a significant difference at the 95% confidence interval (2-tailed).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了冗余减少孪生网络（RRTN），这是一种冗余减少训练框架，通过测量由样本的失真版本馈送的同一网络的输出之间的互相关矩阵并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵来最小化冗余。 RRTN 还应用了一种新的损失函数，即 Barlow Twins 损失函数，以帮助最大限度地提高从样本的不同扭曲版本获得的表示的相似性。然而，由于损失的分布可能会导致网络的性能波动，因此我们还建议使用约束不确定性权重损失（RUWL）或联合训练来确定损失函数的最佳权重。我们在 CNN14 上采用所提出的方法的最佳方法在 ExVo 多任务开发集上获得了 0.678 的情感回归 CCC，比普通 CNN 14 CCC 0.647 提高了 4.8%，在 95% 置信区间（2 尾）实现了显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RRTN的冗余减少双胞胎网络训练框架，用于多输出情感回归任务。
AI.motivation: 多输出模型中输出间的冗余性可能导致性能波动，需通过减少冗余并优化损失函数来提升情感回归的稳定性与准确性。
AI.method: 通过计算同一网络在输入扰动样本下的输出交叉相关矩阵，将其逼近单位矩阵以减少冗余；结合Barlow双胞胎损失函数及受限不确定性权重损失（RUWL）或联合训练优化损失权重。
AI.result: 在CNN14模型上，RRTN在ExVo多任务开发集上达到0.678的CCC值，较原始CNN14提升4.8%（p<0.05）。
AI.conclusion: RRTN框架有效降低了多输出情感回归中的冗余性，显著提升了模型性能。

RRTN also applies a new loss function, the Barlow Twins loss function, to help maximize the similarity of representations obtained from different distorted versions of a sample. However, as the distribution of losses can cause performance fluctuations in the network, we also propose the use of a Restrained Uncertainty Weight Loss (RUWL) or joint training to identify the best weights for the loss function. Our best approach on CNN14 with the proposed methodology obtains a CCC over emotion regression of 0.678 on the ExVo Multi-task dev set, a 4.8% increase over a vanilla CNN 14 CCC of 0.647, which achieves a significant difference at the 95% confidence interval (2-tailed). 在本文中，我们提出了冗余减少孪生网络（RRTN），这是一种冗余减少训练框架，通过测量由样本的失真版本馈送的同一网络的输出之间的互相关矩阵并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵来最小化冗余。 RRTN 还应用了一种新的损失函数，即 Barlow Twins 损失函数，以帮助最大限度地提高从样本的不同扭曲版本获得的表示的相似性。然而，由于损失的分布可能会导致网络的性能波动，因此我们还建议使用约束不确定性权重损失（RUWL）或联合训练来确定损失函数的最佳权重。我们在 CNN14 上采用所提出的方法的最佳方法在 ExVo 多任务开发集上获得了 0.678 的情感回归 CCC，比普通 CNN 14 CCC 0.647 提高了 4.8%，在 95% 置信区间（2 尾）实现了显着差异。 本文提出了一种名为RRTN的冗余减少双胞胎网络训练框架，用于多输出情感回归任务。 Xin Jing,Meishu Song,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Zijiang Yang,Björn W. Schuller cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shreshth Tuli,Rajas Bansal,Rohan Paul,Mausam
title: ToolTango: Common sense Generalization in Predicting Sequential Tool Interactions for Robot Plan Synthesis
title_zh: ToolTango：预测机器人计划综合的顺序工具交互的常识泛化
comment: Accepted in Journal of AI Research. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.04556
comments: Accepted in Journal of AI Research. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.04556
abstract: Robots assisting us in environments such as factories or homes must learn to make use of objects as tools to perform tasks, for instance using a tray to carry objects. We consider the problem of learning commonsense knowledge of when a tool may be useful and how its use may be composed with other tools to accomplish a high-level task instructed by a human. Specifically, we introduce a novel neural model, termed TOOLTANGO, that first predicts the next tool to be used, and then uses this information to predict the next action. We show that this joint model can inform learning of a fine-grained policy enabling the robot to use a particular tool in sequence and adds a significant value in making the model more accurate. TOOLTANGO encodes the world state, comprising objects and symbolic relationships between them, using a graph neural network and is trained using demonstrations from human teachers instructing a virtual robot in a physics simulator. The model learns to attend over the scene using knowledge of the goal and the action history, finally decoding the symbolic action to execute. Crucially, we address generalization to unseen environments where some known tools are missing, but alternative unseen tools are present. We show that by augmenting the representation of the environment with pre-trained embeddings derived from a knowledge-base, the model can generalize effectively to novel environments. Experimental results show at least 48.8-58.1% absolute improvement over the baselines in predicting successful symbolic plans for a simulated mobile manipulator in novel environments with unseen objects. This work takes a step in the direction of enabling robots to rapidly synthesize robust plans for complex tasks, particularly in novel settings

We consider the problem of learning commonsense knowledge of when a tool may be useful and how its use may be composed with other tools to accomplish a high-level task instructed by a human. We show that this joint model can inform learning of a fine-grained policy enabling the robot to use a particular tool in sequence and adds a significant value in making the model more accurate. TOOLTANGO encodes the world state, comprising objects and symbolic relationships between them, using a graph neural network and is trained using demonstrations from human teachers instructing a virtual robot in a physics simulator. The model learns to attend over the scene using knowledge of the goal and the action history, finally decoding the symbolic action to execute. Experimental results show at least 48.8-58.1% absolute improvement over the baselines in predicting successful symbolic plans for a simulated mobile manipulator in novel environments with unseen objects. This work takes a step in the direction of enabling robots to rapidly synthesize robust plans for complex tasks, particularly in novel settings
abstract_zh: 在工厂或家庭等环境中协助我们的机器人必须学会利用物体作为工具来执行任务，例如使用托盘来搬运物体。我们考虑学习常识性知识的问题，即工具何时有用以及如何将其与其他工具组合使用以完成人类指​​示的高级任务。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖的神经模型，称为 TOOLTANGO，它首先预测下一个要使用的工具，然后使用这些信息来预测下一个动作。我们表明，这种联合模型可以帮助学习细粒度的策略，使机器人能够按顺序使用特定的工具，并为使模型更加准确增加了重要的价值。 TOOLTANGO 使用图神经网络对世界状态进行编码，包括对象及其之间的符号关系，并使用人类教师在物理模拟器中指导虚拟机器人的演示进行训练。该模型学习使用目标和动作历史的知识来关注场景，最终解码要执行的符号动作。至关重要的是，我们解决了对看不见的环境的泛化问题，其中缺少一些已知的工具，但存在替代的看不见的工具。我们表明，通过使用从知识库派生的预先训练的嵌入来增强环境的表示，该模型可以有效地推广到新的环境。实验结果表明，在具有不可见物体的新环境中，预测模拟移动机械臂的成功符号计划方面，与基线相比，绝对改进至少为 48.8-58.1%。这项工作朝着使机器人能够快速合成复杂任务的稳健计划的方向迈出了一步，特别是在新颖的环境中

AI.tldr: 本文提出ToolTango模型，通过预测工具使用序列帮助机器人在新环境中合成复杂任务的鲁棒计划。
AI.motivation: 机器人需在动态环境中灵活使用工具完成任务，但现有方法难以泛化到未见过的工具和场景。
AI.method: 设计基于图神经网络的ToolTango模型，结合目标信息与动作历史进行场景注意力机制，并引入知识库预训练嵌入提升环境泛化能力。
AI.result: 在包含未见过物体的模拟环境中，ToolTango较基线方法提升48.8-58.1%的符号计划预测成功率。
AI.conclusion: 通过工具序列预测与知识增强表示，该方法为机器人快速合成复杂任务计划提供了有效途径。
