authors_text: Hirokatsu Kataoka,Sora Takashima,Ryo Hayamizu,Ryosuke Yamada,Kodai Nakashima,Xinyu Zhang,Edgar Josafat Martinez-Noriega,Nakamasa Inoue,Rio Yokota
title: Pre-training Vision Transformers with Formula-driven Supervised Learning
title_zh: 使用公式驱动的监督学习预训练视觉转换器
abstract: In the present work, we show that the performance of formula-driven supervised learning (FDSL) can match or even exceed that of ImageNet-21k and can approach that of the JFT-300M dataset without the use of real images, human supervision, or self-supervision during the pre-training of vision transformers (ViTs). For example, ViT-Base pre-trained on ImageNet-21k and JFT-300M showed 83.0 and 84.1% top-1 accuracy when fine-tuned on ImageNet-1k, and FDSL showed 83.8% top-1 accuracy when pre-trained under comparable conditions (hyperparameters and number of epochs). Especially, the ExFractalDB-21k pre-training was calculated with x14.2 fewer images compared with JFT-300M. Images generated by formulas avoid privacy and copyright issues, labeling costs and errors, and biases that real images suffer from, and thus have tremendous potential for pre-training general models. To understand the performance of the synthetic images, we tested two hypotheses, namely (i) object contours are what matter in FDSL datasets and (ii) an increased number of parameters for label creation improves performance in FDSL pre-training. To test the former hypothesis, we constructed a dataset that consisted of simple object contour combinations. We found that this dataset matched the performance of fractal databases. For the latter hypothesis, we found that increasing the difficulty of the pre-training task generally leads to better fine-tuning accuracy.
summary: In the present work, we show that the performance of formula-driven supervised learning (FDSL) can match or even exceed that of ImageNet-21k and can approach that of the JFT-300M dataset without the use of real images, human supervision, or self-supervision during the pre-training of vision transformers (ViTs). For example, ViT-Base pre-trained on ImageNet-21k and JFT-300M showed 83.0 and 84.1% top-1 accuracy when fine-tuned on ImageNet-1k, and FDSL showed 83.8% top-1 accuracy when pre-trained under comparable conditions (hyperparameters and number of epochs). Especially, the ExFractalDB-21k pre-training was calculated with x14.2 fewer images compared with JFT-300M. Images generated by formulas avoid privacy and copyright issues, labeling costs and errors, and biases that real images suffer from, and thus have tremendous potential for pre-training general models. To understand the performance of the synthetic images, we tested two hypotheses, namely (i) object contours are what matter in FDSL datasets and (ii) an increased number of parameters for label creation improves performance in FDSL pre-training. To test the former hypothesis, we constructed a dataset that consisted of simple object contour combinations. We found that this dataset matched the performance of fractal databases. For the latter hypothesis, we found that increasing the difficulty of the pre-training task generally leads to better fine-tuning accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在目前的工作中，我们表明公式驱动的监督学习（FDSL）的性能可以匹配甚至超过 ImageNet-21k，并且可以接近 JFT-300M 数据集的性能，而无需在视觉变压器（ViT）预训练期间使用真实图像、人类监督或自监督。例如，在 ImageNet-21k 和 JFT-300M 上预训练的 ViT-Base 在 ImageNet-1k 上进行微调时显示出 83.0 和 84.1% 的 top-1 准确率，而在可比条件（超参数和 epoch 数）下预训练时 FDSL 显示出 83.8% 的 top-1 准确率。特别是，与 JFT-300M 相比，ExFractalDB-21k 预训练的计算图像数量减少了 14.2 倍。通过公式生成的图像避免了隐私和版权问题、标签成本和错误以及真实图像所遭受的偏差，因此在预训练通用模型方面具有巨大的潜力。为了了解合成图像的性能，我们测试了两个假设，即 (i) 对象轮廓在 FDSL 数据集中很重要，(ii) 增加标签创建参数数量可以提高 FDSL 预训练的性能。为了检验前一个假设，我们构建了一个由简单的对象轮廓组合组成的数据集。我们发现该数据集与分形数据库的性能相匹配。对于后一个假设，我们发现增加预训练任务的难度通常会带来更好的微调精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需真实图像、人工监督或自监督的公式驱动监督学习（FDSL）方法，用于预训练视觉Transformer（ViT），并通过合成图像实现与ImageNet-21k和JFT-300M相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 真实图像存在隐私、版权、标注成本及偏差等问题，而合成图像可通过公式生成，避免上述问题，同时探索其在预训练通用模型中的潜力。
AI.method: 通过公式生成合成图像构建ExFractalDB-21k数据集，测试两个假设：（i）对象轮廓是FDSL数据集的关键；（ii）增加标签生成参数可提升性能。构建简单轮廓组合数据集验证假设，并调整预训练任务难度进行实验。
AI.result: FDSL在ViT-Base预训练中达到83.8%的ImageNet-1k微调准确率，接近ImageNet-21k（83.0%）和JFT-300M（84.1%），且图像量减少14.2倍；轮廓数据集性能与分形数据库匹配，任务难度提升显著提高微调准确率。
AI.conclusion: 公式驱动的合成图像能有效替代真实图像进行ViT预训练，避免其固有缺陷，且验证了轮廓重要性及任务难度对性能的影响，为通用模型预训练提供新方向。

conclusion: 公式驱动的合成图像能有效替代真实图像进行ViT预训练，避免其固有缺陷，且验证了轮廓重要性及任务难度对性能的影响，为通用模型预训练提供新方向。
search_text: Pre-training Vision Transformers with Formula-driven Supervised Learning 使用公式驱动的监督学习预训练视觉转换器 In the present work, we show that the performance of formula-driven supervised learning (FDSL) can match or even exceed that of ImageNet-21k and can approach that of the JFT-300M dataset without the use of real images, human supervision, or self-supervision during the pre-training of vision transformers (ViTs). For example, ViT-Base pre-trained on ImageNet-21k and JFT-300M showed 83.0 and 84.1% top-1 accuracy when fine-tuned on ImageNet-1k, and FDSL showed 83.8% top-1 accuracy when pre-trained under comparable conditions (hyperparameters and number of epochs). Especially, the ExFractalDB-21k pre-training was calculated with x14.2 fewer images compared with JFT-300M. Images generated by formulas avoid privacy and copyright issues, labeling costs and errors, and biases that real images suffer from, and thus have tremendous potential for pre-training general models. To understand the performance of the synthetic images, we tested two hypotheses, namely (i) object contours are what matter in FDSL datasets and (ii) an increased number of parameters for label creation improves performance in FDSL pre-training. To test the former hypothesis, we constructed a dataset that consisted of simple object contour combinations. We found that this dataset matched the performance of fractal databases. For the latter hypothesis, we found that increasing the difficulty of the pre-training task generally leads to better fine-tuning accuracy. 在目前的工作中，我们表明公式驱动的监督学习（FDSL）的性能可以匹配甚至超过 ImageNet-21k，并且可以接近 JFT-300M 数据集的性能，而无需在视觉变压器（ViT）预训练期间使用真实图像、人类监督或自监督。例如，在 ImageNet-21k 和 JFT-300M 上预训练的 ViT-Base 在 ImageNet-1k 上进行微调时显示出 83.0 和 84.1% 的 top-1 准确率，而在可比条件（超参数和 epoch 数）下预训练时 FDSL 显示出 83.8% 的 top-1 准确率。特别是，与 JFT-300M 相比，ExFractalDB-21k 预训练的计算图像数量减少了 14.2 倍。通过公式生成的图像避免了隐私和版权问题、标签成本和错误以及真实图像所遭受的偏差，因此在预训练通用模型方面具有巨大的潜力。为了了解合成图像的性能，我们测试了两个假设，即 (i) 对象轮廓在 FDSL 数据集中很重要，(ii) 增加标签创建参数数量可以提高 FDSL 预训练的性能。为了检验前一个假设，我们构建了一个由简单的对象轮廓组合组成的数据集。我们发现该数据集与分形数据库的性能相匹配。对于后一个假设，我们发现增加预训练任务的难度通常会带来更好的微调精度。 本文提出了一种无需真实图像、人工监督或自监督的公式驱动监督学习（FDSL）方法，用于预训练视觉Transformer（ViT），并通过合成图像实现与ImageNet-21k和JFT-300M相当的性能。 Hirokatsu Kataoka,Sora Takashima,Ryo Hayamizu,Ryosuke Yamada,Kodai Nakashima,Xinyu Zhang,Edgar Josafat Martinez-Noriega,Nakamasa Inoue,Rio Yokota cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haibin Wu,Jiawen Kang,Lingwei Meng,Yang Zhang,Xixin Wu,Zhiyong Wu,Hung-yi Lee,Helen Meng
title: Tackling Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification with Multi-Model Fusion
title_zh: 通过多模型融合解决欺骗感知扬声器验证问题
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the extraordinary development of automatic speaker verification (ASV). However, previous works show that state-of-the-art ASV models are seriously vulnerable to voice spoofing attacks, and the recently proposed high-performance spoofing countermeasure (CM) models only focus solely on the standalone anti-spoofing tasks, and ignore the subsequent speaker verification process. How to integrate the CM and ASV together remains an open question. A spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) challenge has recently taken place with the argument that better performance can be delivered when both CM and ASV subsystems are optimized jointly. Under the challenge's scenario, the integrated systems proposed by the participants are required to reject both impostor speakers and spoofing attacks from target speakers, which intuitively and effectively matches the expectation of a reliable, spoofing-robust ASV system. This work focuses on fusion-based SASV solutions and proposes a multi-model fusion framework to leverage the power of multiple state-of-the-art ASV and CM models. The proposed framework vastly improves the SASV-EER from 8.75% to 1.17\%, which is 86% relative improvement compared to the best baseline system in the SASV challenge.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the extraordinary development of automatic speaker verification (ASV). However, previous works show that state-of-the-art ASV models are seriously vulnerable to voice spoofing attacks, and the recently proposed high-performance spoofing countermeasure (CM) models only focus solely on the standalone anti-spoofing tasks, and ignore the subsequent speaker verification process. How to integrate the CM and ASV together remains an open question. A spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) challenge has recently taken place with the argument that better performance can be delivered when both CM and ASV subsystems are optimized jointly. Under the challenge's scenario, the integrated systems proposed by the participants are required to reject both impostor speakers and spoofing attacks from target speakers, which intuitively and effectively matches the expectation of a reliable, spoofing-robust ASV system. This work focuses on fusion-based SASV solutions and proposes a multi-model fusion framework to leverage the power of multiple state-of-the-art ASV and CM models. The proposed framework vastly improves the SASV-EER from 8.75% to 1.17\%, which is 86% relative improvement compared to the best baseline system in the SASV challenge.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动说话人验证（ASV）取得了非凡的发展。然而，之前的工作表明，最先进的 ASV 模型非常容易受到语音欺骗攻击，而最近提出的高性能欺骗对策（CM）模型仅专注于独立的反欺骗任务，而忽略了后续的说话人验证过程。如何将 CM 和 ASV 集成在一起仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。最近发生了欺骗感知说话人验证 (SASV) 挑战，其论点是，当 CM 和 ASV 子系统联合优化时，可以提供更好的性能。在挑战场景下，参与者提出的集成系统需要拒绝冒名顶替者和来自目标发言者的欺骗攻击，这直观有效地符合可靠、欺骗鲁棒的 ASV 系统的期望。这项工作重点关注基于融合的 SASV 解决方案，并提出了一个多模型融合框架，以利用多个最先进的 ASV 和 CM 模型的力量。所提出的框架将 SASV-EER 从 8.75% 大幅提高到 1.17\%，与 SASV 挑战中的最佳基线系统相比，相对提高了 86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模型融合的防欺骗说话人验证（SASV）框架，以提高系统在面对语音欺骗攻击时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动说话人验证（ASV）系统对语音欺骗攻击非常脆弱，而目前的反欺骗（CM）模型仅专注于独立的反欺骗任务，忽略了后续的说话人验证过程，如何将CM与ASV结合仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多模型融合框架，结合多个最先进的ASV和CM模型，以实现更高效的防欺骗说话人验证。
AI.result: 该框架将SASV-EER从8.75%显著提升至1.17%，相比挑战赛中最佳基线系统实现了86%的相对改进。
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合方法在防欺骗说话人验证中表现出色，能够有效结合ASV与CM模型的优势，提升系统的鲁棒性和性能。

authors_text: Md. Wahiduzzaman Khan Arnob,Arunima Dey Pooja,Md. Saif Hassan Onim
title: A Combined PCA-MLP Network for Early Breast Cancer Detection
title_zh: 用于早期乳腺癌检测的组合 PCA-MLP 网络
abstract: Breast cancer is the second most responsible for all cancer types and has been the cause of numerous deaths over the years, especially among women. Any improvisation of the existing diagnosis system for the detection of cancer can contribute to minimizing the death ratio. Moreover, cancer detection at an early stage has recently been a prime research area in the scientific community to enhance the survival rate. Proper choice of machine learning tools can ensure early-stage prognosis with high accuracy. In this paper, we have studied different machine learning algorithms to detect whether a patient is likely to face breast cancer or not. Due to the implicit behavior of early-stage features, we have implemented a multilayer perception model with the integration of PCA and suggested it to be more viable than other detection algorithms. Our 4 layers MLP-PCA network has obtained the best accuracy of 100% with a mean of 90.48% accuracy on the BCCD dataset.
summary: Breast cancer is the second most responsible for all cancer types and has been the cause of numerous deaths over the years, especially among women. Any improvisation of the existing diagnosis system for the detection of cancer can contribute to minimizing the death ratio. Moreover, cancer detection at an early stage has recently been a prime research area in the scientific community to enhance the survival rate. Proper choice of machine learning tools can ensure early-stage prognosis with high accuracy. In this paper, we have studied different machine learning algorithms to detect whether a patient is likely to face breast cancer or not. Due to the implicit behavior of early-stage features, we have implemented a multilayer perception model with the integration of PCA and suggested it to be more viable than other detection algorithms. Our 4 layers MLP-PCA network has obtained the best accuracy of 100% with a mean of 90.48% accuracy on the BCCD dataset.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌是所有癌症类型中第二大的癌症，多年来一直是导致无数人死亡的原因，尤其是女性。现有癌症检测诊断系统的任何临时改进都有助于最大限度地降低死亡率。此外，早期癌症检测最近已成为科学界提高生存率的主要研究领域。正确选择机器学习工具可以确保高精度的早期预测。在本文中，我们研究了不同的机器学习算法来检测患者是否可能患乳腺癌。由于早期特征的隐式行为，我们实现了集成 PCA 的多层感知模型，并表明它比其他检测算法更可行。我们的 4 层 MLP-PCA 网络在 BCCD 数据集上获得了 100% 的最佳准确率，平均准确率为 90.48%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合PCA和MLP网络的模型，用于早期乳腺癌检测。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌是导致女性死亡的主要癌症类型之一，早期检测对提高生存率至关重要，因此需要改进现有诊断系统以提高准确性。
AI.method: 通过集成主成分分析（PCA）与多层感知机（MLP），构建了一个四层MLP-PCA网络，用于提取特征并分类乳腺癌患者。
AI.result: 该模型在BCCD数据集上达到100%的最佳准确率，平均准确率为90.48%。
AI.conclusion: PCA-MLP网络在乳腺癌早期检测中表现出更高的准确性，优于其他检测算法。

authors_text: Chonghan Chen,Qi Jiang,Chih-Hao Wang,Noel Chen,Haohan Wang,Xiang Li,Bhiksha Raj
title: Bear the Query in Mind: Visual Grounding with Query-conditioned Convolution
title_zh: 牢记查询：带有查询条件卷积的视觉基础
abstract: Visual grounding is a task that aims to locate a target object according to a natural language expression. As a multi-modal task, feature interaction between textual and visual inputs is vital. However, previous solutions mainly handle each modality independently before fusing them together, which does not take full advantage of relevant textual information while extracting visual features. To better leverage the textual-visual relationship in visual grounding, we propose a Query-conditioned Convolution Module (QCM) that extracts query-aware visual features by incorporating query information into the generation of convolutional kernels. With our proposed QCM, the downstream fusion module receives visual features that are more discriminative and focused on the desired object described in the expression, leading to more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on three popular visual grounding datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. In addition, the query-aware visual features are informative enough to achieve comparable performance to the latest methods when directly used for prediction without further multi-modal fusion.
summary: Visual grounding is a task that aims to locate a target object according to a natural language expression. As a multi-modal task, feature interaction between textual and visual inputs is vital. However, previous solutions mainly handle each modality independently before fusing them together, which does not take full advantage of relevant textual information while extracting visual features. To better leverage the textual-visual relationship in visual grounding, we propose a Query-conditioned Convolution Module (QCM) that extracts query-aware visual features by incorporating query information into the generation of convolutional kernels. With our proposed QCM, the downstream fusion module receives visual features that are more discriminative and focused on the desired object described in the expression, leading to more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on three popular visual grounding datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. In addition, the query-aware visual features are informative enough to achieve comparable performance to the latest methods when directly used for prediction without further multi-modal fusion.
abstract_zh: 视觉定位是一项旨在根据自然语言表达来定位目标对象的任务。作为多模式任务，文本和视觉输入之间的特征交互至关重要。然而，以前的解决方案主要是在将每种模态融合在一起之前独立处理它们，在提取视觉特征时没有充分利用相关的文本信息。为了更好地利用视觉基础中的文本-视觉关系，我们提出了一种查询条件卷积模块（QCM），它通过将查询信息合并到卷积核的生成中来提取查询感知的视觉特征。通过我们提出的 QCM，下游融合模块接收更具辨别力并专注于表达式中描述的所需对象的视觉特征，从而实现更准确的预测。对三个流行的视觉基础数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。此外，查询感知视觉特征的信息量足以在直接用于预测而无需进一步多模态融合时实现与最新方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于查询条件卷积的视觉定位方法，通过融合自然语言查询信息优化视觉特征提取。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位方法在提取视觉特征时未充分结合文本查询信息，导致特征区分度不足，影响定位准确性。
AI.method: 设计查询条件卷积模块（QCM），将文本查询信息嵌入卷积核生成过程，使视觉特征提取过程关注文本描述的物体。
AI.result: 在三个主流数据集上达到最先进水平，且提取的查询感知特征可直接用于预测并保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模文本-视觉关联，查询条件卷积能有效提升视觉定位性能，证明了跨模态特征交互的重要性。

authors_text: Yu Cui,Moshiur Farazi
title: VReBERT: A Simple and Flexible Transformer for Visual Relationship Detection
title_zh: VReBERT：用于视觉关系检测的简单灵活的变压器
comment: Published at International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022, Montreal Quebec
comments: Published at International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022, Montreal Quebec
abstract: Visual Relationship Detection (VRD) impels a computer vision model to 'see' beyond an individual object instance and 'understand' how different objects in a scene are related. The traditional way of VRD is first to detect objects in an image and then separately predict the relationship between the detected object instances. Such a disjoint approach is prone to predict redundant relationship tags (i.e., predicate) between the same object pair with similar semantic meaning, or incorrect ones that have a similar meaning to the ground truth but are semantically incorrect. To remedy this, we propose to jointly train a VRD model with visual object features and semantic relationship features. To this end, we propose VReBERT, a BERT-like transformer model for Visual Relationship Detection with a multi-stage training strategy to jointly process visual and semantic features. We show that our simple BERT-like model is able to outperform the state-of-the-art VRD models in predicate prediction. Furthermore, we show that by using the pre-trained VReBERT model, our model pushes the state-of-the-art zero-shot predicate prediction by a significant margin (+8.49 R@50 and +8.99 R@100).
summary: Visual Relationship Detection (VRD) impels a computer vision model to 'see' beyond an individual object instance and 'understand' how different objects in a scene are related. The traditional way of VRD is first to detect objects in an image and then separately predict the relationship between the detected object instances. Such a disjoint approach is prone to predict redundant relationship tags (i.e., predicate) between the same object pair with similar semantic meaning, or incorrect ones that have a similar meaning to the ground truth but are semantically incorrect. To remedy this, we propose to jointly train a VRD model with visual object features and semantic relationship features. To this end, we propose VReBERT, a BERT-like transformer model for Visual Relationship Detection with a multi-stage training strategy to jointly process visual and semantic features. We show that our simple BERT-like model is able to outperform the state-of-the-art VRD models in predicate prediction. Furthermore, we show that by using the pre-trained VReBERT model, our model pushes the state-of-the-art zero-shot predicate prediction by a significant margin (+8.49 R@50 and +8.99 R@100).
abstract_zh: 视觉关系检测 (VRD) 促使计算机视觉模型“看到”单个对象实例之外的内容，并“理解”场景中不同对象之间的关系。 VRD的传统方式是首先检测图像中的对象，然后分别预测检测到的对象实例之间的关系。这种不相交的方法很容易预测具有相似语义含义的同一对象对之间的冗余关系标签（即谓词），或者预测与基本事实具有相似含义但语义不正确的错误关系标签。为了解决这个问题，我们建议联合训练具有视觉对象特征和语义关系特征的 VRD 模型。为此，我们提出了 VReBERT，一种用于视觉关系检测的类似 BERT 的转换器模型，采用多阶段训练策略来联合处理视觉和语义特征。我们证明，我们的简单的类 BERT 模型能够在谓词预测方面优于最先进的 VRD 模型。此外，我们表明，通过使用预训练的 VReBERT 模型，我们的模型将最先进的零样本谓词预测显着提升（+8.49 R@50 和 +8.99 R@100）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VReBERT，一种基于Transformer的视觉关系检测模型，通过联合处理视觉和语义特征提升关系预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉关系检测方法分步处理物体检测和关系预测，导致冗余或语义错误的关系标签，需联合优化视觉与语义特征。
AI.method: 设计类似BERT的Transformer架构，采用多阶段训练策略，联合处理视觉物体特征与语义关系特征进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在谓词预测任务中超越现有SOTA模型，零样本预测指标提升显著（R@50+8.49，R@100+8.99）。
AI.conclusion: VReBERT通过联合建模视觉与语义信息，证明了简单Transformer架构在视觉关系检测任务中的有效性与优越性。

authors_text: Zhengyi Luo,Shun Iwase,Ye Yuan,Kris Kitani
title: Embodied Scene-aware Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 体现场景感知的人体姿势估计
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Project website: https://zhengyiluo.github.io/projects/embodied_pose/. Zhengyi Luo and Shun Iwase contributed equally
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Project website: https://zhengyiluo.github.io/projects/embodied_pose/. Zhengyi Luo and Shun Iwase contributed equally
abstract: We propose embodied scene-aware human pose estimation where we estimate 3D poses based on a simulated agent's proprioception and scene awareness, along with external third-person observations. Unlike prior methods that often resort to multistage optimization, non-causal inference, and complex contact modeling to estimate human pose and human scene interactions, our method is one-stage, causal, and recovers global 3D human poses in a simulated environment. Since 2D third-person observations are coupled with the camera pose, we propose to disentangle the camera pose and use a multi-step projection gradient defined in the global coordinate frame as the movement cue for our embodied agent. Leveraging a physics simulation and prescanned scenes (e.g., 3D mesh), we simulate our agent in everyday environments (library, office, bedroom, etc.) and equip our agent with environmental sensors to intelligently navigate and interact with the geometries of the scene. Our method also relies only on 2D keypoints and can be trained on synthetic datasets derived from popular human motion databases. To evaluate, we use the popular H36M and PROX datasets and achieve high quality pose estimation on the challenging PROX dataset without ever using PROX motion sequences for training. Code and videos are available on the project page.
summary: We propose embodied scene-aware human pose estimation where we estimate 3D poses based on a simulated agent's proprioception and scene awareness, along with external third-person observations. Unlike prior methods that often resort to multistage optimization, non-causal inference, and complex contact modeling to estimate human pose and human scene interactions, our method is one-stage, causal, and recovers global 3D human poses in a simulated environment. Since 2D third-person observations are coupled with the camera pose, we propose to disentangle the camera pose and use a multi-step projection gradient defined in the global coordinate frame as the movement cue for our embodied agent. Leveraging a physics simulation and prescanned scenes (e.g., 3D mesh), we simulate our agent in everyday environments (library, office, bedroom, etc.) and equip our agent with environmental sensors to intelligently navigate and interact with the geometries of the scene. Our method also relies only on 2D keypoints and can be trained on synthetic datasets derived from popular human motion databases. To evaluate, we use the popular H36M and PROX datasets and achieve high quality pose estimation on the challenging PROX dataset without ever using PROX motion sequences for training. Code and videos are available on the project page.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了具体的场景感知人体姿势估计，其中我们根据模拟代理的本体感觉和场景感知以及外部第三人称观察来估计 3D 姿势。与通常采用多阶段优化、非因果推理和复杂接触建模来估计人体姿势和人体场景交互的现有方法不同，我们的方法是单阶段的、因果的，并在模拟环境中恢复全局 3D 人体姿势。由于 2D 第三人称观察与相机姿势相结合，我们建议解开相机姿势，并使用全局坐标系中定义的多步投影梯度作为我们具体代理的运动线索。利用物理模拟和预扫描场景（例如 3D 网格），我们在日常环境（图书馆、办公室、卧室等）中模拟我们的代理，并为我们的代理配备环境传感器，以智能导航并与场景的几何图形交互。我们的方法还仅依赖于 2D 关键点，并且可以在源自流行人体运动数据库的合成数据集上进行训练。为了进行评估，我们使用流行的 H36M 和 PROX 数据集，并在具有挑战性的 PROX 数据集上实现高质量的姿态估计，而无需使用 PROX 运动序列进行训练。项目页面上提供了代码和视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模拟智能体本体感知和场景意识的三维人体姿态估计方法，结合第三人称观测实现全局三维姿态恢复。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖多阶段优化、非因果推理和复杂接触建模，而本文旨在通过单阶段因果推理实现更高效的场景感知人体姿态估计。
AI.method: 通过解耦相机姿态并利用全局坐标系中的多步投影梯度作为运动线索，结合物理仿真和预扫描场景（如3D网格），模拟智能体在日常环境中的导航与交互，并仅使用2D关键点进行训练。
AI.result: 在H36M和PROX数据集上实现高质量姿态估计，尤其在未使用PROX训练序列的情况下仍能在挑战性PROX数据集上取得优异结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合本体感知、场景意识和第三人称观测，有效实现了复杂环境下的三维人体姿态估计，且无需复杂模型即可达到高精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模拟智能体本体感知和场景意识的三维人体姿态估计方法，结合第三人称观测实现全局三维姿态恢复。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖多阶段优化、非因果推理和复杂接触建模，而本文旨在通过单阶段因果推理实现更高效的场景感知人体姿态估计。
ai_content.method: 通过解耦相机姿态并利用全局坐标系中的多步投影梯度作为运动线索，结合物理仿真和预扫描场景（如3D网格），模拟智能体在日常环境中的导航与交互，并仅使用2D关键点进行训练。
ai_content.result: 在H36M和PROX数据集上实现高质量姿态估计，尤其在未使用PROX训练序列的情况下仍能在挑战性PROX数据集上取得优异结果。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过融合本体感知、场景意识和第三人称观测，有效实现了复杂环境下的三维人体姿态估计，且无需复杂模型即可达到高精度。

search_text: Embodied Scene-aware Human Pose Estimation 体现场景感知的人体姿势估计 We propose embodied scene-aware human pose estimation where we estimate 3D poses based on a simulated agent's proprioception and scene awareness, along with external third-person observations. Unlike prior methods that often resort to multistage optimization, non-causal inference, and complex contact modeling to estimate human pose and human scene interactions, our method is one-stage, causal, and recovers global 3D human poses in a simulated environment. Since 2D third-person observations are coupled with the camera pose, we propose to disentangle the camera pose and use a multi-step projection gradient defined in the global coordinate frame as the movement cue for our embodied agent. Leveraging a physics simulation and prescanned scenes (e.g., 3D mesh), we simulate our agent in everyday environments (library, office, bedroom, etc.) and equip our agent with environmental sensors to intelligently navigate and interact with the geometries of the scene. Our method also relies only on 2D keypoints and can be trained on synthetic datasets derived from popular human motion databases. To evaluate, we use the popular H36M and PROX datasets and achieve high quality pose estimation on the challenging PROX dataset without ever using PROX motion sequences for training. Code and videos are available on the project page. 我们提出了具体的场景感知人体姿势估计，其中我们根据模拟代理的本体感觉和场景感知以及外部第三人称观察来估计 3D 姿势。与通常采用多阶段优化、非因果推理和复杂接触建模来估计人体姿势和人体场景交互的现有方法不同，我们的方法是单阶段的、因果的，并在模拟环境中恢复全局 3D 人体姿势。由于 2D 第三人称观察与相机姿势相结合，我们建议解开相机姿势，并使用全局坐标系中定义的多步投影梯度作为我们具体代理的运动线索。利用物理模拟和预扫描场景（例如 3D 网格），我们在日常环境（图书馆、办公室、卧室等）中模拟我们的代理，并为我们的代理配备环境传感器，以智能导航并与场景的几何图形交互。我们的方法还仅依赖于 2D 关键点，并且可以在源自流行人体运动数据库的合成数据集上进行训练。为了进行评估，我们使用流行的 H36M 和 PROX 数据集，并在具有挑战性的 PROX 数据集上实现高质量的姿态估计，而无需使用 PROX 运动序列进行训练。项目页面上提供了代码和视频。 本文提出了一种基于模拟智能体本体感知和场景意识的三维人体姿态估计方法，结合第三人称观测实现全局三维姿态恢复。 Zhengyi Luo,Shun Iwase,Ye Yuan,Kris Kitani cs.CV

authors_text: Giannis Daras,Yuval Dagan,Alexandros G. Dimakis,Constantinos Daskalakis
title: Score-Guided Intermediate Layer Optimization: Fast Langevin Mixing for Inverse Problems
title_zh: 分数引导的中间层优化：逆问题的快速 Langevin 混合
abstract: We prove fast mixing and characterize the stationary distribution of the Langevin Algorithm for inverting random weighted DNN generators. This result extends the work of Hand and Voroninski from efficient inversion to efficient posterior sampling. In practice, to allow for increased expressivity, we propose to do posterior sampling in the latent space of a pre-trained generative model. To achieve that, we train a score-based model in the latent space of a StyleGAN-2 and we use it to solve inverse problems. Our framework, Score-Guided Intermediate Layer Optimization (SGILO), extends prior work by replacing the sparsity regularization with a generative prior in the intermediate layer. Experimentally, we obtain significant improvements over the previous state-of-the-art, especially in the low measurement regime.
summary: We prove fast mixing and characterize the stationary distribution of the Langevin Algorithm for inverting random weighted DNN generators. This result extends the work of Hand and Voroninski from efficient inversion to efficient posterior sampling. In practice, to allow for increased expressivity, we propose to do posterior sampling in the latent space of a pre-trained generative model. To achieve that, we train a score-based model in the latent space of a StyleGAN-2 and we use it to solve inverse problems. Our framework, Score-Guided Intermediate Layer Optimization (SGILO), extends prior work by replacing the sparsity regularization with a generative prior in the intermediate layer. Experimentally, we obtain significant improvements over the previous state-of-the-art, especially in the low measurement regime.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了快速混合并表征了用于反转随机加权 DNN 生成器的 Langevin 算法的平稳分布。这一结果将 Hand 和 Voroninski 的工作从高效反演扩展到高效后采样。在实践中，为了提高表达能力，我们建议在预训练的生成模型的潜在空间中进行后验采样。为了实现这一目标，我们在 StyleGAN-2 的潜在空间中训练基于分数的模型，并用它来解决逆问题。我们的框架，分数引导中间层优化（SGILO），通过在中间层中用生成先验替换稀疏正则化来扩展先前的工作。在实验上，我们比以前的最先进技术取得了显着的改进，特别是在低测量范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分数引导的中间层优化方法（SGILO），通过改进朗之万算法加速逆问题求解，并在潜在空间中使用生成模型提升采样效率。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏正则化在逆问题中表现有限，尤其在低测量条件下，需通过生成模型的先验知识提升重建质量与采样效率。
AI.method: 理论证明朗之万算法在随机加权DNN生成器中的快速混合性，在StyleGAN-2潜在空间训练分数模型，以生成先验替代稀疏正则化构建SGILO框架。
AI.result: 实验显示SGILO在低测量条件下显著优于现有方法，后验采样效率与重建精度均大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: SGILO通过理论分析与生成模型结合，为逆问题提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

authors_text: Danwei Cai,Zexin Cai,Ming Li
title: Identifying Source Speakers for Voice Conversion based Spoofing Attacks on Speaker Verification Systems
title_zh: 识别源说话人以进行基于语音转换的对说话人验证系统的欺骗攻击
abstract: An automatic speaker verification system aims to verify the speaker identity of a speech signal. However, a voice conversion system could manipulate a person's speech signal to make it sound like another speaker's voice and deceive the speaker verification system. Most countermeasures for voice conversion-based spoofing attacks are designed to discriminate bona fide speech from spoofed speech for speaker verification systems. In this paper, we investigate the problem of source speaker identification -- inferring the identity of the source speaker given the voice converted speech. To perform source speaker identification, we simply add voice-converted speech data with the label of source speaker identity to the genuine speech dataset during speaker embedding network training. Experimental results show the feasibility of source speaker identification when training and testing with converted speeches from the same voice conversion model(s). In addition, our results demonstrate that having more converted utterances from various voice conversion model for training helps improve the source speaker identification performance on converted utterances from unseen voice conversion models.
summary: An automatic speaker verification system aims to verify the speaker identity of a speech signal. However, a voice conversion system could manipulate a person's speech signal to make it sound like another speaker's voice and deceive the speaker verification system. Most countermeasures for voice conversion-based spoofing attacks are designed to discriminate bona fide speech from spoofed speech for speaker verification systems. In this paper, we investigate the problem of source speaker identification -- inferring the identity of the source speaker given the voice converted speech. To perform source speaker identification, we simply add voice-converted speech data with the label of source speaker identity to the genuine speech dataset during speaker embedding network training. Experimental results show the feasibility of source speaker identification when training and testing with converted speeches from the same voice conversion model(s). In addition, our results demonstrate that having more converted utterances from various voice conversion model for training helps improve the source speaker identification performance on converted utterances from unseen voice conversion models.
abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证系统旨在验证语音信号的说话人身份。然而，语音转换系统可以操纵一个人的语音信号，使其听起来像另一个说话者的声音，从而欺骗说话者验证系统。大多数针对基于语音转换的欺骗攻击的对策旨在区分说话者验证系统的真实语音和欺骗语音。在本文中，我们研究了源说话者识别问题——根据语音转换后的语音推断源说话者的身份。为了执行源说话人识别，我们只需在说话人嵌入网络训练期间将带有源说话人身份标签的语音转换后的语音数据添加到真实语音数据集中。实验结果表明，在使用来自相同语音转换模型的转换后的语音进行训练和测试时，源说话人识别的可行性。此外，我们的结果表明，从各种语音转换模型中获得更多转换后的话语进行训练有助于提高对来自未见过的语音转换模型的转换后的话语的源说话人识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在语音转换欺骗攻击中识别原始说话人的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有反制措施主要关注区分真实与伪造语音，但未解决识别原始说话人的需求，需提升系统安全性。
AI.method: 在训练过程中将带源说话人标签的语音转换数据加入真实数据集，训练说话人嵌入网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用相同模型训练测试时可行，且多模型训练数据可提升对未知模型的识别效果。
AI.conclusion: 识别源说话人可增强系统安全性，未来需结合多种攻击模型进行研究。

authors_text: Han Zhu,Jindong Wang,Gaofeng Cheng,Pengyuan Zhang,Yonghong Yan
title: Decoupled Federated Learning for ASR with Non-IID Data
title_zh: 具有非 IID 数据的 ASR 解耦联合学习
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) with federated learning (FL) makes it possible to leverage data from multiple clients without compromising privacy. The quality of FL-based ASR could be measured by recognition performance, communication and computation costs. When data among different clients are not independently and identically distributed (non-IID), the performance could degrade significantly. In this work, we tackle the non-IID issue in FL-based ASR with personalized FL, which learns personalized models for each client. Concretely, we propose two types of personalized FL approaches for ASR. Firstly, we adapt the personalization layer based FL for ASR, which keeps some layers locally to learn personalization models. Secondly, to reduce the communication and computation costs, we propose decoupled federated learning (DecoupleFL). On one hand, DecoupleFL moves the computation burden to the server, thus decreasing the computation on clients. On the other hand, DecoupleFL communicates secure high-level features instead of model parameters, thus reducing communication cost when models are large. Experiments demonstrate two proposed personalized FL-based ASR approaches could reduce WER by 2.3% - 3.4% compared with FedAvg. Among them, DecoupleFL has only 11.4% communication and 75% computation cost compared with FedAvg, which is also significantly less than the personalization layer based FL.

The quality of FL-based ASR could be measured by recognition performance, communication and computation costs. Concretely, we propose two types of personalized FL approaches for ASR. Firstly, we adapt the personalization layer based FL for ASR, which keeps some layers locally to learn personalization models. Secondly, to reduce the communication and computation costs, we propose decoupled federated learning (DecoupleFL). On one hand, DecoupleFL moves the computation burden to the server, thus decreasing the computation on clients. On the other hand, DecoupleFL communicates secure high-level features instead of model parameters, thus reducing communication cost when models are large. Experiments demonstrate two proposed personalized FL-based ASR approaches could reduce WER by 2.3% - 3.4% compared with FedAvg. Among them, DecoupleFL has only 11.4% communication and 75% computation cost compared with FedAvg, which is also significantly less than the personalization layer based FL.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 与联合学习 (FL) 可以在不损害隐私的情况下利用来自多个客户端的数据。基于 FL 的 ASR 的质量可以通过识别性能、通信和计算成本来衡量。当不同客户端之间的数据不是独立同分布（非 IID）时，性能可能会显着下降。在这项工作中，我们通过个性化 FL 解决基于 FL 的 ASR 中的非独立同分布问题，个性化 FL 可以为每个客户学习个性化模型。具体来说，我们提出了两种用于 ASR 的个性化 FL 方法。首先，我们将基于 FL 的个性化层应用于 ASR，这在本地保留了一些层来学习个性化模型。其次，为了减少通信和计算成本，我们提出了解耦联邦学习（De CoupleFL）。一方面，De CoupleFL 将计算负担转移到服务器上，从而减少了客户端的计算量。另一方面，De CoupleFL 传达安全的高级特征而不是模型参数，从而降低模型较大时的通信成本。实验表明，与 FedAvg 相比，两种提出的基于 FL 的个性化 ASR 方法可以将 WER 降低 2.3% - 3.4%。其中，De CoupleFL 与 FedAvg 相比只有 11.4% 的通信成本和 75% 的计算成本，这也明显低于基于个性化层的 FL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解耦联邦学习方法（DecoupleFL），用于解决非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据下的语音识别（ASR）联邦学习问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中的非独立同分布数据会导致ASR性能显著下降，传统方法（如FedAvg）在通信和计算成本上存在不足，需改进个性化模型学习效率。
AI.method: 提出两种个性化联邦学习方法：1）基于个性化层的ASR模型，保留部分本地层进行个性化学习；2）DecoupleFL，将计算负担转移至服务器并传输高层特征而非模型参数，降低通信与计算成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法相比FedAvg将词错误率（WER）降低2.3%-3.4%，其中DecoupleFL通信成本仅为FedAvg的11.4%，计算成本为75%。
AI.conclusion: DecoupleFL在保持高识别性能的同时，显著降低了通信和计算开销，为非IID数据下的联邦ASR提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xinghan Li,Haodong Jiang,Xingyu Chen,He Kong,Junfeng Wu
title: Closed-form Error Propagation on the SE_n(3) Group for Invariant Extended Kalman Filtering with Applications to VINS
title_zh: 用于不变扩展卡尔曼滤波的 SE_n(3) 群上的闭式误差传播及其在 VINS 中的应用
abstract: Pose estimation is important for robotic perception, path planning, etc. Robot poses can be modeled on matrix Lie groups and are usually estimated via filter-based methods. In this paper, we establish the closed-form formula for the error propagation for the Invariant extended Kalman filter (IEKF) in the presence of random noises and apply it to vision-aided inertial navigation. We evaluate our algorithm via numerical simulations and experiments on the OPENVINS platform. Both simulations and the experiments performed on the public EuRoC MAV datasets demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms some state-of-art filter-based methods such as the quaternion-based EKF, first estimates Jacobian EKF, etc.
summary: Pose estimation is important for robotic perception, path planning, etc. Robot poses can be modeled on matrix Lie groups and are usually estimated via filter-based methods. In this paper, we establish the closed-form formula for the error propagation for the Invariant extended Kalman filter (IEKF) in the presence of random noises and apply it to vision-aided inertial navigation. We evaluate our algorithm via numerical simulations and experiments on the OPENVINS platform. Both simulations and the experiments performed on the public EuRoC MAV datasets demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms some state-of-art filter-based methods such as the quaternion-based EKF, first estimates Jacobian EKF, etc.
abstract_zh: 姿态估计对于机器人感知、路径规划等非常重要。机器人姿态可以在矩阵李群上建模，并且通常通过基于滤波器的方法进行估计。在本文中，我们建立了随机噪声存在下不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（IEKF）误差传播的闭式公式，并将其应用于视觉辅助惯性导航。我们通过数值模拟和 OPENVINS 平台上的实验来评估我们的算法。在公共 EuRoC MAV 数据集上进行的模拟和实验都表明，我们的算法优于一些最先进的基于滤波器的方法，例如基于四元数的 EKF、首先估计雅可比 EKF 等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在SE_n(3)群上的闭式误差传播公式，用于改进不变扩展卡尔曼滤波（IEKF）在视觉惯性导航系统（VINS）中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波方法在处理机器人姿态估计时存在误差传播不准确的问题，需更精确的数学模型提高导航性能。
AI.method: 在SE_n(3)李群上推导闭式误差传播公式，结合IEKF实现视觉惯性导航中的状态估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在数值仿真和公开数据集测试中优于基于四元数的EKF和首次估计雅可比EKF等方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过闭式误差传播公式提升了IEKF在VINS中的精度，为机器人导航提供了更优的滤波方法。

authors_text: Weijie Zheng,Benjamin Doerr
title: From Understanding Genetic Drift to a Smart-Restart Mechanism for Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms
title_zh: 从理解遗传漂变到分布估计算法的智能重启机制
comment: Extended version of our GECCO 2020 paper. This article supersedes arXiv:2004.07141
comments: Extended version of our GECCO 2020 paper. This article supersedes arXiv:2004.07141
abstract: Estimation-of-distribution algorithms (EDAs) are optimization algorithms that learn a distribution on the search space from which good solutions can be sampled easily. A key parameter of most EDAs is the sample size (population size). If the population size is too small, the update of the probabilistic model builds on few samples, leading to the undesired effect of genetic drift. Too large population sizes avoid genetic drift, but slow down the process. Building on a recent quantitative analysis of how the population size leads to genetic drift, we design a smart-restart mechanism for EDAs. By stopping runs when the risk for genetic drift is high, it automatically runs the EDA in good parameter regimes. Via a mathematical runtime analysis, we prove a general performance guarantee for this smart-restart scheme. This in particular shows that in many situations where the optimal (problem-specific) parameter values are known, the restart scheme automatically finds these, leading to the asymptotically optimal performance. We also conduct an extensive experimental analysis. On four classic benchmark problems, we clearly observe the critical influence of the population size on the performance, and we find that the smart-restart scheme leads to a performance close to the one obtainable with optimal parameter values. Our results also show that previous theory-based suggestions for the optimal population size can be far from the optimal ones, leading to a performance clearly inferior to the one obtained via the smart-restart scheme. We also conduct experiments with PBIL (cross-entropy algorithm) on two combinatorial optimization problems from the literature, the max-cut problem and the bipartition problem. Again, we observe that the smart-restart mechanism finds much better values for the population size than those suggested in the literature, leading to a much better performance.

A key parameter of most EDAs is the sample size (population size). If the population size is too small, the update of the probabilistic model builds on few samples, leading to the undesired effect of genetic drift. Too large population sizes avoid genetic drift, but slow down the process. Building on a recent quantitative analysis of how the population size leads to genetic drift, we design a smart-restart mechanism for EDAs. By stopping runs when the risk for genetic drift is high, it automatically runs the EDA in good parameter regimes. Via a mathematical runtime analysis, we prove a general performance guarantee for this smart-restart scheme. This in particular shows that in many situations where the optimal (problem-specific) parameter values are known, the restart scheme automatically finds these, leading to the asymptotically optimal performance. We also conduct an extensive experimental analysis. On four classic benchmark problems, we clearly observe the critical influence of the population size on the performance, and we find that the smart-restart scheme leads to a performance close to the one obtainable with optimal parameter values. Our results also show that previous theory-based suggestions for the optimal population size can be far from the optimal ones, leading to a performance clearly inferior to the one obtained via the smart-restart scheme. We also conduct experiments with PBIL (cross-entropy algorithm) on two combinatorial optimization problems from the literature, the max-cut problem and the bipartition problem. Again, we observe that the smart-restart mechanism finds much better values for the population size than those suggested in the literature, leading to a much better performance.
abstract_zh: 分布估计算法 (EDA) 是一种优化算法，可以学习搜索空间上的分布，可以轻松地从中抽取好的解决方案。大多数 EDA 的一个关键参数是样本大小（总体大小）。如果种群规模太小，概率模型的更新就建立在很少的样本上，从而导致遗传漂变的不良影响。种群规模太大可以避免遗传漂变，但会减慢这一过程。基于最近对种群规模如何导致遗传漂变的定量分析，我们设计了一种 EDA 智能重启机制。通过在遗传漂变风险较高时停止运行，它会自动在良好的参数范围内运行 EDA。通过数学运行时分析，我们证明了这种智能重启方案的一般性能保证。这特别表明，在许多已知最优（特定问题）参数值的情况下，重启方案会自动找到这些值，从而实现渐近最优性能。我们还进行了广泛的实验分析。在四个经典基准问题上，我们清楚地观察到群体大小对性能的关键影响，并且我们发现智能重启方案导致的性能接近于通过最佳参数值获得的性能。我们的结果还表明，先前基于理论的最佳群体规模建议可能与最佳建议相差甚远，导致性能明显低于通过智能重启方案获得的性能。我们还使用 PBIL（交叉熵算法）对文献中的两个组合优化问题（最大割问题和二分问题）进行了实验。我们再次观察到，智能重启机制发现了比文献中建议的更好的群体规模值，从而带来了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种智能重启机制，用于优化估计分布算法（EDAs）中的种群规模参数，以减少遗传漂移的影响并提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: EDAs的种群规模参数选择存在矛盾：过小导致遗传漂移，过大则降低效率。传统理论建议的种群规模可能偏离最优值，需自动调整参数以平衡性能与效率。
AI.method: 基于遗传漂移的定量分析，设计智能重启机制，在检测到高漂移风险时自动终止当前运行并重启，结合数学运行时分析与实验验证。
AI.result: 在四个经典基准问题和两个组合优化问题中，智能重启机制显著优于传统参数设置，接近最优参数性能，且发现文献中推荐的种群规模存在明显偏差。
AI.conclusion: 智能重启机制能自动适应最优参数范围，有效缓解遗传漂移问题，在多种场景下提升EDAs性能，为参数优化提供通用解决方案。

search_text: From Understanding Genetic Drift to a Smart-Restart Mechanism for Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms 从理解遗传漂变到分布估计算法的智能重启机制 Estimation-of-distribution algorithms (EDAs) are optimization algorithms that learn a distribution on the search space from which good solutions can be sampled easily. A key parameter of most EDAs is the sample size (population size). If the population size is too small, the update of the probabilistic model builds on few samples, leading to the undesired effect of genetic drift. Too large population sizes avoid genetic drift, but slow down the process. Building on a recent quantitative analysis of how the population size leads to genetic drift, we design a smart-restart mechanism for EDAs. By stopping runs when the risk for genetic drift is high, it automatically runs the EDA in good parameter regimes. Via a mathematical runtime analysis, we prove a general performance guarantee for this smart-restart scheme. This in particular shows that in many situations where the optimal (problem-specific) parameter values are known, the restart scheme automatically finds these, leading to the asymptotically optimal performance. We also conduct an extensive experimental analysis. On four classic benchmark problems, we clearly observe the critical influence of the population size on the performance, and we find that the smart-restart scheme leads to a performance close to the one obtainable with optimal parameter values. Our results also show that previous theory-based suggestions for the optimal population size can be far from the optimal ones, leading to a performance clearly inferior to the one obtained via the smart-restart scheme. We also conduct experiments with PBIL (cross-entropy algorithm) on two combinatorial optimization problems from the literature, the max-cut problem and the bipartition problem. Again, we observe that the smart-restart mechanism finds much better values for the population size than those suggested in the literature, leading to a much better performance. 分布估计算法 (EDA) 是一种优化算法，可以学习搜索空间上的分布，可以轻松地从中抽取好的解决方案。大多数 EDA 的一个关键参数是样本大小（总体大小）。如果种群规模太小，概率模型的更新就建立在很少的样本上，从而导致遗传漂变的不良影响。种群规模太大可以避免遗传漂变，但会减慢这一过程。基于最近对种群规模如何导致遗传漂变的定量分析，我们设计了一种 EDA 智能重启机制。通过在遗传漂变风险较高时停止运行，它会自动在良好的参数范围内运行 EDA。通过数学运行时分析，我们证明了这种智能重启方案的一般性能保证。这特别表明，在许多已知最优（特定问题）参数值的情况下，重启方案会自动找到这些值，从而实现渐近最优性能。我们还进行了广泛的实验分析。在四个经典基准问题上，我们清楚地观察到群体大小对性能的关键影响，并且我们发现智能重启方案导致的性能接近于通过最佳参数值获得的性能。我们的结果还表明，先前基于理论的最佳群体规模建议可能与最佳建议相差甚远，导致性能明显低于通过智能重启方案获得的性能。我们还使用 PBIL（交叉熵算法）对文献中的两个组合优化问题（最大割问题和二分问题）进行了实验。我们再次观察到，智能重启机制发现了比文献中建议的更好的群体规模值，从而带来了更好的性能。 本文提出了一种智能重启机制，用于优化估计分布算法（EDAs）中的种群规模参数，以减少遗传漂移的影响并提升算法性能。 Weijie Zheng,Benjamin Doerr cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Zachary A Daniels,Dimitris Metaxas
title: A Dynamic Data Driven Approach for Explainable Scene Understanding
title_zh: 用于可解释场景理解的动态数据驱动方法
abstract: Scene-understanding is an important topic in the area of Computer Vision, and illustrates computational challenges with applications to a wide range of domains including remote sensing, surveillance, smart agriculture, robotics, autonomous driving, and smart cities. We consider the active explanation-driven understanding and classification of scenes. Suppose that an agent utilizing one or more sensors is placed in an unknown environment, and based on its sensory input, the agent needs to assign some label to the perceived scene. The agent can adjust its sensor(s) to capture additional details about the scene, but there is a cost associated with sensor manipulation, and as such, it is important for the agent to understand the scene in a fast and efficient manner. It is also important that the agent understand not only the global state of a scene (e.g., the category of the scene or the major events taking place in the scene) but also the characteristics/properties of the scene that support decisions and predictions made about the global state of the scene. Finally, when the agent encounters an unknown scene category, it must be capable of refusing to assign a label to the scene, requesting aid from a human, and updating its underlying knowledge base and machine learning models based on feedback provided by the human. We introduce a dynamic data driven framework for the active explanation-driven classification of scenes. Our framework is entitled ACUMEN: Active Classification and Understanding Method by Explanation-driven Networks. To demonstrate the utility of the proposed ACUMEN approach and show how it can be adapted to a domain-specific application, we focus on an example case study involving the classification of indoor scenes using an active robotic agent with vision-based sensors, i.e., an electro-optical camera.
summary: Scene-understanding is an important topic in the area of Computer Vision, and illustrates computational challenges with applications to a wide range of domains including remote sensing, surveillance, smart agriculture, robotics, autonomous driving, and smart cities. We consider the active explanation-driven understanding and classification of scenes. Suppose that an agent utilizing one or more sensors is placed in an unknown environment, and based on its sensory input, the agent needs to assign some label to the perceived scene. The agent can adjust its sensor(s) to capture additional details about the scene, but there is a cost associated with sensor manipulation, and as such, it is important for the agent to understand the scene in a fast and efficient manner. It is also important that the agent understand not only the global state of a scene (e.g., the category of the scene or the major events taking place in the scene) but also the characteristics/properties of the scene that support decisions and predictions made about the global state of the scene. Finally, when the agent encounters an unknown scene category, it must be capable of refusing to assign a label to the scene, requesting aid from a human, and updating its underlying knowledge base and machine learning models based on feedback provided by the human. We introduce a dynamic data driven framework for the active explanation-driven classification of scenes. Our framework is entitled ACUMEN: Active Classification and Understanding Method by Explanation-driven Networks. To demonstrate the utility of the proposed ACUMEN approach and show how it can be adapted to a domain-specific application, we focus on an example case study involving the classification of indoor scenes using an active robotic agent with vision-based sensors, i.e., an electro-optical camera.
abstract_zh: 场景理解是计算机视觉领域的一个重要主题，它说明了应用于遥感、监控、智能农业、机器人、自动驾驶和智能城市等广泛领域的计算挑战。我们考虑主动解释驱动的场景理解和分类。假设使用一个或多个传感器的代理被放置在未知环境中，并且基于其感官输入，代理需要为感知的场景分配一些标签。代理可以调整其传感器以捕获有关场景的其他细节，但传感器操作会产生成本，因此，代理以快速有效的方式了解场景非常重要。同样重要的是，代理不仅要了解场景的全局状态（例如，场景的类别或场景中发生的主要事件），还要了解支持对场景的全局状态做出的决策和预测的场景的特征/属性。最后，当智能体遇到未知的场景类别时，它必须能够拒绝为场景分配标签，请求人类的帮助，并根据人类提供的反馈更新其底层知识库和机器学习模型。我们引入了一个动态数据驱动框架，用于主动解释驱动的场景分类。我们的框架名为 ACUMEN：解释驱动网络的主动分类和理解方法。为了展示所提出的 ACUMEN 方法的实用性并展示它如何适应特定领域的应用，我们重点关注一个示例案例研究，涉及使用带有基于视觉的传感器（即光电相机）的主动机器人代理对室内场景进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态数据驱动的框架ACUMEN，用于实现可解释的场景理解与分类，通过主动调整传感器获取信息并结合人类反馈处理未知场景。
AI.motivation: 现有场景分类方法在处理未知环境时效率不足，且缺乏对决策依据的解释性，同时传感器调整存在成本，需在快速分类与信息获取间取得平衡。
AI.method: 设计ACUMEN框架，结合主动学习与解释性网络，通过动态调整传感器参数获取关键特征，利用人类反馈更新知识库，并在未知场景时触发求助机制。
AI.result: 在室内场景分类案例中验证了ACUMEN的有效性，展示了其在减少传感器操作次数的同时提升分类准确率与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ACUMEN框架通过动态数据驱动与人类协作机制，实现了高效、可解释的场景理解，为复杂环境下的智能决策提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiang Wang,Huaxin Zhang,Shiwei Zhang,Changxin Gao,Yuanjie Shao,Nong Sang
title: Context-aware Proposal Network for Temporal Action Detection
title_zh: 用于时间动作检测的上下文感知提案网络
comment: First place winning solution for temporal action detection task in CVPR-2022 AcitivityNet Challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.11812
comments: First place winning solution for temporal action detection task in CVPR-2022 AcitivityNet Challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.11812
abstract: This technical report presents our first place winning solution for temporal action detection task in CVPR-2022 AcitivityNet Challenge. The task aims to localize temporal boundaries of action instances with specific classes in long untrimmed videos. Recent mainstream attempts are based on dense boundary matchings and enumerate all possible combinations to produce proposals. We argue that the generated proposals contain rich contextual information, which may benefits detection confidence prediction. To this end, our method mainly consists of the following three steps: 1) action classification and feature extraction by Slowfast, CSN, TimeSformer, TSP, I3D-flow, VGGish-audio, TPN and ViViT; 2) proposal generation. Our proposed Context-aware Proposal Network (CPN) builds on top of BMN, GTAD and PRN to aggregate contextual information by randomly masking some proposal features. 3) action detection. The final detection prediction is calculated by assigning the proposals with corresponding video-level classifcation results. Finally, we ensemble the results under different feature combination settings and achieve 45.8% performance on the test set, which improves the champion result in CVPR-2021 ActivityNet Challenge by 1.1% in terms of average mAP.
summary: This technical report presents our first place winning solution for temporal action detection task in CVPR-2022 AcitivityNet Challenge. The task aims to localize temporal boundaries of action instances with specific classes in long untrimmed videos. Recent mainstream attempts are based on dense boundary matchings and enumerate all possible combinations to produce proposals. We argue that the generated proposals contain rich contextual information, which may benefits detection confidence prediction. To this end, our method mainly consists of the following three steps: 1) action classification and feature extraction by Slowfast, CSN, TimeSformer, TSP, I3D-flow, VGGish-audio, TPN and ViViT; 2) proposal generation. Our proposed Context-aware Proposal Network (CPN) builds on top of BMN, GTAD and PRN to aggregate contextual information by randomly masking some proposal features. 3) action detection. The final detection prediction is calculated by assigning the proposals with corresponding video-level classifcation results. Finally, we ensemble the results under different feature combination settings and achieve 45.8% performance on the test set, which improves the champion result in CVPR-2021 ActivityNet Challenge by 1.1% in terms of average mAP.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告介绍了我们在 CVPR-2022 AcitivityNet Challenge 中时间动作检测任务的第一名获奖解决方案。该任务旨在定位未修剪的长视频中具有特定类别的动作实例的时间边界。最近的主流尝试是基于密集边界匹配并枚举所有可能的组合来产生建议。我们认为生成的提案包含丰富的上下文信息，这可能有利于检测置信度预测。为此，我们的方法主要包括以下三个步骤：1）通过Slowfast、CSN、TimeSformer、TSP、I3D-flow、VGGish-audio、TPN和ViViT进行动作分类和特征提取； 2）提案生成。我们提出的上下文感知提案网络（CPN）建立在 BMN、GTAD 和 PRN 之上，通过随机屏蔽一些提案特征来聚合上下文信息。 3）动作检测。最终的检测预测是通过为提案分配相应的视频级分类结果来计算的。最后，我们集成了不同特征组合设置下的结果，并在测试集上实现了 45.8% 的性能，这将 CVPR-2021 ActivityNet Challenge 的冠军成绩在平均 mAP 方面提高了 1.1%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种上下文感知的候选框网络，用于在长视频中定位特定类别的动作实例的时序边界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的候选框包含丰富的上下文信息，可提升检测置信度预测，但未被充分利用。
AI.method: 采用多种模型提取特征，构建CPN通过随机掩码聚合上下文信息，并集成不同特征组合进行动作检测。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到45.8%的性能，相比CVPR-2021冠军结果提升1.1%平均mAP。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用候选框的上下文信息，提升了时间动作检测的性能。

authors_text: Hoki Kim,Jinseong Park,Jaewook Lee
title: Comment on Transferability and Input Transformation with Additive Noise
title_zh: 关于可传递性和带加性噪声的输入变换的评论
abstract: Adversarial attacks have verified the existence of the vulnerability of neural networks. By adding small perturbations to a benign example, adversarial attacks successfully generate adversarial examples that lead misclassification of deep learning models. More importantly, an adversarial example generated from a specific model can also deceive other models without modification. We call this phenomenon ``transferability". Here, we analyze the relationship between transferability and input transformation with additive noise by mathematically proving that the modified optimization can produce more transferable adversarial examples.
summary: Adversarial attacks have verified the existence of the vulnerability of neural networks. By adding small perturbations to a benign example, adversarial attacks successfully generate adversarial examples that lead misclassification of deep learning models. More importantly, an adversarial example generated from a specific model can also deceive other models without modification. We call this phenomenon ``transferability". Here, we analyze the relationship between transferability and input transformation with additive noise by mathematically proving that the modified optimization can produce more transferable adversarial examples.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击验证了神经网络脆弱性的存在。通过向良性示例添加小扰动，对抗性攻击成功生成导致深度学习模型错误分类的对抗性示例。更重要的是，从特定模型生成的对抗性示例无需修改也可以欺骗其他模型。我们将这种现象称为“可转移性”。在这里，我们通过数学证明修改后的优化可以产生更多可转移的对抗性示例，从而分析可转移性与带有加性噪声的输入变换之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 分析对抗样本可转移性与加性噪声输入转换的关系，并证明修改后的优化方法能生成更具可转移性的对抗样本
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击揭示了神经网络的脆弱性，而对抗样本的跨模型欺骗能力（可转移性）对安全构成威胁，需深入理解其成因并提出改进方法
AI.method: 通过数学证明修改后的优化方法能够生成更具可转移性的对抗样本
AI.result: 修改后的优化方法确实能生成更具可转移性的对抗样本，增强了对抗攻击的跨模型有效性
AI.conclusion: 输入变换中的加性噪声与可转移性存在数学关联，修改优化方法可有效提升对抗样本的跨模型欺骗能力，为防御策略提供新思路

authors_text: Zhepei Wang,Ritwik Giri,Shrikant Venkataramani,Umut Isik,Jean-Marc Valin,Paris Smaragdis,Mike Goodwin,Arvindh Krishnaswamy
title: Semi-supervised Time Domain Target Speaker Extraction with Attention
title_zh: 带有注意力的半监督时域目标说话人提取
abstract: In this work, we propose Exformer, a time-domain architecture for target speaker extraction. It consists of a pre-trained speaker embedder network and a separator network based on transformer encoder blocks. We study multiple methods to combine speaker information with the input mixture, and the resulting Exformer architecture obtains superior extraction performance compared to prior time-domain networks. Furthermore, we investigate a two-stage procedure to train the model using mixtures without reference signals upon a pre-trained supervised model. Experimental results show that the proposed semi-supervised learning procedure improves the performance of the supervised baselines.
summary: In this work, we propose Exformer, a time-domain architecture for target speaker extraction. It consists of a pre-trained speaker embedder network and a separator network based on transformer encoder blocks. We study multiple methods to combine speaker information with the input mixture, and the resulting Exformer architecture obtains superior extraction performance compared to prior time-domain networks. Furthermore, we investigate a two-stage procedure to train the model using mixtures without reference signals upon a pre-trained supervised model. Experimental results show that the proposed semi-supervised learning procedure improves the performance of the supervised baselines.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 Exformer，一种用于目标说话人提取的时域架构。它由预先训练的扬声器嵌入器网络和基于变压器编码器块的分离器网络组成。我们研究了多种将说话人信息与输入混合相结合的方法，所得的 Exformer 架构与之前的时域网络相比获得了卓越的提取性能。此外，我们研究了一个两阶段程序，在预训练的监督模型上使用没有参考信号的混合物来训练模型。实验结果表明，所提出的半监督学习过程提高了监督基线的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的半监督时域目标说话人提取方法Exformer，结合预训练说话人嵌入网络与Transformer分离器，并设计两阶段训练流程提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统时域说话人提取方法依赖大量标注数据且性能受限，需探索更高效利用未标注数据的半监督学习框架以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含预训练说话人嵌入网络与Transformer编码器的Exformer架构，通过多方法融合说话人信息，并采用两阶段训练：先基于监督数据预训练，再利用无参考信号的混合数据进行半监督微调。
AI.result: 实验表明Exformer在目标说话人提取任务中优于现有时域网络，半监督训练流程显著提升监督基线模型性能。
AI.conclusion: Exformer通过结合预训练模型与半监督学习有效提升了时域说话人提取效果，为减少标注数据依赖提供了新思路。

We study multiple methods to combine speaker information with the input mixture, and the resulting Exformer architecture obtains superior extraction performance compared to prior time-domain networks. Furthermore, we investigate a two-stage procedure to train the model using mixtures without reference signals upon a pre-trained supervised model. Experimental results show that the proposed semi-supervised learning procedure improves the performance of the supervised baselines. 在这项工作中，我们提出了 Exformer，一种用于目标说话人提取的时域架构。它由预先训练的扬声器嵌入器网络和基于变压器编码器块的分离器网络组成。我们研究了多种将说话人信息与输入混合相结合的方法，所得的 Exformer 架构与之前的时域网络相比获得了卓越的提取性能。此外，我们研究了一个两阶段程序，在预训练的监督模型上使用没有参考信号的混合物来训练模型。实验结果表明，所提出的半监督学习过程提高了监督基线的性能。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的半监督时域目标说话人提取方法Exformer，结合预训练说话人嵌入网络与Transformer分离器，并设计两阶段训练流程提升性能。 Zhepei Wang,Ritwik Giri,Shrikant Venkataramani,Umut Isik,Jean-Marc Valin,Paris Smaragdis,Mike Goodwin,Arvindh Krishnaswamy eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Rajeev Patwari,Varo Ly
title: Analysis & Computational Complexity Reduction of Monocular and Stereo Depth Estimation Techniques
title_zh: 单目和立体深度估计技术的分析和计算复杂性降低
abstract: Accurate depth estimation with lowest compute and energy cost is a crucial requirement for unmanned and battery operated autonomous systems. Robotic applications require real time depth estimation for navigation and decision making under rapidly changing 3D surroundings. A high accuracy algorithm may provide the best depth estimation but may consume tremendous compute and energy resources. A general trade-off is to choose less accurate methods for initial depth estimate and a more accurate yet compute intensive method when needed. Previous work has shown this trade-off can be improved by developing a state-of-the-art method (AnyNet) to improve stereo depth estimation. We studied both the monocular and stereo vision depth estimation methods and investigated methods to reduce computational complexity of these methods. This was our baseline. Consequently, our experiments show reduction of monocular depth estimation model size by ~75% reduces accuracy by less than 2% (SSIM metric). Our experiments with the novel stereo vision method (AnyNet) show that accuracy of depth estimation does not degrade more than 3% (three pixel error metric) in spite of reduction in model size by ~20%. We have shown that smaller models can indeed perform competitively.
summary: Accurate depth estimation with lowest compute and energy cost is a crucial requirement for unmanned and battery operated autonomous systems. Robotic applications require real time depth estimation for navigation and decision making under rapidly changing 3D surroundings. A high accuracy algorithm may provide the best depth estimation but may consume tremendous compute and energy resources. A general trade-off is to choose less accurate methods for initial depth estimate and a more accurate yet compute intensive method when needed. Previous work has shown this trade-off can be improved by developing a state-of-the-art method (AnyNet) to improve stereo depth estimation. We studied both the monocular and stereo vision depth estimation methods and investigated methods to reduce computational complexity of these methods. This was our baseline. Consequently, our experiments show reduction of monocular depth estimation model size by ~75% reduces accuracy by less than 2% (SSIM metric). Our experiments with the novel stereo vision method (AnyNet) show that accuracy of depth estimation does not degrade more than 3% (three pixel error metric) in spite of reduction in model size by ~20%. We have shown that smaller models can indeed perform competitively.
abstract_zh: 以最低的计算和能源成本进行准确的深度估计是无人和电池供电的自主系统的关键要求。机器人应用需要实时深度估计，以便在快速变化的 3D 环境下进行导航和决策。高精度算法可以提供最佳的深度估计，但可能消耗大量的计算和能源。一般的权衡是选择不太准确的方法进行初始深度估计，并在需要时选择更准确但计算密集型的方法。之前的工作表明，可以通过开发最先进的方法（AnyNet）来改进立体深度估计，从而改善这种权衡。我们研究了单目和立体视觉深度估计方法，并研究了降低这些方法的计算复杂度的方法。这是我们的基线。因此，我们的实验表明，单目深度估计模型大小减少约 75%，精度降低不到 2%（SSIM 指标）。我们使用新颖的立体视觉方法 (AnyNet) 进行的实验表明，尽管模型尺寸减小了约 20%，但深度估计的准确性不会降低超过 3%（三像素误差指标）。我们已经证明，较小的模型确实可以具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单目和立体视觉深度估计技术的计算复杂度降低方法，并验证了模型压缩对精度的影响。
AI.motivation: 无人系统和电池供电设备需要实时、低能耗的高精度深度估计，但高精度算法往往计算成本过高，需在精度与效率间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 对比分析单目和立体视觉方法，通过模型压缩技术（如参数减少）降低计算复杂度，并采用AnyNet改进立体视觉算法以保持精度。
AI.result: 单目模型压缩75%仅损失<2%精度（SSIM），立体视觉模型压缩20%时深度估计误差不超过3%（三像素误差指标）。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化模型规模可实现计算成本与精度的平衡，小型化模型在实际应用中具备竞争力。

authors_text: Sukesh Adiga V,Jose Dolz,Herve Lombaert
title: Attention-based Dynamic Subspace Learners for Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 用于医学图像分析的基于注意力的动态子空间学习器
abstract: Learning similarity is a key aspect in medical image analysis, particularly in recommendation systems or in uncovering the interpretation of anatomical data in images. Most existing methods learn such similarities in the embedding space over image sets using a single metric learner. Images, however, have a variety of object attributes such as color, shape, or artifacts. Encoding such attributes using a single metric learner is inadequate and may fail to generalize. Instead, multiple learners could focus on separate aspects of these attributes in subspaces of an overarching embedding. This, however, implies the number of learners to be found empirically for each new dataset. This work, Dynamic Subspace Learners, proposes to dynamically exploit multiple learners by removing the need of knowing apriori the number of learners and aggregating new subspace learners during training. Furthermore, the visual interpretability of such subspace learning is enforced by integrating an attention module into our method. This integrated attention mechanism provides a visual insight of discriminative image features that contribute to the clustering of image sets and a visual explanation of the embedding features. The benefits of our attention-based dynamic subspace learners are evaluated in the application of image clustering, image retrieval, and weakly supervised segmentation. Our method achieves competitive results with the performances of multiple learners baselines and significantly outperforms the classification network in terms of clustering and retrieval scores on three different public benchmark datasets. Moreover, our attention maps offer a proxy-labels, which improves the segmentation accuracy up to 15% in Dice scores when compared to state-of-the-art interpretation techniques.
summary: Learning similarity is a key aspect in medical image analysis, particularly in recommendation systems or in uncovering the interpretation of anatomical data in images. Most existing methods learn such similarities in the embedding space over image sets using a single metric learner. Images, however, have a variety of object attributes such as color, shape, or artifacts. Encoding such attributes using a single metric learner is inadequate and may fail to generalize. Instead, multiple learners could focus on separate aspects of these attributes in subspaces of an overarching embedding. This, however, implies the number of learners to be found empirically for each new dataset. This work, Dynamic Subspace Learners, proposes to dynamically exploit multiple learners by removing the need of knowing apriori the number of learners and aggregating new subspace learners during training. Furthermore, the visual interpretability of such subspace learning is enforced by integrating an attention module into our method. This integrated attention mechanism provides a visual insight of discriminative image features that contribute to the clustering of image sets and a visual explanation of the embedding features. The benefits of our attention-based dynamic subspace learners are evaluated in the application of image clustering, image retrieval, and weakly supervised segmentation. Our method achieves competitive results with the performances of multiple learners baselines and significantly outperforms the classification network in terms of clustering and retrieval scores on three different public benchmark datasets. Moreover, our attention maps offer a proxy-labels, which improves the segmentation accuracy up to 15% in Dice scores when compared to state-of-the-art interpretation techniques.
abstract_zh: 学习相似性是医学图像分析的一个关键方面，特别是在推荐系统或揭示图像中解剖数据的解释方面。大多数现有方法使用单个度量学​​习器来学习图像集嵌入空间中的此类相似性。然而，图像具有多种对象属性，例如颜色、形状或伪影。使用单个度量学​​习器对此类属性进行编码是不够的，并且可能无法泛化。相反，多个学习者可以在总体嵌入的子空间中关注这些属性的不同方面。然而，这意味着为每个新数据集凭经验找到的学习者数量。这项名为“动态子空间学习器”的工作提出，通过消除先验了解学习器数量并在训练期间聚合新的子空间学习器的需要，动态地利用多个学习器。此外，通过将注意力模块集成到我们的方法中，可以增强此类子空间学习的视觉可解释性。这种集成的注意力机制提供了对判别性图像特征的视觉洞察，有助于图像集的聚类和嵌入特征的视觉解释。我们的基于注意力的动态子空间学习器的好处在图像聚类、图像检索和弱监督分割的应用中进行了评估。我们的方法在多个学习者基线的性能上取得了有竞争力的结果，并且在三个不同的公共基准数据集上的聚类和检索分数方面显着优于分类网络。此外，我们的注意力图提供了代理标签，与最先进的解释技术相比，它可以将 Dice 分数的分割精度提高高达 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的动态子空间学习方法，用于改进医疗图像分析中的相似性学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一度量学习器处理医疗图像的多样性属性（如颜色、形状等）存在不足，难以泛化且需手动确定子空间数量。
AI.method: 动态子空间学习器通过训练过程中自适应生成子空间学习器，结合注意力模块增强视觉可解释性，以区分图像特征并指导聚类与分割。
AI.result: 在图像聚类、检索和弱监督分割任务中，该方法在三个公开数据集上表现优于基线方法，分割Dice分数提升最高达15%。
AI.conclusion: 动态子空间学习器通过自适应子空间划分和注意力机制，有效提升了医疗图像分析的性能与可解释性。

authors_text: Yingao Liu,Fei Yang,Yidong Yang
title: Free-form Lesion Synthesis Using a Partial Convolution Generative Adversarial Network for Enhanced Deep Learning Liver Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 使用部分卷积生成对抗网络进行自由形式病变合成以增强深度学习肝脏肿瘤分割
comment: The paper is under review by JACMP-Journal of Applied Medical Physics
comments: The paper is under review by JACMP-Journal of Applied Medical Physics
abstract: Automatic deep learning segmentation models has been shown to improve both the segmentation efficiency and the accuracy. However, training a robust segmentation model requires considerably large labeled training samples, which may be impractical. This study aimed to develop a deep learning framework for generating synthetic lesions that can be used to enhance network training. The lesion synthesis network is a modified generative adversarial network (GAN). Specifically, we innovated a partial convolution strategy to construct an Unet-like generator. The discriminator is designed using Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty and spectral normalization. A mask generation method based on principal component analysis was developed to model various lesion shapes. The generated masks are then converted into liver lesions through a lesion synthesis network. The lesion synthesis framework was evaluated for lesion textures, and the synthetic lesions were used to train a lesion segmentation network to further validate the effectiveness of this framework. All the networks are trained and tested on the public dataset from LITS. The synthetic lesions generated by the proposed approach have very similar histogram distributions compared to the real lesions for the two employed texture parameters, GLCM-energy and GLCM-correlation. The Kullback-Leibler divergence of GLCM-energy and GLCM-correlation were 0.01 and 0.10, respectively. Including the synthetic lesions in the tumor segmentation network improved the segmentation dice performance of U-Net significantly from 67.3% to 71.4% (p<0.05). Meanwhile, the volume precision and sensitivity improve from 74.6% to 76.0% (p=0.23) and 66.1% to 70.9% (p<0.01), respectively. The synthetic data significantly improves the segmentation performance.
summary: Automatic deep learning segmentation models has been shown to improve both the segmentation efficiency and the accuracy. However, training a robust segmentation model requires considerably large labeled training samples, which may be impractical. This study aimed to develop a deep learning framework for generating synthetic lesions that can be used to enhance network training. The lesion synthesis network is a modified generative adversarial network (GAN). Specifically, we innovated a partial convolution strategy to construct an Unet-like generator. The discriminator is designed using Wasserstein GAN with gradient penalty and spectral normalization. A mask generation method based on principal component analysis was developed to model various lesion shapes. The generated masks are then converted into liver lesions through a lesion synthesis network. The lesion synthesis framework was evaluated for lesion textures, and the synthetic lesions were used to train a lesion segmentation network to further validate the effectiveness of this framework. All the networks are trained and tested on the public dataset from LITS. The synthetic lesions generated by the proposed approach have very similar histogram distributions compared to the real lesions for the two employed texture parameters, GLCM-energy and GLCM-correlation. The Kullback-Leibler divergence of GLCM-energy and GLCM-correlation were 0.01 and 0.10, respectively. Including the synthetic lesions in the tumor segmentation network improved the segmentation dice performance of U-Net significantly from 67.3% to 71.4% (p<0.05). Meanwhile, the volume precision and sensitivity improve from 74.6% to 76.0% (p=0.23) and 66.1% to 70.9% (p<0.01), respectively. The synthetic data significantly improves the segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 自动深度学习分割模型已被证明可以提高分割效率和准确性。然而，训练鲁棒的分割模型需要相当大的标记训练样本，这可能是不切实际的。这项研究旨在开发一个深度学习框架来生成可用于增强网络训练的合成病变。病变合成网络是一种改进的生成对抗网络（GAN）。具体来说，我们创新了部分卷积策略来构建类似 Unet 的生成器。鉴别器是使用 Wasserstein GAN 设计的，具有梯度惩罚和光谱归一化功能。开发了一种基于主成分分析的掩模生成方法来模拟各种病变形状。然后，生成的掩模通过病变合成网络转换为肝脏病变。对病灶合成框架进行病灶纹理评估，并使用合成病灶来训练病灶分割网络，以进一步验证该框架的有效性。所有网络都在 LITS 的公共数据集上进行训练和测试。对于所使用的两个纹理参数（GLCM 能量和 GLCM 相关性），所提出的方法生成的合成损伤与真实损伤相比具有非常相似的直方图分布。 GLCM 能量和 GLCM 相关性的 Kullback-Leibler 散度分别为 0.01 和 0.10。将合成病灶纳入肿瘤分割网络中，将 U-Net 的分割骰子性能从 67.3% 显着提高到 71.4%（p<0.05）。同时，体积精度和灵敏度分别从 74.6% 提高到 76.0% (p=0.23) 和 66.1% 提高到 70.9% (p<0.01)。合成数据显着提高了分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部分卷积生成对抗网络（GAN）的自由形式病灶合成框架，用于增强深度学习在肝脏肿瘤分割中的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习分割模型需要大量标注数据进行训练，但实际获取足够标注数据成本高且不现实，因此需要生成合成病灶以扩充数据集。
AI.method: 设计了一种改进的GAN框架，包含部分卷积策略的Unet-like生成器、Wasserstein GAN带梯度惩罚和谱归一化的判别器，并结合主成分分析（PCA）生成多样化病灶形状的掩码。
AI.result: 合成病灶的直方图分布与真实病灶高度相似（KL散度分别为0.01和0.10），加入合成数据后U-Net分割Dice值从67.3%提升至71.4%（p<0.05），体积精度和灵敏度分别提升至76.0%和70.9%。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据显著提升肝脏肿瘤分割性能，为数据稀缺场景下的深度学习模型训练提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Free-form Lesion Synthesis Using a Partial Convolution Generative Adversarial Network for Enhanced Deep Learning Liver Tumor Segmentation 使用部分卷积生成对抗网络进行自由形式病变合成以增强深度学习肝脏肿瘤分割 Automatic deep learning segmentation models has been shown to improve both the segmentation efficiency and the accuracy. Meanwhile, the volume precision and sensitivity improve from 74.6% to 76.0% (p=0.23) and 66.1% to 70.9% (p<0.01), respectively. The synthetic data significantly improves the segmentation performance. 自动深度学习分割模型已被证明可以提高分割效率和准确性。然而，训练鲁棒的分割模型需要相当大的标记训练样本，这可能是不切实际的。这项研究旨在开发一个深度学习框架来生成可用于增强网络训练的合成病变。病变合成网络是一种改进的生成对抗网络（GAN）。具体来说，我们创新了部分卷积策略来构建类似 Unet 的生成器。鉴别器是使用 Wasserstein GAN 设计的，具有梯度惩罚和光谱归一化功能。开发了一种基于主成分分析的掩模生成方法来模拟各种病变形状。然后，生成的掩模通过病变合成网络转换为肝脏病变。对病灶合成框架进行病灶纹理评估，并使用合成病灶来训练病灶分割网络，以进一步验证该框架的有效性。所有网络都在 LITS 的公共数据集上进行训练和测试。对于所使用的两个纹理参数（GLCM 能量和 GLCM 相关性），所提出的方法生成的合成损伤与真实损伤相比具有非常相似的直方图分布。 GLCM 能量和 GLCM 相关性的 Kullback-Leibler 散度分别为 0.01 和 0.10。将合成病灶纳入肿瘤分割网络中，将 U-Net 的分割骰子性能从 67.3% 显着提高到 71.4%（p<0.05）。同时，体积精度和灵敏度分别从 74.6% 提高到 76.0% (p=0.23) 和 66.1% 提高到 70.9% (p<0.01)。合成数据显着提高了分割性能。 本文提出了一种基于部分卷积生成对抗网络（GAN）的自由形式病灶合成框架，用于增强深度学习在肝脏肿瘤分割中的性能。 Yingao Liu,Fei Yang,Yidong Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yijing Yang,Hongyu Fu,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: Design of Supervision-Scalable Learning Systems: Methodology and Performance Benchmarking
title_zh: 监督可扩展学习系统的设计：方法论和性能基准测试
comment: 16 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables, under consideration at Pattern Recognition
comments: 16 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables, under consideration at Pattern Recognition
abstract: The design of robust learning systems that offer stable performance under a wide range of supervision degrees is investigated in this work. We choose the image classification problem as an illustrative example and focus on the design of modularized systems that consist of three learning modules: representation learning, feature learning and decision learning. We discuss ways to adjust each module so that the design is robust with respect to different training sample numbers. Based on these ideas, we propose two families of learning systems. One adopts the classical histogram of oriented gradients (HOG) features while the other uses successive-subspace-learning (SSL) features. We test their performance against LeNet-5, which is an end-to-end optimized neural network, for MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. The number of training samples per image class goes from the extremely weak supervision condition (i.e., 1 labeled sample per class) to the strong supervision condition (i.e., 4096 labeled sample per class) with gradual transition in between (i.e., $2^n$, $n=0, 1, \cdots, 12$). Experimental results show that the two families of modularized learning systems have more robust performance than LeNet-5. They both outperform LeNet-5 by a large margin for small $n$ and have performance comparable with that of LeNet-5 for large $n$.
summary: The design of robust learning systems that offer stable performance under a wide range of supervision degrees is investigated in this work. We choose the image classification problem as an illustrative example and focus on the design of modularized systems that consist of three learning modules: representation learning, feature learning and decision learning. We discuss ways to adjust each module so that the design is robust with respect to different training sample numbers. Based on these ideas, we propose two families of learning systems. One adopts the classical histogram of oriented gradients (HOG) features while the other uses successive-subspace-learning (SSL) features. We test their performance against LeNet-5, which is an end-to-end optimized neural network, for MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. The number of training samples per image class goes from the extremely weak supervision condition (i.e., 1 labeled sample per class) to the strong supervision condition (i.e., 4096 labeled sample per class) with gradual transition in between (i.e., $2^n$, $n=0, 1, \cdots, 12$). Experimental results show that the two families of modularized learning systems have more robust performance than LeNet-5. They both outperform LeNet-5 by a large margin for small $n$ and have performance comparable with that of LeNet-5 for large $n$.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了在广泛的监督程度下提供稳定性能的鲁棒学习系统的设计。我们选择图像分类问题作为说明性示例，重点关注由三个学习模块组成的模块化系统的设计：表示学习、特征学习和决策学习。我们讨论调整每个模块的方法，以便设计对于不同的训练样本数量具有鲁棒性。基于这些想法，我们提出了两个学习系统系列。一种采用经典的定向梯度直方图（HOG）特征，另一种则使用连续子空间学习（SSL）特征。我们针对 MNIST 和 Fashion-MNIST 数据集针对 LeNet-5（一种端到端优化的神经网络）测试了它们的性能。每个图像类的训练样本数量从极弱监督条件（即每类 1 个标记样本）到强监督条件（即每类 4096 个标记样本），并在两者之间逐渐过渡（即 $2^n$, $n=0, 1, \cdots, 12$）。实验结果表明，这两个系列的模块化学习系统比 LeNet-5 具有更鲁棒的性能。它们对于小 $n$ 的性能都远远优于 LeNet-5，并且对于大 $n$ 的性能与 LeNet-5 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文研究设计鲁棒的学习系统，使其在不同监督程度下保持稳定性能，以图像分类为例，提出两种模块化学习系统并进行性能基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有学习系统对监督程度（训练样本数量）敏感，难以适应从极弱监督到强监督的广泛场景，需设计更鲁棒且可扩展的模块化学习框架。
AI.method: 将学习系统拆分为表示学习、特征学习和决策学习三个模块，提出基于HOG特征和SSL特征的两种系统家族，并在MNIST/Fashion-MNIST数据集上与LeNet-5对比测试。
AI.result: 两种模块化系统在小样本场景下显著优于LeNet-5，且在大样本场景下性能与LeNet-5相当，验证了其监督可扩展性优势。
AI.conclusion: 模块化设计能有效提升学习系统对监督程度的鲁棒性，提出的两种方法在不同样本规模下均表现优异，为弱监督场景提供可行方案。
