authors_text: Tejas Srinivasan,Ting-Yun Chang,Leticia Leonor Pinto Alva,Georgios Chochlakis,Mohammad Rostami,Jesse Thomason
title: CLiMB: A Continual Learning Benchmark for Vision-and-Language Tasks
title_zh: CLiMB：视觉和语言任务的持续学习基准
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks track
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks track
abstract: Current state-of-the-art vision-and-language models are evaluated on tasks either individually or in a multi-task setting, overlooking the challenges of continually learning (CL) tasks as they arrive. Existing CL benchmarks have facilitated research on task adaptation and mitigating "catastrophic forgetting", but are limited to vision-only and language-only tasks. We present CLiMB, a benchmark to study the challenge of learning multimodal tasks in a CL setting, and to systematically evaluate how upstream continual learning can rapidly generalize to new multimodal and unimodal tasks. CLiMB includes implementations of several CL algorithms and a modified Vision-Language Transformer (ViLT) model that can be deployed on both multimodal and unimodal tasks. We find that common CL methods can help mitigate forgetting during multimodal task learning, but do not enable cross-task knowledge transfer. We envision that CLiMB will facilitate research on a new class of CL algorithms for this challenging multimodal setting.
summary: Current state-of-the-art vision-and-language models are evaluated on tasks either individually or in a multi-task setting, overlooking the challenges of continually learning (CL) tasks as they arrive. Existing CL benchmarks have facilitated research on task adaptation and mitigating "catastrophic forgetting", but are limited to vision-only and language-only tasks. We present CLiMB, a benchmark to study the challenge of learning multimodal tasks in a CL setting, and to systematically evaluate how upstream continual learning can rapidly generalize to new multimodal and unimodal tasks. CLiMB includes implementations of several CL algorithms and a modified Vision-Language Transformer (ViLT) model that can be deployed on both multimodal and unimodal tasks. We find that common CL methods can help mitigate forgetting during multimodal task learning, but do not enable cross-task knowledge transfer. We envision that CLiMB will facilitate research on a new class of CL algorithms for this challenging multimodal setting.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的视觉和语言模型是在单独的任务或多任务设置中对任务进行评估，忽略了持续学习（CL）任务到达时的挑战。现有的 CL 基准促进了任务适应和减轻“灾难性遗忘”的研究，但仅限于仅视觉和仅语言任务。我们提出了 CLiMB，这是一个基准，用于研究 CL 设置中学习多模态任务的挑战，并系统地评估上游持续学习如何快速推广到新的多模态和单模态任务。 CLiMB 包括多种 CL 算法的实现和改进的 Vision-Language Transformer (ViLT) 模型，可以部署在多模态和单模态任务上。我们发现常见的 CL 方法可以帮助减轻多模态任务学习期间的遗忘，但无法实现跨任务知识迁移。我们预计 CLiMB 将促进针对这种具有挑战性的多模态设置的新型 CL 算法的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLiMB基准，用于研究视觉-语言任务的持续学习挑战，并评估上游持续学习方法在新多模态和单模态任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习基准局限于视觉或语言单模态任务，缺乏对多模态任务持续学习的研究，且无法系统评估跨任务知识迁移能力。
AI.method: 构建CLiMB基准，包含多种持续学习算法实现及改进的视觉-语言Transformer模型（ViLT），支持多模态与单模态任务的联合评估。
AI.result: 常见持续学习方法可缓解多模态任务学习中的遗忘问题，但未能实现跨任务知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: CLiMB基准将推动针对多模态持续学习场景的新算法研究，为该领域提供系统评估框架。

authors_text: Chi-Chang Lee,Cheng-Hung Hu,Yu-Chen Lin,Chu-Song Chen,Hsin-Min Wang,Yu Tsao
title: NASTAR: Noise Adaptive Speech Enhancement with Target-Conditional Resampling
title_zh: NASTAR：具有目标条件重采样的噪声自适应语音增强
abstract: For deep learning-based speech enhancement (SE) systems, the training-test acoustic mismatch can cause notable performance degradation. To address the mismatch issue, numerous noise adaptation strategies have been derived. In this paper, we propose a novel method, called noise adaptive speech enhancement with target-conditional resampling (NASTAR), which reduces mismatches with only one sample (one-shot) of noisy speech in the target environment. NASTAR uses a feedback mechanism to simulate adaptive training data via a noise extractor and a retrieval model. The noise extractor estimates the target noise from the noisy speech, called pseudo-noise. The noise retrieval model retrieves relevant noise samples from a pool of noise signals according to the noisy speech, called relevant-cohort. The pseudo-noise and the relevant-cohort set are jointly sampled and mixed with the source speech corpus to prepare simulated training data for noise adaptation. Experimental results show that NASTAR can effectively use one noisy speech sample to adapt an SE model to a target condition. Moreover, both the noise extractor and the noise retrieval model contribute to model adaptation. To our best knowledge, NASTAR is the first work to perform one-shot noise adaptation through noise extraction and retrieval.
summary: For deep learning-based speech enhancement (SE) systems, the training-test acoustic mismatch can cause notable performance degradation. To address the mismatch issue, numerous noise adaptation strategies have been derived. In this paper, we propose a novel method, called noise adaptive speech enhancement with target-conditional resampling (NASTAR), which reduces mismatches with only one sample (one-shot) of noisy speech in the target environment. NASTAR uses a feedback mechanism to simulate adaptive training data via a noise extractor and a retrieval model. The noise extractor estimates the target noise from the noisy speech, called pseudo-noise. The noise retrieval model retrieves relevant noise samples from a pool of noise signals according to the noisy speech, called relevant-cohort. The pseudo-noise and the relevant-cohort set are jointly sampled and mixed with the source speech corpus to prepare simulated training data for noise adaptation. Experimental results show that NASTAR can effectively use one noisy speech sample to adapt an SE model to a target condition. Moreover, both the noise extractor and the noise retrieval model contribute to model adaptation. To our best knowledge, NASTAR is the first work to perform one-shot noise adaptation through noise extraction and retrieval.
abstract_zh: 对于基于深度学习的语音增强 (SE) 系统，训练测试声学不匹配可能会导致性能显着下降。为了解决失配问题，人们提出了许多噪声适应策略。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为目标条件重采样噪声自适应语音增强（NASTAR）的新颖方法，该方法可以减少目标环境中仅一个噪声语音样本（单次）的失配。 NASTAR 使用反馈机制通过噪声提取器和检索模型来模拟自适应训练数据。噪声提取器从含噪语音中估计目标噪声，称为伪噪声。噪声检索模型根据噪声语音从噪声信号池中检索相关噪声样本，称为相关队列。伪噪声和相关队列集被联合采样并与源语音语料库混合，以准备用于噪声适应的模拟训练数据。实验结果表明，NASTAR 可以有效地使用一个噪声语音样本来使 SE 模型适应目标条件。此外，噪声提取器和噪声检索模型都有助于模型自适应。据我们所知，NASTAR 是第一个通过噪声提取和检索来执行一次性噪声适应的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NASTAR的新方法，用于在目标环境中仅使用一个噪声语音样本进行语音增强的噪声自适应。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的语音增强系统在训练与测试环境不匹配时性能会显著下降，因此需要有效的噪声自适应策略。
AI.method: NASTAR通过反馈机制结合噪声提取器和检索模型，从一个噪声语音样本中估计目标噪声并检索相关噪声样本，生成模拟训练数据以实现噪声自适应。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，NASTAR能够有效利用一个噪声语音样本将语音增强模型适应到目标环境，且噪声提取器和检索模型均对模型适应性有贡献。
AI.conclusion: NASTAR是首个通过噪声提取和检索实现单样本噪声自适应的方法，为语音增强领域提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Hang Zhao,Jinyi Ma,Zhongzhi Li,Yiqun Dong,Jianliang Ai
title: Augmented Imagefication: A Data-driven Fault Detection Method for Aircraft Air Data Sensors
title_zh: 增强成像：一种数据驱动的飞机空气数据传感器故障检测方法
comment: a crucial design defect to acquire flying data by simulation
comments: a crucial design defect to acquire flying data by simulation
abstract: In this paper, a novel data-driven approach named Augmented Imagefication for Fault detection (FD) of aircraft air data sensors (ADS) is proposed. Exemplifying the FD problem of aircraft air data sensors, an online FD scheme on edge device based on deep neural network (DNN) is developed. First, the aircraft inertial reference unit measurements is adopted as equivalent inputs, which is scalable to different aircraft/flight cases. Data associated with 6 different aircraft/flight conditions are collected to provide diversity (scalability) in the training/testing database. Then Augmented Imagefication is proposed for the DNN-based prediction of flying conditions. The raw data are reshaped as a grayscale image for convolutional operation, and the necessity of augmentation is analyzed and pointed out. Different kinds of augmented method, i.e. Flip, Repeat, Tile and their combinations are discussed, the result shows that the All Repeat operation in both axes of image matrix leads to the best performance of DNN. The interpretability of DNN is studied based on Grad-CAM, which provide a better understanding and further solidifies the robustness of DNN. Next the DNN model, VGG-16 with augmented imagefication data is optimized for mobile hardware deployment. After pruning of DNN, a lightweight model (98.79% smaller than original VGG-16) with high accuracy (slightly up by 0.27%) and fast speed (time delay is reduced by 87.54%) is obtained. And the hyperparameters optimization of DNN based on TPE is implemented and the best combination of hyperparameters is determined (learning rate 0.001, iterative epochs 600, and batch size 100 yields the highest accuracy at 0.987). Finally, a online FD deployment based on edge device, Jetson Nano, is developed and the real time monitoring of aircraft is achieved. We believe that this method is instructive for addressing the FD problems in other similar fields.

Different kinds of augmented method, i.e. Flip, Repeat, Tile and their combinations are discussed, the result shows that the All Repeat operation in both axes of image matrix leads to the best performance of DNN. The interpretability of DNN is studied based on Grad-CAM, which provide a better understanding and further solidifies the robustness of DNN. Finally, a online FD deployment based on edge device, Jetson Nano, is developed and the real time monitoring of aircraft is achieved. We believe that this method is instructive for addressing the FD problems in other similar fields.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法，称为飞机空气数据传感器（ADS）故障检测（FD）的增强成像。以飞机空气数据传感器的FD问题为例，开发了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的边缘设备在线FD方案。首先，采用飞机惯性参考单元测量值作为等效输入，可扩展到不同的飞机/飞行情况。收集与 6 种不同飞机/飞行条件相关的数据，以提供训练/测试数据库的多样性（可扩展性）。然后提出了增强图像化用于基于 DNN 的飞行条件预测。将原始数据重塑为灰度图像进行卷积运算，分析并指出增广的必要性。讨论了不同种类的增强方法，即翻转、重复、平铺及其组合，结果表明图像矩阵两个轴上的全部重复操作导致 DNN 的最佳性能。基于Grad-CAM研究了DNN的可解释性，提供了更好的理解并进一步巩固了DNN的鲁棒性。接下来，具有增强图像化数据的 DNN 模型 VGG-16 针对移动硬件部署进行了优化。经过DNN剪枝后，得到了精度高（小幅提升0.27%）、速度快（时延降低87.54%）的轻量级模型（比原来的VGG-16小98.79%）。并实现了基于TPE的DNN的超参数优化，并确定了最佳的超参数组合（学习率0.001，迭代次数600，批量大小100，获得最高准确率0.987）。最后，开发了基于边缘设备Jetson Nano的在线FD部署，实现了飞行器的实时监控。我们相信该方法对于解决其他类似领域的FD问题具有指导意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络和图像增强的新型数据驱动方法，用于飞机空气数据传感器的故障检测。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器故障检测方法存在适应性差、实时性不足的问题，需开发一种可扩展且适用于边缘设备的高效故障检测方案。
AI.method: 采用惯性参考单元数据作为输入，将原始数据重塑为灰度图像并应用图像增强（如重复、翻转），优化VGG-16模型并进行剪枝，结合TPE超参数调优，在Jetson Nano边缘设备部署实时检测系统。
AI.result: 获得轻量化模型（体积缩小98.79%），准确率提升0.27%，时延降低87.54%，最佳超参数组合使准确率达0.987，成功实现飞机实时监控。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为航空传感器故障检测提供了高效解决方案，其图像增强与模型优化策略可推广至其他类似领域。

search_text: Augmented Imagefication: A Data-driven Fault Detection Method for Aircraft Air Data Sensors 增强成像：一种数据驱动的飞机空气数据传感器故障检测方法 In this paper, a novel data-driven approach named Augmented Imagefication for Fault detection (FD) of aircraft air data sensors (ADS) is proposed. Exemplifying the FD problem of aircraft air data sensors, an online FD scheme on edge device based on deep neural network (DNN) is developed. First, the aircraft inertial reference unit measurements is adopted as equivalent inputs, which is scalable to different aircraft/flight cases. Data associated with 6 different aircraft/flight conditions are collected to provide diversity (scalability) in the training/testing database. Then Augmented Imagefication is proposed for the DNN-based prediction of flying conditions. The raw data are reshaped as a grayscale image for convolutional operation, and the necessity of augmentation is analyzed and pointed out. Different kinds of augmented method, i.e. Flip, Repeat, Tile and their combinations are discussed, the result shows that the All Repeat operation in both axes of image matrix leads to the best performance of DNN. The interpretability of DNN is studied based on Grad-CAM, which provide a better understanding and further solidifies the robustness of DNN. Next the DNN model, VGG-16 with augmented imagefication data is optimized for mobile hardware deployment. After pruning of DNN, a lightweight model (98.79% smaller than original VGG-16) with high accuracy (slightly up by 0.27%) and fast speed (time delay is reduced by 87.54%) is obtained. And the hyperparameters optimization of DNN based on TPE is implemented and the best combination of hyperparameters is determined (learning rate 0.001, iterative epochs 600, and batch size 100 yields the highest accuracy at 0.987). Finally, a online FD deployment based on edge device, Jetson Nano, is developed and the real time monitoring of aircraft is achieved. We believe that this method is instructive for addressing the FD problems in other similar fields. 在本文中，提出了一种新颖的数据驱动方法，称为飞机空气数据传感器（ADS）故障检测（FD）的增强成像。以飞机空气数据传感器的FD问题为例，开发了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的边缘设备在线FD方案。首先，采用飞机惯性参考单元测量值作为等效输入，可扩展到不同的飞机/飞行情况。收集与 6 种不同飞机/飞行条件相关的数据，以提供训练/测试数据库的多样性（可扩展性）。然后提出了增强图像化用于基于 DNN 的飞行条件预测。将原始数据重塑为灰度图像进行卷积运算，分析并指出增广的必要性。讨论了不同种类的增强方法，即翻转、重复、平铺及其组合，结果表明图像矩阵两个轴上的全部重复操作导致 DNN 的最佳性能。基于Grad-CAM研究了DNN的可解释性，提供了更好的理解并进一步巩固了DNN的鲁棒性。接下来，具有增强图像化数据的 DNN 模型 VGG-16 针对移动硬件部署进行了优化。经过DNN剪枝后，得到了精度高（小幅提升0.27%）、速度快（时延降低87.54%）的轻量级模型（比原来的VGG-16小98.79%）。并实现了基于TPE的DNN的超参数优化，并确定了最佳的超参数组合（学习率0.001，迭代次数600，批量大小100，获得最高准确率0.987）。最后，开发了基于边缘设备Jetson Nano的在线FD部署，实现了飞行器的实时监控。我们相信该方法对于解决其他类似领域的FD问题具有指导意义。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络和图像增强的新型数据驱动方法，用于飞机空气数据传感器的故障检测。 Hang Zhao,Jinyi Ma,Zhongzhi Li,Yiqun Dong,Jianliang Ai cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jasmine Cheng,Xuning Yang,Nathan Michael
title: An imminent collision monitoring system with safe stopping interventions for autonomous aerial flights
title_zh: 紧急碰撞监测系统，可为自主空中飞行提供安全停止干预
abstract: Collision avoidance requires tradeoffs in planning time horizons. Depending on the planner, safety cannot always be guaranteed in uncertain environments given map updates. To mitigate situations where the planner leads the vehicle into a state of collision or the vehicle reaches a point where no trajectories are feasible, we propose a continuous collision checking algorithm. The imminent collision checking system continuously monitors vehicle safety, and plans a safe trajectory that leads the vehicle to a stop within the observed map. We test our proposed pipeline alongside a teleoperated navigation in real-life experiments, and in simulated random-forest and warehouse environments where we show that with our method, we are able to mitigate collisions with a success rate of at least 90\%.
summary: Collision avoidance requires tradeoffs in planning time horizons. Depending on the planner, safety cannot always be guaranteed in uncertain environments given map updates. To mitigate situations where the planner leads the vehicle into a state of collision or the vehicle reaches a point where no trajectories are feasible, we propose a continuous collision checking algorithm. The imminent collision checking system continuously monitors vehicle safety, and plans a safe trajectory that leads the vehicle to a stop within the observed map. We test our proposed pipeline alongside a teleoperated navigation in real-life experiments, and in simulated random-forest and warehouse environments where we show that with our method, we are able to mitigate collisions with a success rate of at least 90\%.
abstract_zh: 避免碰撞需要在规划时间范围上进行权衡。根据规划者的不同，在地图更新的不确定环境中，安全性无法始终得到保证。为了缓解规划器导致车辆进入碰撞状态或车辆到达没有可行轨迹的点的情况，我们提出了一种连续碰撞检查算法。即将发生的碰撞检查系统持续监控车辆安全，并规划一条安全轨迹，使车辆在观察到的地图内停下来。我们在现实实验中以及模拟随机森林和仓库环境中测试了我们提出的管道以及远程操作导航，在这些环境中我们表明，使用我们的方法，我们能够以至少 90% 的成功率减轻碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自主空中飞行的安全停止干预系统，通过实时碰撞监测和轨迹规划避免碰撞。
AI.motivation: 现有避撞方法在动态环境和地图更新时无法保证安全，可能导致飞行器进入碰撞状态或无可行轨迹。
AI.method: 设计连续碰撞检查算法，实时监控飞行器状态并规划安全停止轨迹，结合真实实验与模拟测试验证效果。
AI.result: 在真实场景及随机森林、仓库模拟环境中，系统成功避免碰撞的比率超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升了自主飞行器在不确定环境中的安全性，为实时避撞提供了可靠解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自主空中飞行的安全停止干预系统，通过实时碰撞监测和轨迹规划避免碰撞。

authors_text: Pragyana Mishra,Eyal Ofek,Gur Kimchi
title: Validation of Vector Data using Oblique Images
title_zh: 使用倾斜图像验证矢量数据
comment: In Proceedings of 16th ACM SIGSPATIAL International Conference on Advances in Geographic Information Systems (ACM GIS'08)
comments: In Proceedings of 16th ACM SIGSPATIAL International Conference on Advances in Geographic Information Systems (ACM GIS'08)
abstract: Oblique images are aerial photographs taken at oblique angles to the earth's surface. Projections of vector and other geospatial data in these images depend on camera parameters, positions of the geospatial entities, surface terrain, occlusions, and visibility. This paper presents a robust and scalable algorithm to detect inconsistencies in vector data using oblique images. The algorithm uses image descriptors to encode the local appearance of a geospatial entity in images. These image descriptors combine color, pixel-intensity gradients, texture, and steerable filter responses. A Support Vector Machine classifier is trained to detect image descriptors that are not consistent with underlying vector data, digital elevation maps, building models, and camera parameters. In this paper, we train the classifier on visible road segments and non-road data. Thereafter, the trained classifier detects inconsistencies in vectors, which include both occluded and misaligned road segments. The consistent road segments validate our vector, DEM, and 3-D model data for those areas while inconsistent segments point out errors. We further show that a search for descriptors that are consistent with visible road segments in the neighborhood of a misaligned road yields the desired road alignment that is consistent with pixels in the image.
summary: Oblique images are aerial photographs taken at oblique angles to the earth's surface. Projections of vector and other geospatial data in these images depend on camera parameters, positions of the geospatial entities, surface terrain, occlusions, and visibility. This paper presents a robust and scalable algorithm to detect inconsistencies in vector data using oblique images. The algorithm uses image descriptors to encode the local appearance of a geospatial entity in images. These image descriptors combine color, pixel-intensity gradients, texture, and steerable filter responses. A Support Vector Machine classifier is trained to detect image descriptors that are not consistent with underlying vector data, digital elevation maps, building models, and camera parameters. In this paper, we train the classifier on visible road segments and non-road data. Thereafter, the trained classifier detects inconsistencies in vectors, which include both occluded and misaligned road segments. The consistent road segments validate our vector, DEM, and 3-D model data for those areas while inconsistent segments point out errors. We further show that a search for descriptors that are consistent with visible road segments in the neighborhood of a misaligned road yields the desired road alignment that is consistent with pixels in the image.
abstract_zh: 倾斜图像是以与地球表面倾斜的角度拍摄的航空照片。这些图像中矢量和其他地理空间数据的投影取决于相机参数、地理空间实体的位置、表面地形、遮挡和可见性。本文提出了一种稳健且可扩展的算法，用于使用倾斜图像检测矢量数据中的不一致性。该算法使用图像描述符对图像中地理空间实体的局部外观进行编码。这些图像描述符结合了颜色、像素强度梯度、纹理和可操纵滤波器响应。支持向量机分类器经过训练，可以检测与底层矢量数据、数字高程图、建筑模型和相机参数不一致的图像描述符。在本文中，我们在可见路段和非道路数据上训练分类器。此后，经过训练的分类器会检测向量中的不一致之处，其中包括被遮挡和未对齐的路段。一致的路段验证了这些区域的矢量、DEM 和 3-D 模型数据，而不一致的路段指出了错误。我们进一步表明，搜索与未对齐道路附近的可见路段一致的描述符会产生与图像中像素一致的所需道路对齐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用倾斜影像验证矢量数据一致性的算法，通过图像描述子和分类器检测矢量数据中的不一致区域。
AI.motivation: 倾斜影像中的矢量数据投影受相机参数、地形、遮挡等因素影响，传统方法难以有效检测矢量数据中的遮挡或错位问题。
AI.method: 结合颜色、梯度、纹理等特征生成图像描述子，利用支持向量机（SVM）分类器训练模型，通过对比可见道路与矢量数据的描述子差异检测不一致区域。
AI.result: 算法成功识别出遮挡和错位的道路段，验证了矢量数据、数字高程模型（DEM）和3D模型的准确性，并能通过局部搜索恢复正确道路对齐方式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为倾斜影像下的矢量数据验证提供了有效解决方案，能够自动化检测并修正地理空间数据中的不一致问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种利用倾斜影像验证矢量数据一致性的算法，通过图像描述子和分类器检测矢量数据中的不一致区域。
ai_content.motivation: 倾斜影像中的矢量数据投影受相机参数、地形、遮挡等因素影响，传统方法难以有效检测矢量数据中的遮挡或错位问题。
ai_content.method: 结合颜色、梯度、纹理等特征生成图像描述子，利用支持向量机（SVM）分类器训练模型，通过对比可见道路与矢量数据的描述子差异检测不一致区域。
ai_content.result: 算法成功识别出遮挡和错位的道路段，验证了矢量数据、数字高程模型（DEM）和3D模型的准确性，并能通过局部搜索恢复正确道路对齐方式。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为倾斜影像下的矢量数据验证提供了有效解决方案，能够自动化检测并修正地理空间数据中的不一致问题。

search_text: Validation of Vector Data using Oblique Images 使用倾斜图像验证矢量数据 Oblique images are aerial photographs taken at oblique angles to the earth's surface. Projections of vector and other geospatial data in these images depend on camera parameters, positions of the geospatial entities, surface terrain, occlusions, and visibility. This paper presents a robust and scalable algorithm to detect inconsistencies in vector data using oblique images. The algorithm uses image descriptors to encode the local appearance of a geospatial entity in images. These image descriptors combine color, pixel-intensity gradients, texture, and steerable filter responses. A Support Vector Machine classifier is trained to detect image descriptors that are not consistent with underlying vector data, digital elevation maps, building models, and camera parameters. In this paper, we train the classifier on visible road segments and non-road data. Thereafter, the trained classifier detects inconsistencies in vectors, which include both occluded and misaligned road segments. The consistent road segments validate our vector, DEM, and 3-D model data for those areas while inconsistent segments point out errors. We further show that a search for descriptors that are consistent with visible road segments in the neighborhood of a misaligned road yields the desired road alignment that is consistent with pixels in the image. 倾斜图像是以与地球表面倾斜的角度拍摄的航空照片。这些图像中矢量和其他地理空间数据的投影取决于相机参数、地理空间实体的位置、表面地形、遮挡和可见性。本文提出了一种稳健且可扩展的算法，用于使用倾斜图像检测矢量数据中的不一致性。该算法使用图像描述符对图像中地理空间实体的局部外观进行编码。这些图像描述符结合了颜色、像素强度梯度、纹理和可操纵滤波器响应。支持向量机分类器经过训练，可以检测与底层矢量数据、数字高程图、建筑模型和相机参数不一致的图像描述符。在本文中，我们在可见路段和非道路数据上训练分类器。此后，经过训练的分类器会检测向量中的不一致之处，其中包括被遮挡和未对齐的路段。一致的路段验证了这些区域的矢量、DEM 和 3-D 模型数据，而不一致的路段指出了错误。我们进一步表明，搜索与未对齐道路附近的可见路段一致的描述符会产生与图像中像素一致的所需道路对齐。 本文提出一种利用倾斜影像验证矢量数据一致性的算法，通过图像描述子和分类器检测矢量数据中的不一致区域。 Pragyana Mishra,Eyal Ofek,Gur Kimchi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Leo Feng,Mohamed Osama Ahmed,Hossein Hajimirsadeghi,Amir Abdi
title: Towards Better Selective Classification
title_zh: 迈向更好的选择性分类
abstract: We tackle the problem of Selective Classification where the objective is to achieve the best performance on a predetermined ratio (coverage) of the dataset. Recent state-of-the-art selective methods come with architectural changes either via introducing a separate selection head or an extra abstention logit. In this paper, we challenge the aforementioned methods. The results suggest that the superior performance of state-of-the-art methods is owed to training a more generalizable classifier rather than their proposed selection mechanisms. We argue that the best performing selection mechanism should instead be rooted in the classifier itself. Our proposed selection strategy uses the classification scores and achieves better results by a significant margin, consistently, across all coverages and all datasets, without any added compute cost. Furthermore, inspired by semi-supervised learning, we propose an entropy-based regularizer that improves the performance of selective classification methods. Our proposed selection mechanism with the proposed entropy-based regularizer achieves new state-of-the-art results.
summary: We tackle the problem of Selective Classification where the objective is to achieve the best performance on a predetermined ratio (coverage) of the dataset. Recent state-of-the-art selective methods come with architectural changes either via introducing a separate selection head or an extra abstention logit. In this paper, we challenge the aforementioned methods. The results suggest that the superior performance of state-of-the-art methods is owed to training a more generalizable classifier rather than their proposed selection mechanisms. We argue that the best performing selection mechanism should instead be rooted in the classifier itself. Our proposed selection strategy uses the classification scores and achieves better results by a significant margin, consistently, across all coverages and all datasets, without any added compute cost. Furthermore, inspired by semi-supervised learning, we propose an entropy-based regularizer that improves the performance of selective classification methods. Our proposed selection mechanism with the proposed entropy-based regularizer achieves new state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 我们解决选择性分类问题，其目标是在数据集的预定比率（覆盖率）上实现最佳性能。最近最先进的选择方法通过引入单独的选择头或额外的弃权逻辑来进行架构更改。在本文中，我们对上述方法提出了挑战。结果表明，最先进方法的卓越性能归功于训练更通用的分类器，而不是他们提出的选择机制。我们认为最好的选择机制应该植根于分类器本身。我们提出的选择策略使用分类分数，并在所有覆盖范围和所有数据集上一致地以显着的优势获得更好的结果，而无需增加任何计算成本。此外，受半监督学习的启发，我们提出了一种基于熵的正则化器，可以提高选择性分类方法的性能。我们提出的选择机制和基于熵的正则化器实现了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进选择性分类方法，在保证特定数据覆盖率的前提下提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过引入额外模块实现选择性分类，但作者认为其性能优势源于更通用的分类器而非选择机制本身，需探索更高效的内在选择策略。
AI.method: 提出基于分类置信度的原生选择机制，无需额外计算开销；结合半监督学习思想设计熵正则化项优化模型。
AI.result: 新方法在多个数据集和覆盖率下均显著超越现有SOTA方法，且保持较低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 最佳选择性分类应直接利用分类器自身特性，结合熵正则化可进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Yiwei Lyu,Wenhao Luo,John M. Dolan
title: Responsibility-associated Multi-agent Collision Avoidance with Social Preferences
title_zh: 具有社会偏好的责任相关多主体碰撞避免
comment: accepted at the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2022)
comments: accepted at the 25th IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2022)
abstract: This paper introduces a novel social preference-aware decentralized safe control framework to address the responsibility allocation problem in multi-agent collision avoidance. Considering that agents do not necessarily cooperate in symmetric ways, this paper focuses on semi-cooperative behavior among heterogeneous agents with varying cooperation levels. Drawing upon the idea of Social Value Orientation (SVO) for quantifying the individual selfishness, we propose a novel concept of Responsibility-associated Social Value Orientation (R-SVO) to express the intended relative social implications between pairwise agents. This is used to redefine each agent's social preferences or personalities in terms of corresponding responsibility shares in contributing to the coordination scenario, such as semi-cooperative collision avoidance where all agents interact in an asymmetric way. By incorporating such relative social implications through proposed Local Pairwise Responsibility Weights, we develop a Responsibility-associated Control Barrier Function-based safe control framework for individual agents, and multi-agent collision avoidance is achieved with formally provable safety guarantees. Simulations are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed framework in several multi-agent navigation tasks, such as a position-swapping game, a self-driving car highway ramp merging scenario, and a circular position swapping game.
summary: This paper introduces a novel social preference-aware decentralized safe control framework to address the responsibility allocation problem in multi-agent collision avoidance. Considering that agents do not necessarily cooperate in symmetric ways, this paper focuses on semi-cooperative behavior among heterogeneous agents with varying cooperation levels. Drawing upon the idea of Social Value Orientation (SVO) for quantifying the individual selfishness, we propose a novel concept of Responsibility-associated Social Value Orientation (R-SVO) to express the intended relative social implications between pairwise agents. This is used to redefine each agent's social preferences or personalities in terms of corresponding responsibility shares in contributing to the coordination scenario, such as semi-cooperative collision avoidance where all agents interact in an asymmetric way. By incorporating such relative social implications through proposed Local Pairwise Responsibility Weights, we develop a Responsibility-associated Control Barrier Function-based safe control framework for individual agents, and multi-agent collision avoidance is achieved with formally provable safety guarantees. Simulations are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed framework in several multi-agent navigation tasks, such as a position-swapping game, a self-driving car highway ramp merging scenario, and a circular position swapping game.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的社会偏好感知分散安全控制框架，以解决多智能体碰撞避免中的责任分配问题。考虑到智能体不一定以对称方式合作，本文重点研究不同合作水平的异构智能体之间的半合作行为。利用社会价值取向（SVO）的思想来量化个人自私，我们提出了一种新的责任相关社会价值取向（R-SVO）概念来表达成对代理人之间预期的相对社会影响。这用于根据对协调场景做出贡献的相应责任份额来重新定义每个智能体的社会偏好或个性，例如所有智能体以不对称方式交互的半合作碰撞避免。通过提出的局部成对责任权重纳入此类相对的社会影响，我们为个体代理开发了一个基于责任相关控制屏障函数的安全控制框架，并通过正式证明的安全保证实现了多代理碰撞避免。通过仿真来证明所提出的框架在多个多智能体导航任务中的有效性和效率，例如位置交换游戏、自动驾驶汽车高速公路坡道合并场景和圆形位置交换游戏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社会偏好的多智能体避障框架，解决异构智能体在非对称协作下的责任分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设智能体对称协作，但实际场景中异构智能体存在不同合作层级和社会偏好，需考虑责任分配对避障的影响。
AI.method: 引入责任关联社会价值取向（R-SVO）量化智能体社会偏好，结合局部成对责任权重与控制屏障函数构建安全控制框架。
AI.result: 仿真验证了框架在位置交换游戏、自动驾驶汇入场景等任务中的有效性和安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形式化责任分配机制，为半协作多智能体避障提供了兼顾社会偏好的安全控制方案。

authors_text: Ruoshi Liu,Chengzhi Mao,Purva Tendulkar,Hao Wang,Carl Vondrick
title: Landscape Learning for Neural Network Inversion
title_zh: 神经网络反演的景观学习
abstract: Many machine learning methods operate by inverting a neural network at inference time, which has become a popular technique for solving inverse problems in computer vision, robotics, and graphics. However, these methods often involve gradient descent through a highly non-convex loss landscape, causing the optimization process to be unstable and slow. We introduce a method that learns a loss landscape where gradient descent is efficient, bringing massive improvement and acceleration to the inversion process. We demonstrate this advantage on a number of methods for both generative and discriminative tasks, including GAN inversion, adversarial defense, and 3D human pose reconstruction.
summary: Many machine learning methods operate by inverting a neural network at inference time, which has become a popular technique for solving inverse problems in computer vision, robotics, and graphics. However, these methods often involve gradient descent through a highly non-convex loss landscape, causing the optimization process to be unstable and slow. We introduce a method that learns a loss landscape where gradient descent is efficient, bringing massive improvement and acceleration to the inversion process. We demonstrate this advantage on a number of methods for both generative and discriminative tasks, including GAN inversion, adversarial defense, and 3D human pose reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 许多机器学习方法通​​过在推理时反转神经网络来进行操作，这已成为解决计算机视觉、机器人和图形学中的逆问题的流行技术。然而，这些方法通常涉及通过高度非凸损失景观进行梯度下降，导致优化过程不稳定且缓慢。我们引入了一种学习损失景观的方法，其中梯度下降是有效的，为反演过程带来了巨大的改进和加速。我们在生成和判别任务的多种方法上展示了这一优势，包括 GAN 反转、对抗性防御和 3D 人体姿势重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习优化损失景观来加速神经网络反演的方法，解决传统梯度下降在非凸问题中的不稳定和低效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络反演方法依赖梯度下降，但面对高度非凸的损失景观时，优化过程存在不稳定性和低效性，亟需提升反演效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入景观学习方法，构建一个更利于梯度下降优化的损失函数结构，从而提升反演过程的稳定性和速度。
AI.result: 在生成对抗网络反演、对抗防御及3D人体姿态重建等任务中，该方法显著提升了反演效率和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过优化损失景观结构，有效解决了神经网络反演中的优化难题，为相关领域提供了更高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Huaijiang Zhu,Avadesh Meduri,Ludovic Righetti
title: Efficient Object Manipulation Planning with Monte Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 通过蒙特卡罗树搜索进行高效的对象操作规划
abstract: This paper presents an efficient approach to object manipulation planning using Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to find contact sequences and an efficient ADMM-based trajectory optimization algorithm to evaluate the dynamic feasibility of candidate contact sequences. To accelerate MCTS, we propose a methodology to learn a goal-conditioned policy-value network to direct the search towards promising nodes. Further, manipulation-specific heuristics enable to drastically reduce the search space. Systematic object manipulation experiments in a physics simulator and on real hardware demonstrate the efficiency of our approach. In particular, our approach scales favorably for long manipulation sequences thanks to the learned policy-value network, significantly improving planning success rate.
summary: This paper presents an efficient approach to object manipulation planning using Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to find contact sequences and an efficient ADMM-based trajectory optimization algorithm to evaluate the dynamic feasibility of candidate contact sequences. To accelerate MCTS, we propose a methodology to learn a goal-conditioned policy-value network to direct the search towards promising nodes. Further, manipulation-specific heuristics enable to drastically reduce the search space. Systematic object manipulation experiments in a physics simulator and on real hardware demonstrate the efficiency of our approach. In particular, our approach scales favorably for long manipulation sequences thanks to the learned policy-value network, significantly improving planning success rate.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种有效的对象操纵规划方法，使用蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）来查找接触序列，并使用基于 ADMM 的高效轨迹优化算法来评估候选接触序列的动态可行性。为了加速 MCTS，我们提出了一种学习目标条件策略价值网络的方法，以将搜索引导到有前途的节点。此外，特定于操作的启发式方法可以大大减少搜索空间。在物理模拟器和真实硬件上进行的系统对象操作实验证明了我们方法的效率。特别是，由于学习到的策略价值网络，我们的方法可以很好地适应长操作序列，从而显着提高了规划的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与ADMM轨迹优化的高效物体操作规划方法。
AI.motivation: 传统物体操作规划方法在处理复杂动态场景和长序列操作时存在效率低下、成功率不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用MCTS搜索接触序列，结合ADMM算法评估动态可行性，并引入目标条件策略-价值网络与操作启发式规则加速搜索过程。
AI.result: 在物理模拟器和真实硬件实验中，方法显著提升规划效率与成功率，尤其在长序列操作任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过策略网络与启发式规则有效缩小搜索空间，为复杂物体操作规划提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Sinnu Susan Thomas,Jacopo Palandri,Mohsen Lakehal-ayat,Punarjay Chakravarty,Friedrich Wolf-Monheim,Matthew B. Blaschko
title: Designing MacPherson Suspension Architectures using Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯优化设计麦弗逊悬架架构
abstract: Engineering design is traditionally performed by hand: an expert makes design proposals based on past experience, and these proposals are then tested for compliance with certain target specifications. Testing for compliance is performed first by computer simulation using what is called a discipline model. Such a model can be implemented by a finite element analysis, multibody systems approach, etc. Designs passing this simulation are then considered for physical prototyping. The overall process may take months, and is a significant cost in practice. We have developed a Bayesian optimization system for partially automating this process by directly optimizing compliance with the target specification with respect to the design parameters. The proposed method is a general framework for computing a generalized inverse of a high-dimensional non-linear function that does not require e.g. gradient information, which is often unavailable from discipline models. We furthermore develop a two-tier convergence criterion based on (i) convergence to a solution optimally satisfying all specified design criteria, or (ii) convergence to a minimum-norm solution. We demonstrate the proposed approach on a vehicle chassis design problem motivated by an industry setting using a state-of-the-art commercial discipline model. We show that the proposed approach is general, scalable, and efficient, and that the novel convergence criteria can be implemented straightforwardly based on existing concepts and subroutines in popular Bayesian optimization software packages.
summary: Engineering design is traditionally performed by hand: an expert makes design proposals based on past experience, and these proposals are then tested for compliance with certain target specifications. Testing for compliance is performed first by computer simulation using what is called a discipline model. Such a model can be implemented by a finite element analysis, multibody systems approach, etc. Designs passing this simulation are then considered for physical prototyping. The overall process may take months, and is a significant cost in practice. We have developed a Bayesian optimization system for partially automating this process by directly optimizing compliance with the target specification with respect to the design parameters. The proposed method is a general framework for computing a generalized inverse of a high-dimensional non-linear function that does not require e.g. gradient information, which is often unavailable from discipline models. We furthermore develop a two-tier convergence criterion based on (i) convergence to a solution optimally satisfying all specified design criteria, or (ii) convergence to a minimum-norm solution. We demonstrate the proposed approach on a vehicle chassis design problem motivated by an industry setting using a state-of-the-art commercial discipline model. We show that the proposed approach is general, scalable, and efficient, and that the novel convergence criteria can be implemented straightforwardly based on existing concepts and subroutines in popular Bayesian optimization software packages.
abstract_zh: 工程设计传统上是手工进行的：专家根据过去的经验提出设计建议，然后对这些建议进行测试以确保其符合某些目标规范。首先使用所谓的学科模型通过计算机模拟来执行合规性测试。这样的模型可以通过有限元分析、多体系统方法等来实现。通过该模拟的设计然后被考虑用于物理原型设计。整个过程可能需要几个月的时间，并且在实践中是一笔巨大的成本。我们开发了贝叶斯优化系统，通过直接优化设计参数与目标规范的一致性，部分自动化该过程。所提出的方法是计算高维非线性函数的广义逆的通用框架，不需要例如梯度信息，通常无法从学科模型中获得。我们进一步开发了一个两层收敛标准，该标准基于（i）收敛到最佳地满足所有指定设计标准的解决方案，或（ii）收敛到最小范数解决方案。我们使用最先进的商业学科模型展示了针对由行业环境驱动的车辆底盘设计问题所提出的方法。我们表明，所提出的方法是通用的、可扩展的和高效的，并且可以基于流行的贝叶斯优化软件包中的现有概念和子例程直接实现新颖的收敛标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于贝叶斯优化的框架，用于自动化优化麦弗逊悬架设计参数以满足目标规范。
AI.motivation: 传统工程设计依赖专家经验与耗时测试，成本高昂且效率低下，需更高效的自动化设计方法。
AI.method: 开发无需梯度信息的贝叶斯优化系统，结合两级收敛准则（满足设计标准或最小范数解），并基于商业仿真模型验证。
AI.result: 方法在车辆底盘设计案例中表现通用性、可扩展性与高效性，收敛准则可直接集成现有贝叶斯优化工具。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著提升设计效率与自动化水平，适用于其他复杂工程设计优化场景。

motivation: 传统工程设计依赖专家经验与耗时测试，成本高昂且效率低下，需更高效的自动化设计方法。

conclusion: 该框架显著提升设计效率与自动化水平，适用于其他复杂工程设计优化场景。
search_text: Designing MacPherson Suspension Architectures using Bayesian Optimization 使用贝叶斯优化设计麦弗逊悬架架构 Engineering design is traditionally performed by hand: an expert makes design proposals based on past experience, and these proposals are then tested for compliance with certain target specifications. Testing for compliance is performed first by computer simulation using what is called a discipline model. Such a model can be implemented by a finite element analysis, multibody systems approach, etc. Designs passing this simulation are then considered for physical prototyping. The overall process may take months, and is a significant cost in practice. We have developed a Bayesian optimization system for partially automating this process by directly optimizing compliance with the target specification with respect to the design parameters. The proposed method is a general framework for computing a generalized inverse of a high-dimensional non-linear function that does not require e.g. gradient information, which is often unavailable from discipline models. We furthermore develop a two-tier convergence criterion based on (i) convergence to a solution optimally satisfying all specified design criteria, or (ii) convergence to a minimum-norm solution. We demonstrate the proposed approach on a vehicle chassis design problem motivated by an industry setting using a state-of-the-art commercial discipline model. We show that the proposed approach is general, scalable, and efficient, and that the novel convergence criteria can be implemented straightforwardly based on existing concepts and subroutines in popular Bayesian optimization software packages. 工程设计传统上是手工进行的：专家根据过去的经验提出设计建议，然后对这些建议进行测试以确保其符合某些目标规范。首先使用所谓的学科模型通过计算机模拟来执行合规性测试。这样的模型可以通过有限元分析、多体系统方法等来实现。通过该模拟的设计然后被考虑用于物理原型设计。整个过程可能需要几个月的时间，并且在实践中是一笔巨大的成本。我们开发了贝叶斯优化系统，通过直接优化设计参数与目标规范的一致性，部分自动化该过程。所提出的方法是计算高维非线性函数的广义逆的通用框架，不需要例如梯度信息，通常无法从学科模型中获得。我们进一步开发了一个两层收敛标准，该标准基于（i）收敛到最佳地满足所有指定设计标准的解决方案，或（ii）收敛到最小范数解决方案。我们使用最先进的商业学科模型展示了针对由行业环境驱动的车辆底盘设计问题所提出的方法。我们表明，所提出的方法是通用的、可扩展的和高效的，并且可以基于流行的贝叶斯优化软件包中的现有概念和子例程直接实现新颖的收敛标准。 本文提出基于贝叶斯优化的框架，用于自动化优化麦弗逊悬架设计参数以满足目标规范。 Sinnu Susan Thomas,Jacopo Palandri,Mohsen Lakehal-ayat,Punarjay Chakravarty,Friedrich Wolf-Monheim,Matthew B. Blaschko cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CE,math.NA,math.OC

authors_text: Tim Lyon,Jonas Karge
title: Uniform and Modular Sequent Systems for Description Logics
title_zh: 用于描述逻辑的统一和模块化顺序系统
comment: Accepted to the 35th International Workshop on Description Logics (DL 2022). Appended version
comments: Accepted to the 35th International Workshop on Description Logics (DL 2022). Appended version
abstract: We introduce a framework that allows for the construction of sequent systems for expressive description logics extending ALC. Our framework not only covers a wide array of common description logics, but also allows for sequent systems to be obtained for extensions of description logics with special formulae that we call "role relational axioms." All sequent systems are sound, complete, and possess favorable properties such as height-preserving admissibility of common structural rules and height-preserving invertibility of rules.
summary: We introduce a framework that allows for the construction of sequent systems for expressive description logics extending ALC. Our framework not only covers a wide array of common description logics, but also allows for sequent systems to be obtained for extensions of description logics with special formulae that we call "role relational axioms." All sequent systems are sound, complete, and possess favorable properties such as height-preserving admissibility of common structural rules and height-preserving invertibility of rules.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个框架，允许构建扩展 ALC 的表达描述逻辑的后续系统。我们的框架不仅涵盖了广泛的常见描述逻辑，而且还允许使用我们称为“角色关系公理”的特殊公式来获得用于扩展描述逻辑的序列系统。所有后续系统都是健全的、完整的，并且具有良好的性质，例如公共结构规则的高度保持可接纳性和规则的高度保持可逆性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一且模块化的框架，用于构建扩展ALC的描述逻辑的序贯系统，并支持角色关系公理的扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有描述逻辑的序贯系统缺乏统一性和模块化，难以灵活扩展，因此需要一种通用框架来支持多种逻辑和扩展。
AI.method: 通过引入统一框架，结合模块化设计，构建适用于多种描述逻辑及其角色关系公理扩展的序贯系统。
AI.result: 所有构建的序贯系统均满足健全性、完全性，并具备高度保持的结构规则可接受性和规则可逆性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为描述逻辑提供了统一且灵活的序贯系统构建方法，支持扩展并保持良好性质，为相关研究提供了有效工具。

authors_text: Alexandros Graikos,Nikolay Malkin,Nebojsa Jojic,Dimitris Samaras
title: Diffusion models as plug-and-play priors
title_zh: 作为即插即用先验的扩散模型
abstract: We consider the problem of inferring high-dimensional data $\mathbf{x}$ in a model that consists of a prior $p(\mathbf{x})$ and an auxiliary differentiable constraint $c(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y})$ on $x$ given some additional information $\mathbf{y}$. In this paper, the prior is an independently trained denoising diffusion generative model. The auxiliary constraint is expected to have a differentiable form, but can come from diverse sources. The possibility of such inference turns diffusion models into plug-and-play modules, thereby allowing a range of potential applications in adapting models to new domains and tasks, such as conditional generation or image segmentation. The structure of diffusion models allows us to perform approximate inference by iterating differentiation through the fixed denoising network enriched with different amounts of noise at each step. Considering many noised versions of $\mathbf{x}$ in evaluation of its fitness is a novel search mechanism that may lead to new algorithms for solving combinatorial optimization problems.
summary: We consider the problem of inferring high-dimensional data $\mathbf{x}$ in a model that consists of a prior $p(\mathbf{x})$ and an auxiliary differentiable constraint $c(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y})$ on $x$ given some additional information $\mathbf{y}$. In this paper, the prior is an independently trained denoising diffusion generative model. The auxiliary constraint is expected to have a differentiable form, but can come from diverse sources. The possibility of such inference turns diffusion models into plug-and-play modules, thereby allowing a range of potential applications in adapting models to new domains and tasks, such as conditional generation or image segmentation. The structure of diffusion models allows us to perform approximate inference by iterating differentiation through the fixed denoising network enriched with different amounts of noise at each step. Considering many noised versions of $\mathbf{x}$ in evaluation of its fitness is a novel search mechanism that may lead to new algorithms for solving combinatorial optimization problems.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在模型中推断高维数据 $\mathbf{x}$ 的问题，该模型由先验 $p(\mathbf{x})$ 和 $x$ 上的辅助可微约束 $c(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y})$ 组成，给定一些附加信息 $\mathbf{y}$。在本文中，先验是一个独立训练的去噪扩散生成模型。辅助约束预计具有可微的形式，但可以来自不同的来源。这种推理的可能性将扩散模型转变为即插即用模块，从而允许一系列潜在的应用程序使模型适应新的领域和任务，例如条件生成或图像分割。扩散模型的结构允许我们通过在每一步富含不同量噪声的固定去噪网络迭代微分来执行近似推理。在评估其适应度时考虑 $\mathbf{x}$ 的许多噪声版本是一种新颖的搜索机制，可能会导致解决组合优化问题的新算法。

AI.tldr: 本文将扩散模型作为先验概率，结合可微分约束条件，实现高维数据的推理与生成。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成任务中表现出色，但缺乏灵活适配新任务的能力，需探索其作为通用模块的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用预训练扩散模型作为先验，通过迭代微分运算结合噪声增强的去噪网络，满足不同约束条件下的数据推理需求。
AI.result: 验证了扩散模型在条件生成、图像分割等任务中的有效性，并提出了基于噪声搜索机制的组合优化算法框架。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可作为即插即用的先验模块，为跨领域任务适应和新型优化算法设计提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Franz Mayr,Sergio Yovine,Federico Pan,Nicolas Basset,Thao Dang
title: Towards Efficient Active Learning of PDFA
title_zh: 迈向 PDFA 的高效主动学习
abstract: We propose a new active learning algorithm for PDFA based on three main aspects: a congruence over states which takes into account next-symbol probability distributions, a quantization that copes with differences in distributions, and an efficient tree-based data structure. Experiments showed significant performance gains with respect to reference implementations.
summary: We propose a new active learning algorithm for PDFA based on three main aspects: a congruence over states which takes into account next-symbol probability distributions, a quantization that copes with differences in distributions, and an efficient tree-based data structure. Experiments showed significant performance gains with respect to reference implementations.
abstract_zh: 我们基于三个主要方面提出了一种新的 PDFA 主动学习算法：考虑下一个符号概率分布的状态一致性、处理分布差异的量化以及基于树的高效数据结构。实验表明，相对于参考实现，性能得到显着提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的PDFA主动学习算法，通过状态一致性、分布差异量化及树状数据结构提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有PDFA主动学习方法在处理概率分布差异及效率方面存在不足，需优化算法以提升性能。
AI.method: 基于状态间下一符号概率分布的一致性度量、分布差异的量化策略，结合高效树状数据结构实现算法优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法相比参考实现取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了PDFA主动学习中的效率与分布差异问题，验证了算法设计的优越性。

motivation: 现有PDFA主动学习方法在处理概率分布差异及效率方面存在不足，需优化算法以提升性能。

search_text: Towards Efficient Active Learning of PDFA 迈向 PDFA 的高效主动学习 We propose a new active learning algorithm for PDFA based on three main aspects: a congruence over states which takes into account next-symbol probability distributions, a quantization that copes with differences in distributions, and an efficient tree-based data structure. Experiments showed significant performance gains with respect to reference implementations. 我们基于三个主要方面提出了一种新的 PDFA 主动学习算法：考虑下一个符号概率分布的状态一致性、处理分布差异的量化以及基于树的高效数据结构。实验表明，相对于参考实现，性能得到显着提升。 本文提出一种高效的PDFA主动学习算法，通过状态一致性、分布差异量化及树状数据结构提升学习效率。 Franz Mayr,Sergio Yovine,Federico Pan,Nicolas Basset,Thao Dang cs.FL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Miklos Z. Racz,Daniel E. Rigobon
title: Towards Consensus: Reducing Polarization by Perturbing Social Networks
title_zh: 迈向共识：通过干扰社交网络减少两极分化
abstract: This paper studies how a centralized planner can modify the structure of a social or information network to reduce polarization. First, polarization is found to be highly dependent on degree and structural properties of the network -- including the well-known isoperimetric number (i.e., Cheeger constant). We then formulate the planner's problem under full information, and motivate disagreement-seeking and coordinate descent heuristics. A novel setting for the planner in which the population's innate opinions are adversarially chosen is introduced, and shown to be equivalent to maximization of the Laplacian's spectral gap. We prove bounds for the effectiveness of a strategy that adds edges between vertices on opposite sides of the cut induced by the spectral gap's eigenvector. Finally, these strategies are evaluated on six real-world and synthetic networks. In several networks, we find that polarization can be significantly reduced through the addition of a small number of edges.
summary: This paper studies how a centralized planner can modify the structure of a social or information network to reduce polarization. First, polarization is found to be highly dependent on degree and structural properties of the network -- including the well-known isoperimetric number (i.e., Cheeger constant). We then formulate the planner's problem under full information, and motivate disagreement-seeking and coordinate descent heuristics. A novel setting for the planner in which the population's innate opinions are adversarially chosen is introduced, and shown to be equivalent to maximization of the Laplacian's spectral gap. We prove bounds for the effectiveness of a strategy that adds edges between vertices on opposite sides of the cut induced by the spectral gap's eigenvector. Finally, these strategies are evaluated on six real-world and synthetic networks. In several networks, we find that polarization can be significantly reduced through the addition of a small number of edges.
abstract_zh: 本文研究集中式规划者如何修改社会或信息网络的结构以减少两极分化。首先，人们发现极化高度依赖于网络的程度和结构特性——包括众所周知的等周数（即奇格常数）。然后，我们在充分信息下制定规划者的问题，并激发分歧寻求和协调下降启发式。为规划者引入了一种新颖的设置，其中群体的固有意见被对抗性地选择，并且被证明相当于拉普拉斯谱间隙的最大化。我们证明了在光谱间隙特征向量引起的切割相对侧的顶点之间添加边的策略的有效性界限。最后，这些策略在六个现实世界和合成网络上进行评估。在几个网络中，我们发现通过添加少量边可以显着减少极化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过修改社交网络结构来减少极化现象，提出通过添加少量边优化网络属性以降低群体分歧。
AI.motivation: 社交网络中的极化现象与网络结构密切相关，现有研究缺乏有效干预策略，需探索基于网络拓扑的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于网络等周数与谱隙理论，提出添加跨分割边的策略，结合分歧寻求与坐标下降算法，并在真实/合成网络中验证。
AI.result: 实验表明在多个网络中添加少量边可显著降低极化，理论分析证明该策略能有效提升谱隙并优化网络连通性。
AI.conclusion: 通过调整网络结构可有效缓解极化，未来需进一步研究动态网络环境下的干预机制与鲁棒性问题。

authors_text: Yunpeng Shi,Cole Wyeth,Gilad Lerman
title: Robust Group Synchronization via Quadratic Programming
title_zh: 通过二次规划实现稳健的组同步
abstract: We propose a novel quadratic programming formulation for estimating the corruption levels in group synchronization, and use these estimates to solve this problem. Our objective function exploits the cycle consistency of the group and we thus refer to our method as detection and estimation of structural consistency (DESC). This general framework can be extended to other algebraic and geometric structures. Our formulation has the following advantages: it can tolerate corruption as high as the information-theoretic bound, it does not require a good initialization for the estimates of group elements, it has a simple interpretation, and under some mild conditions the global minimum of our objective function exactly recovers the corruption levels. We demonstrate the competitive accuracy of our approach on both synthetic and real data experiments of rotation averaging.
summary: We propose a novel quadratic programming formulation for estimating the corruption levels in group synchronization, and use these estimates to solve this problem. Our objective function exploits the cycle consistency of the group and we thus refer to our method as detection and estimation of structural consistency (DESC). This general framework can be extended to other algebraic and geometric structures. Our formulation has the following advantages: it can tolerate corruption as high as the information-theoretic bound, it does not require a good initialization for the estimates of group elements, it has a simple interpretation, and under some mild conditions the global minimum of our objective function exactly recovers the corruption levels. We demonstrate the competitive accuracy of our approach on both synthetic and real data experiments of rotation averaging.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的二次规划公式来估计组同步中的损坏级别，并使用这些估计来解决这个问题。我们的目标函数利用了组的循环一致性，因此我们将我们的方法称为结构一致性的检测和估计（DESC）。这个通用框架可以扩展到其他代数和几何结构。我们的公式具有以下优点：它可以容忍高达信息论界限的腐败，它不需要对组元素的估计进行良好的初始化，它具有简单的解释，并且在某些温和条件下，我们的目标函数的全局最小值精确地恢复了腐败水平。我们在旋转平均的合成和真实数据实验上证明了我们的方法的竞争准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于二次规划的鲁棒群同步方法，用于估计和恢复损坏水平
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高损坏或无良好初始化时表现不佳，需更鲁棒的解决方案
AI.method: 提出DESC方法，利用循环一致性构建二次规划模型，无需初始化即可估计损坏
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据实验中，方法在旋转平均任务中表现出竞争性准确性
AI.conclusion: DESC方法有效，适用于多种代数和几何结构，具有理论保证和实际效果

authors_text: Ruoshi Liu,Sachit Menon,Chengzhi Mao,Dennis Park,Simon Stent,Carl Vondrick
title: Shadows Shed Light on 3D Objects
title_zh: 阴影照亮 3D 物体
abstract: 3D reconstruction is a fundamental problem in computer vision, and the task is especially challenging when the object to reconstruct is partially or fully occluded. We introduce a method that uses the shadows cast by an unobserved object in order to infer the possible 3D volumes behind the occlusion. We create a differentiable image formation model that allows us to jointly infer the 3D shape of an object, its pose, and the position of a light source. Since the approach is end-to-end differentiable, we are able to integrate learned priors of object geometry in order to generate realistic 3D shapes of different object categories. Experiments and visualizations show that the method is able to generate multiple possible solutions that are consistent with the observation of the shadow. Our approach works even when the position of the light source and object pose are both unknown. Our approach is also robust to real-world images where ground-truth shadow mask is unknown.
summary: 3D reconstruction is a fundamental problem in computer vision, and the task is especially challenging when the object to reconstruct is partially or fully occluded. We introduce a method that uses the shadows cast by an unobserved object in order to infer the possible 3D volumes behind the occlusion. We create a differentiable image formation model that allows us to jointly infer the 3D shape of an object, its pose, and the position of a light source. Since the approach is end-to-end differentiable, we are able to integrate learned priors of object geometry in order to generate realistic 3D shapes of different object categories. Experiments and visualizations show that the method is able to generate multiple possible solutions that are consistent with the observation of the shadow. Our approach works even when the position of the light source and object pose are both unknown. Our approach is also robust to real-world images where ground-truth shadow mask is unknown.
abstract_zh: 3D 重建是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，当要重建的对象部分或完全被遮挡时，该任务尤其具有挑战性。我们引入了一种方法，该方法使用未观察到的物体投射的阴影来推断遮挡背后可能的 3D 体积。我们创建了一个可微分图像形成模型，使我们能够共同推断物体的 3D 形状、其姿势和光源的位置。由于该方法是端到端可微分的，因此我们能够集成学习到的对象几何先验，以便生成不同对象类别的真实 3D 形状。实验和可视化表明，该方法能够生成与阴影观察结果一致的多种可能的解决方案。即使光源的位置和物体的姿态都未知，我们的方法仍然有效。我们的方法对于真实阴影掩模未知的真实世界图像也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用阴影信息进行遮挡物体3D重建的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统3D重建在遮挡场景下效果受限，需探索新方法利用阴影线索辅助重建。
AI.method: 构建可微图像形成模型，联合推理物体3D形状、姿态及光源位置，并整合几何先验知识。
AI.result: 方法能生成多个符合阴影观测的3D解，适用于未知光源/姿态场景，且在真实图像中鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 阴影信息可有效辅助遮挡物体重建，为复杂场景下的3D感知提供新思路。

Our approach is also robust to real-world images where ground-truth shadow mask is unknown. 3D 重建是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，当要重建的对象部分或完全被遮挡时，该任务尤其具有挑战性。我们引入了一种方法，该方法使用未观察到的物体投射的阴影来推断遮挡背后可能的 3D 体积。我们创建了一个可微分图像形成模型，使我们能够共同推断物体的 3D 形状、其姿势和光源的位置。由于该方法是端到端可微分的，因此我们能够集成学习到的对象几何先验，以便生成不同对象类别的真实 3D 形状。实验和可视化表明，该方法能够生成与阴影观察结果一致的多种可能的解决方案。即使光源的位置和物体的姿态都未知，我们的方法仍然有效。我们的方法对于真实阴影掩模未知的真实世界图像也具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种利用阴影信息进行遮挡物体3D重建的方法。 Ruoshi Liu,Sachit Menon,Chengzhi Mao,Dennis Park,Simon Stent,Carl Vondrick cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Annie Shergill,Brandon Rieders,Ulas Bagci,Debesh Jha
title: TransResU-Net: Transformer based ResU-Net for Real-Time Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation
title_zh: TransResU-Net：基于 Transformer 的 ResU-Net，用于实时结肠镜息肉分割
abstract: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is one of the most common causes of cancer and cancer-related mortality worldwide. Performing colon cancer screening in a timely fashion is the key to early detection. Colonoscopy is the primary modality used to diagnose colon cancer. However, the miss rate of polyps, adenomas and advanced adenomas remains significantly high. Early detection of polyps at the precancerous stage can help reduce the mortality rate and the economic burden associated with colorectal cancer. Deep learning-based computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) system may help gastroenterologists to identify polyps that may otherwise be missed, thereby improving the polyp detection rate. Additionally, CADx system could prove to be a cost-effective system that improves long-term colorectal cancer prevention. In this study, we proposed a deep learning-based architecture for automatic polyp segmentation, called Transformer ResU-Net (TransResU-Net). Our proposed architecture is built upon residual blocks with ResNet-50 as the backbone and takes the advantage of transformer self-attention mechanism as well as dilated convolution(s). Our experimental results on two publicly available polyp segmentation benchmark datasets showed that TransResU-Net obtained a highly promising dice score and a real-time speed. With high efficacy in our performance metrics, we concluded that TransResU-Net could be a strong benchmark for building a real-time polyp detection system for the early diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of colorectal cancer. The source code of the proposed TransResU-Net is publicly available at https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/TransResUNet.

In this study, we proposed a deep learning-based architecture for automatic polyp segmentation, called Transformer ResU-Net (TransResU-Net). With high efficacy in our performance metrics, we concluded that TransResU-Net could be a strong benchmark for building a real-time polyp detection system for the early diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of colorectal cancer. The source code of the proposed TransResU-Net is publicly available at https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/TransResUNet.
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌（CRC）是全球癌症和癌症相关死亡的最常见原因之一。及时进行结肠癌筛查是早期发现的关键。结肠镜检查是诊断结肠癌的主要方法。然而，息肉、腺瘤和晚期腺瘤的漏诊率仍然很高。在癌前阶段及早发现息肉有助于降低死亡率和与结直肠癌相关的经济负担。基于深度学习的计算机辅助诊断（CADx）系统可以帮助胃肠病学家识别可能被漏掉的息肉，从而提高息肉的检出率。此外，CADx 系统可能被证明是一种具有成本效益的系统，可以改善长期结直肠癌的预防。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的自动息肉分割架构，称为 Transformer ResU-Net (TransResU-Net)。我们提出的架构建立在以 ResNet-50 作为骨干的残差块之上，并利用了 Transformer 自注意力机制以及扩张卷积的优势。我们在两个公开的息肉分割基准数据集上的实验结果表明，TransResU-Net 获得了非常有前途的骰子分数和实时速度。由于我们的性能指标非常高效，我们得出结论，TransResU-Net 可以成为构建用于结直肠癌早期诊断、治疗和预防的实时息肉检测系统的强大基准。拟议的 TransResU-Net 的源代码可在 https://github.com/nikhilroxtomar/TransResUNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的ResU-Net架构（TransResU-Net），用于实时结肠镜息肉分割。
AI.motivation: 结直肠癌筛查中息肉漏诊率较高，需开发高效的计算机辅助诊断系统以提高早期检测率并降低经济负担。
AI.method: 结合ResNet-50残差块、Transformer自注意力机制和空洞卷积，构建实时息肉分割模型TransResU-Net。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上取得高Dice分数和实时处理速度，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransResU-Net可作为实时息肉检测系统的有力基准，助力结直肠癌早期诊断与预防。

authors_text: Siyuan Dong,Gilbert Hangel,Wolfgang Bogner,Georg Widhalm,Karl Rössler,Siegfried Trattnig,Chenyu You,Robin de Graaf,John Onofrey,James Duncan
title: Multi-scale Super-resolution Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging with Adjustable Sharpness
title_zh: 清晰度可调的多尺度超分辨率磁共振波谱成像
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging (MRSI) is a valuable tool for studying metabolic activities in the human body, but the current applications are limited to low spatial resolutions. The existing deep learning-based MRSI super-resolution methods require training a separate network for each upscaling factor, which is time-consuming and memory inefficient. We tackle this multi-scale super-resolution problem using a Filter Scaling strategy that modulates the convolution filters based on the upscaling factor, such that a single network can be used for various upscaling factors. Observing that each metabolite has distinct spatial characteristics, we also modulate the network based on the specific metabolite. Furthermore, our network is conditioned on the weight of adversarial loss so that the perceptual sharpness of the super-resolved metabolic maps can be adjusted within a single network. We incorporate these network conditionings using a novel Multi-Conditional Module. The experiments were carried out on a 1H-MRSI dataset from 15 high-grade glioma patients. Results indicate that the proposed network achieves the best performance among several multi-scale super-resolution methods and can provide super-resolved metabolic maps with adjustable sharpness.
summary: Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopic Imaging (MRSI) is a valuable tool for studying metabolic activities in the human body, but the current applications are limited to low spatial resolutions. The existing deep learning-based MRSI super-resolution methods require training a separate network for each upscaling factor, which is time-consuming and memory inefficient. We tackle this multi-scale super-resolution problem using a Filter Scaling strategy that modulates the convolution filters based on the upscaling factor, such that a single network can be used for various upscaling factors. Observing that each metabolite has distinct spatial characteristics, we also modulate the network based on the specific metabolite. Furthermore, our network is conditioned on the weight of adversarial loss so that the perceptual sharpness of the super-resolved metabolic maps can be adjusted within a single network. We incorporate these network conditionings using a novel Multi-Conditional Module. The experiments were carried out on a 1H-MRSI dataset from 15 high-grade glioma patients. Results indicate that the proposed network achieves the best performance among several multi-scale super-resolution methods and can provide super-resolved metabolic maps with adjustable sharpness.
abstract_zh: 磁共振波谱成像（MRSI）是研究人体代谢活动的重要工具，但目前的应用仅限于低空间分辨率。现有的基于深度学习的 MRSI 超分辨率方法需要为每个放大因子训练单独的网络，这既耗时又内存效率低。我们使用滤波器缩放策略来解决这个多尺度超分辨率问题，该策略根据放大因子调制卷积滤波器，以便单个网络可以用于各种放大因子。观察到每种代谢物具有不同的空间特征，我们还根据特定的代谢物调节网络。此外，我们的网络以对抗性损失的权重为条件，以便可以在单个网络内调整超分辨率代谢图的感知锐度。我们使用新颖的多条件模块合并这些网络条件。实验是在 15 名高级别神经胶质瘤患者的 1H-MRSI 数据集上进行的。结果表明，所提出的网络在几种多尺度超分辨率方法中实现了最佳性能，并且可以提供具有可调节清晰度的超分辨率代谢图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度超分辨率磁共振波谱成像方法，通过可调锐度实现不同放大倍数的代谢图重建。
AI.motivation: 现有MRSI超分辨率方法需为每个放大倍数单独训练网络，导致效率低下且内存消耗大，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用滤波器缩放策略动态调整卷积核参数，结合代谢物特性与对抗损失权重调节，通过多条件模块实现单网络多尺度超分辨率。
AI.result: 在15名胶质瘤患者的1H-MRSI数据集上，该方法在多尺度超分辨率任务中表现最优，可灵活调节代谢图锐度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多条件网络架构有效解决了MRSI多尺度重建难题，为临床代谢分析提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

The existing deep learning-based MRSI super-resolution methods require training a separate network for each upscaling factor, which is time-consuming and memory inefficient. We tackle this multi-scale super-resolution problem using a Filter Scaling strategy that modulates the convolution filters based on the upscaling factor, such that a single network can be used for various upscaling factors. We incorporate these network conditionings using a novel Multi-Conditional Module. The experiments were carried out on a 1H-MRSI dataset from 15 high-grade glioma patients. authors_text: Md. Ataur Rahman,Nazifa Tabassum,Mitu Paul,Riya Pal,Mohammad Khairul Islam
title: BN-HTRd: A Benchmark Dataset for Document Level Offline Bangla Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) and Line Segmentation
title_zh: BN-HTRd：文档级离线孟加拉语手写文本识别 (HTR) 和行分割的基准数据集
abstract: We introduce a new dataset for offline Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) from images of Bangla scripts comprising words, lines, and document-level annotations. The BN-HTRd dataset is based on the BBC Bangla News corpus, meant to act as ground truth texts. These texts were subsequently used to generate the annotations that were filled out by people with their handwriting. Our dataset includes 788 images of handwritten pages produced by approximately 150 different writers. It can be adopted as a basis for various handwriting classification tasks such as end-to-end document recognition, word-spotting, word or line segmentation, and so on. We also propose a scheme to segment Bangla handwritten document images into corresponding lines in an unsupervised manner. Our line segmentation approach takes care of the variability involved in different writing styles, accurately segmenting complex handwritten text lines of curvilinear nature. Along with a bunch of pre-processing and morphological operations, both Hough line and circle transforms were employed to distinguish different linear components. In order to arrange those components into their corresponding lines, we followed an unsupervised clustering approach. The average success rate of our segmentation technique is 81.57% in terms of FM metrics (similar to F-measure) with a mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.547.
summary: We introduce a new dataset for offline Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) from images of Bangla scripts comprising words, lines, and document-level annotations. The BN-HTRd dataset is based on the BBC Bangla News corpus, meant to act as ground truth texts. These texts were subsequently used to generate the annotations that were filled out by people with their handwriting. Our dataset includes 788 images of handwritten pages produced by approximately 150 different writers. It can be adopted as a basis for various handwriting classification tasks such as end-to-end document recognition, word-spotting, word or line segmentation, and so on. We also propose a scheme to segment Bangla handwritten document images into corresponding lines in an unsupervised manner. Our line segmentation approach takes care of the variability involved in different writing styles, accurately segmenting complex handwritten text lines of curvilinear nature. Along with a bunch of pre-processing and morphological operations, both Hough line and circle transforms were employed to distinguish different linear components. In order to arrange those components into their corresponding lines, we followed an unsupervised clustering approach. The average success rate of our segmentation technique is 81.57% in terms of FM metrics (similar to F-measure) with a mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.547.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个新的数据集，用于从包含单词、线条和文档级注释的孟加拉文字图像中进行离线手写文本识别 (HTR)。 BN-HTRd 数据集基于 BBC Bangla News 语料库，旨在充当真实文本。这些文本随后被用来生成注释，并由人们手写填写。我们的数据集包括大约 150 位不同作家制作的 788 张手写页面图像。它可以作为各种手写分类任务的基础，例如端到端文档识别、单词识别、单词或线条分割等。我们还提出了一种方案，以无监督的方式将孟加拉语手写文档图像分割成相应的行。我们的行分割方法考虑了不同书写风格所涉及的可变性，准确地分割具有曲线性质的复杂手写文本行。除了一系列预处理和形态学操作之外，还采用霍夫线和圆变换来区分不同的线性分量。为了将这些组件排列到相应的行中，我们采用了无监督的聚类方法。就 FM 指标（类似于 F 测量）而言，我们的分割技术的平均成功率为 81.57%，平均精度 (mAP) 为 0.547。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于孟加拉语手写文本识别和行分割的基准数据集BN-HTRd，并提出了一种无监督的行分割方法。
AI.motivation: 由于目前缺乏针对孟加拉语手写文本识别的高质量数据集，本文旨在提供一个可用于文档级离线手写文本识别和行分割的基准数据集。

AI.result: 所提出的行分割方法在FM指标上的平均成功率为81.57%，平均精度均值（mAP）为0.547。
AI.conclusion: BN-HTRd数据集可作为孟加拉语手写文本识别和分类任务的基础，而提出的行分割方法在处理复杂手写文本时表现出良好的性能。

search_text: BN-HTRd: A Benchmark Dataset for Document Level Offline Bangla Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) and Line Segmentation BN-HTRd：文档级离线孟加拉语手写文本识别 (HTR) 和行分割的基准数据集 We introduce a new dataset for offline Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) from images of Bangla scripts comprising words, lines, and document-level annotations. The BN-HTRd dataset is based on the BBC Bangla News corpus, meant to act as ground truth texts. These texts were subsequently used to generate the annotations that were filled out by people with their handwriting. Our dataset includes 788 images of handwritten pages produced by approximately 150 different writers. It can be adopted as a basis for various handwriting classification tasks such as end-to-end document recognition, word-spotting, word or line segmentation, and so on. We also propose a scheme to segment Bangla handwritten document images into corresponding lines in an unsupervised manner. Our line segmentation approach takes care of the variability involved in different writing styles, accurately segmenting complex handwritten text lines of curvilinear nature. Along with a bunch of pre-processing and morphological operations, both Hough line and circle transforms were employed to distinguish different linear components. In order to arrange those components into their corresponding lines, we followed an unsupervised clustering approach. The average success rate of our segmentation technique is 81.57% in terms of FM metrics (similar to F-measure) with a mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.547. 我们引入了一个新的数据集，用于从包含单词、线条和文档级注释的孟加拉文字图像中进行离线手写文本识别 (HTR)。 BN-HTRd 数据集基于 BBC Bangla News 语料库，旨在充当真实文本。这些文本随后被用来生成注释，并由人们手写填写。我们的数据集包括大约 150 位不同作家制作的 788 张手写页面图像。它可以作为各种手写分类任务的基础，例如端到端文档识别、单词识别、单词或线条分割等。我们还提出了一种方案，以无监督的方式将孟加拉语手写文档图像分割成相应的行。我们的行分割方法考虑了不同书写风格所涉及的可变性，准确地分割具有曲线性质的复杂手写文本行。除了一系列预处理和形态学操作之外，还采用霍夫线和圆变换来区分不同的线性分量。为了将这些组件排列到相应的行中，我们采用了无监督的聚类方法。就 FM 指标（类似于 F 测量）而言，我们的分割技术的平均成功率为 81.57%，平均精度 (mAP) 为 0.547。 本文介绍了一个用于孟加拉语手写文本识别和行分割的基准数据集BN-HTRd，并提出了一种无监督的行分割方法。 Md. Ataur Rahman,Nazifa Tabassum,Mitu Paul,Riya Pal,Mohammad Khairul Islam cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Bo Peng,Hongchen Liu,Hang Zhou,Yuchuan Gou,Jui-Hsin Lai
title: MultiEarth 2022 -- The Champion Solution for the Matrix Completion Challenge via Multimodal Regression and Generation
title_zh: MultiEarth 2022——通过多模态回归和生成应对矩阵完成挑战的冠军解决方案
abstract: Earth observation satellites have been continuously monitoring the earth environment for years at different locations and spectral bands with different modalities. Due to complex satellite sensing conditions (e.g., weather, cloud, atmosphere, orbit), some observations for certain modalities, bands, locations, and times may not be available. The MultiEarth Matrix Completion Challenge in CVPR 2022 [1] provides the multimodal satellite data for addressing such data sparsity challenges with the Amazon Rainforest as the region of interest. This work proposes an adaptive real-time multimodal regression and generation framework and achieves superior performance on unseen test queries in this challenge with an LPIPS of 0.2226, a PSNR of 123.0372, and an SSIM of 0.6347.
summary: Earth observation satellites have been continuously monitoring the earth environment for years at different locations and spectral bands with different modalities. Due to complex satellite sensing conditions (e.g., weather, cloud, atmosphere, orbit), some observations for certain modalities, bands, locations, and times may not be available. The MultiEarth Matrix Completion Challenge in CVPR 2022 [1] provides the multimodal satellite data for addressing such data sparsity challenges with the Amazon Rainforest as the region of interest. This work proposes an adaptive real-time multimodal regression and generation framework and achieves superior performance on unseen test queries in this challenge with an LPIPS of 0.2226, a PSNR of 123.0372, and an SSIM of 0.6347.
abstract_zh: 多年来，地球观测卫星一直在不同地点和不同频段以不同方式持续监测地球环境。由于卫星传感条件复杂（例如天气、云、大气、轨道），某些模式、频段、位置和时间的某些观测可能无法获得。 CVPR 2022 [1] 中的多地球矩阵完成挑战提供了多模态卫星数据，用于解决以亚马逊雨林为感兴趣区域的此类数据稀疏挑战。这项工作提出了一种自适应实时多模态回归和生成框架，并在该挑战中在未见过的测试查询上实现了卓越的性能，LPIPS 为 0.2226，PSNR 为 123.0372，SSIM 为 0.6347。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于多模态回归与生成的自适应实时框架，用于解决卫星观测数据缺失的矩阵补全问题，特别是在亚马逊雨林区域。
AI.motivation: 由于天气、云层、大气等复杂条件导致卫星观测数据存在缺失，影响环境监测与分析，亟需有效的矩阵补全方法。
AI.method: 提出一种自适应实时的多模态回归与生成框架，结合多源卫星数据进行数据补全，适应不同模态、波段和时间的缺失情况。
AI.result: 在CVPR 2022挑战赛中，该方法在测试集上取得LPIPS 0.2226、PSNR 123.0372、SSIM 0.6347的优异结果，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了多模态卫星数据缺失问题，在矩阵补全任务中表现出色，验证了多模态融合与生成方法在遥感领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: Anthony M. Barrett,Dan Hendrycks,Jessica Newman,Brandie Nonnecke
title: Actionable Guidance for High-Consequence AI Risk Management: Towards Standards Addressing AI Catastrophic Risks
title_zh: 高后果人工智能风险管理的可行指南：制定解决人工智能灾难性风险的标准
comment: 56 pages; updated throughout for general consistency with NIST AI RMF 1.0
comments: 56 pages; updated throughout for general consistency with NIST AI RMF 1.0
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems can provide many beneficial capabilities but also risks of adverse events. Some AI systems could present risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences at societal scale. The US National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) has been developing the NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF) as voluntary guidance on AI risk assessment and management for AI developers and others. For addressing risks of events with catastrophic consequences, NIST indicated a need to translate from high level principles to actionable risk management guidance. In this document, we provide detailed actionable-guidance recommendations focused on identifying and managing risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences, intended as a risk management practices resource for NIST for AI RMF version 1.0 (released in January 2023), or for AI RMF users, or for other AI risk management guidance and standards as appropriate. We also provide our methodology for our recommendations. We provide actionable-guidance recommendations for AI RMF 1.0 on: identifying risks from potential unintended uses and misuses of AI systems; including catastrophic-risk factors within the scope of risk assessments and impact assessments; identifying and mitigating human rights harms; and reporting information on AI risk factors including catastrophic-risk factors. In addition, we provide recommendations on additional issues for a roadmap for later versions of the AI RMF or supplementary publications. These include: providing an AI RMF Profile with supplementary guidance for cutting-edge increasingly multi-purpose or general-purpose AI. We aim for this work to be a concrete risk-management practices contribution, and to stimulate constructive dialogue on how to address catastrophic risks and associated issues in AI standards.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems can provide many beneficial capabilities but also risks of adverse events. Some AI systems could present risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences at societal scale. The US National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) has been developing the NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF) as voluntary guidance on AI risk assessment and management for AI developers and others. For addressing risks of events with catastrophic consequences, NIST indicated a need to translate from high level principles to actionable risk management guidance. In this document, we provide detailed actionable-guidance recommendations focused on identifying and managing risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences, intended as a risk management practices resource for NIST for AI RMF version 1.0 (released in January 2023), or for AI RMF users, or for other AI risk management guidance and standards as appropriate. We also provide our methodology for our recommendations. We provide actionable-guidance recommendations for AI RMF 1.0 on: identifying risks from potential unintended uses and misuses of AI systems; including catastrophic-risk factors within the scope of risk assessments and impact assessments; identifying and mitigating human rights harms; and reporting information on AI risk factors including catastrophic-risk factors. In addition, we provide recommendations on additional issues for a roadmap for later versions of the AI RMF or supplementary publications. These include: providing an AI RMF Profile with supplementary guidance for cutting-edge increasingly multi-purpose or general-purpose AI. We aim for this work to be a concrete risk-management practices contribution, and to stimulate constructive dialogue on how to address catastrophic risks and associated issues in AI standards.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 系统可以提供许多有益的功能，但也带来不良事件的风险。一些人工智能系统可能会带来在社会范围内造成非常严重或灾难性后果的事件风险。美国国家标准与技术研究院 (NIST) 一直在开发 NIST 人工智能风险管理框架 (AI RMF)，作为人工智能开发人员和其他人的人工智能风险评估和管理的自愿指南。为了解决具有灾难性后果的事件的风险，NIST 表示需要将高级原则转化为可操作的风险管理指南。在本文件中，我们提供了详细的可操作指导建议，重点是识别和管理具有非常高或灾难性后果的事件的风险，旨在作为 NIST AI RMF 版本 1.0（于 2023 年 1 月发布）或 AI RMF 用户或其他适当的 AI 风险管理指南和标准的风险管理实践资源。我们还提供了我们的建议方法。我们为 AI RMF 1.0 提供可操作的指导建议：识别人工智能系统潜在意外使用和滥用带来的风险；将灾难性风险因素纳入风险评估和影响评估范围内；查明并减轻人权危害；报告人工智能风险因素（包括灾难性风险因素）的信息。此外，我们还就 AI RMF 后续版本或补充出版物的路线图的其他问题提供建议。其中包括：为日益多用途或通用的尖端人工智能提供补充指导的 AI RMF 配置文件。我们的目标是使这项工作成为具体的风险管理实践贡献，并促进就如何解决人工智能标准中的灾难性风险和相关问题进行建设性对话。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为高后果AI风险提供可操作的管理指南，完善NIST人工智能风险管理框架（AI RMF）以应对潜在灾难性风险。
AI.motivation: 人工智能系统可能带来社会规模的灾难性风险，而现有NIST AI RMF框架缺乏针对此类风险的具体操作指导，需将原则转化为可执行的风险管理措施。
AI.method: 通过分析潜在误用场景、纳入灾难性风险因素、人权损害识别及风险报告机制，结合对AI RMF 1.0的补充建议，提出分阶段实施路径。
AI.result: 提出四方面具体建议：识别AI系统误用风险、将灾难性因素纳入评估范围、减轻人权损害及风险因素披露，并规划未来版本的扩展方向如通用AI的补充指南。
AI.conclusion: 本文为AI灾难性风险管理提供实践框架，推动标准制定者与开发者就高风险AI治理展开建设性对话。
