search_text: Actionable Guidance for High-Consequence AI Risk Management: Towards Standards Addressing AI Catastrophic Risks 高后果人工智能风险管理的可行指南：制定解决人工智能灾难性风险的标准 Artificial intelligence (AI) systems can provide many beneficial capabilities but also risks of adverse events. Some AI systems could present risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences at societal scale. The US National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) has been developing the NIST Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF) as voluntary guidance on AI risk assessment and management for AI developers and others. For addressing risks of events with catastrophic consequences, NIST indicated a need to translate from high level principles to actionable risk management guidance. In this document, we provide detailed actionable-guidance recommendations focused on identifying and managing risks of events with very high or catastrophic consequences, intended as a risk management practices resource for NIST for AI RMF version 1.0 (released in January 2023), or for AI RMF users, or for other AI risk management guidance and standards as appropriate. We also provide our methodology for our recommendations. We provide actionable-guidance recommendations for AI RMF 1.0 on: identifying risks from potential unintended uses and misuses of AI systems; including catastrophic-risk factors within the scope of risk assessments and impact assessments; identifying and mitigating human rights harms; and reporting information on AI risk factors including catastrophic-risk factors. In addition, we provide recommendations on additional issues for a roadmap for later versions of the AI RMF or supplementary publications. These include: providing an AI RMF Profile with supplementary guidance for cutting-edge increasingly multi-purpose or general-purpose AI. We aim for this work to be a concrete risk-management practices contribution, and to stimulate constructive dialogue on how to address catastrophic risks and associated issues in AI standards. 人工智能 (AI) 系统可以提供许多有益的功能，但也带来不良事件的风险。一些人工智能系统可能会带来在社会范围内造成非常严重或灾难性后果的事件风险。美国国家标准与技术研究院 (NIST) 一直在开发 NIST 人工智能风险管理框架 (AI RMF)，作为人工智能开发人员和其他人的人工智能风险评估和管理的自愿指南。为了解决具有灾难性后果的事件的风险，NIST 表示需要将高级原则转化为可操作的风险管理指南。在本文件中，我们提供了详细的可操作指导建议，重点是识别和管理具有非常高或灾难性后果的事件的风险，旨在作为 NIST AI RMF 版本 1.0（于 2023 年 1 月发布）或 AI RMF 用户或其他适当的 AI 风险管理指南和标准的风险管理实践资源。我们还提供了我们的建议方法。我们为 AI RMF 1.0 提供可操作的指导建议：识别人工智能系统潜在意外使用和滥用带来的风险；将灾难性风险因素纳入风险评估和影响评估范围内；查明并减轻人权危害；报告人工智能风险因素（包括灾难性风险因素）的信息。此外，我们还就 AI RMF 后续版本或补充出版物的路线图的其他问题提供建议。其中包括：为日益多用途或通用的尖端人工智能提供补充指导的 AI RMF 配置文件。我们的目标是使这项工作成为具体的风险管理实践贡献，并促进就如何解决人工智能标准中的灾难性风险和相关问题进行建设性对话。 本文旨在为高后果AI风险提供可操作的管理指南，完善NIST人工智能风险管理框架（AI RMF）以应对潜在灾难性风险。 Anthony M. Barrett,Dan Hendrycks,Jessica Newman,Brandie Nonnecke cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Víctor Corsino,José Manuel Gilpérez,Luis Herrera
title: KitBit: A New AI Model for Solving Intelligence Tests and Numerical Series
title_zh: KitBit：解决智力测试和数值系列问题的新人工智能模型
abstract: The resolution of intelligence tests, in particular numerical sequences, has been of great interest in the evaluation of AI systems. We present a new computational model called KitBit that uses a reduced set of algorithms and their combinations to build a predictive model that finds the underlying pattern in numerical sequences, such as those included in IQ tests and others of much greater complexity. We present the fundamentals of the model and its application in different cases. First, the system is tested on a set of number series used in IQ tests collected from various sources. Next, our model is successfully applied on the sequences used to evaluate the models reported in the literature. In both cases, the system is capable of solving these types of problems in less than a second using standard computing power. Finally, KitBit's algorithms have been applied for the first time to the complete set of entire sequences of the well-known OEIS database. We find a pattern in the form of a list of algorithms and predict the following terms in the largest number of series to date. These results demonstrate the potential of KitBit to solve complex problems that could be represented numerically.
summary: The resolution of intelligence tests, in particular numerical sequences, has been of great interest in the evaluation of AI systems. We present a new computational model called KitBit that uses a reduced set of algorithms and their combinations to build a predictive model that finds the underlying pattern in numerical sequences, such as those included in IQ tests and others of much greater complexity. We present the fundamentals of the model and its application in different cases. First, the system is tested on a set of number series used in IQ tests collected from various sources. Next, our model is successfully applied on the sequences used to evaluate the models reported in the literature. In both cases, the system is capable of solving these types of problems in less than a second using standard computing power. Finally, KitBit's algorithms have been applied for the first time to the complete set of entire sequences of the well-known OEIS database. We find a pattern in the form of a list of algorithms and predict the following terms in the largest number of series to date. These results demonstrate the potential of KitBit to solve complex problems that could be represented numerically.
abstract_zh: 智力测试的分辨率，特别是数字序列的分辨率，在人工智能系统的评估中引起了极大的兴趣。我们提出了一种名为 KitBit 的新计算模型，它使用一组精简的算法及其组合来构建预测模型，该模型可以找到数字序列中的潜在模式，例如 IQ 测试中包含的模式以及其他复杂性更高的模式。我们介绍该模型的基本原理及其在不同情况下的应用。首先，系统在从各种来源收集的智商测试中使用的一组数字系列上进行测试。接下来，我们的模型成功应用于用于评估文献中报告的模型的序列。在这两种情况下，系统都能够使用标准计算能力在不到一秒的时间内解决这些类型的问题。最后，KitBit的算法首次应用于著名OEIS数据库的完整序列集。我们找到算法列表形式的模式，并预测迄今为止最大数量的系列中的以下术语。这些结果证明了 KitBit 解决可以用数字表示的复杂问题的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KitBit的新计算模型，用于解决智力测试和数值序列问题。
AI.motivation: 数值序列解析在AI系统评估中具有重要意义，但现有方法复杂且效率低，需开发更高效的模型。
AI.method: 构建基于少量算法组合的KitBit模型，通过分析数值序列的潜在模式进行预测，并在IQ测试、文献模型及OEIS数据库中验证。
AI.result: 模型能在标准计算设备上秒级解决IQ测试序列及文献案例，首次完整解析OEIS数据库序列并预测最多项。
AI.conclusion: KitBit展示了处理复杂数值问题的潜力，为AI在模式识别领域提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Maulik Bhatt,Yixuan Jia,Negar Mehr
title: Efficient Constrained Multi-Agent Trajectory Optimization using Dynamic Potential Games
title_zh: 使用动态势博弈的高效约束多智能体轨迹优化
abstract: Although dynamic games provide a rich paradigm for modeling agents' interactions, solving these games for real-world applications is often challenging. Many real-world interactive settings involve general nonlinear state and input constraints that couple agents' decisions with one another. In this work, we develop an efficient and fast planner for interactive trajectory optimization in constrained setups using a constrained game-theoretical framework. Our key insight is to leverage the special structure of agents' objective and constraint functions that are common in multi-agent interactions for fast and reliable planning. More precisely, we identify the structure of agents' cost and constraint functions under which the resulting dynamic game is an instance of a constrained dynamic potential game. Constrained dynamic potential games are a class of games for which instead of solving a set of coupled constrained optimal control problems, a constrained Nash equilibrium, i.e. a Generalized Nash equilibrium, can be found by solving a single constrained optimal control problem. This simplifies constrained interactive trajectory optimization significantly. We compare the performance of our method in a navigation setup involving four planar agents and show that our method is on average 20 times faster than the state-of-the-art. We further provide experimental validation of our proposed method in a navigation setup involving two quadrotors carrying a rigid object while avoiding collisions with two humans.
summary: Although dynamic games provide a rich paradigm for modeling agents' interactions, solving these games for real-world applications is often challenging. Many real-world interactive settings involve general nonlinear state and input constraints that couple agents' decisions with one another. In this work, we develop an efficient and fast planner for interactive trajectory optimization in constrained setups using a constrained game-theoretical framework. Our key insight is to leverage the special structure of agents' objective and constraint functions that are common in multi-agent interactions for fast and reliable planning. More precisely, we identify the structure of agents' cost and constraint functions under which the resulting dynamic game is an instance of a constrained dynamic potential game. Constrained dynamic potential games are a class of games for which instead of solving a set of coupled constrained optimal control problems, a constrained Nash equilibrium, i.e. a Generalized Nash equilibrium, can be found by solving a single constrained optimal control problem. This simplifies constrained interactive trajectory optimization significantly. We compare the performance of our method in a navigation setup involving four planar agents and show that our method is on average 20 times faster than the state-of-the-art. We further provide experimental validation of our proposed method in a navigation setup involving two quadrotors carrying a rigid object while avoiding collisions with two humans.
abstract_zh: 尽管动态游戏为代理交互建模提供了丰富的范例，但为现实世界的应用程序解决这些游戏通常具有挑战性。许多现实世界的交互设置涉及一般的非线性状态和输入约束，它们将代理的决策相互耦合。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种高效快速的规划器，用于使用约束博弈论框架在约束设置中进行交互式轨迹优化。我们的主要见解是利用多智能体交互中常见的智能体目标和约束函数的特殊结构来实现快速可靠的规划。更准确地说，我们确定了代理成本和约束函数的结构，在该结构下，生成的动态博弈是受约束的动态潜在博弈的一个实例。约束动态势博弈是一类博弈，其不是解决一组耦合的约束最优控制问题，而是可以通过解决单个约束最优控制问题来找到约束纳什均衡，即广义纳什均衡。这显着简化了约束交互式轨迹优化。我们比较了我们的方法在涉及四个平面代理的导航设置中的性能，结果表明我们的方法平均比最先进的方法快 20 倍。我们进一步在涉及两个携带刚性物体的四旋翼飞行器的导航设置中对我们提出的方法进行实验验证，同时避免与两个人发生碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束动态势博弈的高效多智能体轨迹优化方法，通过将耦合约束问题转化为单个最优控制问题，显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多智能体轨迹优化面临非线性耦合约束的挑战，传统方法需求解多个耦合最优控制问题，计算复杂度高且效率低下。
AI.method: 通过分析智能体成本与约束函数的结构，识别出可转化为约束动态势博弈的条件，将多智能体博弈简化为单个约束最优控制问题求解。
AI.result: 在四智能体导航实验中，该方法平均速度较现有技术提升20倍，并通过双四旋翼机避障实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用动态势博弈结构，为约束多智能体轨迹优化提供了高效可靠的新范式，具有重要实际应用价值。

ai_content_json.result: 在四智能体导航实验中，该方法平均速度较现有技术提升20倍，并通过双四旋翼机避障实验验证了方法有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过利用动态势博弈结构，为约束多智能体轨迹优化提供了高效可靠的新范式，具有重要实际应用价值。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束动态势博弈的高效多智能体轨迹优化方法，通过将耦合约束问题转化为单个最优控制问题，显著提升计算效率。
motivation: 现实场景中多智能体轨迹优化面临非线性耦合约束的挑战，传统方法需求解多个耦合最优控制问题，计算复杂度高且效率低下。
method: 通过分析智能体成本与约束函数的结构，识别出可转化为约束动态势博弈的条件，将多智能体博弈简化为单个约束最优控制问题求解。
result: 在四智能体导航实验中，该方法平均速度较现有技术提升20倍，并通过双四旋翼机避障实验验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 该方法通过利用动态势博弈结构，为约束多智能体轨迹优化提供了高效可靠的新范式，具有重要实际应用价值。
search_text: Efficient Constrained Multi-Agent Trajectory Optimization using Dynamic Potential Games 使用动态势博弈的高效约束多智能体轨迹优化 Although dynamic games provide a rich paradigm for modeling agents' interactions, solving these games for real-world applications is often challenging. Many real-world interactive settings involve general nonlinear state and input constraints that couple agents' decisions with one another. In this work, we develop an efficient and fast planner for interactive trajectory optimization in constrained setups using a constrained game-theoretical framework. Our key insight is to leverage the special structure of agents' objective and constraint functions that are common in multi-agent interactions for fast and reliable planning. More precisely, we identify the structure of agents' cost and constraint functions under which the resulting dynamic game is an instance of a constrained dynamic potential game. Constrained dynamic potential games are a class of games for which instead of solving a set of coupled constrained optimal control problems, a constrained Nash equilibrium, i.e. a Generalized Nash equilibrium, can be found by solving a single constrained optimal control problem. This simplifies constrained interactive trajectory optimization significantly. We compare the performance of our method in a navigation setup involving four planar agents and show that our method is on average 20 times faster than the state-of-the-art. We further provide experimental validation of our proposed method in a navigation setup involving two quadrotors carrying a rigid object while avoiding collisions with two humans. 尽管动态游戏为代理交互建模提供了丰富的范例，但为现实世界的应用程序解决这些游戏通常具有挑战性。许多现实世界的交互设置涉及一般的非线性状态和输入约束，它们将代理的决策相互耦合。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种高效快速的规划器，用于使用约束博弈论框架在约束设置中进行交互式轨迹优化。我们的主要见解是利用多智能体交互中常见的智能体目标和约束函数的特殊结构来实现快速可靠的规划。更准确地说，我们确定了代理成本和约束函数的结构，在该结构下，生成的动态博弈是受约束的动态潜在博弈的一个实例。约束动态势博弈是一类博弈，其不是解决一组耦合的约束最优控制问题，而是可以通过解决单个约束最优控制问题来找到约束纳什均衡，即广义纳什均衡。这显着简化了约束交互式轨迹优化。我们比较了我们的方法在涉及四个平面代理的导航设置中的性能，结果表明我们的方法平均比最先进的方法快 20 倍。我们进一步在涉及两个携带刚性物体的四旋翼飞行器的导航设置中对我们提出的方法进行实验验证，同时避免与两个人发生碰撞。 本文提出一种基于约束动态势博弈的高效多智能体轨迹优化方法，通过将耦合约束问题转化为单个最优控制问题，显著提升计算效率。 Maulik Bhatt,Yixuan Jia,Negar Mehr cs.RO

authors_text: Yubei Chen,Adrien Bardes,Zengyi Li,Yann LeCun
title: Bag of Image Patch Embedding Behind the Success of Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督学习成功背后的一袋图像补丁嵌入
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has recently achieved tremendous empirical advancements in learning image representation. However, our understanding of the principle behind learning such a representation is still limited. This work shows that joint-embedding SSL approaches primarily learn a representation of image patches, which reflects their co-occurrence. Such a connection to co-occurrence modeling can be established formally, and it supplements the prevailing invariance perspective. We empirically show that learning a representation for fixed-scale patches and aggregating local patch representations as the image representation achieves similar or even better results than the baseline methods. We denote this process as BagSSL. Even with 32x32 patch representation, BagSSL achieves 62% top-1 linear probing accuracy on ImageNet. On the other hand, with a multi-scale pretrained model, we show that the whole image embedding is approximately the average of local patch embeddings. While the SSL representation is relatively invariant at the global scale, we show that locality is preserved when we zoom into local patch-level representation. Further, we show that patch representation aggregation can improve various SOTA baseline methods by a large margin. The patch representation is considerably easier to understand, and this work makes a step to demystify self-supervised representation learning.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has recently achieved tremendous empirical advancements in learning image representation. However, our understanding of the principle behind learning such a representation is still limited. This work shows that joint-embedding SSL approaches primarily learn a representation of image patches, which reflects their co-occurrence. Such a connection to co-occurrence modeling can be established formally, and it supplements the prevailing invariance perspective. We empirically show that learning a representation for fixed-scale patches and aggregating local patch representations as the image representation achieves similar or even better results than the baseline methods. We denote this process as BagSSL. Even with 32x32 patch representation, BagSSL achieves 62% top-1 linear probing accuracy on ImageNet. On the other hand, with a multi-scale pretrained model, we show that the whole image embedding is approximately the average of local patch embeddings. While the SSL representation is relatively invariant at the global scale, we show that locality is preserved when we zoom into local patch-level representation. Further, we show that patch representation aggregation can improve various SOTA baseline methods by a large margin. The patch representation is considerably easier to understand, and this work makes a step to demystify self-supervised representation learning.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）最近在学习图像表示方面取得了巨大的实证进展。然而，我们对学习这种表示背后的原理的理解仍然有限。这项工作表明，联合嵌入 SSL 方法主要学习图像块的表示，这反映了它们的共现性。这种与共现建模的联系可以正式建立，它补充了流行的不变性观点。我们凭经验表明，学习固定尺度补丁的表示并将局部补丁表示聚合为图像表示可以实现与基线方法相似甚至更好的结果。我们将此过程表示为 BagSSL。即使使用 32x32 块表示，BagSSL 在 ImageNet 上也能实现 62% 的 top-1 线性探测精度。另一方面，通过多尺度预训练模型，我们表明整个图像嵌入大约是局部补丁嵌入的平均值。虽然 SSL 表示在全局范围内相对不变，但我们表明，当我们放大到局部补丁级表示时，局部性得以保留。此外，我们还表明补丁表示聚合可以大幅改进各种 SOTA 基线方法。补丁表示相当容易理解，这项工作为揭开自监督表示学习的神秘面纱迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨自监督学习（SSL）成功背后的机制，提出通过图像块嵌入（BagSSL）方法学习图像表示，揭示其与局部块共现建模的关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管SSL在图像表示学习上取得进展，但其原理仍不明确，现有研究侧重全局不变性视角，缺乏对局部结构建模的深入分析。
AI.method: 提出BagSSL方法，通过固定尺度图像块嵌入与局部表示聚合构建全局表示，并分析多尺度预训练模型中整体嵌入与局部块嵌入的关联性。
AI.result: BagSSL在ImageNet上达到62% top-1线性探针准确率；多尺度模型显示整体嵌入近似局部块嵌入平均值，且局部表示保留空间局部性，显著提升基线方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 图像块表示更易解释，揭示SSL学习本质是建模局部块共现关系，为理解自监督表示学习提供新视角。

authors_text: Qihang Yu,Huiyu Wang,Dahun Kim,Siyuan Qiao,Maxwell Collins,Yukun Zhu,Hartwig Adam,Alan Yuille,Liang-Chieh Chen
title: CMT-DeepLab: Clustering Mask Transformers for Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: CMT-DeepLab：用于全景分割的聚类掩模变压器
abstract: We propose Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT-DeepLab), a transformer-based framework for panoptic segmentation designed around clustering. It rethinks the existing transformer architectures used in segmentation and detection; CMT-DeepLab considers the object queries as cluster centers, which fill the role of grouping the pixels when applied to segmentation. The clustering is computed with an alternating procedure, by first assigning pixels to the clusters by their feature affinity, and then updating the cluster centers and pixel features. Together, these operations comprise the Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT) layer, which produces cross-attention that is denser and more consistent with the final segmentation task. CMT-DeepLab improves the performance over prior art significantly by 4.4% PQ, achieving a new state-of-the-art of 55.7% PQ on the COCO test-dev set.
summary: We propose Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT-DeepLab), a transformer-based framework for panoptic segmentation designed around clustering. It rethinks the existing transformer architectures used in segmentation and detection; CMT-DeepLab considers the object queries as cluster centers, which fill the role of grouping the pixels when applied to segmentation. The clustering is computed with an alternating procedure, by first assigning pixels to the clusters by their feature affinity, and then updating the cluster centers and pixel features. Together, these operations comprise the Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT) layer, which produces cross-attention that is denser and more consistent with the final segmentation task. CMT-DeepLab improves the performance over prior art significantly by 4.4% PQ, achieving a new state-of-the-art of 55.7% PQ on the COCO test-dev set.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT-DeepLab)，这是一种基于 Transformer 的框架，用于围绕聚类设计的全景分割。它重新思考了用于分割和检测的现有变压器架构； CMT-DeepLab 将对象查询视为聚类中心，在应用于分割时起到对像素进行分组的作用。聚类是通过交替过程计算的，首先根据像素的特征亲和力将像素分配给聚类，然后更新聚类中心和像素特征。这些操作共同构成了 Clustering Mask Transformer (CMT) 层，该层产生更密集且与最终分割任务更一致的交叉注意力。与现有技术相比，CMT-DeepLab 的性能显着提高了 4.4% PQ，在 COCO 测试开发集上实现了 55.7% PQ 的最新技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于聚类的Transformer框架CMT-DeepLab，用于全景分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer架构在分割任务中存在注意力机制不够密集和一致的问题，需通过聚类方法提升分割性能。
AI.method: 将对象查询视为聚类中心，通过交替分配像素到聚类及更新特征的CMT层，生成更密集的交叉注意力机制。
AI.result: 在COCO测试集上提升4.4% PQ指标，达到55.7% PQ的最新SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 聚类机制有效增强了Transformer在全景分割中的表现，验证了CMT-DeepLab方法的优越性。

authors_text: Aimon Rahman,Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Ilker Hacihaliloglu,Vishal M Patel
title: Simultaneous Bone and Shadow Segmentation Network using Task Correspondence Consistency
title_zh: 使用任务对应一致性的同时骨骼和阴影分割网络
abstract: Segmenting both bone surface and the corresponding acoustic shadow are fundamental tasks in ultrasound (US) guided orthopedic procedures. However, these tasks are challenging due to minimal and blurred bone surface response in US images, cross-machine discrepancy, imaging artifacts, and low signal-to-noise ratio. Notably, bone shadows are caused by a significant acoustic impedance mismatch between the soft tissue and bone surfaces. To leverage this mutual information between these highly related tasks, we propose a single end-to-end network with a shared transformer-based encoder and task independent decoders for simultaneous bone and shadow segmentation. To share complementary features, we propose a cross task feature transfer block which learns to transfer meaningful features from decoder of shadow segmentation to that of bone segmentation and vice-versa. We also introduce a correspondence consistency loss which makes sure that network utilizes the inter-dependency between the bone surface and its corresponding shadow to refine the segmentation. Validation against expert annotations shows that the method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art for both bone surface and shadow segmentation.
summary: Segmenting both bone surface and the corresponding acoustic shadow are fundamental tasks in ultrasound (US) guided orthopedic procedures. However, these tasks are challenging due to minimal and blurred bone surface response in US images, cross-machine discrepancy, imaging artifacts, and low signal-to-noise ratio. Notably, bone shadows are caused by a significant acoustic impedance mismatch between the soft tissue and bone surfaces. To leverage this mutual information between these highly related tasks, we propose a single end-to-end network with a shared transformer-based encoder and task independent decoders for simultaneous bone and shadow segmentation. To share complementary features, we propose a cross task feature transfer block which learns to transfer meaningful features from decoder of shadow segmentation to that of bone segmentation and vice-versa. We also introduce a correspondence consistency loss which makes sure that network utilizes the inter-dependency between the bone surface and its corresponding shadow to refine the segmentation. Validation against expert annotations shows that the method outperforms the previous state-of-the-art for both bone surface and shadow segmentation.
abstract_zh: 分割骨表面和相应的声影是超声 (US) 引导的骨科手术中的基本任务。然而，由于超声图像中骨表面响应极小且模糊、跨机器差异、成像伪影和低信噪比，这些任务具有挑战性。值得注意的是，骨阴影是由软组织和骨表面之间显着的声阻抗不匹配引起的。为了利用这些高度相关的任务之间的相互信息，我们提出了一个单一的端到端网络，该网络具有基于共享变压器的编码器和独立于任务的解码器，用于同时进行骨骼和阴影分割。为了共享互补特征，我们提出了一个跨任务特征传输块，它学习将有意义的特征从阴影分割解码器传输到骨骼分割解码器，反之亦然。我们还引入了对应一致性损失，确保网络利用骨骼表面及其相应阴影之间的相互依赖性来细化分割。针对专家注释的验证表明，该方法在骨表面和阴影分割方面均优于以前的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用任务对应一致性进行骨组织与声影同时分割的端到端网络架构。
AI.motivation: 超声引导骨科手术中骨表面与声影分割面临信号弱、设备差异大、伪影多等挑战，而声影与骨表面存在物理关联性，需通过任务间信息共享提升分割精度。
AI.method: 设计共享Transformer编码器与独立解码器的网络结构，引入跨任务特征迁移模块实现特征互补，并采用对应一致性损失函数强化骨表面与声影的相互依赖关系。
AI.result: 在专家标注数据集上，该方法在骨表面分割和声影分割任务中均优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘骨分割与声影分割任务的物理关联性，所提方法有效提升了超声图像中相关结构的联合分割性能，对骨科手术导航具有实际意义。

authors_text: Claire Stevenson,Iris Smal,Matthijs Baas,Raoul Grasman,Han van der Maas
title: Putting GPT-3's Creativity to the (Alternative Uses) Test
title_zh: 将 GPT-3 的创造力进行（替代用途）测试
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted at the International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC) 2022 as a Short Paper. See https://osf.io/vmk3c/ for data, analyses and code
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted at the International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC) 2022 as a Short Paper. See https://osf.io/vmk3c/ for data, analyses and code
abstract: AI large language models have (co-)produced amazing written works from newspaper articles to novels and poetry. These works meet the standards of the standard definition of creativity: being original and useful, and sometimes even the additional element of surprise. But can a large language model designed to predict the next text fragment provide creative, out-of-the-box, responses that still solve the problem at hand? We put Open AI's generative natural language model, GPT-3, to the test. Can it provide creative solutions to one of the most commonly used tests in creativity research? We assessed GPT-3's creativity on Guilford's Alternative Uses Test and compared its performance to previously collected human responses on expert ratings of originality, usefulness and surprise of responses, flexibility of each set of ideas as well as an automated method to measure creativity based on the semantic distance between a response and the AUT object in question. Our results show that -- on the whole -- humans currently outperform GPT-3 when it comes to creative output. But, we believe it is only a matter of time before GPT-3 catches up on this particular task. We discuss what this work reveals about human and AI creativity, creativity testing and our definition of creativity.
summary: AI large language models have (co-)produced amazing written works from newspaper articles to novels and poetry. These works meet the standards of the standard definition of creativity: being original and useful, and sometimes even the additional element of surprise. But can a large language model designed to predict the next text fragment provide creative, out-of-the-box, responses that still solve the problem at hand? We put Open AI's generative natural language model, GPT-3, to the test. Can it provide creative solutions to one of the most commonly used tests in creativity research? We assessed GPT-3's creativity on Guilford's Alternative Uses Test and compared its performance to previously collected human responses on expert ratings of originality, usefulness and surprise of responses, flexibility of each set of ideas as well as an automated method to measure creativity based on the semantic distance between a response and the AUT object in question. Our results show that -- on the whole -- humans currently outperform GPT-3 when it comes to creative output. But, we believe it is only a matter of time before GPT-3 catches up on this particular task. We discuss what this work reveals about human and AI creativity, creativity testing and our definition of creativity.
abstract_zh: 人工智能大型语言模型（共同）创作了从报纸文章到小说和诗歌的令人惊叹的书面作品。这些作品符合创造力的标准定义：原创且有用，有时甚至还带有惊喜元素。但是，旨在预测下一个文本片段的大型语言模型能否提供创造性的、开箱即用的响应来解决当前的问题？我们对 Open AI 的生成自然语言模型 GPT-3 进行了测试。它能为创造力研究中最常用的测试之一提供创造性的解决方案吗？我们在 Guilford 的替代用途测试中评估了 GPT-3 的创造力，并将其性能与之前收集的人类反应进行了比较，包括专家对反应的原创性、有用性和惊喜性的评级、每组想法的灵活性以及基于反应和相关 AUT 对象之间的语义距离来衡量创造力的自动化方法。我们的结果表明，总体而言，人类目前在创意输出方面优于 GPT-3。但是，我们相信 GPT-3 赶上这一特定任务只是时间问题。我们讨论这项工作揭示了人类和人工智能的创造力、创造力测试以及我们对创造力的定义。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-3在创造性任务（替代用途测试）中的表现，并与人类创造力进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI生成内容展现创造力，但需验证其是否能在需要跳出框架的创造性任务（如替代用途测试）中有效解决问题。
AI.method: 采用Guilford替代用途测试，通过专家评分（原创性、有用性、惊喜感、灵活性）及语义距离自动化方法，比较GPT-3与人类响应的创造力差异。
AI.result: 人类整体创造力仍优于GPT-3，但AI在特定指标（如语义距离）上接近人类表现，未来可能追平甚至超越。
AI.conclusion: 当前人类创造力领先，但AI创造力发展迅速，需重新思考创造力定义及评估方法以适应技术进步。

authors_text: Mark Diaz,Ian D. Kivlichan,Rachel Rosen,Dylan K. Baker,Razvan Amironesei,Vinodkumar Prabhakaran,Emily Denton
title: CrowdWorkSheets: Accounting for Individual and Collective Identities Underlying Crowdsourced Dataset Annotation
title_zh: CrowdWorkSheets：解释众包数据集注释背后的个人和集体身份
comment: 11 pages, Accepted at 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.04554
comments: 11 pages, Accepted at 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.04554
abstract: Human annotated data plays a crucial role in machine learning (ML) research and development. However, the ethical considerations around the processes and decisions that go into dataset annotation have not received nearly enough attention. In this paper, we survey an array of literature that provides insights into ethical considerations around crowdsourced dataset annotation. We synthesize these insights, and lay out the challenges in this space along two layers: (1) who the annotator is, and how the annotators' lived experiences can impact their annotations, and (2) the relationship between the annotators and the crowdsourcing platforms, and what that relationship affords them. Finally, we introduce a novel framework, CrowdWorkSheets, for dataset developers to facilitate transparent documentation of key decisions points at various stages of the data annotation pipeline: task formulation, selection of annotators, platform and infrastructure choices, dataset analysis and evaluation, and dataset release and maintenance.
summary: Human annotated data plays a crucial role in machine learning (ML) research and development. However, the ethical considerations around the processes and decisions that go into dataset annotation have not received nearly enough attention. In this paper, we survey an array of literature that provides insights into ethical considerations around crowdsourced dataset annotation. We synthesize these insights, and lay out the challenges in this space along two layers: (1) who the annotator is, and how the annotators' lived experiences can impact their annotations, and (2) the relationship between the annotators and the crowdsourcing platforms, and what that relationship affords them. Finally, we introduce a novel framework, CrowdWorkSheets, for dataset developers to facilitate transparent documentation of key decisions points at various stages of the data annotation pipeline: task formulation, selection of annotators, platform and infrastructure choices, dataset analysis and evaluation, and dataset release and maintenance.
abstract_zh: 人工注释数据在机器学习 (ML) 研究和开发中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，围绕数据集注释的过程和决策的道德考虑还没有得到足够的关注。在本文中，我们调查了一系列文献，这些文献提供了有关众包数据集注释的伦理考虑的见解。我们综合这些见解，并从两个层面列出了这个领域的挑战：（1）注释者是谁，注释者的生活经历如何影响他们的注释，（2）注释者和众包平台之间的关系，以及这种关系为他们提供了什么。最后，我们为数据集开发人员引入了一个新颖的框架 CrowdWorkSheets，以促进数据注释管道各个阶段关键决策点的透明记录：任务制定、注释器选择、平台和基础设施选择、数据集分析和评估以及数据集发布和维护。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为CrowdWorkSheets的框架，用于透明记录众包数据集标注过程中的关键决策点，以解决伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 当前众包数据集标注过程中的伦理问题缺乏足够关注，影响数据质量和公平性。
AI.method: 通过综述相关文献，分析注释者个体与集体身份对标注的影响，并设计CrowdWorkSheets框架，涵盖任务制定、注释者选择、平台选择等阶段。
AI.result: 提出了CrowdWorkSheets框架，明确了数据标注流程中的伦理挑战，并提供了透明记录的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: CrowdWorkSheets框架有助于提高数据集开发的透明度和伦理标准，促进更公平和可靠的人工智能发展。

search_text: CrowdWorkSheets: Accounting for Individual and Collective Identities Underlying Crowdsourced Dataset Annotation CrowdWorkSheets：解释众包数据集注释背后的个人和集体身份 Human annotated data plays a crucial role in machine learning (ML) research and development. However, the ethical considerations around the processes and decisions that go into dataset annotation have not received nearly enough attention. In this paper, we survey an array of literature that provides insights into ethical considerations around crowdsourced dataset annotation. We synthesize these insights, and lay out the challenges in this space along two layers: (1) who the annotator is, and how the annotators' lived experiences can impact their annotations, and (2) the relationship between the annotators and the crowdsourcing platforms, and what that relationship affords them. Finally, we introduce a novel framework, CrowdWorkSheets, for dataset developers to facilitate transparent documentation of key decisions points at various stages of the data annotation pipeline: task formulation, selection of annotators, platform and infrastructure choices, dataset analysis and evaluation, and dataset release and maintenance. 人工注释数据在机器学习 (ML) 研究和开发中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，围绕数据集注释的过程和决策的道德考虑还没有得到足够的关注。在本文中，我们调查了一系列文献，这些文献提供了有关众包数据集注释的伦理考虑的见解。我们综合这些见解，并从两个层面列出了这个领域的挑战：（1）注释者是谁，注释者的生活经历如何影响他们的注释，（2）注释者和众包平台之间的关系，以及这种关系为他们提供了什么。最后，我们为数据集开发人员引入了一个新颖的框架 CrowdWorkSheets，以促进数据注释管道各个阶段关键决策点的透明记录：任务制定、注释器选择、平台和基础设施选择、数据集分析和评估以及数据集发布和维护。 提出一种名为CrowdWorkSheets的框架，用于透明记录众包数据集标注过程中的关键决策点，以解决伦理问题。 Mark Diaz,Ian D. Kivlichan,Rachel Rosen,Dylan K. Baker,Razvan Amironesei,Vinodkumar Prabhakaran,Emily Denton cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Sreela Kodali,Allison M. Okamura,Thomas C. Bulea,Alexander T. Chesler,Carsten G. Bönnemann
title: Wearable Haptic Device for Individuals with Congenital Absence of Proprioception
title_zh: 适用于先天性本体感觉缺失患者的可穿戴触觉设备
abstract: A rare genetic condition, PIEZO2 loss of function (LOF) is characterized by absence of proprioception and light touch, which makes functional tasks (e.g., walking, manipulation) difficult. There are no pharmacological treatments or assistive technologies available for individuals with PIEZO2-LOF. We propose a sensory substitution device that communicates proprioceptive feedback via detectable haptic stimuli. We created a wearable prototype that maps measurements of elbow movement to deep pressure applied to the forearm. The prototype applies up to 18 N, includes an embedded force sensor, and is programmable to allow for various angle-to-pressure mappings. Future work includes comparing proprioceptive acuity and movement ability with and without the device in healthy and PIEZO2-LOF individuals, developing low-profile devices using soft robotics, providing sensory substitution for multiple joints simultaneously, and encoding additional aspects of joint dynamics.
summary: A rare genetic condition, PIEZO2 loss of function (LOF) is characterized by absence of proprioception and light touch, which makes functional tasks (e.g., walking, manipulation) difficult. There are no pharmacological treatments or assistive technologies available for individuals with PIEZO2-LOF. We propose a sensory substitution device that communicates proprioceptive feedback via detectable haptic stimuli. We created a wearable prototype that maps measurements of elbow movement to deep pressure applied to the forearm. The prototype applies up to 18 N, includes an embedded force sensor, and is programmable to allow for various angle-to-pressure mappings. Future work includes comparing proprioceptive acuity and movement ability with and without the device in healthy and PIEZO2-LOF individuals, developing low-profile devices using soft robotics, providing sensory substitution for multiple joints simultaneously, and encoding additional aspects of joint dynamics.
abstract_zh: PIEZO2 功能丧失 (LOF) 是一种罕见的遗传性疾病，其特点是缺乏本体感觉和轻触觉，这使得功能性任务（例如行走、操作）变得困难。对于 PIEZO2-LOF 患者，目前尚无可用的药物治疗或辅助技术。我们提出了一种感觉替代设备，通过可检测的触觉刺激来传达本体感觉反馈。我们创建了一个可穿戴原型，将肘部运动的测量结果映射到施加到前臂的深度压力。该原型适用高达 18 N 的力，包括嵌入式力传感器，并且可编程以允许各种角度到压力映射。未来的工作包括比较健康个体和 PIEZO2-LOF 个体使用和不使用该设备的本体感觉敏锐度和运动能力，使用软机器人技术开发低轮廓设备，同时为多个关节提供感觉替代，以及对关节动力学的其他方面进行编码。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可穿戴触觉设备，为先天性本体感觉缺失患者提供本体感觉反馈替代方案。
AI.motivation: PIEZO2功能丧失会导致本体感觉和轻触觉缺失，现有无药物或辅助技术可帮助患者完成日常功能任务。
AI.method: 设计可穿戴原型设备，将肘部运动数据映射为前臂的可检测压力反馈，设备包含力传感器并支持编程调节角度-压力映射关系。
AI.result: 成功开发出可施加最大18N压力的原型设备，未来计划通过对比实验验证设备对健康人和患者群体的本体感觉及运动能力的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该设备为PIEZO2-LOF患者提供了潜在的感官替代方案，后续需进一步优化设备形态并扩展多关节同时感知功能。

authors_text: Ruilong Li,Julian Tanke,Minh Vo,Michael Zollhofer,Jurgen Gall,Angjoo Kanazawa,Christoph Lassner
title: TAVA: Template-free Animatable Volumetric Actors
title_zh: TAVA：无模板可动画体积 Actor
abstract: Coordinate-based volumetric representations have the potential to generate photo-realistic virtual avatars from images. However, virtual avatars also need to be controllable even to a novel pose that may not have been observed. Traditional techniques, such as LBS, provide such a function; yet it usually requires a hand-designed body template, 3D scan data, and limited appearance models. On the other hand, neural representation has been shown to be powerful in representing visual details, but are under explored on deforming dynamic articulated actors. In this paper, we propose TAVA, a method to create T emplate-free Animatable Volumetric Actors, based on neural representations. We rely solely on multi-view data and a tracked skeleton to create a volumetric model of an actor, which can be animated at the test time given novel pose. Since TAVA does not require a body template, it is applicable to humans as well as other creatures such as animals. Furthermore, TAVA is designed such that it can recover accurate dense correspondences, making it amenable to content-creation and editing tasks. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed method generalizes well to novel poses as well as unseen views and showcase basic editing capabilities.
summary: Coordinate-based volumetric representations have the potential to generate photo-realistic virtual avatars from images. However, virtual avatars also need to be controllable even to a novel pose that may not have been observed. Traditional techniques, such as LBS, provide such a function; yet it usually requires a hand-designed body template, 3D scan data, and limited appearance models. On the other hand, neural representation has been shown to be powerful in representing visual details, but are under explored on deforming dynamic articulated actors. In this paper, we propose TAVA, a method to create T emplate-free Animatable Volumetric Actors, based on neural representations. We rely solely on multi-view data and a tracked skeleton to create a volumetric model of an actor, which can be animated at the test time given novel pose. Since TAVA does not require a body template, it is applicable to humans as well as other creatures such as animals. Furthermore, TAVA is designed such that it can recover accurate dense correspondences, making it amenable to content-creation and editing tasks. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed method generalizes well to novel poses as well as unseen views and showcase basic editing capabilities.
abstract_zh: 基于坐标的体积表示有可能从图像生成逼真的虚拟化身。然而，虚拟化身也需要可控，即使是可能未观察到的新颖姿势。传统技术，如LBS，就提供了这样的功能；但它通常需要手工设计的身体模板、3D 扫描数据和有限的外观模型。另一方面，神经表示已被证明在表示视觉细节方面非常强大，但在变形动态关节演员方面尚未得到探索。在本文中，我们提出了 TAVA，一种基于神经表示创建无模板可动画体积 Actor 的方法。我们仅依靠多视图数据和跟踪的骨架来创建演员的体积模型，可以在给定新姿势的测试时对其进行动画处理。由于 TAVA 不需要身体模板，因此它适用于人类以及其他生物，例如动物。此外，TAVA 的设计使其能够恢复准确的密集对应关系，使其能够胜任内容创建和编辑任务。通过大量的实验，我们证明所提出的方法可以很好地推广到新颖的姿势以及未见过的视图，并展示基本的编辑功能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需模板的神经表示方法，利用多视角数据和跟踪骨架生成可动画的体积演员。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手设计模板和3D扫描数据，限制了灵活性和应用范围；神经表示在动态变形的动画角色建模中尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 基于神经表示，仅使用多视角图像和跟踪的骨骼数据，构建无需模板的可变形体积模型，支持新姿态动画生成及内容编辑。
AI.result: 实验表明TAVA能有效泛化至未见过的姿态和视角，并支持基础内容编辑。
AI.conclusion: TAVA提供了无需模板的灵活体积角色建模方案，适用于多类生物，具备良好的姿态泛化能力和编辑潜力。

Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that the proposed method generalizes well to novel poses as well as unseen views and showcase basic editing capabilities. 基于坐标的体积表示有可能从图像生成逼真的虚拟化身。然而，虚拟化身也需要可控，即使是可能未观察到的新颖姿势。传统技术，如LBS，就提供了这样的功能；但它通常需要手工设计的身体模板、3D 扫描数据和有限的外观模型。另一方面，神经表示已被证明在表示视觉细节方面非常强大，但在变形动态关节演员方面尚未得到探索。在本文中，我们提出了 TAVA，一种基于神经表示创建无模板可动画体积 Actor 的方法。我们仅依靠多视图数据和跟踪的骨架来创建演员的体积模型，可以在给定新姿势的测试时对其进行动画处理。由于 TAVA 不需要身体模板，因此它适用于人类以及其他生物，例如动物。此外，TAVA 的设计使其能够恢复准确的密集对应关系，使其能够胜任内容创建和编辑任务。通过大量的实验，我们证明所提出的方法可以很好地推广到新颖的姿势以及未见过的视图，并展示基本的编辑功能。 提出一种无需模板的神经表示方法，利用多视角数据和跟踪骨架生成可动画的体积演员。 Ruilong Li,Julian Tanke,Minh Vo,Michael Zollhofer,Jurgen Gall,Angjoo Kanazawa,Christoph Lassner cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ivan Lopes,Tuan-Hung Vu,Raoul de Charette
title: DenseMTL: Cross-task Attention Mechanism for Dense Multi-task Learning
title_zh: DenseMTL：密集多任务学习的跨任务注意力机制
comment: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Multi-task learning has recently emerged as a promising solution for a comprehensive understanding of complex scenes. In addition to being memory-efficient, multi-task models, when appropriately designed, can facilitate the exchange of complementary signals across tasks. In this work, we jointly address 2D semantic segmentation and three geometry-related tasks: dense depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and edge estimation, demonstrating their benefits on both indoor and outdoor datasets. We propose a novel multi-task learning architecture that leverages pairwise cross-task exchange through correlation-guided attention and self-attention to enhance the overall representation learning for all tasks. We conduct extensive experiments across three multi-task setups, showing the advantages of our approach compared to competitive baselines in both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Additionally, we extend our method to the novel multi-task unsupervised domain adaptation setting. Our code is available at https://github.com/cv-rits/DenseMTL
summary: Multi-task learning has recently emerged as a promising solution for a comprehensive understanding of complex scenes. In addition to being memory-efficient, multi-task models, when appropriately designed, can facilitate the exchange of complementary signals across tasks. In this work, we jointly address 2D semantic segmentation and three geometry-related tasks: dense depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and edge estimation, demonstrating their benefits on both indoor and outdoor datasets. We propose a novel multi-task learning architecture that leverages pairwise cross-task exchange through correlation-guided attention and self-attention to enhance the overall representation learning for all tasks. We conduct extensive experiments across three multi-task setups, showing the advantages of our approach compared to competitive baselines in both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Additionally, we extend our method to the novel multi-task unsupervised domain adaptation setting. Our code is available at https://github.com/cv-rits/DenseMTL
abstract_zh: 多任务学习最近已成为全面理解复杂场景的有前途的解决方案。除了内存效率高之外，多任务模型如果设计得当，还可以促进任务之间互补信号的交换。在这项工作中，我们共同解决了 2D 语义分割和三个与几何相关的任务：密集深度估计、表面法线估计和边缘估计，展示了它们在室内和室外数据集上的好处。我们提出了一种新颖的多任务学习架构，该架构通过相关引导注意力和自注意力来利用成对跨任务交换来增强所有任务的整体表示学习。我们在三个多任务设置中进行了广泛的实验，展示了我们的方法与合成基准和现实基准中的竞争基准相比的优势。此外，我们将我们的方法扩展到新颖的多任务无监督域适应设置。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/cv-rits/DenseMTL

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseMTL，一种利用跨任务注意力机制的密集多任务学习方法，同时解决2D语义分割与几何相关任务。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习能提升复杂场景理解效率，但如何有效跨任务共享互补信息仍是挑战，尤其在密集预测任务中。
AI.method: 设计包含相关性引导注意力与自注意力的多任务架构，通过跨任务特征交互增强整体表示学习，并扩展至无监督域适应场景。
AI.result: 在室内/室外数据集及合成/真实基准测试中，DenseMTL优于现有方法，且在无监督域适应任务中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 跨任务注意力机制有效提升多任务学习性能，方法具有良好的泛化能力与实际应用价值。

authors_text: Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Huang Huang,Ellen Novoseller,Daniel Seita,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Michael Laskey,Richard Cheng,Thomas Kollar,Ken Goldberg
title: Efficiently Learning Single-Arm Fling Motions to Smooth Garments
title_zh: 有效学习单臂投掷动作以平滑衣物
comment: Accepted to 2022 International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR)
comments: Accepted to 2022 International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR)
abstract: Recent work has shown that 2-arm "fling" motions can be effective for garment smoothing. We consider single-arm fling motions. Unlike 2-arm fling motions, which require little robot trajectory parameter tuning, single-arm fling motions are very sensitive to trajectory parameters. We consider a single 6-DOF robot arm that learns fling trajectories to achieve high garment coverage. Given a garment grasp point, the robot explores different parameterized fling trajectories in physical experiments. To improve learning efficiency, we propose a coarse-to-fine learning method that first uses a multi-armed bandit (MAB) framework to efficiently find a candidate fling action, which it then refines via a continuous optimization method. Further, we propose novel training and execution-time stopping criteria based on fling outcome uncertainty; the training-time stopping criterion increases data efficiency while the execution-time stopping criteria leverage repeated fling actions to increase performance. Compared to baselines, the proposed method significantly accelerates learning. Moreover, with prior experience on similar garments collected through self-supervision, the MAB learning time for a new garment is reduced by up to 87%. We evaluate on 36 real garments: towels, T-shirts, long-sleeve shirts, dresses, sweat pants, and jeans. Results suggest that using prior experience, a robot requires under 30 minutes to learn a fling action for a novel garment that achieves 60-94% coverage.

Unlike 2-arm fling motions, which require little robot trajectory parameter tuning, single-arm fling motions are very sensitive to trajectory parameters. We consider a single 6-DOF robot arm that learns fling trajectories to achieve high garment coverage. To improve learning efficiency, we propose a coarse-to-fine learning method that first uses a multi-armed bandit (MAB) framework to efficiently find a candidate fling action, which it then refines via a continuous optimization method. Further, we propose novel training and execution-time stopping criteria based on fling outcome uncertainty; the training-time stopping criterion increases data efficiency while the execution-time stopping criteria leverage repeated fling actions to increase performance. Compared to baselines, the proposed method significantly accelerates learning. Moreover, with prior experience on similar garments collected through self-supervision, the MAB learning time for a new garment is reduced by up to 87%. We evaluate on 36 real garments: towels, T-shirts, long-sleeve shirts, dresses, sweat pants, and jeans. abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，两臂“甩动”动作可以有效地平滑衣服。我们考虑单臂投掷动作。与需要很少的机器人轨迹参数调整的 2 臂投掷运动不同，单臂投掷运动对轨迹参数非常敏感。我们考虑使用单个 6 自由度机器人手臂来学习投掷轨迹以实现高服装覆盖率。给定服装抓取点，机器人在物理实验中探索不同的参数化投掷轨迹。为了提高学习效率，我们提出了一种从粗到精的学习方法，首先使用多臂老虎机（MAB）框架来有效地找到候选的投掷动作，然后通过连续优化方法对其进行细化。此外，我们基于投掷结果的不确定性提出了新颖的训练和执行时间停止标准；训练时停止标准提高了数据效率，而执行时停止标准则利用重复的投掷动作来提高性能。与基线相比，所提出的方法显着加速了学习。此外，通过自我监督收集类似服装的先前经验，新服装的 MAB 学习时间最多可减少 87%。我们评估了 36 件真实服装：毛巾、T 恤、长袖衬衫、连衣裙、运动裤和牛仔裤。结果表明，根据之前的经验，机器人需要不到 30 分钟的时间就能学习新服装的投掷动作，从而实现 60-94% 的覆盖率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过单臂机器人学习高效的甩动动作以实现衣物的平整。
AI.motivation: 虽然双臂甩动动作已被证明在衣物平整中有效，但单臂甩动动作对轨迹参数非常敏感，因此需要一种高效的学习方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种从粗到细的学习方法，首先使用多臂老虎机框架找到候选甩动动作，再通过连续优化方法进行细化。同时引入了基于甩动结果不确定性的训练和执行时停止准则。
AI.result: 在36种真实衣物上的实验表明，使用先验经验后，机器人可在30分钟内学习到一种新的甩动动作，实现60-94%的覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提高了学习效率，并且通过先验经验可大幅减少新衣物的MAB学习时间。

authors_text: Yicheng Liu,Tianyuan Yuan,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao
title: VectorMapNet: End-to-end Vectorized HD Map Learning
title_zh: VectorMapNet：端到端矢量化高精地图学习
abstract: Autonomous driving systems require High-Definition (HD) semantic maps to navigate around urban roads. Existing solutions approach the semantic mapping problem by offline manual annotation, which suffers from serious scalability issues. Recent learning-based methods produce dense rasterized segmentation predictions to construct maps. However, these predictions do not include instance information of individual map elements and require heuristic post-processing to obtain vectorized maps. To tackle these challenges, we introduce an end-to-end vectorized HD map learning pipeline, termed VectorMapNet. VectorMapNet takes onboard sensor observations and predicts a sparse set of polylines in the bird's-eye view. This pipeline can explicitly model the spatial relation between map elements and generate vectorized maps that are friendly to downstream autonomous driving tasks. Extensive experiments show that VectorMapNet achieve strong map learning performance on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 dataset, surpassing previous state-of-the-art methods by 14.2 mAP and 14.6mAP. Qualitatively, VectorMapNet is capable of generating comprehensive maps and capturing fine-grained details of road geometry. To the best of our knowledge, VectorMapNet is the first work designed towards end-to-end vectorized map learning from onboard observations. Our project website is available at \url{https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/vectormapnet/}.

To the best of our knowledge, VectorMapNet is the first work designed towards end-to-end vectorized map learning from onboard observations. Our project website is available at \url{https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/vectormapnet/}.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统需要高清 (HD) 语义地图来在城市道路上导航。现有的解决方案通过离线手动注释来解决语义映射问题，这存在严重的可扩展性问题。最近基于学习的方法产生密集的光栅化分割预测来构建地图。然而，这些预测不包括各个地图元素的实例信息，并且需要启发式后处理来获得矢量化地图。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了端到端矢量化高清地图学习管道，称为 VectorMapNet。 VectorMapNet 获取机载传感器观测结果并预测鸟瞰图中的一组稀疏折线。该管道可以显式地对地图元素之间的空间关系进行建模，并生成对下游自动驾驶任务友好的矢量化地图。大量实验表明，VectorMapNet 在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上均实现了强大的地图学习性能，超过了之前最先进的方法 14.2 mAP 和 14.6 mAP。定性地讲，VectorMapNet 能够生成全面的地图并捕获道路几何的细粒度细节。据我们所知，VectorMapNet 是第一个旨在从机载观测中进行端到端矢量化地图学习的工作。我们的项目网站位于 \url{https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/vectormapnet/}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VectorMapNet，一种端到端的向量化高精度地图学习方法，用于自动驾驶中的语义地图构建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖人工标注或生成栅格化地图，存在可扩展性差、缺乏实例信息及需后处理等问题。
AI.method: VectorMapNet直接从车载传感器数据生成鸟瞰视角的稀疏多段线，显式建模地图元素空间关系，无需后处理即可输出向量化地图。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上分别以14.2 mAP和14.6 mAP超越现有方法，且能生成包含细节的高质量向量化地图。
AI.conclusion: VectorMapNet是首个从车载观测直接学习端到端向量化地图的框架，为自动驾驶提供了更高效的语义地图生成方案。

search_text: VectorMapNet: End-to-end Vectorized HD Map Learning VectorMapNet：端到端矢量化高精地图学习 Autonomous driving systems require High-Definition (HD) semantic maps to navigate around urban roads. Existing solutions approach the semantic mapping problem by offline manual annotation, which suffers from serious scalability issues. Recent learning-based methods produce dense rasterized segmentation predictions to construct maps. However, these predictions do not include instance information of individual map elements and require heuristic post-processing to obtain vectorized maps. To tackle these challenges, we introduce an end-to-end vectorized HD map learning pipeline, termed VectorMapNet. VectorMapNet takes onboard sensor observations and predicts a sparse set of polylines in the bird's-eye view. This pipeline can explicitly model the spatial relation between map elements and generate vectorized maps that are friendly to downstream autonomous driving tasks. Extensive experiments show that VectorMapNet achieve strong map learning performance on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 dataset, surpassing previous state-of-the-art methods by 14.2 mAP and 14.6mAP. Qualitatively, VectorMapNet is capable of generating comprehensive maps and capturing fine-grained details of road geometry. To the best of our knowledge, VectorMapNet is the first work designed towards end-to-end vectorized map learning from onboard observations. Our project website is available at \url{https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/vectormapnet/}. 自动驾驶系统需要高清 (HD) 语义地图来在城市道路上导航。现有的解决方案通过离线手动注释来解决语义映射问题，这存在严重的可扩展性问题。最近基于学习的方法产生密集的光栅化分割预测来构建地图。然而，这些预测不包括各个地图元素的实例信息，并且需要启发式后处理来获得矢量化地图。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了端到端矢量化高清地图学习管道，称为 VectorMapNet。 VectorMapNet 获取机载传感器观测结果并预测鸟瞰图中的一组稀疏折线。该管道可以显式地对地图元素之间的空间关系进行建模，并生成对下游自动驾驶任务友好的矢量化地图。大量实验表明，VectorMapNet 在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上均实现了强大的地图学习性能，超过了之前最先进的方法 14.2 mAP 和 14.6 mAP。定性地讲，VectorMapNet 能够生成全面的地图并捕获道路几何的细粒度细节。据我们所知，VectorMapNet 是第一个旨在从机载观测中进行端到端矢量化地图学习的工作。我们的项目网站位于 \url{https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/vectormapnet/}。 本文提出VectorMapNet，一种端到端的向量化高精度地图学习方法，用于自动驾驶中的语义地图构建。 Yicheng Liu,Tianyuan Yuan,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Teng Wang,Wenhao Jiang,Zhichao Lu,Feng Zheng,Ran Cheng,Chengguo Yin,Ping Luo
title: VLMixer: Unpaired Vision-Language Pre-training via Cross-Modal CutMix
title_zh: VLMixer：通过跨模式 CutMix 进行不配对的视觉语言预训练
abstract: Existing vision-language pre-training (VLP) methods primarily rely on paired image-text datasets, which are either annotated by enormous human labors, or crawled from the internet followed by elaborate data cleaning techniques. To reduce the dependency on well-aligned image-text pairs, it is promising to directly leverage the large-scale text-only and image-only corpora. This paper proposes a data augmentation method, namely cross-modal CutMix (CMC), for implicit cross-modal alignment learning in unpaired VLP. Specifically, CMC transforms natural sentences from the textual view into a multi-modal view, where visually-grounded words in a sentence are randomly replaced by diverse image patches with similar semantics. There are several appealing proprieties of the proposed CMC. First, it enhances the data diversity while keeping the semantic meaning intact for tackling problems where the aligned data are scarce; Second, by attaching cross-modal noise on uni-modal data, it guides models to learn token-level interactions across modalities for better denoising. Furthermore, we present a new unpaired VLP method, dubbed as VLMixer, that integrates CMC with contrastive learning to pull together the uni-modal and multi-modal views for better instance-level alignments among different modalities. Extensive experiments on five downstream tasks show that VLMixer could surpass previous state-of-the-art unpaired VLP methods.
summary: Existing vision-language pre-training (VLP) methods primarily rely on paired image-text datasets, which are either annotated by enormous human labors, or crawled from the internet followed by elaborate data cleaning techniques. To reduce the dependency on well-aligned image-text pairs, it is promising to directly leverage the large-scale text-only and image-only corpora. This paper proposes a data augmentation method, namely cross-modal CutMix (CMC), for implicit cross-modal alignment learning in unpaired VLP. Specifically, CMC transforms natural sentences from the textual view into a multi-modal view, where visually-grounded words in a sentence are randomly replaced by diverse image patches with similar semantics. There are several appealing proprieties of the proposed CMC. First, it enhances the data diversity while keeping the semantic meaning intact for tackling problems where the aligned data are scarce; Second, by attaching cross-modal noise on uni-modal data, it guides models to learn token-level interactions across modalities for better denoising. Furthermore, we present a new unpaired VLP method, dubbed as VLMixer, that integrates CMC with contrastive learning to pull together the uni-modal and multi-modal views for better instance-level alignments among different modalities. Extensive experiments on five downstream tasks show that VLMixer could surpass previous state-of-the-art unpaired VLP methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的视觉语言预训练（VLP）方法主要依赖于成对的图像文本数据集，这些数据集要么经过大量的人工标注，要么从互联网上爬取，然后采用复杂的数据清理技术。为了减少对对齐良好的图像文本对的依赖，有希望直接利用大规模纯文本和纯图像语料库。本文提出了一种数据增强方法，即跨模态 CutMix (CMC)，用于未配对 VLP 中的隐式跨模态对齐学习。具体来说，CMC 将自然句子从文本视图转换为多模态视图，其中句子中基于视觉的单词被具有相似语义的不同图像块随机替换。拟议的 CMC 有几个吸引人的特点。首先，它增强了数据多样性，同时保持语义完整，以解决对齐数据稀缺的问题；其次，通过在单模态数据上附加跨模态噪声，它引导模型学习跨模态的标记级交互，以实现更好的去噪。此外，我们提出了一种新的不成对的 VLP 方法，称为 VLMixer，它将 CMC 与对比学习相结合，将单模态和多模态视图结合在一起，以实现不同模态之间更好的实例级对齐。对五个下游任务的广泛实验表明，VLMixer 可以超越以前最先进的未配对 VLP 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对数据的视觉-语言预训练方法VLMixer，通过跨模态CutMix（CMC）技术实现单模态语料的跨模态对齐学习。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法依赖人工标注或清洗的配对数据，成本高昂且数据稀缺，需探索利用大规模单模态文本/图像语料的无配对预训练方案。
AI.method: 设计跨模态CutMix（CMC）数据增强方法：将文本中视觉相关词汇替换为语义相似图像块，结合对比学习框架VLMixer实现单模态与多模态视图的实例级对齐。
AI.result: 在五个下游任务中，VLMixer性能超越现有无配对视觉-语言预训练方法，验证了跨模态数据增强与对比学习结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过CMC增强数据多样性与跨模态噪声注入，VLMixer为无配对视觉-语言预训练提供了新范式，降低了对人工标注配对数据的依赖。

authors_text: Ilias Diakonikolas,Vasilis Kontonis,Christos Tzamos,Nikos Zarifis
title: Learning a Single Neuron with Adversarial Label Noise via Gradient Descent
title_zh: 通过梯度下降学习具有对抗性标签噪声的单个神经元
abstract: We study the fundamental problem of learning a single neuron, i.e., a function of the form $\mathbf{x}\mapstoσ(\mathbf{w}\cdot\mathbf{x})$ for monotone activations $σ:\mathbb{R}\mapsto\mathbb{R}$, with respect to the $L_2^2$-loss in the presence of adversarial label noise. Specifically, we are given labeled examples from a distribution $D$ on $(\mathbf{x}, y)\in\mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$ such that there exists $\mathbf{w}^\ast\in\mathbb{R}^d$ achieving $F(\mathbf{w}^\ast)=ε$, where $F(\mathbf{w})=\mathbf{E}_{(\mathbf{x},y)\sim D}[(σ(\mathbf{w}\cdot \mathbf{x})-y)^2]$. The goal of the learner is to output a hypothesis vector $\mathbf{w}$ such that $F(\mathbb{w})=C\, ε$ with high probability, where $C>1$ is a universal constant. As our main contribution, we give efficient constant-factor approximate learners for a broad class of distributions (including log-concave distributions) and activation functions. Concretely, for the class of isotropic log-concave distributions, we obtain the following important corollaries: For the logistic activation, we obtain the first polynomial-time constant factor approximation (even under the Gaussian distribution). Our algorithm has sample complexity $\widetilde{O}(d/ε)$, which is tight within polylogarithmic factors. For the ReLU activation, we give an efficient algorithm with sample complexity $\tilde{O}(d\, \polylog(1/ε))$. Prior to our work, the best known constant-factor approximate learner had sample complexity $\tildeΩ(d/ε)$. In both of these settings, our algorithms are simple, performing gradient-descent on the (regularized) $L_2^2$-loss. The correctness of our algorithms relies on novel structural results that we establish, showing that (essentially all) stationary points of the underlying non-convex loss are approximately optimal.

Specifically, we are given labeled examples from a distribution $D$ on $(\mathbf{x}, y)\in\mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$ such that there exists $\mathbf{w}^\ast\in\mathbb{R}^d$ achieving $F(\mathbf{w}^\ast)=ε$, where $F(\mathbf{w})=\mathbf{E}_{(\mathbf{x},y)\sim D}[(σ(\mathbf{w}\cdot \mathbf{x})-y)^2]$. Concretely, for the class of isotropic log-concave distributions, we obtain the following important corollaries: For the logistic activation, we obtain the first polynomial-time constant factor approximation (even under the Gaussian distribution). Our algorithm has sample complexity $\widetilde{O}(d/ε)$, which is tight within polylogarithmic factors. In both of these settings, our algorithms are simple, performing gradient-descent on the (regularized) $L_2^2$-loss. The correctness of our algorithms relies on novel structural results that we establish, showing that (essentially all) stationary points of the underlying non-convex loss are approximately optimal.
abstract_zh: 我们研究学习单个神经元的基本问题，即单调激活 $\mathbf{x}\mapstoσ(\mathbf{w}\cdot\mathbf{x})$ 形式的函数 $σ:\mathbb{R}\mapsto\mathbb{R}$，相对于存在对抗性标签噪声时的 $L_2^2$-损失。具体来说，我们从 $(\mathbf{x}, y)\in\mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$ 上的分布 $D$ 中获得带标签的示例，使得存在 $\mathbf{w}^\ast\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 实现 $F(\mathbf{w}^\ast)=ε$，其中$F(\mathbf{w})=\mathbf{E}_{(\mathbf{x},y)\sim D}[(σ(\mathbf{w}\cdot \mathbf{x})-y)^2]$。学习器的目标是输出一个假设向量$\mathbf{w}$，使得$F(\mathbb{w})=C\, ε$以高概率出现，其中$C>1$是通用常数。作为我们的主要贡献，我们为广泛的分布（包括对数凹分布）和激活函数提供了高效的常数因子近似学习器。具体来说，对于各向同性对数凹分布类，我们得到以下重要推论：对于逻辑激活，我们得到第一个多项式时间常数因子近似（即使在高斯分布下）。我们的算法具有样本复杂度$\widetilde{O}(d/ε)$，其在多对数因子内是严格的。对于 ReLU 激活，我们给出了一个样本复杂度为 $\tilde{O}(d\, \polylog(1/ε))$ 的高效算法。在我们的工作之前，最著名的常数因子近似学习器的样本复杂度为 $\tildeΩ(d/ε)$。在这两种设置中，我们的算法都很简单，对（正则化）$L_2^2$-loss 执行梯度下降。我们算法的正确性依赖于我们建立的新颖的结构结果，表明基础非凸损失的（基本上所有）驻点近似最优。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在对抗性标签噪声下通过梯度下降学习单个神经元的问题，提出高效算法并分析其样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 对抗性标签噪声会破坏模型训练，现有方法难以处理此类噪声下的单神经元学习问题，需设计鲁棒且高效的算法。
AI.method: 采用正则化L2²损失的梯度下降法，结合对损失函数平稳点结构的分析，证明其近似最优性。
AI.result: 对各向同性对数凹分布，提出多项式时间常数因子近似算法，样本复杂度为~O(d/ε)（逻辑激活）和~O(d polylog(1/ε))（ReLU激活），优于先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度下降与损失函数结构分析，实现了对抗噪声下单神经元学习的高效近似算法，理论界与实验结果均具重要意义。

search_text: Learning a Single Neuron with Adversarial Label Noise via Gradient Descent 通过梯度下降学习具有对抗性标签噪声的单个神经元 We study the fundamental problem of learning a single neuron, i.e., a function of the form $\mathbf{x}\mapstoσ(\mathbf{w}\cdot\mathbf{x})$ for monotone activations $σ:\mathbb{R}\mapsto\mathbb{R}$, with respect to the $L_2^2$-loss in the presence of adversarial label noise. Specifically, we are given labeled examples from a distribution $D$ on $(\mathbf{x}, y)\in\mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$ such that there exists $\mathbf{w}^\ast\in\mathbb{R}^d$ achieving $F(\mathbf{w}^\ast)=ε$, where $F(\mathbf{w})=\mathbf{E}_{(\mathbf{x},y)\sim D}[(σ(\mathbf{w}\cdot \mathbf{x})-y)^2]$. The goal of the learner is to output a hypothesis vector $\mathbf{w}$ such that $F(\mathbb{w})=C\, ε$ with high probability, where $C>1$ is a universal constant. As our main contribution, we give efficient constant-factor approximate learners for a broad class of distributions (including log-concave distributions) and activation functions. Concretely, for the class of isotropic log-concave distributions, we obtain the following important corollaries: For the logistic activation, we obtain the first polynomial-time constant factor approximation (even under the Gaussian distribution). Our algorithm has sample complexity $\widetilde{O}(d/ε)$, which is tight within polylogarithmic factors. For the ReLU activation, we give an efficient algorithm with sample complexity $\tilde{O}(d\, \polylog(1/ε))$. Prior to our work, the best known constant-factor approximate learner had sample complexity $\tildeΩ(d/ε)$. In both of these settings, our algorithms are simple, performing gradient-descent on the (regularized) $L_2^2$-loss. The correctness of our algorithms relies on novel structural results that we establish, showing that (essentially all) stationary points of the underlying non-convex loss are approximately optimal. 我们研究学习单个神经元的基本问题，即单调激活 $\mathbf{x}\mapstoσ(\mathbf{w}\cdot\mathbf{x})$ 形式的函数 $σ:\mathbb{R}\mapsto\mathbb{R}$，相对于存在对抗性标签噪声时的 $L_2^2$-损失。具体来说，我们从 $(\mathbf{x}, y)\in\mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$ 上的分布 $D$ 中获得带标签的示例，使得存在 $\mathbf{w}^\ast\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 实现 $F(\mathbf{w}^\ast)=ε$，其中$F(\mathbf{w})=\mathbf{E}_{(\mathbf{x},y)\sim D}[(σ(\mathbf{w}\cdot \mathbf{x})-y)^2]$。学习器的目标是输出一个假设向量$\mathbf{w}$，使得$F(\mathbb{w})=C\, ε$以高概率出现，其中$C>1$是通用常数。作为我们的主要贡献，我们为广泛的分布（包括对数凹分布）和激活函数提供了高效的常数因子近似学习器。具体来说，对于各向同性对数凹分布类，我们得到以下重要推论：对于逻辑激活，我们得到第一个多项式时间常数因子近似（即使在高斯分布下）。我们的算法具有样本复杂度$\widetilde{O}(d/ε)$，其在多对数因子内是严格的。对于 ReLU 激活，我们给出了一个样本复杂度为 $\tilde{O}(d\, \polylog(1/ε))$ 的高效算法。在我们的工作之前，最著名的常数因子近似学习器的样本复杂度为 $\tildeΩ(d/ε)$。在这两种设置中，我们的算法都很简单，对（正则化）$L_2^2$-loss 执行梯度下降。我们算法的正确性依赖于我们建立的新颖的结构结果，表明基础非凸损失的（基本上所有）驻点近似最优。 本文研究在对抗性标签噪声下通过梯度下降学习单个神经元的问题，提出高效算法并分析其样本复杂度。 Ilias Diakonikolas,Vasilis Kontonis,Christos Tzamos,Nikos Zarifis cs.LG,cs.DS,math.ST,stat.ML

authors_text: Jiasen Lu,Christopher Clark,Rowan Zellers,Roozbeh Mottaghi,Aniruddha Kembhavi
title: Unified-IO: A Unified Model for Vision, Language, and Multi-Modal Tasks
title_zh: Unified-IO：视觉、语言和多模态任务的统一模型
abstract: We propose Unified-IO, a model that performs a large variety of AI tasks spanning classical computer vision tasks, including pose estimation, object detection, depth estimation and image generation, vision-and-language tasks such as region captioning and referring expression, to natural language processing tasks such as question answering and paraphrasing. Developing a single unified model for such a large variety of tasks poses unique challenges due to the heterogeneous inputs and outputs pertaining to each task, including RGB images, per-pixel maps, binary masks, bounding boxes, and language. We achieve this unification by homogenizing every supported input and output into a sequence of discrete vocabulary tokens. This common representation across all tasks allows us to train a single transformer-based architecture, jointly on over 90 diverse datasets in the vision and language fields. Unified-IO is the first model capable of performing all 7 tasks on the GRIT benchmark and produces strong results across 16 diverse benchmarks like NYUv2-Depth, ImageNet, VQA2.0, OK-VQA, Swig, VizWizGround, BoolQ, and SciTail, with no task-specific fine-tuning. Code and demos for Unified-IO are available at: https://unified-io.allenai.org.
summary: We propose Unified-IO, a model that performs a large variety of AI tasks spanning classical computer vision tasks, including pose estimation, object detection, depth estimation and image generation, vision-and-language tasks such as region captioning and referring expression, to natural language processing tasks such as question answering and paraphrasing. Developing a single unified model for such a large variety of tasks poses unique challenges due to the heterogeneous inputs and outputs pertaining to each task, including RGB images, per-pixel maps, binary masks, bounding boxes, and language. We achieve this unification by homogenizing every supported input and output into a sequence of discrete vocabulary tokens. This common representation across all tasks allows us to train a single transformer-based architecture, jointly on over 90 diverse datasets in the vision and language fields. Unified-IO is the first model capable of performing all 7 tasks on the GRIT benchmark and produces strong results across 16 diverse benchmarks like NYUv2-Depth, ImageNet, VQA2.0, OK-VQA, Swig, VizWizGround, BoolQ, and SciTail, with no task-specific fine-tuning. Code and demos for Unified-IO are available at: https://unified-io.allenai.org.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Unified-IO 模型，该模型可以执行多种 AI 任务，涵盖经典计算机视觉任务，包括姿势估计、对象检测、深度估计和图像生成、区域字幕和引用表达等视觉和语言任务，以及问答和释义等自然语言处理任务。由于与每个任务相关的异构输入和输出（包括 RGB 图像、每像素图、二进制掩码、边界框和语言），为如此多种任务开发单一统一模型带来了独特的挑战。我们通过将每个支持的输入和输出同质化为一系列离散词汇标记来实现这种统一。这种跨所有任务的通用表示使我们能够在视觉和语言领域的 90 多个不同数据集上联合训练基于 Transformer 的架构。 Unified-IO 是第一个能够在 GRIT 基准上执行所有 7 项任务的模型，并在 NYUv2-Depth、ImageNet、VQA2.0、OK-VQA、Swig、VizWizGround、BoolQ 和 SciTail 等 16 个不同基准上产生了出色的结果，无需针对特定任务进行微调。 Unified-IO 的代码和演示位于：https://unified-io.allenai.org。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Unified-IO模型，通过统一表示不同任务的输入输出，实现视觉、语言及多模态任务的统一处理。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理视觉与语言任务间异构输入输出格式的多样性，需开发无需任务特定微调的通用模型。
AI.method: 将所有输入输出转换为离散词汇序列，基于Transformer架构联合训练90余个视觉与语言数据集。
AI.result: 在GRIT基准完成7项任务，在NYUv2-Depth、ImageNet、VQA2.0等16个基准中取得强效表现，无需任务微调。
AI.conclusion: Unified-IO验证了统一表示方法在多模态任务中的有效性，为通用AI模型发展提供新方向。

authors_text: Taylor L. Bobrow,Mayank Golhar,Rohan Vijayan,Venkata S. Akshintala,Juan R. Garcia,Nicholas J. Durr
title: Colonoscopy 3D Video Dataset with Paired Depth from 2D-3D Registration
title_zh: 具有 2D-3D 配准配对深度的结肠镜检查 3D 视频数据集
abstract: Screening colonoscopy is an important clinical application for several 3D computer vision techniques, including depth estimation, surface reconstruction, and missing region detection. However, the development, evaluation, and comparison of these techniques in real colonoscopy videos remain largely qualitative due to the difficulty of acquiring ground truth data. In this work, we present a Colonoscopy 3D Video Dataset (C3VD) acquired with a high definition clinical colonoscope and high-fidelity colon models for benchmarking computer vision methods in colonoscopy. We introduce a novel multimodal 2D-3D registration technique to register optical video sequences with ground truth rendered views of a known 3D model. The different modalities are registered by transforming optical images to depth maps with a Generative Adversarial Network and aligning edge features with an evolutionary optimizer. This registration method achieves an average translation error of 0.321 millimeters and an average rotation error of 0.159 degrees in simulation experiments where error-free ground truth is available. The method also leverages video information, improving registration accuracy by 55.6% for translation and 60.4% for rotation compared to single frame registration. 22 short video sequences were registered to generate 10,015 total frames with paired ground truth depth, surface normals, optical flow, occlusion, six degree-of-freedom pose, coverage maps, and 3D models. The dataset also includes screening videos acquired by a gastroenterologist with paired ground truth pose and 3D surface models. The dataset and registration source code are available at durr.jhu.edu/C3VD.

The dataset also includes screening videos acquired by a gastroenterologist with paired ground truth pose and 3D surface models. The dataset and registration source code are available at durr.jhu.edu/C3VD.
abstract_zh: 筛查结肠镜检查是多种 3D 计算机视觉技术的重要临床应用，包括深度估计、表面重建和缺失区域检测。然而，由于难以获取真实数据，这些技术在真实结肠镜检查视频中的开发、评估和比较在很大程度上仍然是定性的。在这项工作中，我们提出了通过高清临床结肠镜和高保真结肠模型获取的结肠镜检查 3D 视频数据集 (C3VD)，用于对结肠镜检查中的计算机视觉方法进行基准测试。我们引入了一种新颖的多模态 2D-3D 配准技术，将光学视频序列与已知 3D 模型的真实渲染视图配准。通过使用生成对抗网络将光学图像转换为深度图并使用进化优化器对齐边缘特征来注册不同的模态。在无误差地面实况的模拟实验中，该配准方法实现了 0.321 毫米的平均平移误差和 0.159 度的平均旋转误差。该方法还利用视频信息，与单帧配准相比，平移配准精度提高了 55.6%，旋转配准精度提高了 60.4%。注册了 22 个短视频序列，生成总共 10,015 个帧，其中包含配对的地面真实深度、表面法线、光流、遮挡、六自由度姿势、覆盖图和 3D 模型。该数据集还包括胃肠病学家获取的筛选视频以及配对的地面真实姿势和 3D 表面模型。数据集和注册源代码可在 durr.jhu.edu/C3VD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于2D-3D配准的结肠镜3D视频数据集（C3VD），包含配对的深度图和真实3D模型，用于评估计算机视觉方法。
AI.motivation: 结肠镜检查中的3D计算机视觉技术（如深度估计）缺乏真实标注数据，难以进行定量评估，需构建标准化数据集以推动算法发展。
AI.method: 通过生成对抗网络（GAN）将光学图像转换为深度图，并结合进化优化器对齐边缘特征，实现2D视频与3D模型的配准，利用视频时序信息提升精度。
AI.result: 配准误差达0.321毫米（平移）和0.159度（旋转），相比单帧注册提升55.6%和60.4%；数据集包含22段视频共10,015帧，含深度、表面法线、光流等标注数据。
AI.conclusion: C3VD数据集及配准方法为结肠镜3D视觉技术提供基准，促进算法开发与客观评估，推动临床应用研究。

search_text: Colonoscopy 3D Video Dataset with Paired Depth from 2D-3D Registration 具有 2D-3D 配准配对深度的结肠镜检查 3D 视频数据集 Screening colonoscopy is an important clinical application for several 3D computer vision techniques, including depth estimation, surface reconstruction, and missing region detection. However, the development, evaluation, and comparison of these techniques in real colonoscopy videos remain largely qualitative due to the difficulty of acquiring ground truth data. In this work, we present a Colonoscopy 3D Video Dataset (C3VD) acquired with a high definition clinical colonoscope and high-fidelity colon models for benchmarking computer vision methods in colonoscopy. We introduce a novel multimodal 2D-3D registration technique to register optical video sequences with ground truth rendered views of a known 3D model. The different modalities are registered by transforming optical images to depth maps with a Generative Adversarial Network and aligning edge features with an evolutionary optimizer. This registration method achieves an average translation error of 0.321 millimeters and an average rotation error of 0.159 degrees in simulation experiments where error-free ground truth is available. The method also leverages video information, improving registration accuracy by 55.6% for translation and 60.4% for rotation compared to single frame registration. 22 short video sequences were registered to generate 10,015 total frames with paired ground truth depth, surface normals, optical flow, occlusion, six degree-of-freedom pose, coverage maps, and 3D models. The dataset also includes screening videos acquired by a gastroenterologist with paired ground truth pose and 3D surface models. The dataset and registration source code are available at durr.jhu.edu/C3VD. 筛查结肠镜检查是多种 3D 计算机视觉技术的重要临床应用，包括深度估计、表面重建和缺失区域检测。然而，由于难以获取真实数据，这些技术在真实结肠镜检查视频中的开发、评估和比较在很大程度上仍然是定性的。在这项工作中，我们提出了通过高清临床结肠镜和高保真结肠模型获取的结肠镜检查 3D 视频数据集 (C3VD)，用于对结肠镜检查中的计算机视觉方法进行基准测试。我们引入了一种新颖的多模态 2D-3D 配准技术，将光学视频序列与已知 3D 模型的真实渲染视图配准。通过使用生成对抗网络将光学图像转换为深度图并使用进化优化器对齐边缘特征来注册不同的模态。在无误差地面实况的模拟实验中，该配准方法实现了 0.321 毫米的平均平移误差和 0.159 度的平均旋转误差。该方法还利用视频信息，与单帧配准相比，平移配准精度提高了 55.6%，旋转配准精度提高了 60.4%。注册了 22 个短视频序列，生成总共 10,015 个帧，其中包含配对的地面真实深度、表面法线、光流、遮挡、六自由度姿势、覆盖图和 3D 模型。该数据集还包括胃肠病学家获取的筛选视频以及配对的地面真实姿势和 3D 表面模型。数据集和注册源代码可在 durr.jhu.edu/C3VD 获取。 本文提出一种基于2D-3D配准的结肠镜3D视频数据集（C3VD），包含配对的深度图和真实3D模型，用于评估计算机视觉方法。 Taylor L. authors_text: Javier Antorán,David Janz,James Urquhart Allingham,Erik Daxberger,Riccardo Barbano,Eric Nalisnick,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato
title: Adapting the Linearised Laplace Model Evidence for Modern Deep Learning
title_zh: 将线性拉普拉斯模型证据应用于现代深度学习
abstract: The linearised Laplace method for estimating model uncertainty has received renewed attention in the Bayesian deep learning community. The method provides reliable error bars and admits a closed-form expression for the model evidence, allowing for scalable selection of model hyperparameters. In this work, we examine the assumptions behind this method, particularly in conjunction with model selection. We show that these interact poorly with some now-standard tools of deep learning--stochastic approximation methods and normalisation layers--and make recommendations for how to better adapt this classic method to the modern setting. We provide theoretical support for our recommendations and validate them empirically on MLPs, classic CNNs, residual networks with and without normalisation layers, generative autoencoders and transformers.
summary: The linearised Laplace method for estimating model uncertainty has received renewed attention in the Bayesian deep learning community. The method provides reliable error bars and admits a closed-form expression for the model evidence, allowing for scalable selection of model hyperparameters. In this work, we examine the assumptions behind this method, particularly in conjunction with model selection. We show that these interact poorly with some now-standard tools of deep learning--stochastic approximation methods and normalisation layers--and make recommendations for how to better adapt this classic method to the modern setting. We provide theoretical support for our recommendations and validate them empirically on MLPs, classic CNNs, residual networks with and without normalisation layers, generative autoencoders and transformers.
abstract_zh: 用于估计模型不确定性的线性拉普拉斯方法在贝叶斯深度学习社区中重新受到关注。该方法提供可靠的误差线，并接受模型证据的封闭式表达式，从而允许可扩展地选择模型超参数。在这项工作中，我们检查了该方法背后的假设，特别是与模型选择相结合。我们表明，这些方法与一些现在的深度学习标准工具（随机逼近方法和归一化层）的相互作用很差，并就如何更好地使这种经典方法适应现代环境提出了建议。我们为我们的建议提供理论支持，并在 MLP、经典 CNN、带或不带归一化层的残差网络、生成自动编码器和转换器上进行实证验证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性化拉普拉斯模型证据方法在现代深度学习中的适应性问题，并提出改进方案以解决其与当前工具的兼容性问题。
AI.motivation: 线性化拉普拉斯方法虽能提供可靠误差估计和闭式模型证据，但其假设与现代深度学习中的随机近似方法及归一化层存在冲突，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 分析方法假设与现代工具的交互问题，提出适应性改进方案，并通过理论推导与多类神经网络的实验证明有效性。
AI.result: 理论支持和实验验证表明，改进方案能提升线性化拉普拉斯方法在MLP、CNN、残差网络、自编码器及Transformer中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 发现传统方法与现代深度学习组件的冲突并提出解决方案，为贝叶斯深度学习的实用化提供了理论与实践指导。

authors_text: Guy Blanc,Jane Lange,Ali Malik,Li-Yang Tan
title: Popular decision tree algorithms are provably noise tolerant
title_zh: 流行的决策树算法已被证明具有抗噪性
comment: Proceedings of the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 39 th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
abstract: Using the framework of boosting, we prove that all impurity-based decision tree learning algorithms, including the classic ID3, C4.5, and CART, are highly noise tolerant. Our guarantees hold under the strongest noise model of nasty noise, and we provide near-matching upper and lower bounds on the allowable noise rate. We further show that these algorithms, which are simple and have long been central to everyday machine learning, enjoy provable guarantees in the noisy setting that are unmatched by existing algorithms in the theoretical literature on decision tree learning. Taken together, our results add to an ongoing line of research that seeks to place the empirical success of these practical decision tree algorithms on firm theoretical footing.
summary: Using the framework of boosting, we prove that all impurity-based decision tree learning algorithms, including the classic ID3, C4.5, and CART, are highly noise tolerant. Our guarantees hold under the strongest noise model of nasty noise, and we provide near-matching upper and lower bounds on the allowable noise rate. We further show that these algorithms, which are simple and have long been central to everyday machine learning, enjoy provable guarantees in the noisy setting that are unmatched by existing algorithms in the theoretical literature on decision tree learning. Taken together, our results add to an ongoing line of research that seeks to place the empirical success of these practical decision tree algorithms on firm theoretical footing.
abstract_zh: 使用boosting框架，我们证明了所有基于杂质的决策树学习算法，包括经典的ID3、C4.5和CART，都具有高度的噪声容忍度。我们的保证适用于令人讨厌的噪声的最强噪声模型，并且我们提供了接近匹配的允许噪声率上限和下限。我们进一步表明，这些简单且长期以来一直是日常机器学习核心的算法在噪声环境中享有可证明的保证，这是决策树学习理论文献中现有算法无法比拟的。总而言之，我们的结果丰富了正在进行的研究，旨在将这些实用决策树算法的经验成功建立在坚实的理论基础上。

AI.tldr: 本文证明经典决策树算法在强噪声环境下具有高容错性，并提供理论保证。
AI.motivation: 决策树算法虽广泛应用于实际，但其在噪声环境下的理论保证长期缺乏系统研究，需填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 基于提升框架，结合杂质度量分析，证明算法在恶意噪声模型下的噪声容忍能力，并建立噪声率的上下界。
AI.result: 证明ID3、C4.5、CART等算法在强噪声模型下仍能有效学习，且噪声容忍度达到理论最优区间，超越现有理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 经典决策树算法的理论基础得到强化，解释了其在实际应用中的鲁棒性，推动理论与实践的统一。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 经典决策树算法的理论基础得到强化，解释了其在实际应用中的鲁棒性，推动理论与实践的统一。

search_text: Popular decision tree algorithms are provably noise tolerant 流行的决策树算法已被证明具有抗噪性 Using the framework of boosting, we prove that all impurity-based decision tree learning algorithms, including the classic ID3, C4.5, and CART, are highly noise tolerant. Our guarantees hold under the strongest noise model of nasty noise, and we provide near-matching upper and lower bounds on the allowable noise rate. We further show that these algorithms, which are simple and have long been central to everyday machine learning, enjoy provable guarantees in the noisy setting that are unmatched by existing algorithms in the theoretical literature on decision tree learning. Taken together, our results add to an ongoing line of research that seeks to place the empirical success of these practical decision tree algorithms on firm theoretical footing. 使用boosting框架，我们证明了所有基于杂质的决策树学习算法，包括经典的ID3、C4.5和CART，都具有高度的噪声容忍度。我们的保证适用于令人讨厌的噪声的最强噪声模型，并且我们提供了接近匹配的允许噪声率上限和下限。我们进一步表明，这些简单且长期以来一直是日常机器学习核心的算法在噪声环境中享有可证明的保证，这是决策树学习理论文献中现有算法无法比拟的。总而言之，我们的结果丰富了正在进行的研究，旨在将这些实用决策树算法的经验成功建立在坚实的理论基础上。 本文证明经典决策树算法在强噪声环境下具有高容错性，并提供理论保证。 Guy Blanc,Jane Lange,Ali Malik,Li-Yang Tan cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Soroush Abbasi Koohpayegani,Hamed Pirsiavash
title: SimA: Simple Softmax-free Attention for Vision Transformers
title_zh: SimA：视觉变压器的简单无 Softmax 注意力机制
abstract: Recently, vision transformers have become very popular. However, deploying them in many applications is computationally expensive partly due to the Softmax layer in the attention block. We introduce a simple but effective, Softmax-free attention block, SimA, which normalizes query and key matrices with simple $\ell_1$-norm instead of using Softmax layer. Then, the attention block in SimA is a simple multiplication of three matrices, so SimA can dynamically change the ordering of the computation at the test time to achieve linear computation on the number of tokens or the number of channels. We empirically show that SimA applied to three SOTA variations of transformers, DeiT, XCiT, and CvT, results in on-par accuracy compared to the SOTA models, without any need for Softmax layer. Interestingly, changing SimA from multi-head to single-head has only a small effect on the accuracy, which simplifies the attention block further. The code is available here: https://github.com/UCDvision/sima
summary: Recently, vision transformers have become very popular. However, deploying them in many applications is computationally expensive partly due to the Softmax layer in the attention block. We introduce a simple but effective, Softmax-free attention block, SimA, which normalizes query and key matrices with simple $\ell_1$-norm instead of using Softmax layer. Then, the attention block in SimA is a simple multiplication of three matrices, so SimA can dynamically change the ordering of the computation at the test time to achieve linear computation on the number of tokens or the number of channels. We empirically show that SimA applied to three SOTA variations of transformers, DeiT, XCiT, and CvT, results in on-par accuracy compared to the SOTA models, without any need for Softmax layer. Interestingly, changing SimA from multi-head to single-head has only a small effect on the accuracy, which simplifies the attention block further. The code is available here: https://github.com/UCDvision/sima
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变形金刚变得非常流行。然而，在许多应用程序中部署它们的计算成本很高，部分原因是注意力模块中存在 Softmax 层。我们引入了一个简单但有效的、无 Softmax 的注意力块 SimA，它使用简单的 $\ell_1$-norm 来标准化查询和关键矩阵，而不是使用 Softmax 层。然后，SimA中的注意力块是三个矩阵的简单乘法，因此SimA可以在测试时动态改变计算的顺序，以实现对令牌数量或通道数量的线性计算。我们凭经验表明，SimA 应用于 Transformer 的三种 SOTA 变体 DeiT、XCiT 和 CvT，与 SOTA 模型相比，其精度达到了同等水平，并且不需要 Softmax 层。有趣的是，将 SimA 从多头更改为单头对准确性的影响很小，这进一步简化了注意力模块。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/UCDvision/sima

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimA，一种无需Softmax的简单注意力机制，用于降低视觉Transformer的计算成本，同时保持模型精度。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer因注意力模块中的Softmax层计算成本高，难以在实际应用中部署。需寻找更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 用ℓ₁范数替代Softmax，对查询和键矩阵进行归一化，简化注意力模块为三矩阵乘法，并动态调整计算顺序以实现线性复杂度。
AI.result: 在DeiT、XCiT和CvT三种先进模型上应用SimA，精度与原模型相当；单头注意力仅小幅影响精度，进一步简化结构。
AI.conclusion: SimA为视觉Transformer提供了高效且准确的注意力替代方案，无需Softmax即可实现轻量化部署。
