authors_text: Joel Lehman,Jonathan Gordon,Shawn Jain,Kamal Ndousse,Cathy Yeh,Kenneth O. Stanley
title: Evolution through Large Models
title_zh: 通过大型模型的演变
abstract: This paper pursues the insight that large language models (LLMs) trained to generate code can vastly improve the effectiveness of mutation operators applied to programs in genetic programming (GP). Because such LLMs benefit from training data that includes sequential changes and modifications, they can approximate likely changes that humans would make. To highlight the breadth of implications of such evolution through large models (ELM), in the main experiment ELM combined with MAP-Elites generates hundreds of thousands of functional examples of Python programs that output working ambulating robots in the Sodarace domain, which the original LLM had never seen in pre-training. These examples then help to bootstrap training a new conditional language model that can output the right walker for a particular terrain. The ability to bootstrap new models that can output appropriate artifacts for a given context in a domain where zero training data was previously available carries implications for open-endedness, deep learning, and reinforcement learning. These implications are explored here in depth in the hope of inspiring new directions of research now opened up by ELM.
summary: This paper pursues the insight that large language models (LLMs) trained to generate code can vastly improve the effectiveness of mutation operators applied to programs in genetic programming (GP). Because such LLMs benefit from training data that includes sequential changes and modifications, they can approximate likely changes that humans would make. To highlight the breadth of implications of such evolution through large models (ELM), in the main experiment ELM combined with MAP-Elites generates hundreds of thousands of functional examples of Python programs that output working ambulating robots in the Sodarace domain, which the original LLM had never seen in pre-training. These examples then help to bootstrap training a new conditional language model that can output the right walker for a particular terrain. The ability to bootstrap new models that can output appropriate artifacts for a given context in a domain where zero training data was previously available carries implications for open-endedness, deep learning, and reinforcement learning. These implications are explored here in depth in the hope of inspiring new directions of research now opened up by ELM.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了这样的见解：经过训练来生成代码的大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以极大地提高应用于遗传编程 (GP) 程序的变异算子的有效性。由于此类法学硕士受益于包含顺序更改和修改的训练数据，因此它们可以近似人类可能做出的更改。为了强调这种通过大型模型（ELM）进化的广泛影响，在主要实验中，ELM 与 MAP-Elites 结合生成了数十万个 Python 程序的功能示例，这些示例在 Sodarace 领域输出工作行走机器人，这是原始 LLM 在预训练中从未见过的。然后，这些示例有助于引导训练一个新的条件语言模型，该模型可以为特定地形输出正确的步行者。引导新模型的能力可以为先前可用的零训练数据的领域中的给定上下文输出适当的工件，这对开放性、深度学习和强化学习具有影响。本文深入探讨了这些含义，希望能够启发 ELM 目前开辟的新研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合大型语言模型（LLM）与遗传编程中的变异算子，生成功能性程序示例并训练新模型，以提升进化算法在无训练数据领域的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传编程的变异算子效果有限，而训练有素的LLM能模拟人类修改代码的模式，从而更高效地生成有效变异，尤其在缺乏领域数据的情况下。
AI.method: 将进化通过大型模型（ELM）与MAP-Elites算法结合，利用LLM生成大量Python程序示例，再通过这些示例训练条件语言模型以适应特定地形需求。
AI.result: 成功生成数万例可运行的机器人行走程序，并训练出可根据地形输出适配步行器的模型，验证了在零训练数据场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ELM方法为开放性演化、深度学习与强化学习提供了新研究方向，展示了生成模型在无监督领域适应中的潜力。

authors_text: Ari Heljakka,Martin Trapp,Juho Kannala,Arno Solin
title: Disentangling Model Multiplicity in Deep Learning
title_zh: 解开深度学习中的模型多重性
abstract: Model multiplicity is a well-known but poorly understood phenomenon that undermines the generalisation guarantees of machine learning models. It appears when two models with similar training-time performance differ in their predictions and real-world performance characteristics. This observed 'predictive' multiplicity (PM) also implies elusive differences in the internals of the models, their 'representational' multiplicity (RM). We introduce a conceptual and experimental setup for analysing RM by measuring activation similarity via singular vector canonical correlation analysis (SVCCA). We show that certain differences in training methods systematically result in larger RM than others and evaluate RM and PM over a finite sample as predictors for generalizability. We further correlate RM with PM measured by the variance in i.i.d. and out-of-distribution test predictions in four standard image data sets. Finally, instead of attempting to eliminate RM, we call for its systematic measurement and maximal exposure.
summary: Model multiplicity is a well-known but poorly understood phenomenon that undermines the generalisation guarantees of machine learning models. It appears when two models with similar training-time performance differ in their predictions and real-world performance characteristics. This observed 'predictive' multiplicity (PM) also implies elusive differences in the internals of the models, their 'representational' multiplicity (RM). We introduce a conceptual and experimental setup for analysing RM by measuring activation similarity via singular vector canonical correlation analysis (SVCCA). We show that certain differences in training methods systematically result in larger RM than others and evaluate RM and PM over a finite sample as predictors for generalizability. We further correlate RM with PM measured by the variance in i.i.d. and out-of-distribution test predictions in four standard image data sets. Finally, instead of attempting to eliminate RM, we call for its systematic measurement and maximal exposure.
abstract_zh: 模型多重性是一种众所周知但人们知之甚少的现象，它破坏了机器学习模型的泛化保证。当具有相似训练时间性能的两个模型的预测和实际性能特征不同时，就会出现这种情况。这种观察到的“预测”多重性（PM）也意味着模型内部难以捉摸的差异，即它们的“表征”多重性（RM）。我们引入了一种概念和实验设置，通过奇异向量典型相关分析 (SVCCA) 测量激活相似性来分析 RM。我们表明，训练方法中的某些差异会系统地导致比其他方法更大的 RM，并在有限样本上评估 RM 和 PM 作为泛化性的预测因子。我们进一步将 RM 与通过 i.i.d 的方差测量的 PM 相关联。以及四个标准图像数据集中的分布外测试预测。最后，我们不是试图消除 RM，而是呼吁对其进行系统测量和最大程度的暴露。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析深度学习中模型多重性现象，通过研究代表性多重性（RM）与预测多重性（PM）的关系，探讨其对模型泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 模型多重性导致训练表现相似的模型在实际预测和泛化能力上存在差异，这一现象影响理论分析和实际应用，但现有研究对其内在机制理解不足。
AI.method: 通过奇异向量典型相关分析（SVCCA）衡量模型激活相似性，分析不同训练方法对RM的影响，并在标准图像数据集上评估RM与PM对泛化能力的预测作用。
AI.result: 发现特定训练方法显著增加RM，RM与PM在i.i.d.和分布外测试中存在相关性，且RM可作为泛化能力的预测指标。
AI.conclusion: 应系统测量并公开RM以深入理解模型多重性，而非试图消除它，从而提升模型可靠性与理论分析深度。

search_text: Disentangling Model Multiplicity in Deep Learning 解开深度学习中的模型多重性 Model multiplicity is a well-known but poorly understood phenomenon that undermines the generalisation guarantees of machine learning models. It appears when two models with similar training-time performance differ in their predictions and real-world performance characteristics. This observed 'predictive' multiplicity (PM) also implies elusive differences in the internals of the models, their 'representational' multiplicity (RM). We introduce a conceptual and experimental setup for analysing RM by measuring activation similarity via singular vector canonical correlation analysis (SVCCA). We show that certain differences in training methods systematically result in larger RM than others and evaluate RM and PM over a finite sample as predictors for generalizability. We further correlate RM with PM measured by the variance in i.i.d. and out-of-distribution test predictions in four standard image data sets. Finally, instead of attempting to eliminate RM, we call for its systematic measurement and maximal exposure. 模型多重性是一种众所周知但人们知之甚少的现象，它破坏了机器学习模型的泛化保证。当具有相似训练时间性能的两个模型的预测和实际性能特征不同时，就会出现这种情况。这种观察到的“预测”多重性（PM）也意味着模型内部难以捉摸的差异，即它们的“表征”多重性（RM）。我们引入了一种概念和实验设置，通过奇异向量典型相关分析 (SVCCA) 测量激活相似性来分析 RM。我们表明，训练方法中的某些差异会系统地导致比其他方法更大的 RM，并在有限样本上评估 RM 和 PM 作为泛化性的预测因子。我们进一步将 RM 与通过 i.i.d 的方差测量的 PM 相关联。以及四个标准图像数据集中的分布外测试预测。最后，我们不是试图消除 RM，而是呼吁对其进行系统测量和最大程度的暴露。 本文旨在分析深度学习中模型多重性现象，通过研究代表性多重性（RM）与预测多重性（PM）的关系，探讨其对模型泛化能力的影响。 Ari Heljakka,Martin Trapp,Juho Kannala,Arno Solin cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Arthur Flajolet,Claire Bizon Monroc,Karim Beguir,Thomas Pierrot
title: Fast Population-Based Reinforcement Learning on a Single Machine
title_zh: 在单台机器上快速基于群体的强化学习
abstract: Training populations of agents has demonstrated great promise in Reinforcement Learning for stabilizing training, improving exploration and asymptotic performance, and generating a diverse set of solutions. However, population-based training is often not considered by practitioners as it is perceived to be either prohibitively slow (when implemented sequentially), or computationally expensive (if agents are trained in parallel on independent accelerators). In this work, we compare implementations and revisit previous studies to show that the judicious use of compilation and vectorization allows population-based training to be performed on a single machine with one accelerator with minimal overhead compared to training a single agent. We also show that, when provided with a few accelerators, our protocols extend to large population sizes for applications such as hyperparameter tuning. We hope that this work and the public release of our code will encourage practitioners to use population-based learning more frequently for their research and applications.
summary: Training populations of agents has demonstrated great promise in Reinforcement Learning for stabilizing training, improving exploration and asymptotic performance, and generating a diverse set of solutions. However, population-based training is often not considered by practitioners as it is perceived to be either prohibitively slow (when implemented sequentially), or computationally expensive (if agents are trained in parallel on independent accelerators). In this work, we compare implementations and revisit previous studies to show that the judicious use of compilation and vectorization allows population-based training to be performed on a single machine with one accelerator with minimal overhead compared to training a single agent. We also show that, when provided with a few accelerators, our protocols extend to large population sizes for applications such as hyperparameter tuning. We hope that this work and the public release of our code will encourage practitioners to use population-based learning more frequently for their research and applications.
abstract_zh: 训练智能体群体在强化学习中展现出了巨大的前景，可以稳定训练、提高探索和渐近性能，并生成多样化的解决方案。然而，基于人群的训练通常不被从业者考虑，因为它被认为要么非常慢（当顺序实施时），要么计算成本昂贵（如果代理在独立加速器上并行训练）。在这项工作中，我们比较了实现并重新审视了之前的研究，以表明编译和矢量化的明智使用允许在具有一个加速器的单台机器上执行基于群体的训练，与训练单个代理相比，开销最小。我们还表明，当提供一些加速器时，我们的协议可以扩展到超参数调整等应用程序的大规模群体。我们希望这项工作和我们代码的公开发布将鼓励从业者更频繁地在他们的研究和应用中使用基于人群的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在单机上高效实现基于种群的强化学习方法，通过优化编译和向量化技术降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有种群训练方法因计算成本高或速度慢而较少被采用，需解决单机环境下高效训练的问题。
AI.method: 利用编译优化和向量化技术，在单机单加速器上实现低开销种群训练，并扩展至多加速器支持大规模种群。
AI.result: 实验表明单机训练开销接近单智能体，且支持多加速器扩展，适用于超参数调优等场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过代码开源和方法验证，鼓励研究者更广泛采用基于种群的强化学习方法。

authors_text: Iain Carmichael,Andrew H. Song,Richard J. Chen,Drew F. K. Williamson,Tiffany Y. Chen,Faisal Mahmood
title: Incorporating intratumoral heterogeneity into weakly-supervised deep learning models via variance pooling
title_zh: 通过方差池将肿瘤内异质性纳入弱监督深度学习模型
abstract: Supervised learning tasks such as cancer survival prediction from gigapixel whole slide images (WSIs) are a critical challenge in computational pathology that requires modeling complex features of the tumor microenvironment. These learning tasks are often solved with deep multi-instance learning (MIL) models that do not explicitly capture intratumoral heterogeneity. We develop a novel variance pooling architecture that enables a MIL model to incorporate intratumoral heterogeneity into its predictions. Two interpretability tools based on representative patches are illustrated to probe the biological signals captured by these models. An empirical study with 4,479 gigapixel WSIs from the Cancer Genome Atlas shows that adding variance pooling onto MIL frameworks improves survival prediction performance for five cancer types.
summary: Supervised learning tasks such as cancer survival prediction from gigapixel whole slide images (WSIs) are a critical challenge in computational pathology that requires modeling complex features of the tumor microenvironment. These learning tasks are often solved with deep multi-instance learning (MIL) models that do not explicitly capture intratumoral heterogeneity. We develop a novel variance pooling architecture that enables a MIL model to incorporate intratumoral heterogeneity into its predictions. Two interpretability tools based on representative patches are illustrated to probe the biological signals captured by these models. An empirical study with 4,479 gigapixel WSIs from the Cancer Genome Atlas shows that adding variance pooling onto MIL frameworks improves survival prediction performance for five cancer types.
abstract_zh: 监督学习任务，例如从十亿像素全幻灯片图像（WSI）预测癌症生存率，是计算病理学中的一个关键挑战，需要对肿瘤微环境的复杂特征进行建模。这些学习任务通常通过深度多实例学习（MIL）模型来解决，这些模型不能明确捕获肿瘤内的异质性。我们开发了一种新颖的方差池架构，使 MIL 模型能够将肿瘤内异质性纳入其预测中。说明了两种基于代表性斑块的可解释性工具，以探测这些模型捕获的生物信号。对癌症基因组图谱中 4,479 个十亿像素 WSI 进行的实证研究表明，在 MIL 框架上添加方差池可提高五种癌症类型的生存预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过方差池化架构将肿瘤内异质性纳入弱监督深度学习模型，以改进癌症生存预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多实例学习（MIL）的模型无法有效捕捉肿瘤微环境的异质性，而这对癌症生存预测等任务至关重要。
AI.method: 开发方差池化架构以整合肿瘤异质性，并通过代表性切片工具解释模型捕获的生物信号。
AI.result: 在4,479张吉帕像素级全切片图像的实验中，方差池化显著提升了五种癌症类型的生存预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 方差池化方法通过建模肿瘤异质性，有效增强了弱监督学习模型在病理图像分析中的表现。

We develop a novel variance pooling architecture that enables a MIL model to incorporate intratumoral heterogeneity into its predictions. Two interpretability tools based on representative patches are illustrated to probe the biological signals captured by these models. An empirical study with 4,479 gigapixel WSIs from the Cancer Genome Atlas shows that adding variance pooling onto MIL frameworks improves survival prediction performance for five cancer types. 监督学习任务，例如从十亿像素全幻灯片图像（WSI）预测癌症生存率，是计算病理学中的一个关键挑战，需要对肿瘤微环境的复杂特征进行建模。这些学习任务通常通过深度多实例学习（MIL）模型来解决，这些模型不能明确捕获肿瘤内的异质性。我们开发了一种新颖的方差池架构，使 MIL 模型能够将肿瘤内异质性纳入其预测中。说明了两种基于代表性斑块的可解释性工具，以探测这些模型捕获的生物信号。对癌症基因组图谱中 4,479 个十亿像素 WSI 进行的实证研究表明，在 MIL 框架上添加方差池可提高五种癌症类型的生存预测性能。 本文提出通过方差池化架构将肿瘤内异质性纳入弱监督深度学习模型，以改进癌症生存预测。 Iain Carmichael,Andrew H. Song,Richard J. Chen,Drew F. K. Williamson,Tiffany Y. Chen,Faisal Mahmood eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ME

authors_text: Yao Mu,Shoufa Chen,Mingyu Ding,Jianyu Chen,Runjian Chen,Ping Luo
title: CtrlFormer: Learning Transferable State Representation for Visual Control via Transformer
title_zh: CtrlFormer：通过 Transformer 学习用于视觉控制的可转移状态表示
abstract: Transformer has achieved great successes in learning vision and language representation, which is general across various downstream tasks. In visual control, learning transferable state representation that can transfer between different control tasks is important to reduce the training sample size. However, porting Transformer to sample-efficient visual control remains a challenging and unsolved problem. To this end, we propose a novel Control Transformer (CtrlFormer), possessing many appealing benefits that prior arts do not have. Firstly, CtrlFormer jointly learns self-attention mechanisms between visual tokens and policy tokens among different control tasks, where multitask representation can be learned and transferred without catastrophic forgetting. Secondly, we carefully design a contrastive reinforcement learning paradigm to train CtrlFormer, enabling it to achieve high sample efficiency, which is important in control problems. For example, in the DMControl benchmark, unlike recent advanced methods that failed by producing a zero score in the "Cartpole" task after transfer learning with 100k samples, CtrlFormer can achieve a state-of-the-art score with only 100k samples while maintaining the performance of previous tasks. The code and models are released in our project homepage.
summary: Transformer has achieved great successes in learning vision and language representation, which is general across various downstream tasks. In visual control, learning transferable state representation that can transfer between different control tasks is important to reduce the training sample size. However, porting Transformer to sample-efficient visual control remains a challenging and unsolved problem. To this end, we propose a novel Control Transformer (CtrlFormer), possessing many appealing benefits that prior arts do not have. Firstly, CtrlFormer jointly learns self-attention mechanisms between visual tokens and policy tokens among different control tasks, where multitask representation can be learned and transferred without catastrophic forgetting. Secondly, we carefully design a contrastive reinforcement learning paradigm to train CtrlFormer, enabling it to achieve high sample efficiency, which is important in control problems. For example, in the DMControl benchmark, unlike recent advanced methods that failed by producing a zero score in the "Cartpole" task after transfer learning with 100k samples, CtrlFormer can achieve a state-of-the-art score with only 100k samples while maintaining the performance of previous tasks. The code and models are released in our project homepage.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在学习视觉和语言表示方面取得了巨大成功，这在各种下游任务中都是通用的。在视觉控制中，学习可以在不同控制任务之间转移的可转移状态表示对于减少训练样本大小非常重要。然而，将 Transformer 移植到样本高效的视觉控制仍然是一个具有挑战性且尚未解决的问题。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的控制变压器（CtrlFormer），它具有许多现有技术所没有的吸引人的优点。首先，CtrlFormer 联合学习不同控制任务之间的视觉标记和策略标记之间的自注意力机制，其中多任务表示可以学习和转移而不会发生灾难性遗忘。其次，我们精心设计了对比强化学习范式来训练 CtrlFormer，使其能够实现高样本效率，这在控制问题中非常重要。例如，在 DMControl 基准测试中，与最近在使用 100k 样本进行迁移学习后在“Cartpole”任务中产生零分而失败的先进方法不同，CtrlFormer 可以仅使用 100k 样本就获得最先进的分数，同时保持之前任务的性能。代码和模型已在我们的项目主页中发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CtrlFormer，一种基于Transformer的视觉控制方法，旨在学习可迁移的状态表示以减少训练样本需求。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉控制任务中，跨任务迁移学习面临样本效率低、灾难性遗忘等问题，而Transformer在视觉任务中的成功启发了其在控制领域的应用。
AI.method: 设计联合学习机制，通过视觉token与策略token间的自注意力机制实现多任务表征迁移，并引入对比强化学习框架提升样本效率。
AI.result: 在DMControl基准测试中，CtrlFormer仅用100k样本即可在Cartpole任务中达到SOTA性能，且不损失先前任务表现。
AI.conclusion: CtrlFormer通过结构创新和训练范式改进，有效解决了视觉控制中跨任务迁移的样本效率与性能保持问题。

authors_text: Rui Song,Anupama Hegde,Numan Senel,Alois Knoll,Andreas Festag
title: Edge-Aided Sensor Data Sharing in Vehicular Communication Networks
title_zh: 车辆通信网络中的边缘辅助传感器数据共享
comment: Accepted for IEEE 95th Vehicular Technology Conference (VTC2022-Spring)
comments: Accepted for IEEE 95th Vehicular Technology Conference (VTC2022-Spring)
abstract: Sensor data sharing in vehicular networks can significantly improve the range and accuracy of environmental perception for connected automated vehicles. Different concepts and schemes for dissemination and fusion of sensor data have been developed. It is common to these schemes that measurement errors of the sensors impair the perception quality and can result in road traffic accidents. Specifically, when the measurement error from the sensors (also referred as measurement noise) is unknown and time varying, the performance of the data fusion process is restricted, which represents a major challenge in the calibration of sensors. In this paper, we consider sensor data sharing and fusion in a vehicular network with both, vehicle-to-infrastructure and vehicle-to-vehicle communication. We propose a method, named Bidirectional Feedback Noise Estimation (BiFNoE), in which an edge server collects and caches sensor measurement data from vehicles. The edge estimates the noise and the targets alternately in double dynamic sliding time windows and enhances the distributed cooperative environment sensing at each vehicle with low communication costs. We evaluate the proposed algorithm and data dissemination strategy in an application scenario by simulation and show that the perception accuracy is on average improved by around 80 % with only 12 kbps uplink and 28 kbps downlink bandwidth.
summary: Sensor data sharing in vehicular networks can significantly improve the range and accuracy of environmental perception for connected automated vehicles. Different concepts and schemes for dissemination and fusion of sensor data have been developed. It is common to these schemes that measurement errors of the sensors impair the perception quality and can result in road traffic accidents. Specifically, when the measurement error from the sensors (also referred as measurement noise) is unknown and time varying, the performance of the data fusion process is restricted, which represents a major challenge in the calibration of sensors. In this paper, we consider sensor data sharing and fusion in a vehicular network with both, vehicle-to-infrastructure and vehicle-to-vehicle communication. We propose a method, named Bidirectional Feedback Noise Estimation (BiFNoE), in which an edge server collects and caches sensor measurement data from vehicles. The edge estimates the noise and the targets alternately in double dynamic sliding time windows and enhances the distributed cooperative environment sensing at each vehicle with low communication costs. We evaluate the proposed algorithm and data dissemination strategy in an application scenario by simulation and show that the perception accuracy is on average improved by around 80 % with only 12 kbps uplink and 28 kbps downlink bandwidth.
abstract_zh: 车辆网络中的传感器数据共享可以显着提高联网自动车辆环境感知的范围和准确性。已经开发了用于传感器数据的传播和融合的不同概念和方案。这些方案的共同点是传感器的测量误差会影响感知质量并可能导致道路交通事故。具体来说，当传感器的测量误差（也称为测量噪声）未知且随时间变化时，数据融合过程的性能受到限制，这代表了传感器校准的主要挑战。在本文中，我们考虑具有车辆对基础设施和车辆对车辆通信的车辆网络中的传感器数据共享和融合。我们提出了一种名为双向反馈噪声估计（BiFNoE）的方法，其中边缘服务器收集并缓存来自车辆的传感器测量数据。边缘在双动态滑动时间窗口中交替估计噪声和目标，并以较低的通信成本增强每个车辆的分布式协作环境感知。我们通过仿真评估了应用场景中所提出的算法和数据传播策略，结果表明，在仅 12 kbps 上行带宽和 28 kbps 下行带宽的情况下，感知精度平均提高了 80% 左右。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘计算的车辆网络传感器数据共享与融合方法，旨在解决传感器噪声对环境感知精度的影响问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方案难以处理未知且时变的传感器噪声，导致数据融合性能受限，存在交通安全风险，需通过边缘计算优化噪声估计与数据共享。
AI.method: 提出双向反馈噪声估计（BiFNoE）方法，利用边缘服务器在双动态滑动时间窗口中交替估计噪声与目标，实现低通信成本的分布式协同感知。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，在仅需12 kbps上行和28 kbps下行带宽的情况下，感知精度平均提升约80%。
AI.conclusion: BiFNoE通过边缘辅助的噪声估计与数据共享策略，有效提升了车辆网络的环境感知能力，为高精度自动驾驶提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Ingy ElSayed-Aly,Lu Feng
title: Logic-based Reward Shaping for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多智能体强化学习的基于逻辑的奖励塑造
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) relies heavily on exploration to learn from its environment and maximize observed rewards. Therefore, it is essential to design a reward function that guarantees optimal learning from the received experience. Previous work has combined automata and logic based reward shaping with environment assumptions to provide an automatic mechanism to synthesize the reward function based on the task. However, there is limited work on how to expand logic-based reward shaping to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). The environment will need to consider the joint state in order to keep track of other agents if the task requires cooperation, thus suffering from the curse of dimensionality with respect to the number of agents. This project explores how logic-based reward shaping for MARL can be designed for different scenarios and tasks. We present a novel method for semi-centralized logic-based MARL reward shaping that is scalable in the number of agents and evaluate it in multiple scenarios.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) relies heavily on exploration to learn from its environment and maximize observed rewards. Therefore, it is essential to design a reward function that guarantees optimal learning from the received experience. Previous work has combined automata and logic based reward shaping with environment assumptions to provide an automatic mechanism to synthesize the reward function based on the task. However, there is limited work on how to expand logic-based reward shaping to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). The environment will need to consider the joint state in order to keep track of other agents if the task requires cooperation, thus suffering from the curse of dimensionality with respect to the number of agents. This project explores how logic-based reward shaping for MARL can be designed for different scenarios and tasks. We present a novel method for semi-centralized logic-based MARL reward shaping that is scalable in the number of agents and evaluate it in multiple scenarios.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在很大程度上依赖于探索来从环境中学习并最大化观察到的奖励。因此，设计一个奖励函数来保证从收到的经验中进行最佳学习是至关重要的。先前的工作将自动机和基于逻辑的奖励塑造与环境假设相结合，以提供一种自动机制来合成基于任务的奖励函数。然而，关于如何将基于逻辑的奖励塑造扩展到多智能体强化学习（MARL）方面的工作有限。如果任务需要合作，环境将需要考虑联合状态，以便跟踪其他智能体，从而遭受智能体数量方面的维数灾难。该项目探讨了如何为不同的场景和任务设计基于逻辑的 MARL 奖励塑造。我们提出了一种基于半集中逻辑的 MARL 奖励塑造的新颖方法，该方法可在代理数量上进行扩展，并在多种场景中对其进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种适用于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的可扩展逻辑奖励塑造方法，以解决联合状态跟踪和维度灾难问题。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑奖励塑造方法难以扩展到MARL场景，因联合状态空间随智能体数量增加而指数级增长，导致学习效率低下。
AI.method: 提出半集中式逻辑奖励塑造框架，通过逻辑规则编码任务约束，结合局部观测与全局奖励信号实现跨智能体协作的奖励分配。
AI.result: 在多个协作型MARL场景中验证了方法有效性，实验表明其在保持学习效率的同时显著降低了维度灾难影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂多智能体系统的逻辑奖励设计提供了可扩展解决方案，为安全关键型协作任务的强化学习应用奠定基础。

search_text: Logic-based Reward Shaping for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 多智能体强化学习的基于逻辑的奖励塑造 Reinforcement learning (RL) relies heavily on exploration to learn from its environment and maximize observed rewards. Therefore, it is essential to design a reward function that guarantees optimal learning from the received experience. Previous work has combined automata and logic based reward shaping with environment assumptions to provide an automatic mechanism to synthesize the reward function based on the task. However, there is limited work on how to expand logic-based reward shaping to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). The environment will need to consider the joint state in order to keep track of other agents if the task requires cooperation, thus suffering from the curse of dimensionality with respect to the number of agents. This project explores how logic-based reward shaping for MARL can be designed for different scenarios and tasks. We present a novel method for semi-centralized logic-based MARL reward shaping that is scalable in the number of agents and evaluate it in multiple scenarios. 强化学习（RL）在很大程度上依赖于探索来从环境中学习并最大化观察到的奖励。因此，设计一个奖励函数来保证从收到的经验中进行最佳学习是至关重要的。先前的工作将自动机和基于逻辑的奖励塑造与环境假设相结合，以提供一种自动机制来合成基于任务的奖励函数。然而，关于如何将基于逻辑的奖励塑造扩展到多智能体强化学习（MARL）方面的工作有限。如果任务需要合作，环境将需要考虑联合状态，以便跟踪其他智能体，从而遭受智能体数量方面的维数灾难。该项目探讨了如何为不同的场景和任务设计基于逻辑的 MARL 奖励塑造。我们提出了一种基于半集中逻辑的 MARL 奖励塑造的新颖方法，该方法可在代理数量上进行扩展，并在多种场景中对其进行评估。 本文旨在设计一种适用于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的可扩展逻辑奖励塑造方法，以解决联合状态跟踪和维度灾难问题。 Ingy ElSayed-Aly,Lu Feng cs.AI,cs.FL,cs.MA

authors_text: Zelong Zeng,Fan Yang,Zheng Wang,Shin'ichi Satoh
title: Improving Generalization of Metric Learning via Listwise Self-distillation
title_zh: 通过列表自蒸馏提高度量学习的泛化
abstract: Most deep metric learning (DML) methods employ a strategy that forces all positive samples to be close in the embedding space while keeping them away from negative ones. However, such a strategy ignores the internal relationships of positive (negative) samples and often leads to overfitting, especially in the presence of hard samples and mislabeled samples. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective regularization, namely Listwise Self-Distillation (LSD), which progressively distills a model's own knowledge to adaptively assign a more appropriate distance target to each sample pair in a batch. LSD encourages smoother embeddings and information mining within positive (negative) samples as a way to mitigate overfitting and thus improve generalization. Our LSD can be directly integrated into general DML frameworks. Extensive experiments show that LSD consistently boosts the performance of various metric learning methods on multiple datasets.
summary: Most deep metric learning (DML) methods employ a strategy that forces all positive samples to be close in the embedding space while keeping them away from negative ones. However, such a strategy ignores the internal relationships of positive (negative) samples and often leads to overfitting, especially in the presence of hard samples and mislabeled samples. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective regularization, namely Listwise Self-Distillation (LSD), which progressively distills a model's own knowledge to adaptively assign a more appropriate distance target to each sample pair in a batch. LSD encourages smoother embeddings and information mining within positive (negative) samples as a way to mitigate overfitting and thus improve generalization. Our LSD can be directly integrated into general DML frameworks. Extensive experiments show that LSD consistently boosts the performance of various metric learning methods on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数深度度量学习（DML）方法采用一种策略，强制所有正样本在嵌入空间中靠近，同时使它们远离负样本。然而，这种策略忽略了正（负）样本的内部关系，常常导致过拟合，特别是在存在硬样本和错误标记样本的情况下。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的正则化，即列表自蒸馏（LSD），它逐步蒸馏模型自身的知识，以自适应地为批次中的每个样本对分配更合适的距离目标。 LSD 鼓励在正（负）样本中进行更平滑的嵌入和信息挖掘，以此作为减轻过度拟合并提高泛化能力的一种方法。我们的LSD可以直接集成到通用的DML框架中。大量实验表明，LSD 持续提高了各种度量学习方法在多个数据集上的性能。

AI.tldr: 通过列表级自蒸馏提升度量学习的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习方法忽视正/负样本内部关系，导致在存在困难样本和误标签时过拟合
AI.method: 提出列表级自蒸馏(LSD)正则化方法，通过自蒸馏动态分配样本对的适应性距离目标
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著提升各类度量学习方法的性能
AI.conclusion: LSD能有效缓解过拟合问题，提升模型泛化能力且可直接集成到通用度量学习框架中

authors_text: Ayush Gupta,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Ahmed Baza,Mert Alper,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: SwarmHawk: Self-Sustaining Multi-Agent System for Landing on a Moving Platform through an Agent Supervision
title_zh: SwarmHawk：通过代理监督登陆移动平台的自我维持多代理系统
comment: Accepted paper at IEEE International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft System (ICUAS 2022), IEEE copyright
comments: Accepted paper at IEEE International Conference on Unmanned Aircraft System (ICUAS 2022), IEEE copyright
abstract: Heterogeneous teams of mobile robots and UAVs are offering a substantial benefit in an autonomous exploration of the environment. Nevertheless, although joint exploration scenarios for such systems are widely discussed, they are still suffering from low adaptability to changes in external conditions and faults of swarm agents during the UAV docking. We propose a novel vision-based drone swarm docking system for robust landing on a moving platform when one of the agents lost its position signal. The proposed SwarmHawk system relies on vision-based detection for the mobile platform tracking and navigation of its agents. Each drone of the swarm carries an RGB camera and AprilTag3 QR-code marker on board. SwarmHawk can switch between two modes of operation, acting as a homogeneous swarm in case of global UAV localization or assigning leader drones to navigate its neighbors in case of a camera fault in one of the drones or global localization failure. Two experiments were performed to evaluate SwarmHawk's performance under the global and local localization with static and moving platforms. The experimental results revealed a sufficient accuracy in the swarm landing task on a static mobile platform (error of 4.2 cm in homogeneous formation and 1.9 cm in leader-follower formation) and on moving platform (error of 6.9 cm in homogeneous formation and 4.7 cm in leader-follower formation). Moreover, the drones showed a good landing on a platform moving along a complex trajectory (average error of 19.4 cm) in leader-follower formation. The proposed SwarmHawk technology can be potentially applied in various swarm scenarios, including complex environment exploration, inspection, and drone delivery.
summary: Heterogeneous teams of mobile robots and UAVs are offering a substantial benefit in an autonomous exploration of the environment. Nevertheless, although joint exploration scenarios for such systems are widely discussed, they are still suffering from low adaptability to changes in external conditions and faults of swarm agents during the UAV docking. We propose a novel vision-based drone swarm docking system for robust landing on a moving platform when one of the agents lost its position signal. The proposed SwarmHawk system relies on vision-based detection for the mobile platform tracking and navigation of its agents. Each drone of the swarm carries an RGB camera and AprilTag3 QR-code marker on board. SwarmHawk can switch between two modes of operation, acting as a homogeneous swarm in case of global UAV localization or assigning leader drones to navigate its neighbors in case of a camera fault in one of the drones or global localization failure. Two experiments were performed to evaluate SwarmHawk's performance under the global and local localization with static and moving platforms. The experimental results revealed a sufficient accuracy in the swarm landing task on a static mobile platform (error of 4.2 cm in homogeneous formation and 1.9 cm in leader-follower formation) and on moving platform (error of 6.9 cm in homogeneous formation and 4.7 cm in leader-follower formation). Moreover, the drones showed a good landing on a platform moving along a complex trajectory (average error of 19.4 cm) in leader-follower formation. The proposed SwarmHawk technology can be potentially applied in various swarm scenarios, including complex environment exploration, inspection, and drone delivery.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人和无人机的异构团队在环境的自主探索中提供了巨大的好处。然而，尽管此类系统的联合探索场景得到了广泛讨论，但它们仍然面临着对外部条件变化和无人机对接过程中群体代理故障的适应性较低的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的基于视觉的无人机群对接系统，当其中一个代理失去位置信号时，该系统可以在移动平台上稳健着陆。所提出的 SwarmHawk 系统依赖于基于视觉的检测来对其代理进行移动平台跟踪和导航。蜂群中的每架无人机均携带 RGB 摄像头和 AprilTag3 二维码标记。 SwarmHawk 可以在两种操作模式之间切换，在全球无人机定位的情况下充当同构群，或者在其中一架无人机出现摄像头故障或全球定位失败的情况下指派领头无人机导航其邻居。进行了两个实验来评估 SwarmHawk 在静态和移动平台的全局和局部定位下的性能。实验结果表明，在静态移动平台（均匀编队误差为4.2厘米，主从编队误差为1.9厘米）和移动平台（均匀编队误差为6.9厘米，主从编队误差为4.7厘米）上集群着陆任务具有足够的精度。此外，无人机在以主从编队的复杂轨迹（平均误差为 19.4 厘米）移动的平台上表现出良好的着陆能力。所提出的 SwarmHawk 技术可潜在应用于各种群体场景，包括复杂环境探索、检查和无人机交付。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwarmHawk的自维持多智能体系统，通过视觉检测实现无人机在移动平台上的鲁棒着陆，尤其在部分代理失去定位信号时保持适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有异构机器人和无人机系统在动态环境和代理故障下的适应性不足，导致着陆任务可靠性下降，需提升复杂场景下的自主性和容错能力。
AI.method: 基于视觉检测的多无人机编队系统，每架无人机配备RGB相机和AprilTag3二维码标记，通过切换均质编队模式或领导者-跟随者模式应对定位故障或全局定位失效。
AI.result: 静态平台着陆误差均质编队4.2cm、领导者-跟随者1.9cm；移动平台误差分别为6.9cm和4.7cm；复杂轨迹下领导者-跟随者模式平均误差19.4cm。
AI.conclusion: SwarmHawk系统验证了其在动态环境和故障场景下的有效性，未来可应用于复杂环境探测、巡检及无人机投递等场景。

ai_content_json.result: 静态平台着陆误差均质编队4.2cm、领导者-跟随者1.9cm；移动平台误差分别为6.9cm和4.7cm；复杂轨迹下领导者-跟随者模式平均误差19.4cm。
ai_content_json.conclusion: SwarmHawk系统验证了其在动态环境和故障场景下的有效性，未来可应用于复杂环境探测、巡检及无人机投递等场景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwarmHawk的自维持多智能体系统，通过视觉检测实现无人机在移动平台上的鲁棒着陆，尤其在部分代理失去定位信号时保持适应性。

search_text: SwarmHawk: Self-Sustaining Multi-Agent System for Landing on a Moving Platform through an Agent Supervision SwarmHawk：通过代理监督登陆移动平台的自我维持多代理系统 Heterogeneous teams of mobile robots and UAVs are offering a substantial benefit in an autonomous exploration of the environment. Nevertheless, although joint exploration scenarios for such systems are widely discussed, they are still suffering from low adaptability to changes in external conditions and faults of swarm agents during the UAV docking. We propose a novel vision-based drone swarm docking system for robust landing on a moving platform when one of the agents lost its position signal. The proposed SwarmHawk system relies on vision-based detection for the mobile platform tracking and navigation of its agents. Each drone of the swarm carries an RGB camera and AprilTag3 QR-code marker on board. SwarmHawk can switch between two modes of operation, acting as a homogeneous swarm in case of global UAV localization or assigning leader drones to navigate its neighbors in case of a camera fault in one of the drones or global localization failure. Two experiments were performed to evaluate SwarmHawk's performance under the global and local localization with static and moving platforms. The experimental results revealed a sufficient accuracy in the swarm landing task on a static mobile platform (error of 4.2 cm in homogeneous formation and 1.9 cm in leader-follower formation) and on moving platform (error of 6.9 cm in homogeneous formation and 4.7 cm in leader-follower formation). Moreover, the drones showed a good landing on a platform moving along a complex trajectory (average error of 19.4 cm) in leader-follower formation. The proposed SwarmHawk technology can be potentially applied in various swarm scenarios, including complex environment exploration, inspection, and drone delivery. 移动机器人和无人机的异构团队在环境的自主探索中提供了巨大的好处。然而，尽管此类系统的联合探索场景得到了广泛讨论，但它们仍然面临着对外部条件变化和无人机对接过程中群体代理故障的适应性较低的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的基于视觉的无人机群对接系统，当其中一个代理失去位置信号时，该系统可以在移动平台上稳健着陆。所提出的 SwarmHawk 系统依赖于基于视觉的检测来对其代理进行移动平台跟踪和导航。蜂群中的每架无人机均携带 RGB 摄像头和 AprilTag3 二维码标记。 SwarmHawk 可以在两种操作模式之间切换，在全球无人机定位的情况下充当同构群，或者在其中一架无人机出现摄像头故障或全球定位失败的情况下指派领头无人机导航其邻居。进行了两个实验来评估 SwarmHawk 在静态和移动平台的全局和局部定位下的性能。实验结果表明，在静态移动平台（均匀编队误差为4.2厘米，主从编队误差为1.9厘米）和移动平台（均匀编队误差为6.9厘米，主从编队误差为4.7厘米）上集群着陆任务具有足够的精度。此外，无人机在以主从编队的复杂轨迹（平均误差为 19.4 厘米）移动的平台上表现出良好的着陆能力。所提出的 SwarmHawk 技术可潜在应用于各种群体场景，包括复杂环境探索、检查和无人机交付。 本文提出了一种名为SwarmHawk的自维持多智能体系统，通过视觉检测实现无人机在移动平台上的鲁棒着陆，尤其在部分代理失去定位信号时保持适应性。 Ayush Gupta,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Ahmed Baza,Mert Alper,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO

authors_text: Siyu Wang,Jianfei Chen,Chongxuan Li,Jun Zhu,Bo Zhang
title: Fast Lossless Neural Compression with Integer-Only Discrete Flows
title_zh: 具有纯整数离散流的快速无损神经压缩
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
abstract: By applying entropy codecs with learned data distributions, neural compressors have significantly outperformed traditional codecs in terms of compression ratio. However, the high inference latency of neural networks hinders the deployment of neural compressors in practical applications. In this work, we propose Integer-only Discrete Flows (IODF), an efficient neural compressor with integer-only arithmetic. Our work is built upon integer discrete flows, which consists of invertible transformations between discrete random variables. We propose efficient invertible transformations with integer-only arithmetic based on 8-bit quantization. Our invertible transformation is equipped with learnable binary gates to remove redundant filters during inference. We deploy IODF with TensorRT on GPUs, achieving 10x inference speedup compared to the fastest existing neural compressors, while retaining the high compression rates on ImageNet32 and ImageNet64.
summary: By applying entropy codecs with learned data distributions, neural compressors have significantly outperformed traditional codecs in terms of compression ratio. However, the high inference latency of neural networks hinders the deployment of neural compressors in practical applications. In this work, we propose Integer-only Discrete Flows (IODF), an efficient neural compressor with integer-only arithmetic. Our work is built upon integer discrete flows, which consists of invertible transformations between discrete random variables. We propose efficient invertible transformations with integer-only arithmetic based on 8-bit quantization. Our invertible transformation is equipped with learnable binary gates to remove redundant filters during inference. We deploy IODF with TensorRT on GPUs, achieving 10x inference speedup compared to the fastest existing neural compressors, while retaining the high compression rates on ImageNet32 and ImageNet64.
abstract_zh: 通过应用具有学习数据分布的熵编解码器，神经压缩器在压缩比方面显着优于传统编解码器。然而，神经网络的高推理延迟阻碍了神经压缩器在实际应用中的部署。在这项工作中，我们提出了纯整数离散流（IODF），这是一种具有纯整数算术的高效神经压缩器。我们的工作建立在整数离散流的基础上，它由离散随机变量之间的可逆变换组成。我们提出了基于 8 位量化的纯整数算术的高效可逆变换。我们的可逆变换配备了可学习的二元门，可以在推理过程中删除冗余过滤器。我们在 GPU 上部署带有 TensorRT 的 IODF，与现有最快的神经压缩器相比，推理速度提高了 10 倍，同时保留了 ImageNet32 和 ImageNet64 上的高压缩率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于整数离散流的高效无损神经压缩方法IODF，通过整数运算和可学习门控机制提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经压缩器虽压缩率高，但推理延迟大，难以实际部署，需在保持压缩性能的同时提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于8位量化整数离散流设计可逆变换，引入可学习二值门控机制去除冗余计算，并通过TensorRT优化GPU部署。
AI.result: 在ImageNet32/64数据集上实现10倍于现有最快神经压缩器的推理速度，同时保持相近的高压缩率。
AI.conclusion: IODF通过整数运算与结构优化有效平衡了压缩性能与推理速度，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xin-Chun Li,Jin-Lin Tang,Shaoming Song,Bingshuai Li,Yinchuan Li,Yunfeng Shao,Le Gan,De-Chuan Zhan
title: Avoid Overfitting User Specific Information in Federated Keyword Spotting
title_zh: 避免在联合关键字识别中过度拟合用户特定信息
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) aims to discriminate a specific wake-up word from other signals precisely and efficiently for different users. Recent works utilize various deep networks to train KWS models with all users' speech data centralized without considering data privacy. Federated KWS (FedKWS) could serve as a solution without directly sharing users' data. However, the small amount of data, different user habits, and various accents could lead to fatal problems, e.g., overfitting or weight divergence. Hence, we propose several strategies to encourage the model not to overfit user-specific information in FedKWS. Specifically, we first propose an adversarial learning strategy, which updates the downloaded global model against an overfitted local model and explicitly encourages the global model to capture user-invariant information. Furthermore, we propose an adaptive local training strategy, letting clients with more training data and more uniform class distributions undertake more local update steps. Equivalently, this strategy could weaken the negative impacts of those users whose data is less qualified. Our proposed FedKWS-UI could explicitly and implicitly learn user-invariant information in FedKWS. Abundant experimental results on federated Google Speech Commands verify the effectiveness of FedKWS-UI.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) aims to discriminate a specific wake-up word from other signals precisely and efficiently for different users. Recent works utilize various deep networks to train KWS models with all users' speech data centralized without considering data privacy. Federated KWS (FedKWS) could serve as a solution without directly sharing users' data. However, the small amount of data, different user habits, and various accents could lead to fatal problems, e.g., overfitting or weight divergence. Hence, we propose several strategies to encourage the model not to overfit user-specific information in FedKWS. Specifically, we first propose an adversarial learning strategy, which updates the downloaded global model against an overfitted local model and explicitly encourages the global model to capture user-invariant information. Furthermore, we propose an adaptive local training strategy, letting clients with more training data and more uniform class distributions undertake more local update steps. Equivalently, this strategy could weaken the negative impacts of those users whose data is less qualified. Our proposed FedKWS-UI could explicitly and implicitly learn user-invariant information in FedKWS. Abundant experimental results on federated Google Speech Commands verify the effectiveness of FedKWS-UI.
abstract_zh: 关键词识别（KWS）旨在为不同用户准确有效地将特定唤醒词与其他信号区分开来。最近的工作利用各种深度网络来训练 KWS 模型，集中所有用户的语音数据，而不考虑数据隐私。联合 KWS (FedKWS) 可以作为一种解决方案，无需直接共享用户数据。然而，数据量小、用户习惯不同、口音不同可能会导致致命的问题，例如过度拟合或权重发散。因此，我们提出了几种策略来鼓励模型不要过度拟合 FedKWS 中的用户特定信息。具体来说，我们首先提出一种对抗性学习策略，该策略根据过度拟合的本地模型更新下载的全局模型，并明确鼓励全局模型捕获用户不变信息。此外，我们提出了一种自适应本地训练策略，让拥有更多训练数据和更均匀类别分布的客户进行更多本地更新步骤。同样，这一策略可以削弱那些数据不合格的用户的负面影响。我们提出的 FedKWS-UI 可以显式和隐式地学习 FedKWS 中的用户不变信息。联合 Google Speech Commands 上的大量实验结果验证了 FedKWS-UI 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedKWS-UI方法，通过对抗学习和自适应本地训练策略，在联邦关键词识别中避免模型过拟合用户特定信息。
AI.motivation: 联邦关键词识别（FedKWS）面临数据量少、用户习惯和口音差异导致的过拟合和权重分歧问题，现有方法未能有效解决用户特定信息过拟合问题。
AI.method: 提出对抗学习策略，通过更新全局模型对抗过拟合的本地模型；设计自适应本地训练策略，让数据质量更高的客户端承担更多本地更新步骤，弱化低质量数据用户的负面影响。
AI.result: 在联邦Google Speech Commands数据集上的实验验证了FedKWS-UI在减少过拟合和提升模型泛化能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FedKWS-UI通过显式和隐式学习用户不变特征，有效缓解了联邦学习中用户特定信息过拟合问题，为隐私保护的关键词识别提供了新思路。

Abundant experimental results on federated Google Speech Commands verify the effectiveness of FedKWS-UI. 关键词识别（KWS）旨在为不同用户准确有效地将特定唤醒词与其他信号区分开来。最近的工作利用各种深度网络来训练 KWS 模型，集中所有用户的语音数据，而不考虑数据隐私。联合 KWS (FedKWS) 可以作为一种解决方案，无需直接共享用户数据。然而，数据量小、用户习惯不同、口音不同可能会导致致命的问题，例如过度拟合或权重发散。因此，我们提出了几种策略来鼓励模型不要过度拟合 FedKWS 中的用户特定信息。具体来说，我们首先提出一种对抗性学习策略，该策略根据过度拟合的本地模型更新下载的全局模型，并明确鼓励全局模型捕获用户不变信息。此外，我们提出了一种自适应本地训练策略，让拥有更多训练数据和更均匀类别分布的客户进行更多本地更新步骤。同样，这一策略可以削弱那些数据不合格的用户的负面影响。我们提出的 FedKWS-UI 可以显式和隐式地学习 FedKWS 中的用户不变信息。联合 Google Speech Commands 上的大量实验结果验证了 FedKWS-UI 的有效性。 本文提出FedKWS-UI方法，通过对抗学习和自适应本地训练策略，在联邦关键词识别中避免模型过拟合用户特定信息。 Xin-Chun Li,Jin-Lin Tang,Shaoming Song,Bingshuai Li,Yinchuan Li,Yunfeng Shao,Le Gan,De-Chuan Zhan cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Linhao Qu,Xiaoyuan Luo,Shaolei Liu,Manning Wang,Zhijian Song
title: DGMIL: Distribution Guided Multiple Instance Learning for Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: DGMIL：用于整个幻灯片图像分类的分布引导多实例学习
abstract: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is widely used in analyzing histopathological Whole Slide Images (WSIs). However, existing MIL methods do not explicitly model the data distribution, and instead they only learn a bag-level or instance-level decision boundary discriminatively by training a classifier. In this paper, we propose DGMIL: a feature distribution guided deep MIL framework for WSI classification and positive patch localization. Instead of designing complex discriminative network architectures, we reveal that the inherent feature distribution of histopathological image data can serve as a very effective guide for instance classification. We propose a cluster-conditioned feature distribution modeling method and a pseudo label-based iterative feature space refinement strategy so that in the final feature space the positive and negative instances can be easily separated. Experiments on the CAMELYON16 dataset and the TCGA Lung Cancer dataset show that our method achieves new SOTA for both global classification and positive patch localization tasks.
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is widely used in analyzing histopathological Whole Slide Images (WSIs). However, existing MIL methods do not explicitly model the data distribution, and instead they only learn a bag-level or instance-level decision boundary discriminatively by training a classifier. In this paper, we propose DGMIL: a feature distribution guided deep MIL framework for WSI classification and positive patch localization. Instead of designing complex discriminative network architectures, we reveal that the inherent feature distribution of histopathological image data can serve as a very effective guide for instance classification. We propose a cluster-conditioned feature distribution modeling method and a pseudo label-based iterative feature space refinement strategy so that in the final feature space the positive and negative instances can be easily separated. Experiments on the CAMELYON16 dataset and the TCGA Lung Cancer dataset show that our method achieves new SOTA for both global classification and positive patch localization tasks.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 广泛用于分析组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI)。然而，现有的 MIL 方法并没有明确地对数据分布进行建模，而是仅通过训练分类器来有区别地学习袋级或实例级决策边界。在本文中，我们提出了 DGMIL：一种用于 WSI 分类和正补丁定位的特征分布引导的深度 MIL 框架。我们没有设计复杂的判别网络架构，而是揭示了组织病理学图像数据的固有特征分布可以作为实例分类的非常有效的指导。我们提出了一种聚类条件特征分布建模方法和一种基于伪标签的迭代特征空间细化策略，以便在最终的特征空间中可以轻松分离正例和负例。 CAMELYON16 数据集和 TCGA 肺癌数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在全局分类和正向补丁定位任务方面都实现了新的 SOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DGMIL框架，通过建模特征分布改进全切片图像分类中的多重实例学习方法，并实现阳性斑块定位。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法未显式建模数据分布，仅通过分类器学习判别边界，导致分类和定位效果受限。
AI.method: 提出聚类条件特征分布建模方法与基于伪标签的迭代特征空间优化策略，利用病理图像固有分布指导实例分类。
AI.result: 在CAMELYON16和TCGA肺癌数据集上，DGMIL在全局分类和阳性斑块定位任务中均达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 特征分布引导的MIL框架能有效提升WSI分类性能，为病理图像分析提供新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 特征分布引导的MIL框架能有效提升WSI分类性能，为病理图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Ayush Gupta,Ahmed Baza,Ekaterina Dorzhieva,Mert Alper,Mariia Makarova,Stepan Perminov,Aleksey Fedoseev,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: SwarmHive: Heterogeneous Swarm of Drones for Robust Autonomous Landing on Moving Robot
title_zh: SwarmHive：异构无人机群，用于移动机器人的稳健自主着陆
comment: Accepted paper at IEEE Vehicular Technology Conference 2022 (IEEE VTC 2022), IEEE copyright
comments: Accepted paper at IEEE Vehicular Technology Conference 2022 (IEEE VTC 2022), IEEE copyright
abstract: The paper focuses on a heterogeneous swarm of drones to achieve a dynamic landing of formation on a moving robot. This challenging task was not yet achieved by scientists. The key technology is that instead of facilitating each agent of the swarm of drones with computer vision that considerably increases the payload and shortens the flight time, we propose to install only one camera on the leader drone. The follower drones receive the commands from the leader UAV and maintain a collision-free trajectory with the artificial potential field. The experimental results revealed a high accuracy of the swarm landing on a static mobile platform (RMSE of 4.48 cm). RMSE of swarm landing on the mobile platform moving with the maximum velocities of 1.0 m/s and 1.5 m/s equals 8.76 cm and 8.98 cm, respectively. The proposed SwarmHive technology will allow the time-saving landing of the swarm for further drone recharging. This will make it possible to achieve self-sustainable operation of a multi-agent robotic system for such scenarios as rescue operations, inspection and maintenance, autonomous warehouse inventory, cargo delivery, and etc.
summary: The paper focuses on a heterogeneous swarm of drones to achieve a dynamic landing of formation on a moving robot. This challenging task was not yet achieved by scientists. The key technology is that instead of facilitating each agent of the swarm of drones with computer vision that considerably increases the payload and shortens the flight time, we propose to install only one camera on the leader drone. The follower drones receive the commands from the leader UAV and maintain a collision-free trajectory with the artificial potential field. The experimental results revealed a high accuracy of the swarm landing on a static mobile platform (RMSE of 4.48 cm). RMSE of swarm landing on the mobile platform moving with the maximum velocities of 1.0 m/s and 1.5 m/s equals 8.76 cm and 8.98 cm, respectively. The proposed SwarmHive technology will allow the time-saving landing of the swarm for further drone recharging. This will make it possible to achieve self-sustainable operation of a multi-agent robotic system for such scenarios as rescue operations, inspection and maintenance, autonomous warehouse inventory, cargo delivery, and etc.
abstract_zh: 该论文重点研究了异构无人机群，以实现在移动机器人上动态着陆编队。科学家尚未完成这项具有挑战性的任务。关键技术是，我们建议在领头无人机上仅安装一个摄像头，而不是通过计算机视觉为无人机群中的每个代理提供便利，从而大大增加有效载荷并缩短飞行时间。跟随无人机接收领航无人机的命令，并与人工势场保持无碰撞轨迹。实验结果表明，集群在静态移动平台上的着陆精度很高（RMSE为4.48厘米）。以最大速度 1.0 m/s 和 1.5 m/s 移动的移动平台上集群着陆的 RMSE 分别等于 8.76 cm 和 8.98 cm。拟议的 SwarmHive 技术将使蜂群能够节省时间着陆，以便进一步为无人机充电。这将使多智能体机器人系统在救援行动、检查和维护、自主仓库盘点、货物配送等场景中实现自我可持续运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异构无人机群系统，实现无人机在移动机器人上的自主动态着陆。
AI.motivation: 传统方法为每个无人机配备计算机视觉模块导致负载增加和续航时间缩短，本文旨在通过优化系统结构提升无人机群的自主着陆效率。
AI.method: 仅在领航无人机安装摄像头，通过领航机指挥跟随无人机，并采用人工势场法确保碰撞规避的轨迹规划。
AI.result: 静态平台着陆均方根误差为4.48厘米，移动平台（1.0m/s和1.5m/s）分别为8.76厘米和8.98厘米。
AI.conclusion: SwarmHive技术可实现高效无人机群着陆与充电，适用于救援、仓储等多智能体系统场景。

authors_text: Linxi Fan,Guanzhi Wang,Yunfan Jiang,Ajay Mandlekar,Yuncong Yang,Haoyi Zhu,Andrew Tang,De-An Huang,Yuke Zhu,Anima Anandkumar
title: MineDojo: Building Open-Ended Embodied Agents with Internet-Scale Knowledge
title_zh: MineDojo：利用互联网规模的知识构建开放式实体代理
comment: Outstanding Paper Award at NeurIPS 2022. Project website: https://minedojo.org
comments: Outstanding Paper Award at NeurIPS 2022. Project website: https://minedojo.org
abstract: Autonomous agents have made great strides in specialist domains like Atari games and Go. However, they typically learn tabula rasa in isolated environments with limited and manually conceived objectives, thus failing to generalize across a wide spectrum of tasks and capabilities. Inspired by how humans continually learn and adapt in the open world, we advocate a trinity of ingredients for building generalist agents: 1) an environment that supports a multitude of tasks and goals, 2) a large-scale database of multimodal knowledge, and 3) a flexible and scalable agent architecture. We introduce MineDojo, a new framework built on the popular Minecraft game that features a simulation suite with thousands of diverse open-ended tasks and an internet-scale knowledge base with Minecraft videos, tutorials, wiki pages, and forum discussions. Using MineDojo's data, we propose a novel agent learning algorithm that leverages large pre-trained video-language models as a learned reward function. Our agent is able to solve a variety of open-ended tasks specified in free-form language without any manually designed dense shaping reward. We open-source the simulation suite, knowledge bases, algorithm implementation, and pretrained models (https://minedojo.org) to promote research towards the goal of generally capable embodied agents.
summary: Autonomous agents have made great strides in specialist domains like Atari games and Go. However, they typically learn tabula rasa in isolated environments with limited and manually conceived objectives, thus failing to generalize across a wide spectrum of tasks and capabilities. Inspired by how humans continually learn and adapt in the open world, we advocate a trinity of ingredients for building generalist agents: 1) an environment that supports a multitude of tasks and goals, 2) a large-scale database of multimodal knowledge, and 3) a flexible and scalable agent architecture. We introduce MineDojo, a new framework built on the popular Minecraft game that features a simulation suite with thousands of diverse open-ended tasks and an internet-scale knowledge base with Minecraft videos, tutorials, wiki pages, and forum discussions. Using MineDojo's data, we propose a novel agent learning algorithm that leverages large pre-trained video-language models as a learned reward function. Our agent is able to solve a variety of open-ended tasks specified in free-form language without any manually designed dense shaping reward. We open-source the simulation suite, knowledge bases, algorithm implementation, and pretrained models (https://minedojo.org) to promote research towards the goal of generally capable embodied agents.
abstract_zh: 自治代理在雅达利游戏和围棋等专业领域取得了长足的进步。然而，他们通常在孤立的环境中学习白板，目标有限且手动构思，因此无法概括广泛的任务和能力。受人类如何在开放世界中不断学习和适应的启发，我们主张构建多面手代理的三位要素：1）支持多种任务和目标的环境，2）多模态知识的大规模数据库，以及 3）灵活且可扩展的代理架构。我们介绍 MineDojo，这是一个基于流行的 Minecraft 游戏构建的新框架，它具有一个包含数千个不同开放式任务的模拟套件，以及一个包含 Minecraft 视频、教程、维基页面和论坛讨论的互联网规模知识库。利用 MineDojo 的数据，我们提出了一种新颖的代理学习算法，该算法利用大型预训练视频语言模型作为学习奖励函数。我们的代理能够解决以自由形式语言指定的各种开放式任务，而无需任何手动设计的密集塑造奖励。我们开源模拟套件、知识库、算法实现和预训练模型 (https://minedojo.org)，以促进研究朝着普遍能力的具体代理的目标迈进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MineDojo框架，通过结合Minecraft游戏环境与互联网规模的多模态知识库，构建能够完成开放端任务的通用型智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体在特定领域（如Atari游戏）表现优异，但难以泛化到多样任务，缺乏人类持续学习和适应开放世界的能力。
AI.method: 基于Minecraft构建包含数千种任务的仿真环境，整合视频、教程等互联网知识，利用预训练视频-语言模型作为奖励函数，无需人工设计密集奖励即可学习自然语言指令任务。
AI.result: 智能体能通过自由形式语言指令完成多种开放任务，验证了框架在无需人工奖励设计下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MineDojo通过环境多样性、知识规模与灵活架构的结合，为通用型具身智能体研究提供了开源平台和新方向。

search_text: MineDojo: Building Open-Ended Embodied Agents with Internet-Scale Knowledge MineDojo：利用互联网规模的知识构建开放式实体代理 Autonomous agents have made great strides in specialist domains like Atari games and Go. However, they typically learn tabula rasa in isolated environments with limited and manually conceived objectives, thus failing to generalize across a wide spectrum of tasks and capabilities. Inspired by how humans continually learn and adapt in the open world, we advocate a trinity of ingredients for building generalist agents: 1) an environment that supports a multitude of tasks and goals, 2) a large-scale database of multimodal knowledge, and 3) a flexible and scalable agent architecture. We introduce MineDojo, a new framework built on the popular Minecraft game that features a simulation suite with thousands of diverse open-ended tasks and an internet-scale knowledge base with Minecraft videos, tutorials, wiki pages, and forum discussions. Using MineDojo's data, we propose a novel agent learning algorithm that leverages large pre-trained video-language models as a learned reward function. Our agent is able to solve a variety of open-ended tasks specified in free-form language without any manually designed dense shaping reward. We open-source the simulation suite, knowledge bases, algorithm implementation, and pretrained models (https://minedojo.org) to promote research towards the goal of generally capable embodied agents. 自治代理在雅达利游戏和围棋等专业领域取得了长足的进步。然而，他们通常在孤立的环境中学习白板，目标有限且手动构思，因此无法概括广泛的任务和能力。受人类如何在开放世界中不断学习和适应的启发，我们主张构建多面手代理的三位要素：1）支持多种任务和目标的环境，2）多模态知识的大规模数据库，以及 3）灵活且可扩展的代理架构。我们介绍 MineDojo，这是一个基于流行的 Minecraft 游戏构建的新框架，它具有一个包含数千个不同开放式任务的模拟套件，以及一个包含 Minecraft 视频、教程、维基页面和论坛讨论的互联网规模知识库。利用 MineDojo 的数据，我们提出了一种新颖的代理学习算法，该算法利用大型预训练视频语言模型作为学习奖励函数。我们的代理能够解决以自由形式语言指定的各种开放式任务，而无需任何手动设计的密集塑造奖励。我们开源模拟套件、知识库、算法实现和预训练模型 (https://minedojo.org)，以促进研究朝着普遍能力的具体代理的目标迈进。 本文提出MineDojo框架，通过结合Minecraft游戏环境与互联网规模的多模态知识库，构建能够完成开放端任务的通用型智能体。 Linxi Fan,Guanzhi Wang,Yunfan Jiang,Ajay Mandlekar,Yuncong Yang,Haoyi Zhu,Andrew Tang,De-An Huang,Yuke Zhu,Anima Anandkumar cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Dong,Xunlin Zhan,Yunchao Wei,Xiaoyong Wei,Yaowei Wang,Minlong Lu,Xiaochun Cao,Xiaodan Liang
title: Entity-Graph Enhanced Cross-Modal Pretraining for Instance-level Product Retrieval
title_zh: 用于实例级产品检索的实体图增强型跨模式预训练
abstract: Our goal in this research is to study a more realistic environment in which we can conduct weakly-supervised multi-modal instance-level product retrieval for fine-grained product categories. We first contribute the Product1M datasets, and define two real practical instance-level retrieval tasks to enable the evaluations on the price comparison and personalized recommendations. For both instance-level tasks, how to accurately pinpoint the product target mentioned in the visual-linguistic data and effectively decrease the influence of irrelevant contents is quite challenging. To address this, we exploit to train a more effective cross-modal pertaining model which is adaptively capable of incorporating key concept information from the multi-modal data, by using an entity graph whose node and edge respectively denote the entity and the similarity relation between entities. Specifically, a novel Entity-Graph Enhanced Cross-Modal Pretraining (EGE-CMP) model is proposed for instance-level commodity retrieval, that explicitly injects entity knowledge in both node-based and subgraph-based ways into the multi-modal networks via a self-supervised hybrid-stream transformer, which could reduce the confusion between different object contents, thereby effectively guiding the network to focus on entities with real semantic. Experimental results well verify the efficacy and generalizability of our EGE-CMP, outperforming several SOTA cross-modal baselines like CLIP, UNITER and CAPTURE.
summary: Our goal in this research is to study a more realistic environment in which we can conduct weakly-supervised multi-modal instance-level product retrieval for fine-grained product categories. We first contribute the Product1M datasets, and define two real practical instance-level retrieval tasks to enable the evaluations on the price comparison and personalized recommendations. For both instance-level tasks, how to accurately pinpoint the product target mentioned in the visual-linguistic data and effectively decrease the influence of irrelevant contents is quite challenging. To address this, we exploit to train a more effective cross-modal pertaining model which is adaptively capable of incorporating key concept information from the multi-modal data, by using an entity graph whose node and edge respectively denote the entity and the similarity relation between entities. Specifically, a novel Entity-Graph Enhanced Cross-Modal Pretraining (EGE-CMP) model is proposed for instance-level commodity retrieval, that explicitly injects entity knowledge in both node-based and subgraph-based ways into the multi-modal networks via a self-supervised hybrid-stream transformer, which could reduce the confusion between different object contents, thereby effectively guiding the network to focus on entities with real semantic. Experimental results well verify the efficacy and generalizability of our EGE-CMP, outperforming several SOTA cross-modal baselines like CLIP, UNITER and CAPTURE.
abstract_zh: 我们这项研究的目标是研究一个更现实的环境，在这个环境中我们可以对细粒度的产品类别进行弱监督的多模式实例级产品检索。我们首先贡献 Product1M 数据集，并定义两个真实实用的实例级检索任务，以实现价格比较和个性化推荐的评估。对于这两个实例级任务，如何准确定位视觉语言数据中提到的产品目标并有效减少不相关内容的影响是相当具有挑战性的。为了解决这个问题，我们利用实体图来训练一种更有效的跨模态相关模型，该模型能够自适应地合并来自多模态数据的关键概念信息，该实体图的节点和边分别表示实体和实体之间的相似关系。具体来说，针对实例级商品检索，提出了一种新颖的实体图增强型跨模态预训练（EGE-CMP）模型，该模型通过自监督混合流变压器将基于节点和基于子图的实体知识显式注入多模态网络，这可以减少不同对象内容之间的混淆，从而有效引导网络关注具有真实语义的实体。实验结果很好地验证了我们的 EGE-CMP 的有效性和通用性，优于 CLIP、UNITER 和 CAPTURE 等几个 SOTA 跨模态基线。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究弱监督多模态实例级产品检索的更真实环境，提出实体图增强的跨模态预训练模型以提升细粒度产品类别的检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态数据时难以准确定位产品目标并消除无关内容干扰，需通过实体知识增强模型对真实语义的聚焦能力以满足实际场景需求。
AI.method: 构建Product1M数据集并定义价格对比与个性化推荐任务，提出基于实体图的跨模态预训练模型EGE-CMP，通过节点级和子图级实体知识注入机制结合自监督混合流变压器优化多模态网络。
AI.result: 实验验证EGE-CMP在实例级商品检索任务中显著优于CLIP、UNITER等SOTA模型，证明其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 实体图增强的跨模态预训练方法能有效解决多模态数据中的语义混淆问题，为细粒度产品检索提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在研究弱监督多模态实例级产品检索的更真实环境，提出实体图增强的跨模态预训练模型以提升细粒度产品类别的检索效果。

authors_text: Sebastian P. Bayerl,Gabriel Roccabruna,Shammur Absar Chowdhury,Tommaso Ciulli,Morena Danieli,Korbinian Riedhammer,Giuseppe Riccardi
title: What can Speech and Language Tell us About the Working Alliance in Psychotherapy
title_zh: 关于心理治疗工作联盟，言语和语言可以告诉我们什么
abstract: We are interested in the problem of conversational analysis and its application to the health domain. Cognitive Behavioral Therapy is a structured approach in psychotherapy, allowing the therapist to help the patient to identify and modify the malicious thoughts, behavior, or actions. This cooperative effort can be evaluated using the Working Alliance Inventory Observer-rated Shortened - a 12 items inventory covering task, goal, and relationship - which has a relevant influence on therapeutic outcomes. In this work, we investigate the relation between this alliance inventory and the spoken conversations (sessions) between the patient and the psychotherapist. We have delivered eight weeks of e-therapy, collected their audio and video call sessions, and manually transcribed them. The spoken conversations have been annotated and evaluated with WAI ratings by professional therapists. We have investigated speech and language features and their association with WAI items. The feature types include turn dynamics, lexical entrainment, and conversational descriptors extracted from the speech and language signals. Our findings provide strong evidence that a subset of these features are strong indicators of working alliance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first and a novel study to exploit speech and language for characterising working alliance.

Our findings provide strong evidence that a subset of these features are strong indicators of working alliance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first and a novel study to exploit speech and language for characterising working alliance.
abstract_zh: 我们对对话分析问题及其在健康领域的应用感兴趣。认知行为疗法是心理治疗中的一种结构化方法，允许治疗师帮助患者识别和改变恶意的想法、行为或行动。这种合作努力可以使用工作联盟清单观察员评级缩短来评估 - 一个涵盖任务、目标和关系的 12 项清单 - 这对治疗结果有相关影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种联盟清单与患者和心理治疗师之间的口头对话（会话）之间的关系。我们已经提供了八周的电子治疗，收集了他们的音频和视频通话会话，并手动转录它们。口语对话已由专业治疗师用 WAI 评级进行注释和评估。我们研究了语音和语言特征及其与 WAI 项目的关联。特征类型包括转向动态、词汇夹带以及从语音和语言信号中提取的会话描述符。我们的研究结果提供了强有力的证据，证明这些特征的一部分是工作联盟的有力指标。据我们所知，这是第一个利用语音和语言来描述工作联盟特征的新颖研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过分析患者与心理治疗师之间的言语和语言特征，评估心理治疗中工作联盟（Working Alliance）的方法。
AI.motivation: 工作联盟是影响心理治疗效果的关键因素，但传统评估依赖人工评分。本文旨在通过客观的语音语言特征分析，为工作联盟的评估提供新方法。
AI.method: 收集8周在线治疗的音频视频会话并转录，由专业治疗师标注WAI评分，提取对话动态、词汇趋同性和语言描述符等特征进行关联分析。
AI.result: 发现部分语音语言特征（如对话节奏、词汇重叠）与工作联盟评分显著相关，首次证明此类特征可作为工作联盟的客观指标。
AI.conclusion: 语音语言分析能有效表征治疗中的工作联盟，为心理治疗效果评估提供自动化工具，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: What can Speech and Language Tell us About the Working Alliance in Psychotherapy 关于心理治疗工作联盟，言语和语言可以告诉我们什么 We are interested in the problem of conversational analysis and its application to the health domain. Cognitive Behavioral Therapy is a structured approach in psychotherapy, allowing the therapist to help the patient to identify and modify the malicious thoughts, behavior, or actions. This cooperative effort can be evaluated using the Working Alliance Inventory Observer-rated Shortened - a 12 items inventory covering task, goal, and relationship - which has a relevant influence on therapeutic outcomes. In this work, we investigate the relation between this alliance inventory and the spoken conversations (sessions) between the patient and the psychotherapist. We have delivered eight weeks of e-therapy, collected their audio and video call sessions, and manually transcribed them. The spoken conversations have been annotated and evaluated with WAI ratings by professional therapists. We have investigated speech and language features and their association with WAI items. The feature types include turn dynamics, lexical entrainment, and conversational descriptors extracted from the speech and language signals. Our findings provide strong evidence that a subset of these features are strong indicators of working alliance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first and a novel study to exploit speech and language for characterising working alliance. 我们对对话分析问题及其在健康领域的应用感兴趣。认知行为疗法是心理治疗中的一种结构化方法，允许治疗师帮助患者识别和改变恶意的想法、行为或行动。这种合作努力可以使用工作联盟清单观察员评级缩短来评估 - 一个涵盖任务、目标和关系的 12 项清单 - 这对治疗结果有相关影响。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种联盟清单与患者和心理治疗师之间的口头对话（会话）之间的关系。我们已经提供了八周的电子治疗，收集了他们的音频和视频通话会话，并手动转录它们。口语对话已由专业治疗师用 WAI 评级进行注释和评估。我们研究了语音和语言特征及其与 WAI 项目的关联。特征类型包括转向动态、词汇夹带以及从语音和语言信号中提取的会话描述符。我们的研究结果提供了强有力的证据，证明这些特征的一部分是工作联盟的有力指标。据我们所知，这是第一个利用语音和语言来描述工作联盟特征的新颖研究。 本文探讨了通过分析患者与心理治疗师之间的言语和语言特征，评估心理治疗中工作联盟（Working Alliance）的方法。 Sebastian P. authors_text: Riqiang Gao,Thomas Li,Yucheng Tang,Zhoubing Xu,Michael Kammer,Sanja L. Antic,Kim Sandler,Fabien Moldonado,Thomas A. Lasko,Bennett Landman
title: A Comparative Study of Confidence Calibration in Deep Learning: From Computer Vision to Medical Imaging
title_zh: 深度学习中置信度校准的比较研究：从计算机视觉到医学成像
abstract: Although deep learning prediction models have been successful in the discrimination of different classes, they can often suffer from poor calibration across challenging domains including healthcare. Moreover, the long-tail distribution poses great challenges in deep learning classification problems including clinical disease prediction. There are approaches proposed recently to calibrate deep prediction in computer vision, but there are no studies found to demonstrate how the representative models work in different challenging contexts. In this paper, we bridge the confidence calibration from computer vision to medical imaging with a comparative study of four high-impact calibration models. Our studies are conducted in different contexts (natural image classification and lung cancer risk estimation) including in balanced vs. imbalanced training sets and in computer vision vs. medical imaging. Our results support key findings: (1) We achieve new conclusions which are not studied under different learning contexts, e.g., combining two calibration models that both mitigate the overconfident prediction can lead to under-confident prediction, and simpler calibration models from the computer vision domain tend to be more generalizable to medical imaging. (2) We highlight the gap between general computer vision tasks and medical imaging prediction, e.g., calibration methods ideal for general computer vision tasks may in fact damage the calibration of medical imaging prediction. (3) We also reinforce previous conclusions in natural image classification settings. We believe that this study has merits to guide readers to choose calibration models and understand gaps between general computer vision and medical imaging domains.
summary: Although deep learning prediction models have been successful in the discrimination of different classes, they can often suffer from poor calibration across challenging domains including healthcare. Moreover, the long-tail distribution poses great challenges in deep learning classification problems including clinical disease prediction. There are approaches proposed recently to calibrate deep prediction in computer vision, but there are no studies found to demonstrate how the representative models work in different challenging contexts. In this paper, we bridge the confidence calibration from computer vision to medical imaging with a comparative study of four high-impact calibration models. Our studies are conducted in different contexts (natural image classification and lung cancer risk estimation) including in balanced vs. imbalanced training sets and in computer vision vs. medical imaging. Our results support key findings: (1) We achieve new conclusions which are not studied under different learning contexts, e.g., combining two calibration models that both mitigate the overconfident prediction can lead to under-confident prediction, and simpler calibration models from the computer vision domain tend to be more generalizable to medical imaging. (2) We highlight the gap between general computer vision tasks and medical imaging prediction, e.g., calibration methods ideal for general computer vision tasks may in fact damage the calibration of medical imaging prediction. (3) We also reinforce previous conclusions in natural image classification settings. We believe that this study has merits to guide readers to choose calibration models and understand gaps between general computer vision and medical imaging domains.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习预测模型在区分不同类别方面取得了成功，但在医疗保健等具有挑战性的领域中，它们常常会受到校准不良的影响。此外，长尾分布对包括临床疾病预测在内的深度学习分类问题提出了巨大的挑战。最近提出了一些方法来校准计算机视觉中的深度预测，但没有研究表明代表性模型如何在不同的挑战性环境中工作。在本文中，我们通过对四种高影响力校准模型的比较研究，将置信度校准从计算机视觉与医学成像联系起来。我们的研究是在不同的背景下进行的（自然图像分类和肺癌风险估计），包括平衡与不平衡训练集以及计算机视觉与医学成像。我们的结果支持了关键发现：（1）我们得到了在不同学习背景下没有研究过的新结论，例如，组合两个都可以减轻过度自信预测的校准模型可能导致信心不足的预测，并且来自计算机视觉领域的更简单的校准模型往往更适用于医学成像。 （2）我们强调了一般计算机视觉任务和医学成像预测之间的差距，例如，适用于一般计算机视觉任务的理想校准方法实际上可能会损害医学成像预测的校准。 (3)我们还强化了先前在自然图像分类设置中的结论。我们相信这项研究有利于指导读者选择校准模型并了解通用计算机视觉和医学成像领域之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较四种高影响力的校准模型，研究深度学习中置信度校准从计算机视觉到医学影像的迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型在分类任务中表现优异，但其在医疗等挑战性领域的校准能力不足，且长尾分布加剧了问题，现有研究缺乏跨领域校准方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 在自然图像分类和肺癌风险预测场景中，对比四种校准模型在平衡与不平衡数据集、计算机视觉与医学影像任务中的表现。
AI.result: 发现组合两种缓解过度自信的模型可能导致欠自信，简单计算机视觉校准模型更易泛化至医学影像；通用视觉任务的校准方法可能损害医学影像预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了通用视觉任务与医学影像预测间的校准差距，为模型选择提供指导，并强调跨领域适应性研究的重要性。

authors_text: Michal Golovanevsky,Carsten Eickhoff,Ritambhara Singh
title: Multimodal Attention-based Deep Learning for Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis
title_zh: 基于多模态注意力的深度学习用于阿尔茨海默病诊断
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common neurodegenerative disorder with one of the most complex pathogeneses, making effective and clinically actionable decision support difficult. The objective of this study was to develop a novel multimodal deep learning framework to aid medical professionals in AD diagnosis. We present a Multimodal Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis framework (MADDi) to accurately detect the presence of AD and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) from imaging, genetic, and clinical data. MADDi is novel in that we use cross-modal attention, which captures interactions between modalities - a method not previously explored in this domain. We perform multi-class classification, a challenging task considering the strong similarities between MCI and AD. We compare with previous state-of-the-art models, evaluate the importance of attention, and examine the contribution of each modality to the model's performance. MADDi classifies MCI, AD, and controls with 96.88% accuracy on a held-out test set. When examining the contribution of different attention schemes, we found that the combination of cross-modal attention with self-attention performed the best, and no attention layers in the model performed the worst, with a 7.9% difference in F1-Scores. Our experiments underlined the importance of structured clinical data to help machine learning models contextualize and interpret the remaining modalities. Extensive ablation studies showed that any multimodal mixture of input features without access to structured clinical information suffered marked performance losses. This study demonstrates the merit of combining multiple input modalities via cross-modal attention to deliver highly accurate AD diagnostic decision support.
summary: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common neurodegenerative disorder with one of the most complex pathogeneses, making effective and clinically actionable decision support difficult. The objective of this study was to develop a novel multimodal deep learning framework to aid medical professionals in AD diagnosis. We present a Multimodal Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis framework (MADDi) to accurately detect the presence of AD and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) from imaging, genetic, and clinical data. MADDi is novel in that we use cross-modal attention, which captures interactions between modalities - a method not previously explored in this domain. We perform multi-class classification, a challenging task considering the strong similarities between MCI and AD. We compare with previous state-of-the-art models, evaluate the importance of attention, and examine the contribution of each modality to the model's performance. MADDi classifies MCI, AD, and controls with 96.88% accuracy on a held-out test set. When examining the contribution of different attention schemes, we found that the combination of cross-modal attention with self-attention performed the best, and no attention layers in the model performed the worst, with a 7.9% difference in F1-Scores. Our experiments underlined the importance of structured clinical data to help machine learning models contextualize and interpret the remaining modalities. Extensive ablation studies showed that any multimodal mixture of input features without access to structured clinical information suffered marked performance losses. This study demonstrates the merit of combining multiple input modalities via cross-modal attention to deliver highly accurate AD diagnostic decision support.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 是最常见的神经退行性疾病，也是最复杂的发病机制之一，因此难以提供有效且临床可操作的决策支持。本研究的目的是开发一种新颖的多模式深度学习框架，以帮助医疗专业人员进行 AD 诊断。我们提出了多模式阿尔茨海默病诊断框架 (MADDi)，可根据影像、遗传和临床数据准确检测 AD 和轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 的存在。 MADDi 的新颖之处在于我们使用跨模态注意力，它捕获模态之间的交互 ​​- 这是该领域之前未探索过的方法。考虑到 MCI 和 AD 之间的强烈相似性，我们执行多类分类，这是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们与以前最先进的模型进行比较，评估注意力的重要性，并检查每种模式对模型性能的贡献。 MADDi 在保留的测试集上以 96.88% 的准确度对 MCI、AD 和控件进行分类。在检查不同注意力方案的贡献时，我们发现跨模态注意力与自注意力的组合表现最好，模型中无注意力层表现最差，F1-Scores 相差 7.9%。我们的实验强调了结构化临床数据对于帮助机器学习模型情境化和解释其余模式的重要性。广泛的消融研究表明，任何无法访问结构化临床信息的输入特征的多模态混合都会遭受显着的性能损失。这项研究证明了通过跨模式注意力组合多种输入模式以提供高度准确的 AD 诊断决策支持的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态注意力机制的深度学习框架MADDi，用于从影像、基因和临床数据中准确诊断阿尔茨海默病（AD）和轻度认知障碍（MCI）。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的病理机制复杂，现有诊断方法难以有效整合多模态数据。本文旨在开发一种新型多模态深度学习框架，通过跨模态注意力机制提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 构建MADDi框架，结合跨模态注意力与自注意力机制，对影像、基因和临床数据进行多分类任务。通过消融实验验证注意力机制有效性，并对比其他模型性能。
AI.result: 在测试集上实现96.88%的分类准确率，跨模态与自注意力组合表现最佳，无注意力机制时F1分数下降7.9%。实验表明结构化临床数据对模型性能至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态注意力机制能有效融合多模态数据，显著提升AD诊断准确性，且结构化临床数据对模型性能具有关键作用。
