search_text: Multimodal Attention-based Deep Learning for Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis 基于多模态注意力的深度学习用于阿尔茨海默病诊断 Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common neurodegenerative disorder with one of the most complex pathogeneses, making effective and clinically actionable decision support difficult. The objective of this study was to develop a novel multimodal deep learning framework to aid medical professionals in AD diagnosis. We present a Multimodal Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis framework (MADDi) to accurately detect the presence of AD and mild cognitive impairment (MCI) from imaging, genetic, and clinical data. MADDi is novel in that we use cross-modal attention, which captures interactions between modalities - a method not previously explored in this domain. We perform multi-class classification, a challenging task considering the strong similarities between MCI and AD. We compare with previous state-of-the-art models, evaluate the importance of attention, and examine the contribution of each modality to the model's performance. MADDi classifies MCI, AD, and controls with 96.88% accuracy on a held-out test set. When examining the contribution of different attention schemes, we found that the combination of cross-modal attention with self-attention performed the best, and no attention layers in the model performed the worst, with a 7.9% difference in F1-Scores. Our experiments underlined the importance of structured clinical data to help machine learning models contextualize and interpret the remaining modalities. Extensive ablation studies showed that any multimodal mixture of input features without access to structured clinical information suffered marked performance losses. This study demonstrates the merit of combining multiple input modalities via cross-modal attention to deliver highly accurate AD diagnostic decision support. 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 是最常见的神经退行性疾病，也是最复杂的发病机制之一，因此难以提供有效且临床可操作的决策支持。本研究的目的是开发一种新颖的多模式深度学习框架，以帮助医疗专业人员进行 AD 诊断。我们提出了多模式阿尔茨海默病诊断框架 (MADDi)，可根据影像、遗传和临床数据准确检测 AD 和轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 的存在。 MADDi 的新颖之处在于我们使用跨模态注意力，它捕获模态之间的交互 ​​- 这是该领域之前未探索过的方法。考虑到 MCI 和 AD 之间的强烈相似性，我们执行多类分类，这是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们与以前最先进的模型进行比较，评估注意力的重要性，并检查每种模式对模型性能的贡献。 MADDi 在保留的测试集上以 96.88% 的准确度对 MCI、AD 和控件进行分类。在检查不同注意力方案的贡献时，我们发现跨模态注意力与自注意力的组合表现最好，模型中无注意力层表现最差，F1-Scores 相差 7.9%。我们的实验强调了结构化临床数据对于帮助机器学习模型情境化和解释其余模式的重要性。广泛的消融研究表明，任何无法访问结构化临床信息的输入特征的多模态混合都会遭受显着的性能损失。这项研究证明了通过跨模式注意力组合多种输入模式以提供高度准确的 AD 诊断决策支持的优点。 本文提出一种基于多模态注意力机制的深度学习框架MADDi，用于从影像、基因和临床数据中准确诊断阿尔茨海默病（AD）和轻度认知障碍（MCI）。 Michal Golovanevsky,Carsten Eickhoff,Ritambhara Singh cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xavier Allamigeon,Daniel Dadush,Georg Loho,Bento Natura,László A. Végh
title: Interior point methods are not worse than Simplex
title_zh: 内点法并不比单纯形法差
abstract: We develop a new `subspace layered least squares' interior point method (IPM) for solving linear programs. Applied to an $n$-variable linear program in standard form, the iteration complexity of our IPM is up to an $O(n^{1.5} \log n)$ factor upper bounded by the \emph{straight line complexity} (SLC) of the linear program. This term refers to the minimum number of segments of any piecewise linear curve that traverses the \emph{wide neighborhood} of the central path, a lower bound on the iteration complexity of any IPM that follows a piecewise linear trajectory along a path induced by a self-concordant barrier. In particular, our algorithm matches the number of iterations of any such IPM up to the same factor $O(n^{1.5}\log n)$. As our second contribution, we show that the SLC of any linear program is upper bounded by $2^{n + o(1)}$, which implies that our IPM's iteration complexity is at most exponential. This in contrast to existing iteration complexity bounds that depend on either bit-complexity or condition measures; these can be unbounded in the problem dimension. We achieve our upper bound by showing that the central path is well-approximated by a combinatorial proxy we call the \emph{max central path}, which consists of $2n$ shadow vertex simplex paths. Our upper bound complements the lower bounds of Allamigeon, Benchimol, Gaubert, and Joswig (SIAGA 2018), and Allamigeon, Gaubert, and Vandame (STOC 2022), who constructed linear programs with exponential SLC. Finally, we show that each iteration of our IPM can be implemented in strongly polynomial time. Along the way, we develop a deterministic algorithm that approximates the singular value decomposition of a matrix in strongly polynomial time to high accuracy, which may be of independent interest.
summary: We develop a new `subspace layered least squares' interior point method (IPM) for solving linear programs. Applied to an $n$-variable linear program in standard form, the iteration complexity of our IPM is up to an $O(n^{1.5} \log n)$ factor upper bounded by the \emph{straight line complexity} (SLC) of the linear program. This term refers to the minimum number of segments of any piecewise linear curve that traverses the \emph{wide neighborhood} of the central path, a lower bound on the iteration complexity of any IPM that follows a piecewise linear trajectory along a path induced by a self-concordant barrier. In particular, our algorithm matches the number of iterations of any such IPM up to the same factor $O(n^{1.5}\log n)$. As our second contribution, we show that the SLC of any linear program is upper bounded by $2^{n + o(1)}$, which implies that our IPM's iteration complexity is at most exponential. This in contrast to existing iteration complexity bounds that depend on either bit-complexity or condition measures; these can be unbounded in the problem dimension. We achieve our upper bound by showing that the central path is well-approximated by a combinatorial proxy we call the \emph{max central path}, which consists of $2n$ shadow vertex simplex paths. Our upper bound complements the lower bounds of Allamigeon, Benchimol, Gaubert, and Joswig (SIAGA 2018), and Allamigeon, Gaubert, and Vandame (STOC 2022), who constructed linear programs with exponential SLC. Finally, we show that each iteration of our IPM can be implemented in strongly polynomial time. Along the way, we develop a deterministic algorithm that approximates the singular value decomposition of a matrix in strongly polynomial time to high accuracy, which may be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种新的“子空间分层最小二乘法”内点法（IPM）来求解线性规划。应用于标准形式的 $n$ 变量线性程序时，我们的 IPM 的迭代复杂度高达 $O(n^{1.5} \log n)$ 因子，上限由线性程序的 \emph{直线复杂度} (SLC) 决定。该术语指的是穿过中心路径的\emph{宽邻域}的任何分段线性曲线的最小线段数，是沿着自和谐障碍引起的路径遵循分段线性轨迹的任何IPM的迭代复杂度的下限。特别是，我们的算法将任何此类 IPM 的迭代次数匹配到相同的因子 $O(n^{1.5}\log n)$。作为我们的第二个贡献，我们证明任何线性程序的 SLC 上限都是 $2^{n + o(1)}$，这意味着我们的 IPM 的迭代复杂度最多是指数级的。这与现有的取决于位复杂度或条件测量的迭代复杂度界限形成对比；这些在问题维度上可以是无限的。我们通过证明中心路径可以通过我们称为 \emph{最大中心路径} 的组合代理很好地逼近来实现上限，该组合代理由 $2n$ 阴影顶点单纯形路径组成。我们的上限补充了 Allamigeon、Benchimol、Gaubert 和 Joswig (SIAGA 2018) 以及 Allamigeon、Gaubert 和 Vandame (STOC 2022) 的下限，他们使用指数 SLC 构建了线性程序。最后，我们证明了 IPM 的每次迭代都可以在强多项式时间内实现。在此过程中，我们开发了一种确定性算法，可以在强多项式时间内以高精度逼近矩阵的奇异值分解，这可能是独立的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型内点法（IPM），通过子空间分层最小二乘方法解决线性规划问题，并分析其迭代复杂度与直线复杂度（SLC）的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有内点法的迭代复杂度依赖于位复杂度或条件度量，这些指标可能随问题维度无界增长，而单纯形法的复杂度分析更直观。本文旨在证明内点法的复杂度可与单纯形法媲美。
AI.method: 开发了子空间分层最小二乘内点法，通过构造‘最大中心路径’（由2n个影子顶点单纯形路径组成）逼近中心路径，并证明其迭代复杂度受SLC上界约束。
AI.result: 算法迭代复杂度至多为指数级（2^{n+o(1)}），优于依赖位复杂度的现有结果；每轮迭代可在强多项式时间内实现，并提出一种高精度的矩阵奇异值分解近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 内点法的迭代复杂度与单纯形法相当，且通过SLC框架提供了新的理论分析工具，为优化算法设计提供了新思路。

Our upper bound complements the lower bounds of Allamigeon, Benchimol, Gaubert, and Joswig (SIAGA 2018), and Allamigeon, Gaubert, and Vandame (STOC 2022), who constructed linear programs with exponential SLC. Finally, we show that each iteration of our IPM can be implemented in strongly polynomial time. Along the way, we develop a deterministic algorithm that approximates the singular value decomposition of a matrix in strongly polynomial time to high accuracy, which may be of independent interest. 我们开发了一种新的“子空间分层最小二乘法”内点法（IPM）来求解线性规划。应用于标准形式的 $n$ 变量线性程序时，我们的 IPM 的迭代复杂度高达 $O(n^{1.5} \log n)$ 因子，上限由线性程序的 \emph{直线复杂度} (SLC) 决定。该术语指的是穿过中心路径的\emph{宽邻域}的任何分段线性曲线的最小线段数，是沿着自和谐障碍引起的路径遵循分段线性轨迹的任何IPM的迭代复杂度的下限。特别是，我们的算法将任何此类 IPM 的迭代次数匹配到相同的因子 $O(n^{1.5}\log n)$。作为我们的第二个贡献，我们证明任何线性程序的 SLC 上限都是 $2^{n + o(1)}$，这意味着我们的 IPM 的迭代复杂度最多是指数级的。这与现有的取决于位复杂度或条件测量的迭代复杂度界限形成对比；这些在问题维度上可以是无限的。我们通过证明中心路径可以通过我们称为 \emph{最大中心路径} 的组合代理很好地逼近来实现上限，该组合代理由 $2n$ 阴影顶点单纯形路径组成。我们的上限补充了 Allamigeon、Benchimol、Gaubert 和 Joswig (SIAGA 2018) 以及 Allamigeon、Gaubert 和 Vandame (STOC 2022) 的下限，他们使用指数 SLC 构建了线性程序。最后，我们证明了 IPM 的每次迭代都可以在强多项式时间内实现。在此过程中，我们开发了一种确定性算法，可以在强多项式时间内以高精度逼近矩阵的奇异值分解，这可能是独立的兴趣。 本文提出一种新型内点法（IPM），通过子空间分层最小二乘方法解决线性规划问题，并分析其迭代复杂度与直线复杂度（SLC）的关系。 Xavier Allamigeon,Daniel Dadush,Georg Loho,Bento Natura,László A. Végh math.OC,cs.DS

authors_text: Hongyu Hu,Qi Wang,Zhengguang Zhang,Zhengyi Li,Zhenhai Gao
title: Holistic Transformer: A Joint Neural Network for Trajectory Prediction and Decision-Making of Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: Holistic Transformer：用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测和决策的联合神经网络
abstract: Trajectory prediction and behavioral decision-making are two important tasks for autonomous vehicles that require good understanding of the environmental context; behavioral decisions are better made by referring to the outputs of trajectory predictions. However, most current solutions perform these two tasks separately. Therefore, a joint neural network that combines multiple cues is proposed and named as the holistic transformer to predict trajectories and make behavioral decisions simultaneously. To better explore the intrinsic relationships between cues, the network uses existing knowledge and adopts three kinds of attention mechanisms: the sparse multi-head type for reducing noise impact, feature selection sparse type for optimally using partial prior knowledge, and multi-head with sigmoid activation type for optimally using posteriori knowledge. Compared with other trajectory prediction models, the proposed model has better comprehensive performance and good interpretability. Perceptual noise robustness experiments demonstrate that the proposed model has good noise robustness. Thus, simultaneous trajectory prediction and behavioral decision-making combining multiple cues can reduce computational costs and enhance semantic relationships between scenes and agents.
summary: Trajectory prediction and behavioral decision-making are two important tasks for autonomous vehicles that require good understanding of the environmental context; behavioral decisions are better made by referring to the outputs of trajectory predictions. However, most current solutions perform these two tasks separately. Therefore, a joint neural network that combines multiple cues is proposed and named as the holistic transformer to predict trajectories and make behavioral decisions simultaneously. To better explore the intrinsic relationships between cues, the network uses existing knowledge and adopts three kinds of attention mechanisms: the sparse multi-head type for reducing noise impact, feature selection sparse type for optimally using partial prior knowledge, and multi-head with sigmoid activation type for optimally using posteriori knowledge. Compared with other trajectory prediction models, the proposed model has better comprehensive performance and good interpretability. Perceptual noise robustness experiments demonstrate that the proposed model has good noise robustness. Thus, simultaneous trajectory prediction and behavioral decision-making combining multiple cues can reduce computational costs and enhance semantic relationships between scenes and agents.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测和行为决策是自动驾驶汽车的两项重要任务，需要充分了解环境背景；通过参考轨迹预测的输出可以更好地做出行为决策。然而，大多数当前的解决方案分别执行这两项任务。因此，提出了一种结合多个线索的联合神经网络，并将其命名为整体变压器，以同时预测轨迹并做出行为决策。为了更好地探索线索之间的内在关系，网络利用现有知识并采用三种注意机制：用于减少噪声影响的稀疏多头类型、用于最优使用部分先验知识的特征选择稀疏类型、以及用于最优使用后验知识的具有 sigmoid 激活类型的多头。与其他轨迹预测模型相比，该模型具有更好的综合性能和良好的可解释性。感知噪声鲁棒性实验表明，所提出的模型具有良好的噪声鲁棒性。因此，结合多个线索的同步轨迹预测和行为决策可以降低计算成本并增强场景和代理之间的语义关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合神经网络Holistic Transformer，用于自动驾驶车辆的轨迹预测与决策制定，通过整合多模态信息提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将轨迹预测与决策制定分离，难以有效利用多模态信息并建立任务间的语义关联，导致效率低下且鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计包含三种注意力机制的Holistic Transformer：稀疏多头注意力减少噪声干扰，特征选择稀疏机制优化先验知识利用，多头sigmoid激活机制增强后验知识整合。
AI.result: 模型在综合性能和可解释性上优于现有轨迹预测方法，噪声鲁棒性实验验证其稳定性，同时降低计算成本并增强场景-代理语义关联。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模轨迹预测与决策可提升自动驾驶系统的效率与鲁棒性，所提方法为多任务协同学习提供了有效框架。

However, most current solutions perform these two tasks separately. Therefore, a joint neural network that combines multiple cues is proposed and named as the holistic transformer to predict trajectories and make behavioral decisions simultaneously. Compared with other trajectory prediction models, the proposed model has better comprehensive performance and good interpretability. Perceptual noise robustness experiments demonstrate that the proposed model has good noise robustness. Thus, simultaneous trajectory prediction and behavioral decision-making combining multiple cues can reduce computational costs and enhance semantic relationships between scenes and agents. 轨迹预测和行为决策是自动驾驶汽车的两项重要任务，需要充分了解环境背景；通过参考轨迹预测的输出可以更好地做出行为决策。然而，大多数当前的解决方案分别执行这两项任务。因此，提出了一种结合多个线索的联合神经网络，并将其命名为整体变压器，以同时预测轨迹并做出行为决策。为了更好地探索线索之间的内在关系，网络利用现有知识并采用三种注意机制：用于减少噪声影响的稀疏多头类型、用于最优使用部分先验知识的特征选择稀疏类型、以及用于最优使用后验知识的具有 sigmoid 激活类型的多头。与其他轨迹预测模型相比，该模型具有更好的综合性能和良好的可解释性。感知噪声鲁棒性实验表明，所提出的模型具有良好的噪声鲁棒性。因此，结合多个线索的同步轨迹预测和行为决策可以降低计算成本并增强场景和代理之间的语义关系。 本文提出一种联合神经网络Holistic Transformer，用于自动驾驶车辆的轨迹预测与决策制定，通过整合多模态信息提升性能。 Hongyu Hu,Qi Wang,Zhengguang Zhang,Zhengyi Li,Zhenhai Gao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Hongxin Wei,Lue Tao,Renchunzi Xie,Lei Feng,Bo An
title: Open-Sampling: Exploring Out-of-Distribution data for Re-balancing Long-tailed datasets
title_zh: 开放采样：探索分布外数据以重新平衡长尾数据集
abstract: Deep neural networks usually perform poorly when the training dataset suffers from extreme class imbalance. Recent studies found that directly training with out-of-distribution data (i.e., open-set samples) in a semi-supervised manner would harm the generalization performance. In this work, we theoretically show that out-of-distribution data can still be leveraged to augment the minority classes from a Bayesian perspective. Based on this motivation, we propose a novel method called Open-sampling, which utilizes open-set noisy labels to re-balance the class priors of the training dataset. For each open-set instance, the label is sampled from our pre-defined distribution that is complementary to the distribution of original class priors. We empirically show that Open-sampling not only re-balances the class priors but also encourages the neural network to learn separable representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms existing data re-balancing methods and can boost the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep neural networks usually perform poorly when the training dataset suffers from extreme class imbalance. Recent studies found that directly training with out-of-distribution data (i.e., open-set samples) in a semi-supervised manner would harm the generalization performance. In this work, we theoretically show that out-of-distribution data can still be leveraged to augment the minority classes from a Bayesian perspective. Based on this motivation, we propose a novel method called Open-sampling, which utilizes open-set noisy labels to re-balance the class priors of the training dataset. For each open-set instance, the label is sampled from our pre-defined distribution that is complementary to the distribution of original class priors. We empirically show that Open-sampling not only re-balances the class priors but also encourages the neural network to learn separable representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly outperforms existing data re-balancing methods and can boost the performance of existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 当训练数据集遭受极端的类别不平衡时，深度神经网络通常表现不佳。最近的研究发现，以半监督方式直接使用分布外数据（即开放集样本）进行训练会损害泛化性能。在这项工作中，我们从理论上证明，从贝叶斯角度来看，分布外数据仍然可以用来增强少数类别。基于这个动机，我们提出了一种称为开放采样的新方法，它利用开放集噪声标签来重新平衡训练数据集的类先验。对于每个开放集实例，标签是​​从我们预定义的分布中采样的，该分布与原始类先验的分布互补。我们凭经验表明，开放采样不仅重新平衡了类先验，而且还鼓励神经网络学习可分离的表示。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法显着优于现有的数据重新平衡方法，并且可以提高现有最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Open-sampling的方法，通过利用分布外数据（开放集样本）重新平衡长尾数据集的类别分布，以提升深度神经网络在极端类别不平衡场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法直接使用分布外数据会损害模型泛化能力，而理论分析表明从贝叶斯视角可利用开放集数据增强少数类，从而解决类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 通过预定义与原始类别先验互补的分布，为每个开放集样本分配噪声标签，以此调整训练数据集的类别先验分布，同时促进网络学习可分表征。
AI.result: 实验表明Open-sampling显著优于现有再平衡方法，并能有效提升当前最先进的方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法从理论和实践层面验证了分布外数据在长尾数据集再平衡中的有效性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiao Lu,Yihong Cao,Sheng Liu,Chengjiang Long,Zipei Chen,Xuanyu Zhou,Yimin Yang,Chunxia Xiao
title: Video Shadow Detection via Spatio-Temporal Interpolation Consistency Training
title_zh: 通过时空插值一致性训练进行视频阴影检测
abstract: It is challenging to annotate large-scale datasets for supervised video shadow detection methods. Using a model trained on labeled images to the video frames directly may lead to high generalization error and temporal inconsistent results. In this paper, we address these challenges by proposing a Spatio-Temporal Interpolation Consistency Training (STICT) framework to rationally feed the unlabeled video frames together with the labeled images into an image shadow detection network training. Specifically, we propose the Spatial and Temporal ICT, in which we define two new interpolation schemes, \textit{i.e.}, the spatial interpolation and the temporal interpolation. We then derive the spatial and temporal interpolation consistency constraints accordingly for enhancing generalization in the pixel-wise classification task and for encouraging temporal consistent predictions, respectively. In addition, we design a Scale-Aware Network for multi-scale shadow knowledge learning in images, and propose a scale-consistency constraint to minimize the discrepancy among the predictions at different scales. Our proposed approach is extensively validated on the ViSha dataset and a self-annotated dataset. Experimental results show that, even without video labels, our approach is better than most state of the art supervised, semi-supervised or unsupervised image/video shadow detection methods and other methods in related tasks. Code and dataset are available at \url{https://github.com/yihong-97/STICT}.
summary: It is challenging to annotate large-scale datasets for supervised video shadow detection methods. Using a model trained on labeled images to the video frames directly may lead to high generalization error and temporal inconsistent results. In this paper, we address these challenges by proposing a Spatio-Temporal Interpolation Consistency Training (STICT) framework to rationally feed the unlabeled video frames together with the labeled images into an image shadow detection network training. Specifically, we propose the Spatial and Temporal ICT, in which we define two new interpolation schemes, \textit{i.e.}, the spatial interpolation and the temporal interpolation. We then derive the spatial and temporal interpolation consistency constraints accordingly for enhancing generalization in the pixel-wise classification task and for encouraging temporal consistent predictions, respectively. In addition, we design a Scale-Aware Network for multi-scale shadow knowledge learning in images, and propose a scale-consistency constraint to minimize the discrepancy among the predictions at different scales. Our proposed approach is extensively validated on the ViSha dataset and a self-annotated dataset. Experimental results show that, even without video labels, our approach is better than most state of the art supervised, semi-supervised or unsupervised image/video shadow detection methods and other methods in related tasks. Code and dataset are available at \url{https://github.com/yihong-97/STICT}.
abstract_zh: 为监督视频阴影检测方法注释大规模数据集具有挑战性。直接使用在标记图像上训练的模型到视频帧可能会导致高泛化误差和时间不一致的结果。在本文中，我们通过提出时空插值一致性训练（STICT）框架来解决这些挑战，将未标记的视频帧与标记的图像一起合理地输入到图像阴影检测网络训练中。具体来说，我们提出了空间和时间ICT，其中我们定义了两种新的插值方案，\textit{i.e.}，空间插值和时间插值。然后，我们相应地推导空间和时间插值一致性约束，以分别增强像素分类任务的泛化性和鼓励时间一致的预测。此外，我们设计了一个用于图像中多尺度阴影知识学习的尺度感知网络，并提出了尺度一致性约束以最小化不同尺度下预测之间的差异。我们提出的方法在 ViSha 数据集和自注释数据集上得到了广泛验证。实验结果表明，即使没有视频标签，我们的方法也比大多数最先进的监督、半监督或无监督图像/视频阴影检测方法以及相关任务中的其他方法更好。代码和数据集可在 \url{https://github.com/yihong-97/STICT} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空插值一致性的训练框架（STICT），用于解决视频阴影检测中大规模标注数据不足及时间不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模标注视频数据的获取成本高，直接使用图像模型处理视频帧会导致泛化误差和时间不一致结果，亟需一种无需视频标注的数据利用方法。
AI.method: 设计时空插值一致性约束（Spatial ICT与Temporal ICT），结合尺度感知网络与尺度一致性约束，通过联合训练图像与未标注视频帧提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在ViSha数据集和自标注数据集上验证，即使无视频标签，该方法也优于大多数监督、半监督及无监督的图像/视频阴影检测方法。
AI.conclusion: STICT框架通过时空一致性约束有效提升了阴影检测的泛化能力与时间稳定性，为弱监督视频检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Video Shadow Detection via Spatio-Temporal Interpolation Consistency Training 通过时空插值一致性训练进行视频阴影检测 It is challenging to annotate large-scale datasets for supervised video shadow detection methods. Using a model trained on labeled images to the video frames directly may lead to high generalization error and temporal inconsistent results. In this paper, we address these challenges by proposing a Spatio-Temporal Interpolation Consistency Training (STICT) framework to rationally feed the unlabeled video frames together with the labeled images into an image shadow detection network training. Specifically, we propose the Spatial and Temporal ICT, in which we define two new interpolation schemes, \textit{i.e.}, the spatial interpolation and the temporal interpolation. We then derive the spatial and temporal interpolation consistency constraints accordingly for enhancing generalization in the pixel-wise classification task and for encouraging temporal consistent predictions, respectively. In addition, we design a Scale-Aware Network for multi-scale shadow knowledge learning in images, and propose a scale-consistency constraint to minimize the discrepancy among the predictions at different scales. Our proposed approach is extensively validated on the ViSha dataset and a self-annotated dataset. Experimental results show that, even without video labels, our approach is better than most state of the art supervised, semi-supervised or unsupervised image/video shadow detection methods and other methods in related tasks. authors_text: Rasmus Laurvig Haugaard,Anders Glent Buch,Thorbjørn Mosekjær Iversen
title: Self-supervised deep visual servoing for high precision peg-in-hole insertion
title_zh: 用于高精度钉孔插入的自监督深度视觉伺服
abstract: Many industrial assembly tasks involve peg-in-hole like insertions with sub-millimeter tolerances which are challenging, even in highly calibrated robot cells. Visual servoing can be employed to increase the robustness towards uncertainties in the system, however, state of the art methods either rely on accurate 3D models for synthetic renderings or manual involvement in acquisition of training data. We present a novel self-supervised visual servoing method for high precision peg-in-hole insertion, which is fully automated and does not rely on synthetic data. We demonstrate its applicability for insertion of electronic components into a printed circuit board with tight tolerances. We show that peg-in-hole insertion can be drastically sped up by preceding a robust but slow force-based insertion strategy with our proposed visual servoing method, the configuration of which is fully autonomous.
summary: Many industrial assembly tasks involve peg-in-hole like insertions with sub-millimeter tolerances which are challenging, even in highly calibrated robot cells. Visual servoing can be employed to increase the robustness towards uncertainties in the system, however, state of the art methods either rely on accurate 3D models for synthetic renderings or manual involvement in acquisition of training data. We present a novel self-supervised visual servoing method for high precision peg-in-hole insertion, which is fully automated and does not rely on synthetic data. We demonstrate its applicability for insertion of electronic components into a printed circuit board with tight tolerances. We show that peg-in-hole insertion can be drastically sped up by preceding a robust but slow force-based insertion strategy with our proposed visual servoing method, the configuration of which is fully autonomous.
abstract_zh: 许多工业装配任务涉及具有亚毫米公差的钉孔式插入，即使在高度校准的机器人单元中，这也具有挑战性。视觉伺服可用于提高系统对不确定性的鲁棒性，然而，最先进的方法要么依赖于准确的 3D 模型进行合成渲染，要么依赖于手动参与训练数据的获取。我们提出了一种新颖的自监督视觉伺服方法，用于高精度孔内插入，该方法是完全自动化的，不依赖于合成数据。我们展示了其将电子元件插入具有严格公差的印刷电路板的适用性。我们证明，通过使用我们提出的视觉伺服方法（其配置是完全自主的）之前的稳健但缓慢的基于力的插入策略，可以大大加快钉孔插入的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需合成数据的自监督深度视觉伺服方法，用于实现高精度的插孔插入工业装配任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉伺服方法依赖精确3D模型或人工标注数据，难以适应实际工业场景中的亚毫米级精度需求和系统不确定性。
AI.method: 开发了完全自动化的自监督视觉伺服框架，通过真实环境数据训练模型，无需人工干预或合成渲染数据。
AI.result: 成功应用于电子元件插入印刷电路板场景，相比传统力控策略显著提升插入速度并保持高精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了自监督视觉伺服在精密装配中的有效性，通过与力控策略结合可实现更高效可靠的工业自动化解决方案。

authors_text: Jupinder Parmar,Khaled Saab,Brian Pogatchnik,Daniel Rubin,Christopher Ré
title: The Importance of Background Information for Out of Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 背景信息对于分布外泛化的重要性
abstract: Domain generalization in medical image classification is an important problem for trustworthy machine learning to be deployed in healthcare. We find that existing approaches for domain generalization which utilize ground-truth abnormality segmentations to control feature attributions have poor out-of-distribution (OOD) performance relative to the standard baseline of empirical risk minimization (ERM). We investigate what regions of an image are important for medical image classification and show that parts of the background, that which is not contained in the abnormality segmentation, provides helpful signal. We then develop a new task-specific mask which covers all relevant regions. Utilizing this new segmentation mask significantly improves the performance of the existing methods on the OOD test sets. To obtain better generalization results than ERM, we find it necessary to scale up the training data size in addition to the usage of these task-specific masks.
summary: Domain generalization in medical image classification is an important problem for trustworthy machine learning to be deployed in healthcare. We find that existing approaches for domain generalization which utilize ground-truth abnormality segmentations to control feature attributions have poor out-of-distribution (OOD) performance relative to the standard baseline of empirical risk minimization (ERM). We investigate what regions of an image are important for medical image classification and show that parts of the background, that which is not contained in the abnormality segmentation, provides helpful signal. We then develop a new task-specific mask which covers all relevant regions. Utilizing this new segmentation mask significantly improves the performance of the existing methods on the OOD test sets. To obtain better generalization results than ERM, we find it necessary to scale up the training data size in addition to the usage of these task-specific masks.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分类中的领域泛化是在医疗保健中部署值得信赖的机器学习的一个重要问题。我们发现，现有的领域泛化方法利用真实异常分割来控制特征归因，相对于经验风险最小化（ERM）的标准基线，其分布外（OOD）性能较差。我们研究了图像的哪些区域对于医学图像分类很重要，并表明未包含在异常分割中的背景部分提供了有用的信号。然后，我们开发一个新的特定于任务的掩模，覆盖所有相关区域。利用这种新的分割掩码显着提高了现有方法在 OOD 测试集上的性能。为了获得比 ERM 更好的泛化结果，我们发现除了使用这些特定于任务的掩码之外，还需要扩大训练数据的大小。

AI.tldr: 本文研究医学图像分类中背景信息对分布外泛化能力的影响，并提出利用背景区域改进领域泛化的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于异常分割的领域泛化方法在分布外测试中表现不佳，而标准经验风险最小化（ERM）效果更优，需探索背景信息的潜在价值。
AI.method: 通过分析医学图像中关键区域，设计覆盖背景和异常区域的任务特定掩码，并结合扩大训练数据规模优化模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 新掩码显著提升现有方法在分布外测试集的性能，且数据规模扩大后效果超越ERM基线。
AI.conclusion: 医学图像分类需同时利用背景信息和扩大数据规模，才能实现更优的分布外泛化。

tldr: 本文研究医学图像分类中背景信息对分布外泛化能力的影响，并提出利用背景区域改进领域泛化的方法。
motivation: 现有基于异常分割的领域泛化方法在分布外测试中表现不佳，而标准经验风险最小化（ERM）效果更优，需探索背景信息的潜在价值。
method: 通过分析医学图像中关键区域，设计覆盖背景和异常区域的任务特定掩码，并结合扩大训练数据规模优化模型泛化能力。
result: 新掩码显著提升现有方法在分布外测试集的性能，且数据规模扩大后效果超越ERM基线。
conclusion: 医学图像分类需同时利用背景信息和扩大数据规模，才能实现更优的分布外泛化。
search_text: The Importance of Background Information for Out of Distribution Generalization 背景信息对于分布外泛化的重要性 Domain generalization in medical image classification is an important problem for trustworthy machine learning to be deployed in healthcare. We find that existing approaches for domain generalization which utilize ground-truth abnormality segmentations to control feature attributions have poor out-of-distribution (OOD) performance relative to the standard baseline of empirical risk minimization (ERM). We investigate what regions of an image are important for medical image classification and show that parts of the background, that which is not contained in the abnormality segmentation, provides helpful signal. We then develop a new task-specific mask which covers all relevant regions. Utilizing this new segmentation mask significantly improves the performance of the existing methods on the OOD test sets. To obtain better generalization results than ERM, we find it necessary to scale up the training data size in addition to the usage of these task-specific masks. 医学图像分类中的领域泛化是在医疗保健中部署值得信赖的机器学习的一个重要问题。我们发现，现有的领域泛化方法利用真实异常分割来控制特征归因，相对于经验风险最小化（ERM）的标准基线，其分布外（OOD）性能较差。我们研究了图像的哪些区域对于医学图像分类很重要，并表明未包含在异常分割中的背景部分提供了有用的信号。然后，我们开发一个新的特定于任务的掩模，覆盖所有相关区域。利用这种新的分割掩码显着提高了现有方法在 OOD 测试集上的性能。为了获得比 ERM 更好的泛化结果，我们发现除了使用这些特定于任务的掩码之外，还需要扩大训练数据的大小。 本文研究医学图像分类中背景信息对分布外泛化能力的影响，并提出利用背景区域改进领域泛化的方法。 Jupinder Parmar,Khaled Saab,Brian Pogatchnik,Daniel Rubin,Christopher Ré cs.CV

authors_text: Hui Li,Zihao Li,Rui Ma,Tieru Wu
title: FD-CAM: Improving Faithfulness and Discriminability of Visual Explanation for CNNs
title_zh: FD-CAM：提高 CNN 视觉解释的可信度和辨别力
comment: Accepted by ICPR 2022 and also accepted by CVPR 2022 Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop
comments: Accepted by ICPR 2022 and also accepted by CVPR 2022 Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop
abstract: Class activation map (CAM) has been widely studied for visual explanation of the internal working mechanism of convolutional neural networks. The key of existing CAM-based methods is to compute effective weights to combine activation maps in the target convolution layer. Existing gradient and score based weighting schemes have shown superiority in ensuring either the discriminability or faithfulness of the CAM, but they normally cannot excel in both properties. In this paper, we propose a novel CAM weighting scheme, named FD-CAM, to improve both the faithfulness and discriminability of the CAM-based CNN visual explanation. First, we improve the faithfulness and discriminability of the score-based weights by performing a grouped channel switching operation. Specifically, for each channel, we compute its similarity group and switch the group of channels on or off simultaneously to compute changes in the class prediction score as the weights. Then, we combine the improved score-based weights with the conventional gradient-based weights so that the discriminability of the final CAM can be further improved. We perform extensive comparisons with the state-of-the-art CAM algorithms. The quantitative and qualitative results show our FD-CAM can produce more faithful and more discriminative visual explanations of the CNNs. We also conduct experiments to verify the effectiveness of the proposed grouped channel switching and weight combination scheme on improving the results. Our code is available at https://github.com/crishhh1998/FD-CAM.
summary: Class activation map (CAM) has been widely studied for visual explanation of the internal working mechanism of convolutional neural networks. The key of existing CAM-based methods is to compute effective weights to combine activation maps in the target convolution layer. Existing gradient and score based weighting schemes have shown superiority in ensuring either the discriminability or faithfulness of the CAM, but they normally cannot excel in both properties. In this paper, we propose a novel CAM weighting scheme, named FD-CAM, to improve both the faithfulness and discriminability of the CAM-based CNN visual explanation. First, we improve the faithfulness and discriminability of the score-based weights by performing a grouped channel switching operation. Specifically, for each channel, we compute its similarity group and switch the group of channels on or off simultaneously to compute changes in the class prediction score as the weights. Then, we combine the improved score-based weights with the conventional gradient-based weights so that the discriminability of the final CAM can be further improved. We perform extensive comparisons with the state-of-the-art CAM algorithms. The quantitative and qualitative results show our FD-CAM can produce more faithful and more discriminative visual explanations of the CNNs. We also conduct experiments to verify the effectiveness of the proposed grouped channel switching and weight combination scheme on improving the results. Our code is available at https://github.com/crishhh1998/FD-CAM.
abstract_zh: 类激活图（CAM）用于直观地解释卷积神经网络的内部工作机制，已被广泛研究。现有基于 CAM 的方法的关键是计算有效权重以组合目标卷积层中的激活图。现有的基于梯度和分数的加权方案在确保 CAM 的可辨别性或忠实度方面显示出优越性，但它们通常不能在这两个属性上都表现出色。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 CAM 加权方案，称为 FD-CAM，以提高基于 CAM 的 CNN 视觉解释的忠实度和可辨别性。首先，我们通过执行分组通道切换操作来提高基于分数的权重的忠实度和可辨别性。具体来说，对于每个通道，我们计算其相似性组并同时打开或关闭该组通道，以计算类别预测分数的变化作为权重。然后，我们将改进的基于分数的权重与传统的基于梯度的权重相结合，从而进一步提高最终 CAM 的可辨别性。我们与最先进的 CAM 算法进行了广泛的比较。定量和定性结果表明，我们的 FD-CAM 可以对 CNN 产生更忠实、更具辨别力的视觉解释。我们还进行了实验来验证所提出的分组通道切换和权重组合方案对改善结果的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/crishhh1998/FD-CAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FD-CAM方法，旨在提升卷积神经网络（CNN）视觉解释中类激活图（CAM）的忠实性与可区分性。
AI.motivation: 现有CAM方法在保证CAM的可区分性或忠实性方面表现优异，但难以同时兼顾两者，需改进权重计算方案以平衡二者。
AI.method: 通过分组通道切换操作优化基于分数的权重，并结合传统梯度权重，最终生成更忠实且可区分的CAM。
AI.result: 实验表明FD-CAM在定量与定性评估中均优于现有算法，验证了分组通道切换与权重组合方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FD-CAM通过创新权重计算方式，有效提升了CNN视觉解释的忠实性与可区分性，为CAM研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yilong Li,Yaqi Wang,Huiyu Zhou,Huaqiong Wang,Gangyong Jia,Qianni Zhang
title: DU-Net based Unsupervised Contrastive Learning for Cancer Segmentation in Histology Images
title_zh: 基于 DU-Net 的无监督对比学习用于组织学图像中的癌症分割
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.05709 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.05709 by other authors
abstract: In this paper, we introduce an unsupervised cancer segmentation framework for histology images. The framework involves an effective contrastive learning scheme for extracting distinctive visual representations for segmentation. The encoder is a Deep U-Net (DU-Net) structure that contains an extra fully convolution layer compared to the normal U-Net. A contrastive learning scheme is developed to solve the problem of lacking training sets with high-quality annotations on tumour boundaries. A specific set of data augmentation techniques are employed to improve the discriminability of the learned colour features from contrastive learning. Smoothing and noise elimination are conducted using convolutional Conditional Random Fields. The experiments demonstrate competitive performance in segmentation even better than some popular supervised networks.
summary: In this paper, we introduce an unsupervised cancer segmentation framework for histology images. The framework involves an effective contrastive learning scheme for extracting distinctive visual representations for segmentation. The encoder is a Deep U-Net (DU-Net) structure that contains an extra fully convolution layer compared to the normal U-Net. A contrastive learning scheme is developed to solve the problem of lacking training sets with high-quality annotations on tumour boundaries. A specific set of data augmentation techniques are employed to improve the discriminability of the learned colour features from contrastive learning. Smoothing and noise elimination are conducted using convolutional Conditional Random Fields. The experiments demonstrate competitive performance in segmentation even better than some popular supervised networks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于组织学图像的无监督癌症分割框架。该框架涉及一种有效的对比学习方案，用于提取独特的视觉表示以进行分割。编码器是 Deep U-Net (DU-Net) 结构，与普通 U-Net 相比，包含额外的全卷积层。开发了一种对比学习方案来解决缺乏肿瘤边界高质量注释的训练集的问题。采用一组特定的数据增强技术来提高从对比学习中学习到的颜色特征的可辨别性。使用卷积条件随机场进行平滑和噪声消除。实验证明了分割方面的竞争性能甚至比一些流行的监督网络还要好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DU-Net的无监督对比学习框架，用于组织学图像中的癌症分割。
AI.motivation: 组织学图像中肿瘤边界高质量标注数据稀缺，传统监督方法依赖标注数据存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计包含额外全卷积层的DU-Net编码器，结合对比学习提取区分性特征，并采用数据增强与卷积条件随机场优化分割结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在分割性能上可与部分主流监督网络竞争，且无需依赖标注数据。
AI.conclusion: 无监督对比学习框架有效解决了标注数据不足问题，为癌症分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Robin Klippert
title: Reconstructing vehicles from orthographic drawings using deep neural networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络从正交绘图重建车辆
abstract: This paper explores the current state-of-the-art of object reconstruction from multiple orthographic drawings using deep neural networks. It proposes two algorithms to extract multiple views from a single image. The paper proposes a system based on pixel-aligned implicit functions (PIFu) and develops an advanced sampling strategy to generate signed distance samples. It also compares this approach to depth map regression from multiple views. Additionally, the paper uses a novel dataset for vehicle reconstruction from the racing game Assetto Corsa, which features higher quality models than the commonly used ShapeNET dataset. The trained neural network generalizes well to real-world inputs and creates plausible and detailed reconstructions.
summary: This paper explores the current state-of-the-art of object reconstruction from multiple orthographic drawings using deep neural networks. It proposes two algorithms to extract multiple views from a single image. The paper proposes a system based on pixel-aligned implicit functions (PIFu) and develops an advanced sampling strategy to generate signed distance samples. It also compares this approach to depth map regression from multiple views. Additionally, the paper uses a novel dataset for vehicle reconstruction from the racing game Assetto Corsa, which features higher quality models than the commonly used ShapeNET dataset. The trained neural network generalizes well to real-world inputs and creates plausible and detailed reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了使用深度神经网络从多个正交绘图进行对象重建的当前最先进技术。它提出了两种从单个图像中提取多个视图的算法。该论文提出了一种基于像素对齐隐式函数（PIFu）的系统，并开发了一种先进的采样策略来生成有符号距离样本。它还将这种方法与来自多个视图的深度图回归进行了比较。此外，本文还使用赛车游戏《神力科莎》中的新颖数据集进行车辆重建，该数据集比常用的 ShapeNET 数据集具有更高质量的模型。经过训练的神经网络可以很好地概括现实世界的输入，并创建合理且详细的重建。

AI.tldr: 利用深度神经网络从正交视图重建车辆模型
AI.motivation: 现有方法在重建精度和效率上存在不足，需探索更高效的方法
AI.method: 提出两种算法从单张图像提取多视图，基于PIFu和改进采样策略生成符号距离样本，并与深度图回归方法对比
AI.result: 在Assetto Corsa数据集上实现高精度重建，模型对真实输入具有良好的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于PIFu的方法在车辆重建任务中优于传统深度图回归方法，新数据集提升模型性能

search_text: Reconstructing vehicles from orthographic drawings using deep neural networks 使用深度神经网络从正交绘图重建车辆 This paper explores the current state-of-the-art of object reconstruction from multiple orthographic drawings using deep neural networks. It proposes two algorithms to extract multiple views from a single image. The paper proposes a system based on pixel-aligned implicit functions (PIFu) and develops an advanced sampling strategy to generate signed distance samples. It also compares this approach to depth map regression from multiple views. Additionally, the paper uses a novel dataset for vehicle reconstruction from the racing game Assetto Corsa, which features higher quality models than the commonly used ShapeNET dataset. The trained neural network generalizes well to real-world inputs and creates plausible and detailed reconstructions. 本文探讨了使用深度神经网络从多个正交绘图进行对象重建的当前最先进技术。它提出了两种从单个图像中提取多个视图的算法。该论文提出了一种基于像素对齐隐式函数（PIFu）的系统，并开发了一种先进的采样策略来生成有符号距离样本。它还将这种方法与来自多个视图的深度图回归进行了比较。此外，本文还使用赛车游戏《神力科莎》中的新颖数据集进行车辆重建，该数据集比常用的 ShapeNET 数据集具有更高质量的模型。经过训练的神经网络可以很好地概括现实世界的输入，并创建合理且详细的重建。 利用深度神经网络从正交视图重建车辆模型 Robin Klippert cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jinyin Chen,Chengyu Jia,Haibin Zheng,Ruoxi Chen,Chenbo Fu
title: Is Multi-Modal Necessarily Better? Robustness Evaluation of Multi-modal Fake News Detection
title_zh: 多式联运一定更好吗？多模态假新闻检测的鲁棒性评估
abstract: The proliferation of fake news and its serious negative social influence push fake news detection methods to become necessary tools for web managers. Meanwhile, the multi-media nature of social media makes multi-modal fake news detection popular for its ability to capture more modal features than uni-modal detection methods. However, current literature on multi-modal detection is more likely to pursue the detection accuracy but ignore the robustness of the detector. To address this problem, we propose a comprehensive robustness evaluation of multi-modal fake news detectors. In this work, we simulate the attack methods of malicious users and developers, i.e., posting fake news and injecting backdoors. Specifically, we evaluate multi-modal detectors with five adversarial and two backdoor attack methods. Experiment results imply that: (1) The detection performance of the state-of-the-art detectors degrades significantly under adversarial attacks, even worse than general detectors; (2) Most multi-modal detectors are more vulnerable when subjected to attacks on visual modality than textual modality; (3) Popular events' images will cause significant degradation to the detectors when they are subjected to backdoor attacks; (4) The performance of these detectors under multi-modal attacks is worse than under uni-modal attacks; (5) Defensive methods will improve the robustness of the multi-modal detectors.
summary: The proliferation of fake news and its serious negative social influence push fake news detection methods to become necessary tools for web managers. Meanwhile, the multi-media nature of social media makes multi-modal fake news detection popular for its ability to capture more modal features than uni-modal detection methods. However, current literature on multi-modal detection is more likely to pursue the detection accuracy but ignore the robustness of the detector. To address this problem, we propose a comprehensive robustness evaluation of multi-modal fake news detectors. In this work, we simulate the attack methods of malicious users and developers, i.e., posting fake news and injecting backdoors. Specifically, we evaluate multi-modal detectors with five adversarial and two backdoor attack methods. Experiment results imply that: (1) The detection performance of the state-of-the-art detectors degrades significantly under adversarial attacks, even worse than general detectors; (2) Most multi-modal detectors are more vulnerable when subjected to attacks on visual modality than textual modality; (3) Popular events' images will cause significant degradation to the detectors when they are subjected to backdoor attacks; (4) The performance of these detectors under multi-modal attacks is worse than under uni-modal attacks; (5) Defensive methods will improve the robustness of the multi-modal detectors.
abstract_zh: 假新闻的泛滥及其严重的社会负面影响使得假新闻检测方法成为网络管理者的必备工具。同时，社交媒体的多媒体性质使得多模态假新闻检测因其能够比单模态检测方法捕获更多模态特征而广受欢迎。然而，目前关于多模态检测的文献更多地追求检测精度而忽略了检测器的鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了多模态假新闻检测器的综合鲁棒性评估。在这项工作中，我们模拟了恶意用户和开发者的攻击方式，即发布虚假新闻和注入后门。具体来说，我们使用五种对抗方法和两种后门攻击方法来评估多模态检测器。实验结果表明：（1）最先进的检测器的检测性能在对抗性攻击下显着下降，甚至比一般检测器更差； （2）大多数多模态检测器在受到视觉模态攻击时比文本模态攻击更容易受到攻击； （3）热门事件的图像在受到后门攻击时会对检测器造成显着的降级； （4）这些检测器在多模态攻击下的性能比在单模态攻击下差； (5)防御方法将提高多模态检测器的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估多模态虚假新闻检测器的鲁棒性，比较其在对抗攻击和后门攻击下的表现，并分析多模态与单模态方法的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重多模态检测的准确性，忽视其在恶意攻击下的鲁棒性，导致实际应用中可能失效。
AI.method: 通过模拟对抗攻击（5种）和后门攻击（2种），测试多模态检测器在视觉和文本模态下的性能变化，并对比单模态方法。
AI.result: （1）先进检测器在对抗攻击下性能显著下降，甚至不如通用检测器；（2）视觉模态攻击对多模态检测器影响更大；（3）热门事件图片在后门攻击下导致严重退化；（4）多模态攻击下的性能劣于单模态攻击；（5）防御方法可提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态方法并非绝对优于单模态，需重视鲁棒性问题，防御机制能有效缓解攻击影响。

authors_text: Biraja Ghoshal,Bhargab Ghoshal,Allan Tucker
title: Leveraging Uncertainty in Deep Learning for Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma Grading
title_zh: 利用深度学习的不确定性进行胰腺癌分级
comment: 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis; 27 - 29 July 2022; University of Cambridge, UK. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.10769
comments: 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis; 27 - 29 July 2022; University of Cambridge, UK. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2003.10769
abstract: Pancreatic cancers have one of the worst prognoses compared to other cancers, as they are diagnosed when cancer has progressed towards its latter stages. The current manual histological grading for diagnosing pancreatic adenocarcinomas is time-consuming and often results in misdiagnosis. In digital pathology, AI-based cancer grading must be extremely accurate in prediction and uncertainty quantification to improve reliability and explainability and are essential for gaining clinicians trust in the technology. We present Bayesian Convolutional Neural Networks for automated pancreatic cancer grading from MGG and HE stained images to estimate uncertainty in model prediction. We show that the estimated uncertainty correlates with prediction error. Specifically, it is useful in setting the acceptance threshold using a metric that weighs classification accuracy-reject trade-off and misclassification cost controlled by hyperparameters and can be employed in clinical settings.
summary: Pancreatic cancers have one of the worst prognoses compared to other cancers, as they are diagnosed when cancer has progressed towards its latter stages. The current manual histological grading for diagnosing pancreatic adenocarcinomas is time-consuming and often results in misdiagnosis. In digital pathology, AI-based cancer grading must be extremely accurate in prediction and uncertainty quantification to improve reliability and explainability and are essential for gaining clinicians trust in the technology. We present Bayesian Convolutional Neural Networks for automated pancreatic cancer grading from MGG and HE stained images to estimate uncertainty in model prediction. We show that the estimated uncertainty correlates with prediction error. Specifically, it is useful in setting the acceptance threshold using a metric that weighs classification accuracy-reject trade-off and misclassification cost controlled by hyperparameters and can be employed in clinical settings.
abstract_zh: 与其他癌症相比，胰腺癌是预后最差的癌症之一，因为胰腺癌是在癌症进展到后期时才被诊断出来的。目前用于诊断胰腺腺癌的手动组织学分级非常耗时，并且经常导致误诊。在数字病理学中，基于人工智能的癌症分级在预测和不确定性量化方面必须极其准确，以提高可靠性和可解释性，并且对于获得临床医生对该技术的信任至关重要。我们提出贝叶斯卷积神经网络，用于根据 MGG 和 HE 染色图像对胰腺癌进行自动分级，以估计模型预测的不确定性。我们表明估计的不确定性与预测误差相关。具体来说，它在使用权衡分类准确性-拒绝权衡和由超参数控制的错误分类成本的指标来设置接受阈值时非常有用，并且可以在临床环境中使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用贝叶斯卷积神经网络通过量化预测不确定性来实现胰腺导管腺癌的自动分级。
AI.motivation: 传统胰腺癌病理分级耗时且易误诊，AI诊断需兼顾预测准确性与不确定性量化以提高临床可信度。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯卷积神经网络处理MGG和HE染色图像，通过不确定性估计优化分类阈值并控制误诊成本。
AI.result: 不确定性估计与预测误差显著相关，所提方法可有效平衡分类准确率与拒绝率，适用于临床场景。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过量化不确定性提升了胰腺癌分级的可靠性，为临床AI诊断提供了可解释性支持。

We present Bayesian Convolutional Neural Networks for automated pancreatic cancer grading from MGG and HE stained images to estimate uncertainty in model prediction. We show that the estimated uncertainty correlates with prediction error. Specifically, it is useful in setting the acceptance threshold using a metric that weighs classification accuracy-reject trade-off and misclassification cost controlled by hyperparameters and can be employed in clinical settings. 与其他癌症相比，胰腺癌是预后最差的癌症之一，因为胰腺癌是在癌症进展到后期时才被诊断出来的。目前用于诊断胰腺腺癌的手动组织学分级非常耗时，并且经常导致误诊。在数字病理学中，基于人工智能的癌症分级在预测和不确定性量化方面必须极其准确，以提高可靠性和可解释性，并且对于获得临床医生对该技术的信任至关重要。我们提出贝叶斯卷积神经网络，用于根据 MGG 和 HE 染色图像对胰腺癌进行自动分级，以估计模型预测的不确定性。我们表明估计的不确定性与预测误差相关。具体来说，它在使用权衡分类准确性-拒绝权衡和由超参数控制的错误分类成本的指标来设置接受阈值时非常有用，并且可以在临床环境中使用。 本文提出使用贝叶斯卷积神经网络通过量化预测不确定性来实现胰腺导管腺癌的自动分级。 Biraja Ghoshal,Bhargab Ghoshal,Allan Tucker eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Balint Gyevnar,Massimiliano Tamborski,Cheng Wang,Christopher G. Lucas,Shay B. Cohen,Stefano V. Albrecht
title: A Human-Centric Method for Generating Causal Explanations in Natural Language for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Planning
title_zh: 一种以人为中心的方法，用自然语言生成因果解释，用于自主车辆运动规划
comment: IJCAI Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Autonomous Driving (AI4AD), 2022
comments: IJCAI Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Autonomous Driving (AI4AD), 2022
abstract: Inscrutable AI systems are difficult to trust, especially if they operate in safety-critical settings like autonomous driving. Therefore, there is a need to build transparent and queryable systems to increase trust levels. We propose a transparent, human-centric explanation generation method for autonomous vehicle motion planning and prediction based on an existing white-box system called IGP2. Our method integrates Bayesian networks with context-free generative rules and can give causal natural language explanations for the high-level driving behaviour of autonomous vehicles. Preliminary testing on simulated scenarios shows that our method captures the causes behind the actions of autonomous vehicles and generates intelligible explanations with varying complexity.
summary: Inscrutable AI systems are difficult to trust, especially if they operate in safety-critical settings like autonomous driving. Therefore, there is a need to build transparent and queryable systems to increase trust levels. We propose a transparent, human-centric explanation generation method for autonomous vehicle motion planning and prediction based on an existing white-box system called IGP2. Our method integrates Bayesian networks with context-free generative rules and can give causal natural language explanations for the high-level driving behaviour of autonomous vehicles. Preliminary testing on simulated scenarios shows that our method captures the causes behind the actions of autonomous vehicles and generates intelligible explanations with varying complexity.
abstract_zh: 深不可测的人工智能系统很难让人信任，尤其是当它们在自动驾驶等安全关键环境中运行时。因此，需要构建透明且可查询的系统来提高信任级别。我们基于现有的称为 IGP2 的白盒系统，提出了一种透明的、以人为中心的解释生成方法，用于自主车辆运动规划和预测。我们的方法将贝叶斯网络与上下文无关的生成规则相结合，可以为自动驾驶车辆的高级驾驶行为提供因果自然语言解释。对模拟场景的初步测试表明，我们的方法捕获了自动驾驶车辆行为背后的原因，并生成具有不同复杂性的可理解的解释。

AI.tldr: 提出一种以人为中心的方法，为自动驾驶车辆的运动规划生成因果自然语言解释，以提高系统透明度和用户信任度。
AI.motivation: 不透明的AI系统在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中难以获得信任，需构建透明且可查询的系统以提高信任度。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯网络与上下文无关生成规则，基于白盒系统IGP2，生成自动驾驶车辆高层驾驶行为的因果自然语言解释。
AI.result: 初步测试表明该方法能有效捕捉自动驾驶车辆行为背后的原因，并生成不同复杂度的可理解自然语言解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶系统提供了有效的透明性解决方案，有助于增强用户信任并支持安全关键场景下的决策。

authors_text: Callum Rhys Tilbury
title: Reinforcement Learning for Economic Policy: A New Frontier?
title_zh: 经济政策的强化学习：新领域？
abstract: Agent-based computational economics is a field with a rich academic history, yet one which has struggled to enter mainstream policy design toolboxes, plagued by the challenges associated with representing a complex and dynamic reality. The field of Reinforcement Learning (RL), too, has a rich history, and has recently been at the centre of several exponential developments. Modern RL implementations have been able to achieve unprecedented levels of sophistication, handling previously unthinkable degrees of complexity. This review surveys the historical barriers of classical agent-based techniques in economic modelling, and contemplates whether recent developments in RL can overcome any of them.
summary: Agent-based computational economics is a field with a rich academic history, yet one which has struggled to enter mainstream policy design toolboxes, plagued by the challenges associated with representing a complex and dynamic reality. The field of Reinforcement Learning (RL), too, has a rich history, and has recently been at the centre of several exponential developments. Modern RL implementations have been able to achieve unprecedented levels of sophistication, handling previously unthinkable degrees of complexity. This review surveys the historical barriers of classical agent-based techniques in economic modelling, and contemplates whether recent developments in RL can overcome any of them.
abstract_zh: 基于代理的计算经济学是一个有着丰富学术历史的领域，但一直难以进入主流政策设计工具箱，并受到与代表复杂和动态现实相关的挑战的困扰。强化学习（RL）领域也有着丰富的历史，并且最近成为了几次指数级发展的中心。现代强化学习的实现已经能够达到前所未有的复杂程度，处理以前难以想象的复杂程度。这篇综述调查了经济建模中基于代理的经典技术的历史障碍，并思考了强化学习的最新发展是否可以克服其中的任何障碍。

AI.tldr: 探讨强化学习在经济政策中的应用潜力及其对传统基于智能体经济模型的改进可能
AI.motivation: 传统基于智能体的经济模型在处理复杂动态现实时面临挑战，而强化学习的最新进展可能提供解决方案，推动其在政策设计中的应用
AI.method: 通过文献综述，回顾基于智能体的经济模型的历史局限性，并评估强化学习的最新技术进展是否能克服这些障碍
AI.result: 发现现代RL技术在处理复杂性和动态性方面具有潜力，但尚未在主流经济政策设计中得到广泛应用
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为经济政策设计提供了新的方法论前景，但需要更多实证研究验证其有效性

authors_text: Weiwei Cui,Yaqi Wang,Qianni Zhang,Huiyu Zhou,Dan Song,Xingyong Zuo,Gangyong Jia,Liaoyuan Zeng
title: CTooth: A Fully Annotated 3D Dataset and Benchmark for Tooth Volume Segmentation on Cone Beam Computed Tomography Images
title_zh: CTooth：完全注释的 3D 数据集和锥形束计算机断层扫描图像上牙齿体积分割的基准
abstract: 3D tooth segmentation is a prerequisite for computer-aided dental diagnosis and treatment. However, segmenting all tooth regions manually is subjective and time-consuming. Recently, deep learning-based segmentation methods produce convincing results and reduce manual annotation efforts, but it requires a large quantity of ground truth for training. To our knowledge, there are few tooth data available for the 3D segmentation study. In this paper, we establish a fully annotated cone beam computed tomography dataset CTooth with tooth gold standard. This dataset contains 22 volumes (7363 slices) with fine tooth labels annotated by experienced radiographic interpreters. To ensure a relative even data sampling distribution, data variance is included in the CTooth including missing teeth and dental restoration. Several state-of-the-art segmentation methods are evaluated on this dataset. Afterwards, we further summarise and apply a series of 3D attention-based Unet variants for segmenting tooth volumes. This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task. Experimental evidence proves that attention modules of the 3D UNet structure boost responses in tooth areas and inhibit the influence of background and noise. The best performance is achieved by 3D Unet with SKNet attention module, of 88.04 \% Dice and 78.71 \% IOU, respectively. The attention-based Unet framework outperforms other state-of-the-art methods on the CTooth dataset. The codebase and dataset are released.
summary: 3D tooth segmentation is a prerequisite for computer-aided dental diagnosis and treatment. However, segmenting all tooth regions manually is subjective and time-consuming. Recently, deep learning-based segmentation methods produce convincing results and reduce manual annotation efforts, but it requires a large quantity of ground truth for training. To our knowledge, there are few tooth data available for the 3D segmentation study. In this paper, we establish a fully annotated cone beam computed tomography dataset CTooth with tooth gold standard. This dataset contains 22 volumes (7363 slices) with fine tooth labels annotated by experienced radiographic interpreters. To ensure a relative even data sampling distribution, data variance is included in the CTooth including missing teeth and dental restoration. Several state-of-the-art segmentation methods are evaluated on this dataset. Afterwards, we further summarise and apply a series of 3D attention-based Unet variants for segmenting tooth volumes. This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task. Experimental evidence proves that attention modules of the 3D UNet structure boost responses in tooth areas and inhibit the influence of background and noise. The best performance is achieved by 3D Unet with SKNet attention module, of 88.04 \% Dice and 78.71 \% IOU, respectively. The attention-based Unet framework outperforms other state-of-the-art methods on the CTooth dataset. The codebase and dataset are released.
abstract_zh: 3D牙齿分割是计算机辅助牙科诊断和治疗的先决条件。然而，手动分割所有牙齿区域是主观且耗时的。最近，基于深度学习的分割方法产生了令人信服的结果并减少了手动注释工作，但它需要大量的真实数据进行训练。据我们所知，可用于 3D 分割研究的牙齿数据很少。在本文中，我们建立了一个具有牙齿金标准的完全注释的锥形束计算机断层扫描数据集 CTooth。该数据集包含 22 卷（7363 个切片），其中有由经验丰富的射线照相解释员注释的细齿标签。为了确保数据采样分布相对均匀，CTooth 中包含了数据方差，包括缺失牙齿和牙齿修复。在此数据集上评估了几种最先进的分割方法。之后，我们进一步总结并应用了一系列基于 3D 注意力的 Unet 变体来分割牙齿体积。这项工作为牙齿体积分割任务提供了新的基准。实验证据证明，3D UNet 结构的注意力模块可以增强牙齿区域的响应并抑制背景和噪声的影响。最好的性能是由带有 SKNet 注意力模块的 3D Unet 实现的，分别为 88.04% Dice 和 78.71% IOU。基于注意力的 Unet 框架在 CTooth 数据集上的性能优于其他最先进的方法。代码库和数据集已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTooth数据集和基准，用于基于锥形束CT图像的牙齿体积分割。
AI.motivation: 手动分割牙齿区域主观且耗时，现有深度学习方法需大量标注数据，但缺乏适用于3D牙齿分割的公开数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含22个体积（7363层）的全标注CBCT数据集，涵盖牙齿缺失和修复等变异；评估多种分割方法，并应用3D注意力机制改进的Unet变体。
AI.result: 基于SKNet注意力模块的3D Unet在CTooth数据集上取得88.04% Dice和78.71% IOU的最优性能，注意力机制有效提升分割精度。
AI.conclusion: CTooth为牙齿体积分割提供新基准，证明注意力机制能增强牙齿区域响应并抑制背景噪声影响。

ai_content.result: 基于SKNet注意力模块的3D Unet在CTooth数据集上取得88.04% Dice和78.71% IOU的最优性能，注意力机制有效提升分割精度。
ai_content.conclusion: CTooth为牙齿体积分割提供新基准，证明注意力机制能增强牙齿区域响应并抑制背景噪声影响。

search_text: CTooth: A Fully Annotated 3D Dataset and Benchmark for Tooth Volume Segmentation on Cone Beam Computed Tomography Images CTooth：完全注释的 3D 数据集和锥形束计算机断层扫描图像上牙齿体积分割的基准 3D tooth segmentation is a prerequisite for computer-aided dental diagnosis and treatment. However, segmenting all tooth regions manually is subjective and time-consuming. Recently, deep learning-based segmentation methods produce convincing results and reduce manual annotation efforts, but it requires a large quantity of ground truth for training. To our knowledge, there are few tooth data available for the 3D segmentation study. In this paper, we establish a fully annotated cone beam computed tomography dataset CTooth with tooth gold standard. This dataset contains 22 volumes (7363 slices) with fine tooth labels annotated by experienced radiographic interpreters. To ensure a relative even data sampling distribution, data variance is included in the CTooth including missing teeth and dental restoration. Several state-of-the-art segmentation methods are evaluated on this dataset. Afterwards, we further summarise and apply a series of 3D attention-based Unet variants for segmenting tooth volumes. This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task. Experimental evidence proves that attention modules of the 3D UNet structure boost responses in tooth areas and inhibit the influence of background and noise. The best performance is achieved by 3D Unet with SKNet attention module, of 88.04 \% Dice and 78.71 \% IOU, respectively. The attention-based Unet framework outperforms other state-of-the-art methods on the CTooth dataset. The codebase and dataset are released. 3D牙齿分割是计算机辅助牙科诊断和治疗的先决条件。然而，手动分割所有牙齿区域是主观且耗时的。最近，基于深度学习的分割方法产生了令人信服的结果并减少了手动注释工作，但它需要大量的真实数据进行训练。据我们所知，可用于 3D 分割研究的牙齿数据很少。在本文中，我们建立了一个具有牙齿金标准的完全注释的锥形束计算机断层扫描数据集 CTooth。该数据集包含 22 卷（7363 个切片），其中有由经验丰富的射线照相解释员注释的细齿标签。为了确保数据采样分布相对均匀，CTooth 中包含了数据方差，包括缺失牙齿和牙齿修复。在此数据集上评估了几种最先进的分割方法。之后，我们进一步总结并应用了一系列基于 3D 注意力的 Unet 变体来分割牙齿体积。这项工作为牙齿体积分割任务提供了新的基准。实验证据证明，3D UNet 结构的注意力模块可以增强牙齿区域的响应并抑制背景和噪声的影响。最好的性能是由带有 SKNet 注意力模块的 3D Unet 实现的，分别为 88.04% Dice 和 78.71% IOU。基于注意力的 Unet 框架在 CTooth 数据集上的性能优于其他最先进的方法。代码库和数据集已发布。 本文提出CTooth数据集和基准，用于基于锥形束CT图像的牙齿体积分割。 Weiwei Cui,Yaqi Wang,Qianni Zhang,Huiyu Zhou,Dan Song,Xingyong Zuo,Gangyong Jia,Liaoyuan Zeng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Pedro Orvalho,Mikoláš Janota,Vasco Manquinho
title: C-Pack of IPAs: A C90 Program Benchmark of Introductory Programming Assignments
title_zh: IPA 的 C-Pack：入门性编程作业的 C90 程序基准
abstract: Due to the vast number of students enrolled in Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs), there has been an increasing number of automated program repair techniques focused on introductory programming assignments (IPAs). Such techniques take advantage of previous correct student implementations in order to provide automated, comprehensive, and personalized feedback to students. This paper presents C-Pack-IPAs, a publicly available benchmark of students' programs submitted for 25 different IPAs. C-Pack-IPAs contains semantically correct, semantically incorrect, and syntactically incorrect programs plus a test suite for each IPA. Hence, C-Pack-IPAs can be used to help evaluate the development of novel semantic, as well as syntactic, automated program repair frameworks, focused on providing feedback to novice programmers.
summary: Due to the vast number of students enrolled in Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs), there has been an increasing number of automated program repair techniques focused on introductory programming assignments (IPAs). Such techniques take advantage of previous correct student implementations in order to provide automated, comprehensive, and personalized feedback to students. This paper presents C-Pack-IPAs, a publicly available benchmark of students' programs submitted for 25 different IPAs. C-Pack-IPAs contains semantically correct, semantically incorrect, and syntactically incorrect programs plus a test suite for each IPA. Hence, C-Pack-IPAs can be used to help evaluate the development of novel semantic, as well as syntactic, automated program repair frameworks, focused on providing feedback to novice programmers.
abstract_zh: 由于大量学生报名参加大规模开放在线课程（MOOC），越来越多的自动化程序修复技术专注于入门编程作业（IPA）。此类技术利用以前正确的学生实现，以便为学生提供自动化、全面且个性化的反馈。本文介绍了 C-Pack-IPA，这是针对 25 个不同 IPA 提交的学生项目的公开基准。 C-Pack-IPA 包含语义正确、语义不正确和语法不正确的程序以及每个 IPA 的测试套件。因此，C-Pack-IPA 可用于帮助评估新颖语义以及句法、自动化程序修复框架的开发，重点是为新手程序员提供反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C-Pack-IPAs基准测试集，用于评估面向入门编程作业的自动化程序修复框架。
AI.motivation: 由于MOOCs学生数量庞大，亟需自动化技术为初学者提供个性化编程反馈，但缺乏统一基准测试集阻碍技术发展。
AI.method: 收集25个编程作业的正确/错误学生代码及测试用例，构建包含语义与语法错误的基准数据集。
AI.result: 公开发布C-Pack-IPAs基准，可支持语义与语法层面的自动化修复技术评估。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为研究者提供了标准化测试资源，推动面向新手程序员的自动化反馈系统发展。

authors_text: Sylvie Coste-Marquis,Pierre Marquis
title: Rectifying Mono-Label Boolean Classifiers
title_zh: 纠正单标签布尔分类器
comment: 8 pages, rewriting of motivations in the Introduction section and of Example 3 and Example 4 explanations, typo corrected in Example 4 and captions of Figure 4 and Figure 5 rectified
comments: 8 pages, rewriting of motivations in the Introduction section and of Example 3 and Example 4 explanations, typo corrected in Example 4 and captions of Figure 4 and Figure 5 rectified
abstract: We elaborate on the notion of rectification of a Boolean classifier $Σ$. Given $Σ$ and some background knowledge $T$, postulates characterizing the way $Σ$ must be changed into a new classifier $Σ\star T$ that complies with $T$ have already been presented. We focus here on the specific case of mono-label Boolean classifiers, i.e., there is a single target concept and any instance is classified either as positive (an element of the concept), or as negative (an element of the complementary concept). In this specific case, our main contribution is twofold: (1) we show that there is a unique rectification operator $\star$ satisfying the postulates, and (2) when $Σ$ and $T$ are Boolean circuits, we show how a classification circuit equivalent to $Σ\star T$ can be computed in time linear in the size of $Σ$ and $T$; when $Σ$ and $T$ are decision trees, a decision tree equivalent to $Σ\star T$ can be computed in time polynomial in the size of $Σ$ and $T$.
summary: We elaborate on the notion of rectification of a Boolean classifier $Σ$. Given $Σ$ and some background knowledge $T$, postulates characterizing the way $Σ$ must be changed into a new classifier $Σ\star T$ that complies with $T$ have already been presented. We focus here on the specific case of mono-label Boolean classifiers, i.e., there is a single target concept and any instance is classified either as positive (an element of the concept), or as negative (an element of the complementary concept). In this specific case, our main contribution is twofold: (1) we show that there is a unique rectification operator $\star$ satisfying the postulates, and (2) when $Σ$ and $T$ are Boolean circuits, we show how a classification circuit equivalent to $Σ\star T$ can be computed in time linear in the size of $Σ$ and $T$; when $Σ$ and $T$ are decision trees, a decision tree equivalent to $Σ\star T$ can be computed in time polynomial in the size of $Σ$ and $T$.
abstract_zh: 我们详细阐述了布尔分类器 $Σ$ 的修正概念。给定$Σ$和一些背景知识$T$，已经提出了描述$Σ$必须改变为符合$T$的新分类器$Σ\star T$的方式的假设。我们在这里关注单标签布尔分类器的具体情况，即，存在单个目标概念，并且任何实例都被分类为正面（概念的元素）或负面（互补概念的元素）。在这个具体案例中，我们的主要贡献有两个：（1）我们证明存在一个满足假设的独特的整流算子$\star$，以及（2）当$Σ$和$T$是布尔电路时，我们展示了如何在时间上以$Σ$和$T$的大小线性计算等效于$Σ\star T$的分类电路；当$Σ$和$T$是决策树时，可以在$Σ$和$T$大小的时间多项式中计算相当于$Σ\star T$的决策树。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过背景知识修正单标签布尔分类器，使其符合给定约束条件。
AI.motivation: 现有布尔分类器可能与领域背景知识冲突，需通过修正确保分类结果符合先验知识，提升分类可靠性。
AI.method: 提出唯一确定的修正算子★，并针对布尔电路和决策树分别设计线性时间与多项式时间的算法生成修正后的分类器。
AI.result: 证明了单标签场景下修正算子的唯一性，并实现了对电路和决策树的高效修正算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为结合领域知识优化分类器提供了理论保证和计算效率，适用于需严格遵循先验约束的分类任务。

authors_text: Wen Wen,Mu Li,Yiru Yao,Xiangjie Sui,Yabin Zhang,Long Lan,Yuming Fang,Kede Ma
title: Perceptual Quality Assessment of Virtual Reality Videos in the Wild
title_zh: 野外虚拟现实视频的感知质量评估
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: Investigating how people perceive virtual reality (VR) videos in the wild (i.e., those captured by everyday users) is a crucial and challenging task in VR-related applications due to complex authentic distortions localized in space and time. Existing panoramic video databases only consider synthetic distortions, assume fixed viewing conditions, and are limited in size. To overcome these shortcomings, we construct the VR Video Quality in the Wild (VRVQW) database, containing $502$ user-generated videos with diverse content and distortion characteristics. Based on VRVQW, we conduct a formal psychophysical experiment to record the scanpaths and perceived quality scores from $139$ participants under two different viewing conditions. We provide a thorough statistical analysis of the recorded data, observing significant impact of viewing conditions on both human scanpaths and perceived quality. Moreover, we develop an objective quality assessment model for VR videos based on pseudocylindrical representation and convolution. Results on the proposed VRVQW show that our method is superior to existing video quality assessment models. We have made the database and code available at https://github.com/limuhit/VR-Video-Quality-in-the-Wild.
summary: Investigating how people perceive virtual reality (VR) videos in the wild (i.e., those captured by everyday users) is a crucial and challenging task in VR-related applications due to complex authentic distortions localized in space and time. Existing panoramic video databases only consider synthetic distortions, assume fixed viewing conditions, and are limited in size. To overcome these shortcomings, we construct the VR Video Quality in the Wild (VRVQW) database, containing $502$ user-generated videos with diverse content and distortion characteristics. Based on VRVQW, we conduct a formal psychophysical experiment to record the scanpaths and perceived quality scores from $139$ participants under two different viewing conditions. We provide a thorough statistical analysis of the recorded data, observing significant impact of viewing conditions on both human scanpaths and perceived quality. Moreover, we develop an objective quality assessment model for VR videos based on pseudocylindrical representation and convolution. Results on the proposed VRVQW show that our method is superior to existing video quality assessment models. We have made the database and code available at https://github.com/limuhit/VR-Video-Quality-in-the-Wild.
abstract_zh: 由于空间和时间上存在复杂的真实扭曲，研究人们在野外如何感知虚拟现实 (VR) 视频（即日常用户捕获的视频）是 VR 相关应用中的一项至关重要且具有挑战性的任务。现有的全景视频数据库仅考虑合成失真，假设观看条件固定，并且大小有限。为了克服这些缺点，我们构建了 VR 野外视频质量 (VRVQW) 数据库，其中包含价值 502 美元的用户生成视频，具有不同的内容和失真特征。基于 VRVQW，我们进行了正式的心理物理学实验，记录 139 美元参与者在两种不同观看条件下的扫描路径和感知质量得分。我们对记录的数据进行全面的统计分析，观察观看条件对人类扫描路径和感知质量的显着影响。此外，我们还开发了一种基于伪圆柱表示和卷积的 VR 视频客观质量评估模型。所提出的 VRVQW 的结果表明我们的方法优于现有的视频质量评估模型。我们已在 https://github.com/limuhit/VR-Video-Quality-in-the-Wild 上提供数据库和代码。

AI.tldr: 构建野外虚拟现实视频感知质量评估数据库并开发客观评估模型
AI.motivation: 现有全景视频数据库仅考虑合成失真、假设固定观看条件且规模有限，无法反映真实用户生成视频的复杂失真特性
AI.method: 构建包含502个用户生成视频的VRVQW数据库，开展139人参与的心理物理实验记录扫视路径与质量评分，基于伪圆柱表示和卷积开发客观评估模型
AI.result: 发现观看条件显著影响人类扫视路径和质量感知，所提模型在VRVQW数据集上优于现有视频质量评估方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效评估野外VR视频质量，数据库和代码开源为后续研究提供重要资源

search_text: Perceptual Quality Assessment of Virtual Reality Videos in the Wild 野外虚拟现实视频的感知质量评估 Investigating how people perceive virtual reality (VR) videos in the wild (i.e., those captured by everyday users) is a crucial and challenging task in VR-related applications due to complex authentic distortions localized in space and time. Existing panoramic video databases only consider synthetic distortions, assume fixed viewing conditions, and are limited in size. To overcome these shortcomings, we construct the VR Video Quality in the Wild (VRVQW) database, containing $502$ user-generated videos with diverse content and distortion characteristics. Based on VRVQW, we conduct a formal psychophysical experiment to record the scanpaths and perceived quality scores from $139$ participants under two different viewing conditions. We provide a thorough statistical analysis of the recorded data, observing significant impact of viewing conditions on both human scanpaths and perceived quality. Moreover, we develop an objective quality assessment model for VR videos based on pseudocylindrical representation and convolution. Results on the proposed VRVQW show that our method is superior to existing video quality assessment models. We have made the database and code available at https://github.com/limuhit/VR-Video-Quality-in-the-Wild. 由于空间和时间上存在复杂的真实扭曲，研究人们在野外如何感知虚拟现实 (VR) 视频（即日常用户捕获的视频）是 VR 相关应用中的一项至关重要且具有挑战性的任务。现有的全景视频数据库仅考虑合成失真，假设观看条件固定，并且大小有限。为了克服这些缺点，我们构建了 VR 野外视频质量 (VRVQW) 数据库，其中包含价值 502 美元的用户生成视频，具有不同的内容和失真特征。基于 VRVQW，我们进行了正式的心理物理学实验，记录 139 美元参与者在两种不同观看条件下的扫描路径和感知质量得分。我们对记录的数据进行全面的统计分析，观察观看条件对人类扫描路径和感知质量的显着影响。此外，我们还开发了一种基于伪圆柱表示和卷积的 VR 视频客观质量评估模型。所提出的 VRVQW 的结果表明我们的方法优于现有的视频质量评估模型。我们已在 https://github.com/limuhit/VR-Video-Quality-in-the-Wild 上提供数据库和代码。 构建野外虚拟现实视频感知质量评估数据库并开发客观评估模型 Wen Wen,Mu Li,Yiru Yao,Xiangjie Sui,Yabin Zhang,Long Lan,Yuming Fang,Kede Ma cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Trung-Kien Le,Ping Li
title: From a few Accurate 2D Correspondences to 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 从一些精确的 2D 对应到 3D 点云
abstract: Key points, correspondences, projection matrices, point clouds and dense clouds are the skeletons in image-based 3D reconstruction, of which point clouds have the important role in generating a realistic and natural model for a 3D reconstructed object. To achieve a good 3D reconstruction, the point clouds must be almost everywhere in the surface of the object. In this article, with a main purpose to build the point clouds covering the entire surface of the object, we propose a new feature named a geodesic feature or geo-feature. Based on the new geo-feature, if there are several (given) initial world points on the object's surface along with all accurately estimated projection matrices, some new world points on the geodesics connecting any two of these given world points will be reconstructed. Then the regions on the surface bordering by these initial world points will be covered by the point clouds. Thus, if the initial world points are around the surface, the point clouds will cover the entire surface. This article proposes a new method to estimate the world points and projection matrices from their correspondences. This method derives the closed-form and iterative solutions for the world points and projection matrices and proves that when the number of world points is less than seven and the number of images is at least five, the proposed solutions are global optimal. We propose an algorithm named World points from their Correspondences (WPfC) to estimate the world points and projection matrices from their correspondences, and another algorithm named Creating Point Clouds (CrPC) to create the point clouds from the world points and projection matrices given by the first algorithm.
summary: Key points, correspondences, projection matrices, point clouds and dense clouds are the skeletons in image-based 3D reconstruction, of which point clouds have the important role in generating a realistic and natural model for a 3D reconstructed object. To achieve a good 3D reconstruction, the point clouds must be almost everywhere in the surface of the object. In this article, with a main purpose to build the point clouds covering the entire surface of the object, we propose a new feature named a geodesic feature or geo-feature. Based on the new geo-feature, if there are several (given) initial world points on the object's surface along with all accurately estimated projection matrices, some new world points on the geodesics connecting any two of these given world points will be reconstructed. Then the regions on the surface bordering by these initial world points will be covered by the point clouds. Thus, if the initial world points are around the surface, the point clouds will cover the entire surface. This article proposes a new method to estimate the world points and projection matrices from their correspondences. This method derives the closed-form and iterative solutions for the world points and projection matrices and proves that when the number of world points is less than seven and the number of images is at least five, the proposed solutions are global optimal. We propose an algorithm named World points from their Correspondences (WPfC) to estimate the world points and projection matrices from their correspondences, and another algorithm named Creating Point Clouds (CrPC) to create the point clouds from the world points and projection matrices given by the first algorithm.
abstract_zh: 关键点、对应关系、投影矩阵、点云和密集云是基于图像的 3D 重建的骨架，其中点云在为 3D 重建对象生成逼真且自然的模型方面发挥着重要作用。为了实现良好的 3D 重建，点云必须几乎遍布物体表面的任何位置。在本文中，主要目的是构建覆盖对象整个表面的点云，我们提出了一种称为测地线特征或地理特征的新特征。基于新的地理特征，如果物体表面上存在多个（给定的）初始世界点以及所有精确估计的投影矩阵，则将重建连接这些给定世界点中的任意两个的测地线上的一些新世界点。然后，表面上与这些初始世界点接壤的区域将被点云覆盖。因此，如果初始世界点位于表面周围，则点云将覆盖整个表面。本文提出了一种根据世界点和投影矩阵的对应关系来估计它们的新方法。该方法推导了世界点和投影矩阵的闭式迭代解，并证明当世界点的数量小于7且图像的数量至少为5时，所提出的解是全局最优的。我们提出了一种名为“世界点从其对应关系”（WPfC）的算法，用于根据其对应关系估计世界点和投影矩阵，以及另一种名为“创建点云”（CrPC）的算法，用于根据第一个算法给出的世界点和投影矩阵创建点云。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从少量准确的2D对应关系生成覆盖物体表面的3D点云的新方法。
AI.motivation: 在基于图像的3D重建中，点云需覆盖物体表面以生成真实模型，但现有方法难以从稀疏初始点高效生成密集点云。
AI.method: 引入基于测地线距离的geo-feature，通过初始点间的测地线生成新点；提出WPfC算法估计世界点和投影矩阵，以及CrPC算法生成点云，并证明在特定条件下解的全局最优性。
AI.result: 成功生成覆盖物体表面的点云，当初始点分布于表面时可覆盖全局；WPfC和CrPC算法有效且满足优化条件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稀疏初始点和投影矩阵高效生成密集点云，为图像-based 3D重建提供了新思路和优化解决方案。

authors_text: Donghao Qiao,Amtul Haq Ayesha,Farhana Zulkernine,Raihan Masroor,Nauman Jaffar
title: ReViSe: Remote Vital Signs Measurement Using Smartphone Camera
title_zh: ReViSe：使用智能手机摄像头进行远程生命体征测量
abstract: We propose an end-to-end framework to measure people's vital signs including Heart Rate (HR), Heart Rate Variability (HRV), Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) and Blood Pressure (BP) based on the rPPG methodology from the video of a user's face captured with a smartphone camera. We extract face landmarks with a deep learning-based neural network model in real-time. Multiple face patches also called Regions-of-Interest (RoIs) are extracted by using the predicted face landmarks. Several filters are applied to reduce the noise from the RoIs in the extracted cardiac signals called Blood Volume Pulse (BVP) signal. The measurements of HR, HRV and SpO2 are validated on two public rPPG datasets namely the TokyoTech rPPG and the Pulse Rate Detection (PURE) datasets, on which our models achieved the following Mean Absolute Errors (MAE): a) for HR, 1.73Beats-Per-Minute (bpm) and 3.95bpm respectively; b) for HRV, 18.55ms and 25.03ms respectively, and c) for SpO2, an MAE of 1.64% on the PURE dataset. We validated our end-to-end rPPG framework, ReViSe, in daily living environment, and thereby created the Video-HR dataset. Our HR estimation model achieved an MAE of 2.49bpm on this dataset. Since no publicly available rPPG datasets existed for BP measurement with face videos, we used a dataset with signals from fingertip sensor to train our deep learning-based BP estimation model and also created our own video dataset, Video-BP. On our Video-BP dataset, our BP estimation model achieved an MAE of 6.7mmHg for Systolic Blood Pressure (SBP), and an MAE of 9.6mmHg for Diastolic Blood Pressure (DBP). ReViSe framework has been validated on datasets with videos recorded in daily living environment as opposed to less noisy laboratory environment as reported by most state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: We propose an end-to-end framework to measure people's vital signs including Heart Rate (HR), Heart Rate Variability (HRV), Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) and Blood Pressure (BP) based on the rPPG methodology from the video of a user's face captured with a smartphone camera. The measurements of HR, HRV and SpO2 are validated on two public rPPG datasets namely the TokyoTech rPPG and the Pulse Rate Detection (PURE) datasets, on which our models achieved the following Mean Absolute Errors (MAE): a) for HR, 1.73Beats-Per-Minute (bpm) and 3.95bpm respectively; b) for HRV, 18.55ms and 25.03ms respectively, and c) for SpO2, an MAE of 1.64% on the PURE dataset. We validated our end-to-end rPPG framework, ReViSe, in daily living environment, and thereby created the Video-HR dataset. Our HR estimation model achieved an MAE of 2.49bpm on this dataset. Since no publicly available rPPG datasets existed for BP measurement with face videos, we used a dataset with signals from fingertip sensor to train our deep learning-based BP estimation model and also created our own video dataset, Video-BP. On our Video-BP dataset, our BP estimation model achieved an MAE of 6.7mmHg for Systolic Blood Pressure (SBP), and an MAE of 9.6mmHg for Diastolic Blood Pressure (DBP). ReViSe framework has been validated on datasets with videos recorded in daily living environment as opposed to less noisy laboratory environment as reported by most state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个端到端框架来测量人们的生命体征，包括心率 (HR)、心率变异性 (HRV)、血氧饱和度 (SpO2) 和血压 (BP)，该框架基于使用智能手机摄像头捕获的用户面部视频的 rPPG 方法。我们使用基于深度学习的神经网络模型实时提取人脸特征点。通过使用预测的面部标志来提取也称为感兴趣区域 (RoI) 的多个面部补丁。应用多个滤波器来减少提取的心脏信号（称为血量脉冲 (BVP) 信号）中 RoI 的噪声。 HR、HRV 和 SpO2 的测量结果在两个公共 rPPG 数据集（即 TokyoTech rPPG 和脉搏率检测 (PURE) 数据集）上进行了验证，我们的模型在这两个数据集上实现了以下平均绝对误差 (MAE)：a) 对于 HR，分别为 1.73 次每分钟心跳 (bpm) 和 3.95bpm； b) 对于 HRV，分别为 18.55 毫秒和 25.03 毫秒，c) 对于 SpO2，PURE 数据集上的 MAE 为 1.64%。我们在日常生活环境中验证了我们的端到端 rPPG 框架 ReViSe，从而创建了 Video-HR 数据集。我们的 HR 估计模型在此数据集上实现了 2.49bpm 的 MAE。由于没有公开可用的 rPPG 数据集用于面部视频血压测量，因此我们使用包含指尖传感器信号的数据集来训练我们基于深度学习的血压估计模型，并创建了我们自己的视频数据集 Video-BP。在我们的 Video-BP 数据集上，我们的血压估计模型实现了收缩压 (SBP) 的 MAE 为 6.7mmHg，舒张压 (DBP) 的 MAE 为 9.6mmHg。 ReViSe 框架已在日常生活环境中录制的视频数据集上进行了验证，而不是大多数最先进技术报告的噪音较小的实验室环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReViSe框架，利用智能手机摄像头通过远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）测量人体心率、心率变异性、血氧饱和度和血压。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多在实验室环境下进行，缺乏真实场景验证。本文旨在开发可在日常环境中使用的非接触式健康监测方法，并填补面部视频数据在血压测量领域的数据空白。
AI.method: 基于深度学习实时提取面部关键点，分割感兴趣区域（RoIs）并过滤噪声；利用公开数据集（TokyoTech、PURE）和自建数据集（Video-HR/Video-BP）训练模型，采用指尖传感器数据辅助血压估计。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上HR误差1.73-3.95bpm，HRV误差18.55-25.03ms，SpO2误差1.64%；自建数据集HR误差2.49bpm，血压估计误差SBP 6.7mmHg、DBP 9.6mmHg。
AI.conclusion: ReViSe框架在真实场景中验证了有效性，通过自建数据集解决了面部视频血压测量的空白，为可穿戴健康监测提供了新思路。
