Dataset and baselines are available (https://github.com/mediatechnologycenter/aestheval). 由于其主观性，美学的计算推理是一项定义不明确的任务。人们已经提出了许多数据集来通过提供基于人类评分的图像对和美学分数来解决这个问题。然而，人类更擅长通过语言来表达自己的观点、品味和情感，而不是用单一的数字来概括它们。事实上，照片评论提供了更丰富的信息，因为它们揭示了用户如何以及为何评价视觉刺激的美感。在这方面，我们提出了 Reddit 照片评论数据集（RPCD），其中包含图像和照片评论的元组。 RPCD 由 74K 张图像和 220K 条评论组成，收集自 Reddit 社区，业余爱好者和专业摄影师可以通过利用建设性的社区反馈来提高他们的摄影技能。所提出的数据集与以前的美学数据集主要在三个方面有所不同，即（i）数据集的大规模和批评图像不同方面的评论的扩展，（ii）它主要包含超高清图像，（iii）它可以很容易地扩展到新数据，因为它是通过自动管道收集的。据我们所知，在这项工作中，我们首次尝试从评论中评估视觉刺激的美学质量。为此，我们利用批评情绪的极性作为审美判断的指标。我们展示了情感极性如何与两个审美评估基准的审美判断呈正相关。最后，我们通过使用情绪分数作为图像排名的目标来试验几种模型。数据集和基线可用（https://github.com/mediatechnologycenter/aestheval）。 该论文提出一个基于语言的图像美学评估数据集RPCD，并利用评论中的情感极性分析图像美学质量。 Daniel Vera Nieto,Luigi Celona,Clara Fernandez-Labrador cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Firat Ozdemir,Berkan Lafci,Xosé Luís Deán-Ben,Daniel Razansky,Fernando Perez-Cruz
title: OADAT: Experimental and Synthetic Clinical Optoacoustic Data for Standardized Image Processing
title_zh: OADAT：用于标准化图像处理的实验和综合临床光声数据
comment: Accepted to TMLR. 32 pages, 24 figures, 9 tables
comments: Accepted to TMLR. 32 pages, 24 figures, 9 tables
abstract: Optoacoustic (OA) imaging is based on excitation of biological tissues with nanosecond-duration laser pulses followed by subsequent detection of ultrasound waves generated via light-absorption-mediated thermoelastic expansion. OA imaging features a powerful combination between rich optical contrast and high resolution in deep tissues. This enabled the exploration of a number of attractive new applications both in clinical and laboratory settings. However, no standardized datasets generated with different types of experimental set-up and associated processing methods are available to facilitate advances in broader applications of OA in clinical settings. This complicates an objective comparison between new and established data processing methods, often leading to qualitative results and arbitrary interpretations of the data. In this paper, we provide both experimental and synthetic OA raw signals and reconstructed image domain datasets rendered with different experimental parameters and tomographic acquisition geometries. We further provide trained neural networks to tackle three important challenges related to OA image processing, namely accurate reconstruction under limited view tomographic conditions, removal of spatial undersampling artifacts and anatomical segmentation for improved image reconstruction. Specifically, we define 44 experiments corresponding to the aforementioned challenges as benchmarks to be used as a reference for the development of more advanced processing methods.
summary: Optoacoustic (OA) imaging is based on excitation of biological tissues with nanosecond-duration laser pulses followed by subsequent detection of ultrasound waves generated via light-absorption-mediated thermoelastic expansion. OA imaging features a powerful combination between rich optical contrast and high resolution in deep tissues. This enabled the exploration of a number of attractive new applications both in clinical and laboratory settings. However, no standardized datasets generated with different types of experimental set-up and associated processing methods are available to facilitate advances in broader applications of OA in clinical settings. This complicates an objective comparison between new and established data processing methods, often leading to qualitative results and arbitrary interpretations of the data. In this paper, we provide both experimental and synthetic OA raw signals and reconstructed image domain datasets rendered with different experimental parameters and tomographic acquisition geometries. We further provide trained neural networks to tackle three important challenges related to OA image processing, namely accurate reconstruction under limited view tomographic conditions, removal of spatial undersampling artifacts and anatomical segmentation for improved image reconstruction. Specifically, we define 44 experiments corresponding to the aforementioned challenges as benchmarks to be used as a reference for the development of more advanced processing methods.
abstract_zh: 光声 (OA) 成像基于纳秒持续时间的激光脉冲激发生物组织，随后检测通过光吸收介导的热弹性膨胀产生的超声波。 OA 成像将丰富的光学对比度与深层组织的高分辨率完美结合。这使得在临床和实验室环境中探索许多有吸引力的新应用成为可能。然而，没有使用不同类型的实验设置和相关处理方法生成的标准化数据集来促进 OA 在临床环境中更广泛应用的进展。这使得新的和已建立的数据处理方法之间的客观比较变得复杂，通常会导致定性结果和对数据的任意解释。在本文中，我们提供了实验和合成的 OA 原始信号以及使用不同实验参数和断层扫描采集几何形状渲染的重建图像域数据集。我们进一步提供经过训练的神经网络来解决与 OA 图像处理相关的三个重要挑战，即有限视图断层扫描条件下的精确重建、空间欠采样伪影的去除以及用于改进图像重建的解剖分割。具体来说，我们定义了与上述挑战相对应的 44 个实验作为基准，作为开发更先进处理方法的参考。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了OADAT数据集，包含实验和合成的光声数据，用于标准化图像处理。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏标准化的光声数据集，这使得新旧数据处理方法的客观比较变得困难，常导致定性结果和任意解释。
AI.method: 论文提供了实验和合成的光声原始信号和重建图像数据集，并提供了训练好的神经网络以解决三个关键问题：有限视角下的准确重建、空间欠采样伪影的去除和解剖分割。
AI.result: 定义了44个实验作为基准，用于开发更先进的图像处理方法。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和方法为光声图像处理的标准化和方法比较提供了重要的参考基准。

authors_text: Yu Zhao,Yunxin Li,Yuxiang Wu,Baotian Hu,Qingcai Chen,Xiaolong Wang,Yuxin Ding,Min Zhang
title: Medical Dialogue Response Generation with Pivotal Information Recalling
title_zh: 通过关键信息回忆生成医疗对话响应
abstract: Medical dialogue generation is an important yet challenging task. Most previous works rely on the attention mechanism and large-scale pretrained language models. However, these methods often fail to acquire pivotal information from the long dialogue history to yield an accurate and informative response, due to the fact that the medical entities usually scatters throughout multiple utterances along with the complex relationships between them. To mitigate this problem, we propose a medical response generation model with Pivotal Information Recalling (MedPIR), which is built on two components, i.e., knowledge-aware dialogue graph encoder and recall-enhanced generator. The knowledge-aware dialogue graph encoder constructs a dialogue graph by exploiting the knowledge relationships between entities in the utterances, and encodes it with a graph attention network. Then, the recall-enhanced generator strengthens the usage of these pivotal information by generating a summary of the dialogue before producing the actual response. Experimental results on two large-scale medical dialogue datasets show that MedPIR outperforms the strong baselines in BLEU scores and medical entities F1 measure.
summary: Medical dialogue generation is an important yet challenging task. Most previous works rely on the attention mechanism and large-scale pretrained language models. However, these methods often fail to acquire pivotal information from the long dialogue history to yield an accurate and informative response, due to the fact that the medical entities usually scatters throughout multiple utterances along with the complex relationships between them. To mitigate this problem, we propose a medical response generation model with Pivotal Information Recalling (MedPIR), which is built on two components, i.e., knowledge-aware dialogue graph encoder and recall-enhanced generator. The knowledge-aware dialogue graph encoder constructs a dialogue graph by exploiting the knowledge relationships between entities in the utterances, and encodes it with a graph attention network. Then, the recall-enhanced generator strengthens the usage of these pivotal information by generating a summary of the dialogue before producing the actual response. Experimental results on two large-scale medical dialogue datasets show that MedPIR outperforms the strong baselines in BLEU scores and medical entities F1 measure.
abstract_zh: 医学对话生成是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。之前的大多数工作都依赖于注意力机制和大规模预训练语言模型。然而，由于医疗实体通常分散在多个话语中以及它们之间的复杂关系，这些方法通常无法从漫长的对话历史中获取关键信息，从而产生准确且信息丰富的响应。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种具有关键信息召回（MedPIR）的医疗响应生成模型，该模型基于两个组件构建，即知识感知对话图编码器和召回增强生成器。知识感知对话图编码器通过利用话语中实体之间的知识关系构建对话图，并使用图注意网络对其进行编码。然后，召回增强生成器通过在生成实际响应之前生成对话摘要来加强对这些关键信息的使用。两个大型医学对话数据集上的实验结果表明，MedPIR 在 BLEU 评分和医疗实体 F1 测量方面优于强基线。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于关键信息回忆的医疗对话响应生成模型，以解决长对话历史中关键信息提取不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖注意力机制和预训练模型，但难以从分散在多轮对话中的医疗实体及其复杂关系中提取关键信息，导致响应准确性不足。
AI.method: 构建包含知识感知对话图编码器和回忆增强生成器的MedPIR模型，前者通过图注意力网络编码对话中的实体关系，后者通过生成对话摘要强化关键信息利用。
AI.result: 在两个大型医疗对话数据集上，MedPIR在BLEU分数和医疗实体F1指标上均优于现有强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MedPIR通过有效捕捉和利用对话中的关键医疗信息，在医疗对话生成任务中取得显著性能提升。

Most previous works rely on the attention mechanism and large-scale pretrained language models. However, these methods often fail to acquire pivotal information from the long dialogue history to yield an accurate and informative response, due to the fact that the medical entities usually scatters throughout multiple utterances along with the complex relationships between them. The knowledge-aware dialogue graph encoder constructs a dialogue graph by exploiting the knowledge relationships between entities in the utterances, and encodes it with a graph attention network. Then, the recall-enhanced generator strengthens the usage of these pivotal information by generating a summary of the dialogue before producing the actual response. Experimental results on two large-scale medical dialogue datasets show that MedPIR outperforms the strong baselines in BLEU scores and medical entities F1 measure. 医学对话生成是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。之前的大多数工作都依赖于注意力机制和大规模预训练语言模型。然而，由于医疗实体通常分散在多个话语中以及它们之间的复杂关系，这些方法通常无法从漫长的对话历史中获取关键信息，从而产生准确且信息丰富的响应。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种具有关键信息召回（MedPIR）的医疗响应生成模型，该模型基于两个组件构建，即知识感知对话图编码器和召回增强生成器。知识感知对话图编码器通过利用话语中实体之间的知识关系构建对话图，并使用图注意网络对其进行编码。然后，召回增强生成器通过在生成实际响应之前生成对话摘要来加强对这些关键信息的使用。两个大型医学对话数据集上的实验结果表明，MedPIR 在 BLEU 评分和医疗实体 F1 测量方面优于强基线。 提出一种基于关键信息回忆的医疗对话响应生成模型，以解决长对话历史中关键信息提取不足的问题。 Yu Zhao,Yunxin Li,Yuxiang Wu,Baotian Hu,Qingcai Chen,Xiaolong Wang,Yuxin Ding,Min Zhang cs.AI

authors_text: Rui He,Yuanxi Sun,Youzeng Li,Zuwei Huang,Feng Hu,Xu Cheng,Jie Tang
title: Masked Autoencoders for Generic Event Boundary Detection CVPR'2022 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界检测的屏蔽自动编码器 CVPR'2022 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge
abstract: Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) tasks aim at detecting generic, taxonomy-free event boundaries that segment a whole video into chunks. In this paper, we apply Masked Autoencoders to improve algorithm performance on the GEBD tasks. Our approach mainly adopted the ensemble of Masked Autoencoders fine-tuned on the GEBD task as a self-supervised learner with other base models. Moreover, we also use a semi-supervised pseudo-label method to take full advantage of the abundant unlabeled Kinetics-400 data while training. In addition, we propose a soft-label method to partially balance the positive and negative samples and alleviate the problem of ambiguous labeling in this task. Lastly, a tricky segmentation alignment policy is implemented to refine boundaries predicted by our models to more accurate locations. With our approach, we achieved 85.94% on the F1-score on the Kinetics-GEBD test set, which improved the F1-score by 2.31% compared to the winner of the 2021 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/ContentAndMaterialPortrait/MAE-GEBD.
summary: Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) tasks aim at detecting generic, taxonomy-free event boundaries that segment a whole video into chunks. In this paper, we apply Masked Autoencoders to improve algorithm performance on the GEBD tasks. Our approach mainly adopted the ensemble of Masked Autoencoders fine-tuned on the GEBD task as a self-supervised learner with other base models. Moreover, we also use a semi-supervised pseudo-label method to take full advantage of the abundant unlabeled Kinetics-400 data while training. In addition, we propose a soft-label method to partially balance the positive and negative samples and alleviate the problem of ambiguous labeling in this task. Lastly, a tricky segmentation alignment policy is implemented to refine boundaries predicted by our models to more accurate locations. With our approach, we achieved 85.94% on the F1-score on the Kinetics-GEBD test set, which improved the F1-score by 2.31% compared to the winner of the 2021 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/ContentAndMaterialPortrait/MAE-GEBD.
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界检测 (GEBD) 任务旨在检测通用的、无分类的事件边界，将整个视频分割成块。在本文中，我们应用 Masked Autoencoders 来提高 GEBD 任务的算法性能。我们的方法主要采用了在 GEBD 任务上微调的蒙蔽自动编码器集合，作为具有其他基础模型的自监督学习器。此外，我们还使用半监督伪标签方法，在训练时充分利用丰富的未标记 Kinetics-400 数据。此外，我们提出了一种软标签方法来部分平衡正样本和负样本，并缓解该任务中标签模糊的问题。最后，实施了一个棘手的分割对齐策略，以将我们的模型预测的边界细化到更准确的位置。通过我们的方法，我们在 Kinetics-GEBD 测试集上取得了 85.94% 的 F1 分数，与 2021 年 Kinetics-GEBD 挑战赛的获胜者相比，F1 分数提高了 2.31%。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ContentAndMaterialPortrait/MAE-GEBD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用掩码自编码器（MAE）改进通用事件边界检测（GEBD）任务的算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GEBD方法在处理无分类标签的事件边界检测时存在性能瓶颈，需探索更有效的自监督学习框架以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 采用MAE作为自监督学习器与基模型集成，结合半监督伪标签方法利用Kinetics-400未标注数据，并提出软标签平衡策略与分割对齐策略优化边界预测。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD测试集上达到85.94%的F1分数，较2021年挑战赛冠军提升2.31%。
AI.conclusion: MAE框架结合半监督策略与边界优化方法显著提升了GEBD任务的检测精度，为视频分割提供了新思路。

search_text: Masked Autoencoders for Generic Event Boundary Detection CVPR'2022 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge 用于通用事件边界检测的屏蔽自动编码器 CVPR'2022 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) tasks aim at detecting generic, taxonomy-free event boundaries that segment a whole video into chunks. In this paper, we apply Masked Autoencoders to improve algorithm performance on the GEBD tasks. Our approach mainly adopted the ensemble of Masked Autoencoders fine-tuned on the GEBD task as a self-supervised learner with other base models. Moreover, we also use a semi-supervised pseudo-label method to take full advantage of the abundant unlabeled Kinetics-400 data while training. In addition, we propose a soft-label method to partially balance the positive and negative samples and alleviate the problem of ambiguous labeling in this task. Lastly, a tricky segmentation alignment policy is implemented to refine boundaries predicted by our models to more accurate locations. With our approach, we achieved 85.94% on the F1-score on the Kinetics-GEBD test set, which improved the F1-score by 2.31% compared to the winner of the 2021 Kinetics-GEBD Challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/ContentAndMaterialPortrait/MAE-GEBD. 通用事件边界检测 (GEBD) 任务旨在检测通用的、无分类的事件边界，将整个视频分割成块。在本文中，我们应用 Masked Autoencoders 来提高 GEBD 任务的算法性能。我们的方法主要采用了在 GEBD 任务上微调的蒙蔽自动编码器集合，作为具有其他基础模型的自监督学习器。此外，我们还使用半监督伪标签方法，在训练时充分利用丰富的未标记 Kinetics-400 数据。此外，我们提出了一种软标签方法来部分平衡正样本和负样本，并缓解该任务中标签模糊的问题。最后，实施了一个棘手的分割对齐策略，以将我们的模型预测的边界细化到更准确的位置。通过我们的方法，我们在 Kinetics-GEBD 测试集上取得了 85.94% 的 F1 分数，与 2021 年 Kinetics-GEBD 挑战赛的获胜者相比，F1 分数提高了 2.31%。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ContentAndMaterialPortrait/MAE-GEBD。 本文提出使用掩码自编码器（MAE）改进通用事件边界检测（GEBD）任务的算法性能。 Rui He,Yuanxi Sun,Youzeng Li,Zuwei Huang,Feng Hu,Xu Cheng,Jie Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Huang Huang,Michael Danielczuk,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Ken Goldberg
title: Optimal Shelf Arrangement to Minimize Robot Retrieval Time
title_zh: 优化货架排列以最大限度地减少机器人检索时间
comment: 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
comments: 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
abstract: Shelves are commonly used to store objects in homes, stores, and warehouses. We formulate the problem of Optimal Shelf Arrangement (OSA), where the goal is to optimize the arrangement of objects on a shelf for access time given an access frequency and movement cost for each object. We propose OSA-MIP, a mixed-integer program (MIP), show that it finds an optimal solution for OSA under certain conditions, and provide bounds on its suboptimal solutions in general cost settings. We analytically characterize a necessary and sufficient shelf density condition for which there exists an arrangement such that any object can be retrieved without removing objects from the shelf. Experimental data from 1,575 simulated shelf trials and 54 trials with a physical Fetch robot equipped with a pushing blade and suction grasping tool suggest that arranging the objects optimally reduces the expected retrieval cost by 60-80% in fully-observed configurations and reduces the expected search cost by 50-70% while increasing the search success rate by up to 2x in partially-observed configurations.
summary: Shelves are commonly used to store objects in homes, stores, and warehouses. We formulate the problem of Optimal Shelf Arrangement (OSA), where the goal is to optimize the arrangement of objects on a shelf for access time given an access frequency and movement cost for each object. We propose OSA-MIP, a mixed-integer program (MIP), show that it finds an optimal solution for OSA under certain conditions, and provide bounds on its suboptimal solutions in general cost settings. We analytically characterize a necessary and sufficient shelf density condition for which there exists an arrangement such that any object can be retrieved without removing objects from the shelf. Experimental data from 1,575 simulated shelf trials and 54 trials with a physical Fetch robot equipped with a pushing blade and suction grasping tool suggest that arranging the objects optimally reduces the expected retrieval cost by 60-80% in fully-observed configurations and reduces the expected search cost by 50-70% while increasing the search success rate by up to 2x in partially-observed configurations.
abstract_zh: 货架通常用于家庭、商店和仓库中存放物品。我们提出了最佳货架排列（OSA）问题，其目标是在给定每个对象的访问频率和移动成本的情况下，针对访问时间优化货架上对象的排列。我们提出了 OSA-MIP，一种混合​​整数程序 (MIP)，表明它在某些条件下找到 OSA 的最佳解决方案，并在一般成本设置下提供其次优解决方案的界限。我们分析地描述了一个必要且充分的货架密度条件，在该条件下，存在一种安排，使得任何物体都可以在不从货架上移除物体的情况下被检索。 1,575 次模拟货架试验和 54 次配备推刀和吸力抓取工具的物理 Fetch 机器人试验的实验数据表明，在完全观察配置中，对物体进行最佳排列可将预期检索成本降低 60-80%，将预期搜索成本降低 50-70%，同时在部分观察配置中将搜索成功率提高多达 2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过优化货架上物品的排列方式，最小化机器人取物时的时间消耗。
AI.motivation: 货架广泛应用于家庭、商店和仓库，但现有排列方式可能因访问频率和移动成本不同而效率低下，需优化以提升机器人取物效率。
AI.method: 提出混合整数规划模型OSA-MIP，分析货架密度条件，并通过1575次模拟和54次物理机器人实验验证效果。
AI.result: 最优排列使全观测场景下取物成本降低60-80%，部分观测场景下搜索成本降低50-70%且搜索成功率提升至2倍。
AI.conclusion: 优化货架排列能显著提升机器人取物效率，OSA-MIP在理论分析与实验中均表现有效，为实际仓储管理提供可行方案。

authors_text: Christopher J. Holder,Muhammad Shafique
title: On Efficient Real-Time Semantic Segmentation: A Survey
title_zh: 关于高效实时语义分割：一项调查
comment: 19 pages, 13 figures, 4 tables This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 19 pages, 13 figures, 4 tables This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Semantic segmentation is the problem of assigning a class label to every pixel in an image, and is an important component of an autonomous vehicle vision stack for facilitating scene understanding and object detection. However, many of the top performing semantic segmentation models are extremely complex and cumbersome, and as such are not suited to deployment onboard autonomous vehicle platforms where computational resources are limited and low-latency operation is a vital requirement. In this survey, we take a thorough look at the works that aim to address this misalignment with more compact and efficient models capable of deployment on low-memory embedded systems while meeting the constraint of real-time inference. We discuss several of the most prominent works in the field, placing them within a taxonomy based on their major contributions, and finally we evaluate the inference speed of the discussed models under consistent hardware and software setups that represent a typical research environment with high-end GPU and a realistic deployed scenario using low-memory embedded GPU hardware. Our experimental results demonstrate that many works are capable of real-time performance on resource-constrained hardware, while illustrating the consistent trade-off between latency and accuracy.
summary: Semantic segmentation is the problem of assigning a class label to every pixel in an image, and is an important component of an autonomous vehicle vision stack for facilitating scene understanding and object detection. However, many of the top performing semantic segmentation models are extremely complex and cumbersome, and as such are not suited to deployment onboard autonomous vehicle platforms where computational resources are limited and low-latency operation is a vital requirement. In this survey, we take a thorough look at the works that aim to address this misalignment with more compact and efficient models capable of deployment on low-memory embedded systems while meeting the constraint of real-time inference. We discuss several of the most prominent works in the field, placing them within a taxonomy based on their major contributions, and finally we evaluate the inference speed of the discussed models under consistent hardware and software setups that represent a typical research environment with high-end GPU and a realistic deployed scenario using low-memory embedded GPU hardware. Our experimental results demonstrate that many works are capable of real-time performance on resource-constrained hardware, while illustrating the consistent trade-off between latency and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是为图像中的每个像素分配类标签的问题，是自动驾驶车辆视觉堆栈的重要组成部分，用于促进场景理解和对象检测。然而，许多性能最佳的语义分割模型都极其复杂和繁琐，因此不适合部署在计算资源有限且低延迟操作是至关重要的要求的车载自动驾驶车辆平台上。在本次调查中，我们深入研究了旨在通过能够部署在低内存嵌入式系统上同时满足实时推理约束的更紧凑、更高效的模型来解决这种不一致问题的工作。我们讨论了该领域中几个最著名的工作，根据其主要贡献将它们置于分类法中，最后我们评估了所讨论模型在一致的硬件和软件设置下的推理速度，这些设置代表了具有高端 GPU 的典型研究环境和使用低内存嵌入式 GPU 硬件的实际部署场景。我们的实验结果表明，许多工作能够在资源受限的硬件上实现实时性能，同时说明延迟和准确性之间的一致权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了高效实时语义分割方法，旨在解决自动驾驶等场景中计算资源受限下的实时性需求。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度模型复杂且计算量大，难以满足自动驾驶等嵌入式系统对低延迟和有限计算资源的需求。
AI.method: 通过分类讨论主流方法，基于统一硬件环境和嵌入式硬件场景评估模型推理速度，分析精度与延迟的权衡。
AI.result: 实验表明多种方法可在资源受限硬件上实现实时分割，但存在精度与延迟的持续权衡。
AI.conclusion: 高效实时分割需平衡精度与效率，未来研究应关注模型压缩与硬件优化协同设计。

tldr: 本文综述了高效实时语义分割方法，旨在解决自动驾驶等场景中计算资源受限下的实时性需求。
motivation: 现有高精度模型复杂且计算量大，难以满足自动驾驶等嵌入式系统对低延迟和有限计算资源的需求。
method: 通过分类讨论主流方法，基于统一硬件环境和嵌入式硬件场景评估模型推理速度，分析精度与延迟的权衡。
result: 实验表明多种方法可在资源受限硬件上实现实时分割，但存在精度与延迟的持续权衡。
conclusion: 高效实时分割需平衡精度与效率，未来研究应关注模型压缩与硬件优化协同设计。
search_text: On Efficient Real-Time Semantic Segmentation: A Survey 关于高效实时语义分割：一项调查 Semantic segmentation is the problem of assigning a class label to every pixel in an image, and is an important component of an autonomous vehicle vision stack for facilitating scene understanding and object detection. However, many of the top performing semantic segmentation models are extremely complex and cumbersome, and as such are not suited to deployment onboard autonomous vehicle platforms where computational resources are limited and low-latency operation is a vital requirement. In this survey, we take a thorough look at the works that aim to address this misalignment with more compact and efficient models capable of deployment on low-memory embedded systems while meeting the constraint of real-time inference. We discuss several of the most prominent works in the field, placing them within a taxonomy based on their major contributions, and finally we evaluate the inference speed of the discussed models under consistent hardware and software setups that represent a typical research environment with high-end GPU and a realistic deployed scenario using low-memory embedded GPU hardware. Our experimental results demonstrate that many works are capable of real-time performance on resource-constrained hardware, while illustrating the consistent trade-off between latency and accuracy. 语义分割是为图像中的每个像素分配类标签的问题，是自动驾驶车辆视觉堆栈的重要组成部分，用于促进场景理解和对象检测。然而，许多性能最佳的语义分割模型都极其复杂和繁琐，因此不适合部署在计算资源有限且低延迟操作是至关重要的要求的车载自动驾驶车辆平台上。在本次调查中，我们深入研究了旨在通过能够部署在低内存嵌入式系统上同时满足实时推理约束的更紧凑、更高效的模型来解决这种不一致问题的工作。我们讨论了该领域中几个最著名的工作，根据其主要贡献将它们置于分类法中，最后我们评估了所讨论模型在一致的硬件和软件设置下的推理速度，这些设置代表了具有高端 GPU 的典型研究环境和使用低内存嵌入式 GPU 硬件的实际部署场景。我们的实验结果表明，许多工作能够在资源受限的硬件上实现实时性能，同时说明延迟和准确性之间的一致权衡。 本文综述了高效实时语义分割方法，旨在解决自动驾驶等场景中计算资源受限下的实时性需求。 Christopher J. Holder,Muhammad Shafique cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lingyue Fu,Jianghao Lin,Weiwen Liu,Ruiming Tang,Weinan Zhang,Rui Zhang,Yong Yu
title: An F-shape Click Model for Information Retrieval on Multi-block Mobile Pages
title_zh: 多块移动页面信息检索的F型点击模型
comment: WSDM 2023. More readable and full version
comments: WSDM 2023. More readable and full version
abstract: To provide click simulation or relevance estimation based on users' implicit interaction feedback, click models have been much studied during recent years. Most click models focus on user behaviors towards a single list. However, with the development of user interface (UI) design, the layout of displayed items on a result page tends to be multi-block (i.e., multi-list) style instead of a single list, which requires different assumptions to model user behaviors more accurately. There exist click models for multi-block pages in desktop contexts, but they cannot be directly applied to mobile scenarios due to different interaction manners, result types and especially multi-block presentation styles. In particular, multi-block mobile pages can normally be decomposed into interleavings of basic vertical blocks and horizontal blocks, thus resulting in typically F-shape forms. To mitigate gaps between desktop and mobile contexts for multi-block pages, we conduct a user eye-tracking study, and identify users' sequential browsing, block skip and comparison patterns on F-shape pages. These findings lead to the design of a novel F-shape Click Model (FSCM), which serves as a general solution to multi-block mobile pages. Firstly, we construct a directed acyclic graph (DAG) for each page, where each item is regarded as a vertex and each edge indicates the user's possible examination flow. Secondly, we propose DAG-structured GRUs and a comparison module to model users' sequential (sequential browsing, block skip) and non-sequential (comparison) behaviors respectively. Finally, we combine GRU states and comparison patterns to perform user click predictions. Experiments on a large-scale real-world dataset validate the effectiveness of FSCM on user behavior predictions compared with baseline models.

In particular, multi-block mobile pages can normally be decomposed into interleavings of basic vertical blocks and horizontal blocks, thus resulting in typically F-shape forms. To mitigate gaps between desktop and mobile contexts for multi-block pages, we conduct a user eye-tracking study, and identify users' sequential browsing, block skip and comparison patterns on F-shape pages. These findings lead to the design of a novel F-shape Click Model (FSCM), which serves as a general solution to multi-block mobile pages. Firstly, we construct a directed acyclic graph (DAG) for each page, where each item is regarded as a vertex and each edge indicates the user's possible examination flow. Secondly, we propose DAG-structured GRUs and a comparison module to model users' sequential (sequential browsing, block skip) and non-sequential (comparison) behaviors respectively. Finally, we combine GRU states and comparison patterns to perform user click predictions. Experiments on a large-scale real-world dataset validate the effectiveness of FSCM on user behavior predictions compared with baseline models.
abstract_zh: 为了提供基于用户隐式交互反馈的点击模拟或相关性估计，点击模型近年来得到了大量研究。大多数点击模型关注用户对单个列表的行为。然而，随着用户界面（UI）设计的发展，结果页面上显示项目的布局趋向于多块（即多列表）样式而不是单个列表，这需要不同的假设来更准确地建模用户行为。桌面上下文中存在多块页面的点击模型，但由于交互方式、结果类型，尤其是多块呈现样式的不同，它们不能直接应用于移动场景。特别是，多块移动页面通常可以分解为基本垂直块和水平块的交错，从而产生典型的F形形式。为了缩小多块页面的桌面和移动环境之间的差距，我们进行了用户眼球跟踪研究，并识别用户在 F 形页面上的顺序浏览、块跳过和比较模式。这些发现导致了一种新颖的 F 形点击模型（FSCM）的设计，该模型可作为多块移动页面的通用解决方案。首先，我们为每个页面构建一个有向无环图（DAG），其中每个项目被视为一个顶点，每条边表示用户可能的检查流程。其次，我们提出了 DAG 结构的 GRU 和比较模块来分别对用户的顺序（顺序浏览、块跳过）和非顺序（比较）行为进行建模。最后，我们结合 GRU 状态和比较模式来执行用户点击预测。大规模现实数据集上的实验验证了 FSCM 与基线模型相比在用户行为预测方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对多区块移动页面的F形点击模型（FSCM），以更准确地模拟用户点击行为。
AI.motivation: 现有点击模型主要针对单列表布局，难以适应移动端多区块（多列表）页面的F形布局特性，需改进以提升行为预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建页面有向无环图（DAG），利用DAG结构的GRU和比较模块分别建模用户顺序浏览/跳块行为与非顺序比较行为，结合GRU状态与比较模式进行点击预测。
AI.result: 在大规模真实数据集上验证，FSCM在用户行为预测任务中显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: FSCM通过建模F形页面的用户浏览模式，为多区块移动页面的信息检索提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Francesco Ruscelli,Arturo Laurenzi,Nikos G. Tsagarakis,Enrico Mingo Hoffman
title: Prototyping fast and agile motions for legged robots with Horizon
title_zh: 使用 Horizo​​n 为腿式机器人制作快速灵活的运动原型
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures, workshop paper: 6th Workshop on Legged Robots
comments: 4 pages, 5 figures, workshop paper: 6th Workshop on Legged Robots
abstract: For legged robots to perform agile, highly dynamic and contact-rich motions, whole-body trajectories computation of under-actuated complex systems subject to non-linear dynamics is required. In this work, we present hands-on applications of Horizon, a novel open-source framework for trajectory optimization tailored to robotic systems, that provides a collection of tools to simplify dynamic motion generation. Horizon was tested on a broad range of behaviours involving several robotic platforms: we introduce its building blocks and describe the complete procedure to generate three complex motions using its intuitive and straightforward API.
summary: For legged robots to perform agile, highly dynamic and contact-rich motions, whole-body trajectories computation of under-actuated complex systems subject to non-linear dynamics is required. In this work, we present hands-on applications of Horizon, a novel open-source framework for trajectory optimization tailored to robotic systems, that provides a collection of tools to simplify dynamic motion generation. Horizon was tested on a broad range of behaviours involving several robotic platforms: we introduce its building blocks and describe the complete procedure to generate three complex motions using its intuitive and straightforward API.
abstract_zh: 为了让腿式机器人执行敏捷、高动态和接触丰富的运动，需要对受非线性动力学影响的欠驱动复杂系统进行全身轨迹计算。在这项工作中，我们展示了 Horizo​​n 的实际应用，这是一种针对机器人系统定制的轨迹优化的新型开源框架，它提供了一系列工具来简化动态运动的生成。 Horizo​​n 在涉及多个机器人平台的广泛行为上进行了测试：我们介绍了它的构建块，并描述了使用其直观和简单的 API 生成三个复杂运动的完整过程。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Horizon框架在腿式机器人快速敏捷运动原型设计中的应用，通过优化轨迹生成复杂动作。
AI.motivation: 腿式机器人执行复杂动态动作需解决欠驱动系统非线性动力学轨迹优化难题，传统方法复杂低效。
AI.method: 基于Horizon开源框架，利用其工具集和直观API，设计全身轨迹优化流程并实现三种复杂运动。
AI.result: 在多平台验证Horizon框架有效性，成功生成包含复杂接触和动态特性的三种典型运动模式。
AI.conclusion: Horizon框架简化了动态运动规划流程，为腿式机器人敏捷运动提供了高效可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Chaeyeon Chung,Taewoo Kim,Hyelin Nam,Seunghwan Choi,Gyojung Gu,Sunghyun Park,Jaegul Choo
title: HairFIT: Pose-Invariant Hairstyle Transfer via Flow-based Hair Alignment and Semantic-Region-Aware Inpainting
title_zh: HairFIT：通过基于流的头发对齐和语义区域感知修复实现姿势不变的发型转移
abstract: Hairstyle transfer is the task of modifying a source hairstyle to a target one. Although recent hairstyle transfer models can reflect the delicate features of hairstyles, they still have two major limitations. First, the existing methods fail to transfer hairstyles when a source and a target image have different poses (e.g., viewing direction or face size), which is prevalent in the real world. Also, the previous models generate unrealistic images when there is a non-trivial amount of regions in the source image occluded by its original hair. When modifying long hair to short hair, shoulders or backgrounds occluded by the long hair need to be inpainted. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework for pose-invariant hairstyle transfer, HairFIT. Our model consists of two stages: 1) flow-based hair alignment and 2) hair synthesis. In the hair alignment stage, we leverage a keypoint-based optical flow estimator to align a target hairstyle with a source pose. Then, we generate a final hairstyle-transferred image in the hair synthesis stage based on Semantic-region-aware Inpainting Mask (SIM) estimator. Our SIM estimator divides the occluded regions in the source image into different semantic regions to reflect their distinct features during the inpainting. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct quantitative and qualitative evaluations using multi-view datasets, K-hairstyle and VoxCeleb. The results indicate that HairFIT achieves a state-of-the-art performance by successfully transferring hairstyles between images of different poses, which has never been achieved before.
summary: Hairstyle transfer is the task of modifying a source hairstyle to a target one. Although recent hairstyle transfer models can reflect the delicate features of hairstyles, they still have two major limitations. First, the existing methods fail to transfer hairstyles when a source and a target image have different poses (e.g., viewing direction or face size), which is prevalent in the real world. Also, the previous models generate unrealistic images when there is a non-trivial amount of regions in the source image occluded by its original hair. When modifying long hair to short hair, shoulders or backgrounds occluded by the long hair need to be inpainted. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework for pose-invariant hairstyle transfer, HairFIT. Our model consists of two stages: 1) flow-based hair alignment and 2) hair synthesis. In the hair alignment stage, we leverage a keypoint-based optical flow estimator to align a target hairstyle with a source pose. Then, we generate a final hairstyle-transferred image in the hair synthesis stage based on Semantic-region-aware Inpainting Mask (SIM) estimator. Our SIM estimator divides the occluded regions in the source image into different semantic regions to reflect their distinct features during the inpainting. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct quantitative and qualitative evaluations using multi-view datasets, K-hairstyle and VoxCeleb. The results indicate that HairFIT achieves a state-of-the-art performance by successfully transferring hairstyles between images of different poses, which has never been achieved before.
abstract_zh: 发型迁移是将源发型修改为目标发型的任务。尽管最近的发型转移模型可以体现发型的精致特征，但它们仍然存在两大局限性。首先，当源图像和目标图像具有不同的姿势（例如，观看方向或面部大小）时，现有方法无法传输发型，这在现实世界中很普遍。此外，当源图像中存在大量被原始头发遮挡的区域时，先前的模型会生成不切实际的图像。长发改短发时，被长发遮挡的肩膀或者背景需要修复。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于姿势不变发型迁移的新颖框架，HairFIT。我们的模型由两个阶段组成：1）基于流的头发对齐和2）头发合成。在头发对齐阶段，我们利用基于关键点的光流估计器将目标发型与源姿势对齐。然后，我们在头发合成阶段基于语义区域感知修复掩模（SIM）估计器生成最终的发型转移图像。我们的 SIM 估计器将源图像中的遮挡区域划分为不同的语义区域，以反映它们在修复过程中的独特特征。为了证明我们模型的有效性，我们使用多视图数据集、K-hairstyle 和 VoxCeleb 进行定量和定性评估。结果表明，HairFIT 通过成功地在不同姿势的图像之间转移发型，实现了最先进的性能，这是以前从未实现过的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HairFIT的框架，用于解决不同姿态下发型迁移的问题，并处理源图像中被头发遮挡区域的修复。
AI.motivation: 现有发型迁移方法在源图像和目标图像姿态不同时（如视角或面部大小差异）无法有效迁移发型，且在处理大量被头发遮挡区域时生成结果不真实。
AI.method: HairFIT包含两个阶段：1）基于光流的关键点对齐，利用关键点光流估计器将目标发型与源姿态对齐；2）基于语义区域感知修复掩码（SIM）的发型合成，通过分割遮挡区域的语义区域实现更真实的修复。
AI.result: 在多视角数据集K-hairstyle和VoxCeleb上进行定量和定性评估，HairFIT在不同姿态图像间的发型迁移任务中达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: HairFIT首次实现了跨姿态的发型迁移，并通过语义区域感知修复有效解决了遮挡问题，为发型迁移领域提供了新方法。

search_text: HairFIT: Pose-Invariant Hairstyle Transfer via Flow-based Hair Alignment and Semantic-Region-Aware Inpainting HairFIT：通过基于流的头发对齐和语义区域感知修复实现姿势不变的发型转移 Hairstyle transfer is the task of modifying a source hairstyle to a target one. Although recent hairstyle transfer models can reflect the delicate features of hairstyles, they still have two major limitations. First, the existing methods fail to transfer hairstyles when a source and a target image have different poses (e.g., viewing direction or face size), which is prevalent in the real world. Also, the previous models generate unrealistic images when there is a non-trivial amount of regions in the source image occluded by its original hair. When modifying long hair to short hair, shoulders or backgrounds occluded by the long hair need to be inpainted. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework for pose-invariant hairstyle transfer, HairFIT. Our model consists of two stages: 1) flow-based hair alignment and 2) hair synthesis. In the hair alignment stage, we leverage a keypoint-based optical flow estimator to align a target hairstyle with a source pose. Then, we generate a final hairstyle-transferred image in the hair synthesis stage based on Semantic-region-aware Inpainting Mask (SIM) estimator. Our SIM estimator divides the occluded regions in the source image into different semantic regions to reflect their distinct features during the inpainting. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our model, we conduct quantitative and qualitative evaluations using multi-view datasets, K-hairstyle and VoxCeleb. The results indicate that HairFIT achieves a state-of-the-art performance by successfully transferring hairstyles between images of different poses, which has never been achieved before. 发型迁移是将源发型修改为目标发型的任务。尽管最近的发型转移模型可以体现发型的精致特征，但它们仍然存在两大局限性。首先，当源图像和目标图像具有不同的姿势（例如，观看方向或面部大小）时，现有方法无法传输发型，这在现实世界中很普遍。此外，当源图像中存在大量被原始头发遮挡的区域时，先前的模型会生成不切实际的图像。长发改短发时，被长发遮挡的肩膀或者背景需要修复。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于姿势不变发型迁移的新颖框架，HairFIT。我们的模型由两个阶段组成：1）基于流的头发对齐和2）头发合成。在头发对齐阶段，我们利用基于关键点的光流估计器将目标发型与源姿势对齐。然后，我们在头发合成阶段基于语义区域感知修复掩模（SIM）估计器生成最终的发型转移图像。我们的 SIM 估计器将源图像中的遮挡区域划分为不同的语义区域，以反映它们在修复过程中的独特特征。为了证明我们模型的有效性，我们使用多视图数据集、K-hairstyle 和 VoxCeleb 进行定量和定性评估。结果表明，HairFIT 通过成功地在不同姿势的图像之间转移发型，实现了最先进的性能，这是以前从未实现过的。 本文提出了一种名为HairFIT的框架，用于解决不同姿态下发型迁移的问题，并处理源图像中被头发遮挡区域的修复。 Chaeyeon Chung,Taewoo Kim,Hyelin Nam,Seunghwan Choi,Gyojung Gu,Sunghyun Park,Jaegul Choo cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Jin,Longhai Wu,Guotao Shen,Youxin Chen,Jie Chen,Jayoon Koo,Cheul-hee Hahm
title: Enhanced Bi-directional Motion Estimation for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 视频帧插值的增强型双向运动估计
abstract: We present a novel simple yet effective algorithm for motion-based video frame interpolation. Existing motion-based interpolation methods typically rely on a pre-trained optical flow model or a U-Net based pyramid network for motion estimation, which either suffer from large model size or limited capacity in handling complex and large motion cases. In this work, by carefully integrating intermediateoriented forward-warping, lightweight feature encoder, and correlation volume into a pyramid recurrent framework, we derive a compact model to simultaneously estimate the bidirectional motion between input frames. It is 15 times smaller in size than PWC-Net, yet enables more reliable and flexible handling of challenging motion cases. Based on estimated bi-directional motion, we forward-warp input frames and their context features to intermediate frame, and employ a synthesis network to estimate the intermediate frame from warped representations. Our method achieves excellent performance on a broad range of video frame interpolation benchmarks. Code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/srcn-ivl/EBME}.
summary: We present a novel simple yet effective algorithm for motion-based video frame interpolation. Existing motion-based interpolation methods typically rely on a pre-trained optical flow model or a U-Net based pyramid network for motion estimation, which either suffer from large model size or limited capacity in handling complex and large motion cases. In this work, by carefully integrating intermediateoriented forward-warping, lightweight feature encoder, and correlation volume into a pyramid recurrent framework, we derive a compact model to simultaneously estimate the bidirectional motion between input frames. It is 15 times smaller in size than PWC-Net, yet enables more reliable and flexible handling of challenging motion cases. Based on estimated bi-directional motion, we forward-warp input frames and their context features to intermediate frame, and employ a synthesis network to estimate the intermediate frame from warped representations. Our method achieves excellent performance on a broad range of video frame interpolation benchmarks. Code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/srcn-ivl/EBME}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的简单而有效的基于运动的视频帧插值算法。现有的基于运动的插值方法通常依赖于预先训练的光流模型或基于 U-Net 的金字塔网络进行运动估计，这些方法要么模型尺寸较大，要么处理复杂和大型运动情况的能力有限。在这项工作中，通过仔细地将中间导向的前向扭曲、轻量级特征编码器和相关量集成到金字塔循环框架中，我们得出了一个紧凑的模型来同时估计输入帧之间的双向运动。它的尺寸比 PWC-Net 小 15 倍，但能够更可靠、更灵活地处理具有挑战性的运动案例。基于估计的双向运动，我们将输入帧及其上下文特征前向扭曲到中间帧，并采用合成网络从扭曲表示估计中间帧。我们的方法在广泛的视频帧插值基准上实现了出色的性能。代码和训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/srcn-ivl/EBME} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向运动估计的视频帧插值算法，旨在解决现有方法模型过大或处理复杂运动能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于运动的视频帧插值方法依赖预训练光流模型或U-Net金字塔网络，存在模型体积大或处理复杂运动能力有限的缺陷。
AI.method: 通过集成中间导向前向变形、轻量级特征编码器和相关体积到金字塔递归框架中，构建紧凑模型同时估计输入帧间的双向运动。
AI.result: 模型体积仅为PWC-Net的1/15，在多个视频帧插值基准测试中表现优异，能可靠处理复杂运动场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持模型轻量化的同时提升了复杂运动场景的处理能力，为视频帧插值提供了更高效解决方案。

authors_text: Kerong Wang,Hanye Zhao,Xufang Luo,Kan Ren,Weinan Zhang,Dongsheng Li
title: Bootstrapped Transformer for Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于离线强化学习的自举变压器
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims at learning policies from previously collected static trajectory data without interacting with the real environment. Recent works provide a novel perspective by viewing offline RL as a generic sequence generation problem, adopting sequence models such as Transformer architecture to model distributions over trajectories, and repurposing beam search as a planning algorithm. However, the training datasets utilized in general offline RL tasks are quite limited and often suffer from insufficient distribution coverage, which could be harmful to training sequence generation models yet has not drawn enough attention in the previous works. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm named Bootstrapped Transformer, which incorporates the idea of bootstrapping and leverages the learned model to self-generate more offline data to further boost the sequence model training. We conduct extensive experiments on two offline RL benchmarks and demonstrate that our model can largely remedy the existing offline RL training limitations and beat other strong baseline methods. We also analyze the generated pseudo data and the revealed characteristics may shed some light on offline RL training. The codes are available at https://seqml.github.io/bootorl.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims at learning policies from previously collected static trajectory data without interacting with the real environment. Recent works provide a novel perspective by viewing offline RL as a generic sequence generation problem, adopting sequence models such as Transformer architecture to model distributions over trajectories, and repurposing beam search as a planning algorithm. However, the training datasets utilized in general offline RL tasks are quite limited and often suffer from insufficient distribution coverage, which could be harmful to training sequence generation models yet has not drawn enough attention in the previous works. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm named Bootstrapped Transformer, which incorporates the idea of bootstrapping and leverages the learned model to self-generate more offline data to further boost the sequence model training. We conduct extensive experiments on two offline RL benchmarks and demonstrate that our model can largely remedy the existing offline RL training limitations and beat other strong baseline methods. We also analyze the generated pseudo data and the revealed characteristics may shed some light on offline RL training. The codes are available at https://seqml.github.io/bootorl.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）旨在从先前收集的静态轨迹数据中学习策略，而不与真实环境交互。最近的工作提供了一种新颖的视角，将离线强化学习视为通用序列生成问题，采用 Transformer 架构等序列模型来对轨迹上的分布进行建模，并将波束搜索重新用作规划算法。然而，一般离线强化学习任务中使用的训练数据集非常有限，并且往往分布覆盖范围不足，这可能对训练序列生成模型有害，但在之前的工作中尚未引起足够的重视。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Bootstrapped Transformer 的新颖算法，该算法结合了 bootstrapping 的思想，利用学习到的模型自行生成更多离线数据，以进一步促进序列模型训练。我们对两个离线 RL 基准进行了广泛的实验，并证明我们的模型可以在很大程度上弥补现有的离线 RL 训练局限性，并击败其他强大的基线方法。我们还分析了生成的伪数据，所揭示的特征可能为离线强化学习训练提供一些启示。这些代码可在 https://seqml.github.io/bootorl 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Bootstrapped Transformer的新算法，通过自动生成更多离线数据来解决离线强化学习中数据分布覆盖不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习任务的数据集通常存在分布覆盖不足的问题，这会损害序列生成模型的训练效果，但此前研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 结合引导方法，利用已学习的模型自动生成额外的离线数据，以增强序列模型的训练过程。
AI.result: 在两个离线强化学习基准上实验表明，该模型能显著改善现有训练局限性，优于其他强基线方法，并揭示了生成伪数据的特性。
AI.conclusion: Bootstrapped Transformer有效缓解了离线强化学习的训练限制，生成的伪数据可能为该领域提供新的研究视角。

search_text: Bootstrapped Transformer for Offline Reinforcement Learning 用于离线强化学习的自举变压器 Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims at learning policies from previously collected static trajectory data without interacting with the real environment. Recent works provide a novel perspective by viewing offline RL as a generic sequence generation problem, adopting sequence models such as Transformer architecture to model distributions over trajectories, and repurposing beam search as a planning algorithm. However, the training datasets utilized in general offline RL tasks are quite limited and often suffer from insufficient distribution coverage, which could be harmful to training sequence generation models yet has not drawn enough attention in the previous works. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm named Bootstrapped Transformer, which incorporates the idea of bootstrapping and leverages the learned model to self-generate more offline data to further boost the sequence model training. We conduct extensive experiments on two offline RL benchmarks and demonstrate that our model can largely remedy the existing offline RL training limitations and beat other strong baseline methods. We also analyze the generated pseudo data and the revealed characteristics may shed some light on offline RL training. The codes are available at https://seqml.github.io/bootorl. 离线强化学习（RL）旨在从先前收集的静态轨迹数据中学习策略，而不与真实环境交互。最近的工作提供了一种新颖的视角，将离线强化学习视为通用序列生成问题，采用 Transformer 架构等序列模型来对轨迹上的分布进行建模，并将波束搜索重新用作规划算法。然而，一般离线强化学习任务中使用的训练数据集非常有限，并且往往分布覆盖范围不足，这可能对训练序列生成模型有害，但在之前的工作中尚未引起足够的重视。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Bootstrapped Transformer 的新颖算法，该算法结合了 bootstrapping 的思想，利用学习到的模型自行生成更多离线数据，以进一步促进序列模型训练。我们对两个离线 RL 基准进行了广泛的实验，并证明我们的模型可以在很大程度上弥补现有的离线 RL 训练局限性，并击败其他强大的基线方法。我们还分析了生成的伪数据，所揭示的特征可能为离线强化学习训练提供一些启示。这些代码可在 https://seqml.github.io/bootorl 获取。 本文提出一种名为Bootstrapped Transformer的新算法，通过自动生成更多离线数据来解决离线强化学习中数据分布覆盖不足的问题。 Kerong Wang,Hanye Zhao,Xufang Luo,Kan Ren,Weinan Zhang,Dongsheng Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO
